Comment: Travelled wide in midfield after beginning from the widest gate, remained same into straight, ran on steadily near the centre of the track to be closest at finish.
Moderate start, settled just worse than midfield on rails, remained similar turning in, ran home one-paced.
Settled towards the rear, switched out for a clear run over 300 metres out, ran on well down the centre of the track to just fail to get up on line.
Jumped only fairly, ridden to 3rd on rails within striking distance, soon came under pressure to challenge upon straightening, fought on hard to claim race final strides.
Jumped fairly from a middle gate and travelled in midfield, produced good late impression in the run home.
Travelled towards the rear most of way and wide around home bend, ran home one-paced.
Jumped well from a wide gate, briefly in front before shifting to over 2L back in 4th, dropped out tamely inside final 300 metres.
Given reminders to be close up early disputing lead around the bend, one-paced without quickening in home straight.
Slightly slow out, soon picked up to forward of midfield on rails sharing 5th some 3L back around home bend, angled off rails to challenge entering straight, ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all, unable to sustain effort and headed closing stages.
Hard ridden in midfield from the start, gained slightly closer when pace slackened around home bend, soon faded out of contention after straightening.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced keenly in last few, found nothing in straight.
Taken well behind from a poor draw, joint last into straight, made up good ground passing beaten runners.
Missed the break, joined other back-markers approaching home bend, found nothing in home straight.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, made ground 350M, run ended 200M.
Pushed to maintain a prominent spot on the rails, harmed by the fast pace, held ground in straight.
Pressed forward, sat just off the lead 2 wide, not suited by the fast sectionals, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Eased back, 2 wide, suited by the fast pace, checked badly 400M, no progress.
Hard ridden early but not muster, behind midfield, benefited by the fast tempo, lack room 400M, made steady ground when clear.
At rear, suited by the fast pace, trapped 2-4 wide, no progress.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 400M, run ended 100M.
Pushed to hold the rail in front of midfield, no dash.
Took rail, led easily at fast sectionals, dropped off rapidly 400M.
Eased to rear, favoured by the fast tempo, bumped 400M, no turn of foot.
Hard ridden early, at back along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, lack room 4-2, made ground when clear.
In front of midfield, 2 wide, flattened in straight.
Pressed forward, 2 wide, not suited by the fast sectionals, held ground in straight.
Took rail at back, favoured by the fast pace, made steady ground 300M for 2nd.
Settled worse than midfield, 3Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, failed to make any impression.
Settled behind the pace, 2Ls behind the leader, kept on steadily to the line.
Hard ridden forward along the grand rail, checked 750M, dropped off thereafter.
Prominent, checked 900M, travelled 1L behind the pace close to the outer fence, kept on one pace without any serious threat to the first two.
Camped handy, travelled 1.5Ls behind the leader, flattened badly 400M, tailed out.
At rear, travelled 5Ls behind the leader close to the outer fence, finished off nicely for 3rd.
At rear, travelled 5Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, made some ground over the latter stages.
Driven forward to take the outer fence, travelled nicely throughout the race, however got beaten by an impressive winner by 2-3/4Ls.
Settled worse than midfield, 3.5Ls behind the leader close to outer fence, kept on steadily to the line.
Prominent, travelled 1.5Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, kept on fairly and weakened 100M.
Settled 2Ls behind the pace close to the grand rail, made some steady ground to get 4th despite travelling greenly in the early stages.
Midfield early, gradually improved after 700M, accelerated strongly to take the victory by 2-3/4Ls.
At rear, travelled 6Ls behind the leader along the grand rail, never ran on.
Prominent, travelled 1.5Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, never respond when asked 400M and eased down 150M.
Outpaced, settling at rear along fence. Switched out turning for home and ran on fairly in straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped well, used from outside draw to lead 1100m, crossing to fence 1000m and steadying pace. Kicked clear 400m and easily held off challenges.
Began well, pressed forward, cutting to rail 1000m about 2L from leader. Urged forward 350m but unable catch leader and lost second placing on the post.
Jumped OK but outpaced, dropping to rear 3-wide. Kept wide around turn, taken to centre track in straight and finished off nicely.
Began OK, ridden along between horses, before selling midfield but 3-wide. Taken wider in straight but only one-paced under hard riding,
Pushed early to hold one-off position in midfield. Caught behind horses turning for home, got close to heels 200m, one-paced.
Quickly into stride, leading field initially before easing into box seat 3L from leader. Put under pressure 400m, kept on fairly till flattened close home.
Ridden along early, settling 3-back along fence. Switched out turning for home, but awkwardly placed halfway up the straight, then one-paced.
Allowed to slide forward without being pushed, settling third in one-off position 3L from leader. Hard ridden from 400m but only one-paced.
Taken in to find cover but shuffled towards rear in one-off position. Put under pressure turning for home, lay in early straight, and finished strongly final 200m.
Began fairly, outpaced and soon at rear in one-off position. Trailed field thereafter.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, settling ahead of midfield but without cover. Kept wide thought and boxed on one-paced in straight.
Jumped with field, not pushed, selling along fence in midfield. Lost position around turn and one-paced in straight.
Began fairly, outpaced, settling at rear along fence. Switched out turning for home but found little under pressure.
Pressed forward from wide draw to sit outside hind quarters of leader. Rolled forward 500m, hit front 400m, overtaken 200m but fought back to win on the line.
Jumped well, pressed forward, settling 2L behind leading pair. Kept on steadily early in straight before tiring final 200m.
Slow into stride, settling at rear in one-off position. Improved position around turn, taken very wide in straight, ran on strongly.
Began well, ridden forward in one-off position 3L from leader. Urged forward top of straight and ran on steadily.
Hard ridden to stay with pacemakers but kept 3-wide without cover from 1300m. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Slow into stride, no early pace and settled at rear along fence. Switched out in straight but held for run 300m, then one-paced.
Began OK, ridden along fence 3-back from leader but lost position around turn, dropping to last 500m. Ran past tired horses close home.
Allowed to stride at own pace, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Improved around turn, rolled forward 400m, hit front 200m, battled but caught on line.
Shifted in from wide draw soon after start but kept 3-wide towards the rear. Made some progress around turn but one-paced in straight.
Ridden along to hold forward position 3L from leader. Improved position turning for home, looked chance 400m, then one-paced.
Jumped well, rolled forward to lead passing 1400m. Set good pace until caught 400m, gave ground gradually.
Not pushed early, racing behind midfield but wide. Kept on fairly in straight to 200m when tired and faded.
Urged forward from inside draw to hold rail 4L from leader. Put under pressure top of straight but found little and faded.
Began fairly then raced ungenerously, dropping to last. Tagged on to field 450m, switched wide and finished off nicely.
Raced in worse than midfield along the rail, 4L behind the leader, not suited to the slow pace, no dash in the Straight.
At the rear along the rail, 6L behind the leader, not suited to the slow pace, made no impression in the Straight.
At the rear, 6-3/4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, not competitive throughout.
Settled in midfield, 3L off the pace 3 wide without over, suited to the slow tempo, finished off well for 4th.
From the widest barrier, settled in worse than midfield, 4-3/4L off 3 wide with cover, not suited to the slow tempo, kept challenging until to the line, beaten only by 1/2L.
Urged forward to take the rail and led by a short head, suited to the slow pace, found no extra and headed at 150M.
Urged forward and sat outside the leader, suited to the slow tempo, dropped off after 250M.
Travelled in midfield, 2L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited to the slow tempo, finished off only one paced.
Eased back, sat 5-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, unleashed strongly from 300M to score.
Raced in midfield along the rail, 3L off the pace, not suited to the slow tempo, one paced home.
Settled in worse than midfield along the rail, 4-1/2L behind the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, did not improve in the Straight.
Prominent, travelled 1L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on well for 3rd.
Urged forward to obtain box-seat, travelled 1-1/2L behind the leader, little dash after straightening, weakened at 200M.
Crowded for room at start, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Switched out entering straight and ran on steadily.
Raced fiercely soon after start and difficult to settle, dropping to rear. Bumped and unbalanced turn, switched out in straight and ran on fairly.
Bounced well, not pushed, settling two-back along fence. Stayed on fence entering straight but blocked for run until near 100m, boxed on.
Began OK, allowed to stride forward, settling midfield but wide. Improved position early in straight, turning one-paced final 200m.
Hard ridden to hold forward position but held three-wide without cover 3L from leaders. Rolled forward top of straight, hit front 300m, run down close to line.
Jumped with field, ridden to maintain forward position 3L from leaders. No clear run early in straight, looked a chance 200m, no extra close home.
Began well, pushed forward, settling one-back, one-off. Urged forward on straightening, joined leaders 300m, unable hold off first two final stages.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground along fence, got close to heels 800m and dropped back to near rear. Never likely thereafter.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners settling at rear in one-off position. Began forward move 600m, swung wide into straight, finished strongly to win close home.
Quickly into stride, hard ridden to go forward joining leader passing 850m. Under pressure from 400m, kept on gamely to 200m before tiring.
Jumped well, ridden to hold box seat 2L from leaders. Came off fence turning for home, kept on fairly until getting close to heels 200m.
Urged forward but wide, settling behind midfield. Improved position around turn, blocked for run early in straight, ran on steadily when clear.
Began well, hard ridden to lead until 850m when joined by another. Travelled well to 400m when failed to respond under pressure. Eased down final 200m. Unacceptable performance
Began awkwardly, shifted across behind runners, settling towards rear along rail. Reluctant to hold position around turn, found little in straight under pressure.
Chased pace, moved up to challenge leader 300M, hit lead 150M, kept on well closing stages under top weight.
Sat in 3rd chasing the pace, always in firing line, faded passing halfway point, first to be beaten.
Towards the rear in a compact field early stages, made good headway when driven out 450M, held by winner final 100M.
Obtained lead along stand's rail, gave only limited response when driven 450M, soon headed, weakened towards finish.
In mid-division early, shuffled back to last passing halfway, ran past well beaten horses only over final 300M, never reached contention.
Did not find the early speed to lead, settled on the outside of field chasing leaders, found little under pressure over final 400M, never involved. (No Vet findings.)
At the back of the field but never too far off the pace, stayed on well final 400M to claim 5th but no serious threat to leaders.
Always close up, vied for lead mid-stages before taking over nearing 400M, headed 150M and weakened to 4th late.
Never far off from pace, held up nearing 200M when making his challenge, did best work final states when clear, nearest finish.
Along the stand's rail in 6th place, had no clear run until 100M, made mild gains when clear.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners, settling at rear in one-off position. Taken very wide in straight and ran on steadily.
Bounced well, ridden along inside early leader before settling one-back, one-off. Lost position turning for home, but kept on gamely to line.
Hard ridden to go forward but didn't muster and eased off 1000m, settling at rear. Left fence 600m, shifted out and bumped 400m, finished strongly to win close home.
Pressed forward to stay with pace but forced to race wide and left without cover from 1000m. Wide into turn, kept on fairly to 200m before fading.
Pressed forward but wide, settling 3L behind leader. Left without cover from 1000m, ran on steadily in straight until getting close to heels final stages.
Urged forward to hold box seat soon after start, keeping tabs on leader to straight when blocked for run. Spent force passing 200m.
Began OK, ridden along between horses, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Improved around turn, kept on to 200m when one-paced.
Pressed forward from start, settling a half length outside leader passing 800m. Hit front on straightening, pulled clear 200m, run down close to line.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners, settling at rear. Last into straight, switched wide, ran on steadily.
Jumped with field, ridden along between horses 3L from leader. Blocked for run early in straight, boxed on gamely when clear.
Quickly into stride, pushed forward to lead on settling before crossing to fence. Joined up front turning for home, kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Began OK, not pushed, holding fence 3-back from leader. Stayed on fence throughout without looking dangerous.
Began awkwardly, but recovered quickly to take a share of the lead, 2-3 wide. Under pressure before the turn, dropping out quickly in the straight to be tailed off by 35L. Unacceptable performance.
Began OK and pushed forward to eventually sit forward of midfield, 3 wide. Came wider on the turn, and worked to the line well. Held out a fast finishing 4th late.

Slow to begin before pushing forward to be placed midfield, on the fence. Moved forward steadily mid race to be well place on the turn. Never responded in the straight, dropping out quickly and easing out late.

OK away, dropping back early to be midfield, 1 off the fence. Had to go searching for a run, before finding open air from the 150m. Ran strongly to the line, and had the nose in front 20m out before winner kicked again.
Broke well from the inside draw, and pushed forward early to take the lead. Still in front at the 350m, before fading out and not pushed to the line.

OK away and settled forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Unsettled early and had a tendency to get to get his head up when racing on heels early/mid race. Ran on steadily to the line, before peaking at 75m.

Looked to push forward early, but dropped back to find cover, midfield and 3 wide. Dropped back to be last, and widest on the turn. Widest in the straight and ran on strongly, but left with too much to do.
Dropped back from the kick to sit at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Last on the turn and ran on well initially, before dropping out from the 150 and easing late.

Drew widest and dropped back from the jump to be 4th last early, 7L off the leaders. Ridden for luck in the straight, with a gap opening up 400m. Went to the line strongly with minimal urging. Kicked again when challenged late.
Began well, and pushed forward from the wide draw to be handily placed, but stuck 3 wide with no cover. Well placed on the turn, but never responded to urging and went flat to the line.
Dropped back from the wide draw to be in the last pair, on the fence. Had difficulty getting a run early in the straight, but ran on steadily when clear from the 200m, without ever threatening.
Began well and taken forward to be handily placed behind the leaders, 1 off the fence. Only plugged away in the straight, and fading before coming off heels 100m and easing out.
Only fairly away and pushed hard early to make up ground, eventually being handily placed 5th, on the rail. Led at the 250m mark, but began to fade, and not vigorously pushed to the line.
Dropped back from the jump sit at the back of the field, 1 off the fence and 9L off the leaders. Never responded and went to the line meekly, only passing two being eased out.
Slowly away, recovered to race in midfield, saved ground on turn, no clear running early in straight, made some progress thereafter to make frame.
Slightly slowly away, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back behind midfield, there to turn, held up for clear running early in straight, finished off evenly when clear thereafter.
Average to begin, raced 4 lengths back in midfield, 3 wide with cover on turn, finished off well in straight to get 3rd.
Jumped with them, raced 6 lengths back at rear, 3 wide with cover on turn, angled out early in straight, closed off very strongly to get 2nd.
Jumped well from the widest draw, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide in 4th, no cover on turn, weakened after turning in when hard run took toll.
Away with them, sent forward to race prominently, 2 wide in 3rd on turn, took the lead 400M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away, raced 1 to 2 lengths back on rail, saved ground on turn, in traffic early in straight, finished off evenly.
Crowded out start, raced 6 lengths back at tail, saved ground on turn, kept to inside and got traffic early in straight, finished off evenly thereafter.
Away with them, raced 3 to 4 lengths back on rail behind midfield, saved ground on turn, no daylight early in straight, made minor progress when clear final 200M.
Began well, positioned 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, made reasonable progress in straight without threatening.

Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, bumped near 850M, positioned a length behind the leader on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked near 200M, one-paced thereafter.
Taken back from a tricky gate, raced 7 lengths back at tail, still last turning in, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to score.

Moderately away from gate 13, difficult to settle early and unable to find cover, improved into the lead near the first turn, emptied early in straight and dropped out tamely. (Unacceptable performance.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in 6th, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight, eased final 100M. (Bled from both nostrils.)
Briefly in front after leaving the widest gate, remained prominent to straight, folded up quickly.
Taken well back from a wide gate, remained in last and widest into straight, made good progress near the centre of the track.

Broke well from a poor gate, raced very wide in midfield down back straight before moving forward to a prominent position passing the 800 metres, chased leader into straight but folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.
Never on terms.
Closer up early stages before shuffled back behind midfield around the 1000-metre bend, travelled 3-wide but with cover down far side, made no impression from a similar position into straight.
Jumped fairly, niggled along on rails in handy position, taken back to just behind the leader from the Rock, gradually weakened after straightening.
Settled in midfield or just worse, did not find much room early in straight, made up some late ground close to home.
Moderate start, soon recovered to midfield on rails, angled off rails to challenge upon straightening, ran on well without troubling the winner.
Settled well behind, commenced move at top of home bend and snuck up on rails turning in, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Ridden to lead and virtually made all, kicked over 2L clear about 100 metres out, won readily.
Began fairly settling within striking distance in 4th, shuffled back to 5th leaving the Rock and similar into straight, fought on steadily without threatening in the run home.
Broke well from a wide gate to be prominent early stages, shifted back to 3-wide in midfield far side, kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in the run home.
Very slow away, midfield 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, demonstrated good finishing efforts 200M.
Eased at start, trapped 2-3 wide at rear, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 100M.
Eased at start, too cover at rear, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 100M.
Hard ridden forward, took rail and led at slow sectionals, hung on until 200M emptied.
Crossed in front easily, sat just off the leader 2 wide, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on strongly 300M to score.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 250M.
Settled nicely in box seat, lack room 300M, ran on well for 3rd.
Checked shortly after start, at back 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, made some ground 200M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, 3 back on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, no dash.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, dashed well 300M despite not suited by the slow pace, lack room 150M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide just off the slow pace, held ground in straight for 2nd.
Eased at start, took rail at back, harmed by the slow tempo, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M, held up 150M.
Taken back from a wide draw, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, finished off strongly down the center of the track for 2nd in a tight finish.
Taken back from a wide gate, 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, closed to the line well.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Settled worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, made minor ground in straight.
Settled midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, kept on one pace without any threats.
Rolled forward to take the fence and led by good pace, dropped off badly soon after straightening.
Pushed to settle midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on well for 3rd in a tight finish.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, kept on steadily until final stages weakened.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader at good pace, responded well to take the victory by 3/4L.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 4th in a tight finish.
Prominent, however trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, weakened soon after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, made no impression in straight.
Crowded start, pressed forward, holding box seat. Hard ridden to hold position from 700m and faded quickly soon after straightening.
Began well, led for a couple of strides before sliding into one-off, one-back position. Battled on gamely early straight but tired after passing 200m.
Jumped with field, pressed forward, holding rail 2-back from leader. Picked up momentum on straightening and ran on strongly.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Not much room early in straight but finished off nicely when clear.
Pressed forward from inside draw to lead on settling then set steady tempo to 150m when flattened and faded.
Pressed forward from a wide draw to sit outside leader first turn and back stretch. Kept on strongly to 200m when flattened and faded.
Outpaced early, dropping to rear along fence. Stayed on fence turning for home and ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Hard ridden early but unable to hold position, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Under pressure from 700m but one-paced. Substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Slow, pressed forward but wide, settling in midfield back stretch. Boxed on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.
Began awkwardly, bumped, pressed forward, settling behind midfield along rail back stretch. Shifted out 300m, finished strongly to just get up in time.
Ridden along from wide draw, settling midfield in one-off position. Switched out entering straight and finished strongly to just miss.
Ridden to grab forward position from an outside draw, racing wide without cover 1.5L from leader. Kept on well to 200m before tiring.
Pressed forward but wide outside early leader to first turn but unable hold position dropping back to last entering straight. Unacceptable performance.
Crowded out at start, ridden to hold rail 3-back from leader. Kept on fairly early in straight before tiring final stages.
Steadied shortly after start, settling midfield in one-off position back stretch. Taken wide in straight, kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Ridden to hold forward position, settling one-back, one-off back stretch. Looked chance top of straight but one-paced final 200m.
Restrained on jumping, shifted in behind runners to rail 5-back from leader. Switched out 800m, wide into straight, finished strongly to win in final strides.
Hard ridden inside leader but unable hold ground and crossed. Followed leader to 500m when taken wide and gave ground abruptly. Unacceptable performance.
Taken in from an outside draw, settling towards rear but away from fence. Taken wide entering straight and finished off strongly.
Lifted leg at start and lost considerable ground, trailing field before making ground around turn. Steadied 150m when finishing off strongly.
Shifted across behind runners, settling at rear 10L from leader. Urged forward 600m, got split top of straight, hit front 100m, run down final strides.
Began well, crossing to rail 3-back from leader. Made progress early straight to look chance 200m before flattened and dropping back.
Quickly into stride, grabbing box seat. Came off fence 600m, surged forward top of straight, led 250m, flattened 100m.
Jumped well, pressed forward to lead before cutting to fence. Set strong tempo to straight when collared and gave ground quickly.
Always at the rear, never a factor.
Settled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind the leader 3 wide without cover, dropped off when rounding Home Turn, did not run on.
Prominent, 3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, little dash after straightening, after that one paced and eased down at final 50M.
Urged forward to take the rail and led by short head, headed at 200M, did not run on thereafter.
Driven forward to obtain box-seat, sat 2L behind the leader, kept on steadily to the line.
Raced in midfield, 2-3/4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, finished off only one paced.
Settled in worse than midfield, 5-1/2L off the pace 3 wide with cover, remained widest in the Straight, finished off well for 3rd.
Pushed forward and sat just outside the leader, found no extra from 150M.
At rear, 7-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, not competitive throughout.
Sat towards the rear along the rail 6L behind, kept pushing to the line, only beaten by a short head.
In midfield along the rail, 4L behind the leader, ran home okay once obtained clear running from 200M.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, strong dash from 200M, held off close challenge to score by a short head.
Began well, not pushed settling 2-back from leader in one-off position. Put under pressure top of straight but only one-paced.
Slow into stride, restrained and shifted across behind runners in last place. Put under pressure 400m but failed to quicken.
Began fairly, then crowded out dropping to rear along fence. Improved position final turn, ran on solidly in straight to be closest at finish.
Got off OK, ridden along behind midfield in one-off position. Switched out entering straight and ran on steadily.
No early speed and soon at rear along rail. Stayed on rail entering straight and ran past tired horses.
Pressed forward outside leader from wide draw before settling one-back, one-off. Gave ground gradually soon after straitening.
Pressed forward from wide draw before cutting in 1500m and moving to within a half length of leader back stretch. Kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Bumped start, then unbalanced, dropping to rear in one-off position. Switched out on straightening but found nothing.
Pressed forward but wide to lead on settling before crossing to fence first turn. Slowed pace back stretch, kicked head 300m, run down on line.
Quickly into stride, grabbing box seat on settling, tailing leader to straight. Got inside run when leader went wide, battled on gamely to just miss.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, settled along rail 4L from leader. Picked up speed top of straight and ran on strongly to win close home.
Began fairly, hard ridden but failed to muster and left wide without cover 3L behind leader from 1500m. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Shifted across behind horses from widest gate, 7Ls back on the fence middle stages, stayed on only fairly on straightening, no threat to leaders.
Settled down 6Ls behind midfield, made limited progress only over final 300M.
Pushed along to sit just behind leader, ran on well but couldn't hold off winner final 100M.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, kept on same pace early straight, never reached contention.
Towards the rear 7-8Ls off the pace, ran on mildly turning home not getting to leaders.
In mid-division, stayed on moderately for non-threatening 4th.
Began awkwardly, allowed an uncontested lead, fought on well early straight, headed near 100M, faded towards finish. (superficial wound to LH leg.)
In 5th place 3-4Ls off the pace, stayed on for 3rd but always held by first two.
Never far off, 2.5Ls back in 4th making the home turn, ran on strongly to lead 50M.
Taken across behind runners from 11, 9Ls back in 2nd last, not quickened when driven along 400M, never involved.
Chased leader along the fence, kept on same pace to 100M, unable to sustain run late stages.
Detached from field from early stages, over 10Ls off the pace, never involved at any stage. (No Vet findings.)
Soon dropped towards the rear, saved ground turning in, kept on at the one pace in the run home.
Slightly slowly away from the one draw, soon took up running and led until headed inside the 300 metres, found no extra.
Broke well from a middle draw, settled within striking distance one off the rails, ran on to hit the front over 150 metres out, soon drew clear.
Trailed the field to straight, only ran past well-beaten horses.
Began from the widest gate, remained wide and well behind, ran home one-paced.
Broke well, travelled in 2nd just outside the leader, hit the front briefly inside the 300 metres out but soon headed, lost 2nd final strides.
Broke well from a poor draw, soon in last few, made steady headway down inside of straight to reach 2nd late.
Jumped moderately, gradually settled just off the pace on rails, still close up after straightening but unable to sustain run inside final 200 metres.
Settled behind midfield from a wide gate, switched for a run upon straightening, ran home one-paced.
Slightly slow out, soon recovered to forward of midfield, found nothing in straight.
From a wide draw, ridden early settling 3-wide without cover in a prominent position, soon faded after straightening.
Jumped fairly, settled in midfield on rails, switched our for a run upon straightening, fought on steadily without quickening.
Never competitive at rear.
At rear, 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, no dash.
Pressed forward, shared the lead in 2 wide at fast sectionals, hung on well until 200M emptied.
Pressed forward, not suited by the fast pace, blocked most straight, ran on ok, on heels 50M.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, suited by the fast tempo, however, blocked most straight, not fully tested.
Eased to rear, took rail, benefited by the fast pace, closed off strongly 200M.
Box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, held ground in straight, checked 100M.
Pushed forward, took rail and shared the lead at fast sectionals, dropped off quickly 400M.
Pushed early, took rail at back, benefited by the fast pace, lack room in straight, ran on fairly.
Failed to muster, midfield 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground 400M, run ended 100M.
Pushed forward, 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, ran on until 200M flattened.
At rear, 2 wide, benefited by the fast pace, made steady ground 300M.
Settled in midfield, suited by the fast sectionals, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Very slow away, trapped 3 wide at back, moved forward 1100M, flattened 250M.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, broken down 200M.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader at slow tempo, kept on one pace to the line for 3rd.
Taken back from a wide barrier, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the slow pace, dashed well to score when clear 300M.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the slow tempo, ran home nicely.
Pushed forward to settle in a prominent position, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, one paced home and weakened 150M.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the slow sectionals, made some ground in straight.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, not suited by the slow pace, never ran on and weakened 300M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, not suited by the slow pace, made minor ground in straight.
Pushed forward to obtain the box seat, benefited by the slow pace, kept on steadily to the line for 4th.
Driven forward to take the fence and led by 1L at slow sectionals, kept on strongly until headed by the winner over the last couple of strides.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never ran on.
Bumped start, pressed forward along outer rail to within 4L of leader, turning one-paced final 400m.
Hard ridden but didn't muster, racing on own down centre field towards rear. Under pressure 500m and faded.
Jumped well, not pushed, settling midfield 3-away from outer fence. Raced tight 400m, lay out under pressure 200m, kept on strongly.
Jumped well, ridden along close to pace. Hampered 300m, switched in to get run but one-paced.
Outpaced and soon a distant last. Trailed field to 200m before running pas beaten horses.
Jumped with field, allowed to stride forward along outer fence 1.5L from leader. Switched in 400m for clear run and finished off strongly.
Began OK, ridden but didn't muster, gradually dropping to rear along centre field. Kept on fairly to 400m when spent force and faded.
Began fairly, taken closer to outer fence 800m, ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Began OK, switched out, settling at rear between horses. Switched in for run 500m, finished strongly down centre track.
Quickly into stride, led on settling, set steady pace to 250m when caught and gave ground gradually.
Outpaced early, taken to outer fence, settling towards rear. Never in the hunt.
Pressed forward, sharing early pace till settling 2L behind leader 3-away from outer fence. One-paced under pressure final 400m.
Bumped start, pressed forward to sit in slipstream of leaders. Put under pressure 400m but only one-paced.
Began well, switched out, settling inside leader, a half length behind. Shaken up 350m, hit front 250m, kept on strongly, holding off challenges.
Blundered badly when gates opened, ridden forward, settling middle in one-off position. Kept on fairly to 200m before fading. Bled from both nostrils.
Ridden to hold forward position, settling one-off, one-back. Urged forward final turn, hit front 250m, pulled clear.
Pressed forward but wide without cover 3L from leader. Unbalanced turn, lost position rapidly, finished tailed off. Unacceptable performance.
Pressed forward to grab box seat but tended to over-race. Kept on well to 300m before tiring.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward, settling 3-back from leader back stretch. Hard ridden turning for home but did not respond.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw, settling towards rear but wide. Taken to centre field in straight and finished off strongly.
Began awkwardly, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Taken out around final turn, wide in straight, ran on strongly.
Began well, pressed forward, settling behind leader back stretch. Urged forward from 600m, hit front 400m, overtaken 250m, faded.
Quickly into stride to lead on settling along rail. Kicked 2L clear back stretch. Joined up from 400m, kept on to 250m when flattened.
Shifted across behind runners from an outside draw, settling behind midfield but wide. Covered extra group turn, one-paced in straight.
Outpaced, settling at rear along fence. Improved position around turn, kept on steadily in straight.
Ridden but slow to muster, steadied 1400m then left wide without cover 3L from leader. Kept on gamely in straight to be closest at finish.
Blundered shortly after start, restrained, shifted across behind runners but away from fence. Dropped to last entering straight, ran on fairly.
Began OK but raced fiercely till settling behind midfield back stretch. Found little when put under pressure in straight.
Raced in worse than midfield, 5-3/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite suited to the fast tempo, did not obtain clear running until 200M.
Always at the rear, not a factor.
At rear, 9L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, ran home fairly.
Settled behind the leader, 1-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, not suited to the quick tempo, dropped off approaching 250M.
In front of midfield, 3-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, not suited to the fast pace, run ended at 150M.
Raced in worse than midfield along the rail 6-1/4L off the pace, suited to the quick tempo, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, 4-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited to the fast tempo, remained one-paced to the line.
Settled in midfield, 4-1/2L off the pace 3 wide without cover, was up with the pace early in the Straight, weakened passing 300M.
In box-seat until 700M, weakened badly when rounding turn.
Settled in worse than midfield, 6L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, suited to the fast pace, ran on well for 2nd, only beaten by a huge run.
Settled in midfield along the rail 4-1/4L behind, despite the fast tempo, finished off steadily from final 250M.
Rolled forward and sat inside the leader along the rail, harmed by the fast tempo, dropped off from final 200M.
Rolled forward to lead by a short head at quick sectionals, dashed strongly from 250M to score.
Travelled at the rear along the rail 7-3/4L off the pace, suited to the quick tempo, finished off well for 3rd.
Bumped start, pressed forward to lead on settling and steadied tempo. Overtaken 700m, ridden but did not respond, gave ground steadily. Unacceptable performance.
Jumped well, pressed forward one-back, one-off. Found little when put under pressure 400m, hampered 150m when tiring.
Bumped start, ridden along, grabbing rail 3-back from leader. Left fence turning for home and ran on steadily in straight.
Outpaced, soon at rear, dropping to last 800m. Still last 200m, switched wide and finished off nicely.
Began fairly, ridden forward along rail 3-back from leader. Off fence 700m, clear run 450m, finished off strongly for easy win.
Ridden along but wide before getting cover towards rear by turn. Widest in straight, finished strongly down centre track.
Began well, ridden to hold box seat before turn. Lost position entering straight but boxed on one-paced. Substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Pressed forward but wide to sit outside leader passing 1000m. Taken to front 700m, led to 250m when overhauled and faded.
Switched across behind runners from outside draw, settling at rear along fence. Not much room top of straight, got split 130m, finished off well.
Ridden to hold forward position, settling two-back, one-off. Taken wide in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Pressed forward, racing 3-wide 2L behind leader at 800m. Lost position around turn, gave ground steadily in straight.
Began OK, ridden along behind midfield in one-off position. Turned wide but only one-pace in straight.
Slotted into a 3-wide spot in midfield but soon without cover, improved to race outside the lead 900M, quickened to a 2.5L lead 250M, continued on and maintained that advantage to the line.
Restrained behind midfield, inclined to lay out and proved difficult to ride, strode forward when left with no cover 800M, held 2nd to near 150M, no extra late stages.
Lost a considerable amount of ground when blundered badly on jumping, 5-6Ls back near the rear, 3-wide bid 600M out but never going the pace to challenge.
Settled down 4Ls back in midfield, shuffled back to near the rear home turn and had little to offer, soon beaten.
Initially settled in 5th, moved up to the fore passing 1000M, outsprinted by rivals 300M, gradually weakened.
Slow to begin, detached from the field middle stages, not made up ground when placed under pressure, never involved. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Taken back from wide barrier, 3-wide towards the rear, mover closer to pace when pace slackened in mid-stages, swung home 4-wide, in contention for minor placing until 50M, faded.
Close up to the pace first half, fell back to midfield approaching home turn, finished best of the chasing pack over final 300M, got up for 2nd late but no impression on runaway winner.
Tracked leaders early stages, shuffled back to midfield when paced slackened mid-stages, kept on only fairly in straight and never looked likely.
Towards the rear in the first half of the race, switched to 3-wide nearing home turn and crept closer to pace 600M, finished with a steady bid but no threat to winner.
Switched off to near the rear 7Ls back, not helped by the slackening pace middle stages, taken wide 600M, stayed on moderately for 3rd but not reached winner.
Failed to muster despite ridden, ended up in a position behind midfield, not picked up entering straight, gradually weakened.
Bustled along after the jump, caught wide until joining leader 1200M, tracked leaders home turn, keeping on same pace in straight, weakened out of contention inside 200M.
Crossed to the lead 1300M but relinquished that position down the back-straight, still close enough turning home, finished off evenly but couldn't get to winner.
Pressed forward to lead on settling but put under pressure 800m before pulling clear around turn. Joined 400m, kept on to 100m before tiring.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling one-back, one-off. Rolled forward top of straight, looked chance 200m before tiring.
Jumped well, pressed forward 3-wide to sit outside leader, before easing 1L behind at turn. Joined leader top of straight, kept on till flattened 100m.
Ridden forward from inside draw, settling two-back from leader. Switched out in straight, ran on fairly to 200m, turning one-paced.
Bumped shortly after start, pressed forward but didn't settle, dropping behind leading pair at turn. Kept on fairly to 200m before fading.
Ridden along from an outside draw and left without cover from 800m towards the rear. Never in the hunt.
Began OK, not pushed, dropping to rear but wide. Bumped, unbalanced 700m, under pressure 500m didn't respond. Faded.
Began fairly, hard ridden to go forward, two-back, one-off. Swung wide entering straight, boxed on gamely under hard riding.
Slow into stride, settling at rear. Left fence turning for home and ran on fairly in straight. Rider reported abnormal breathing noises.
Steadied soon after jump and shifted across behind runners towards rail at rear. Came off fence entering straight but only one-paced.
Began well, restrained and taken to fence 5L from leader. Switched out 400m for clear run, hit front 220m, pulled clear.
Jumped well, not pushed, settling midfield in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished off nicely.
Outpaced early, slipping behind midfield along fence. Switched out turning for home and ran on steadily in straight.
Began fairly, checked 1100m and then over-raced, dropping to rear. Never likely.
OK away, and sat at the rear of the field, 3 wide and tending to over race early. Came widest round the turn. Plugged away in the straight, making up some ground late.

Began OK, but over racing early and dropped back to be 3rd last, on the rails. Checked off heels 950m. Came off heels at the 300m looking for room, moving from the rails to 7-8 wide and only battled on fairly.
Began OK, and handily placed early, on the rails. Lost a run when looking to progress at 250m, and switched inside before coming off heels again 150m. Ran on OK when clear late.
Slow to begin and dropped back to sit last, on the rail. One paced in the straight, and never ran on.
Drew widest and came to midfield. Stuck 3-4 wide, so pushed forward to take the lead from 1000m. Led at the 400m, but faded from that point and dropped back quickly from 250m.

Pushed forward from the wide draw to be the early leader, 1 off the fence, before being crossed at the 1000m. Commanding position at the top of the straight, and ran on well initially. Weakened late, and just held 3rd.
Began well and punched forward early to lead, before being crossed at 1000m and settling 4th. Pushed from the 400m, but never responded, and dropped back quickly before easing late.
Pushed forward initially, but dropped back to settle midfield, 3 wide with cover. Came wider on the turn, and loomed up from the 200m. Worked hard to the line, and pushed by 2nd. Just got there late.

Pushed forward from the kick to be handily place, 1 off the fence. Ran well in the straight, and led at the 200m. Challenged by the winner soon after. Never gave up but peaked near the line, and lost the win late.
Began awkwardly and dropped back from the wide barrier to sit worse than midfield, 3-4 wide. Raced greenly and off heels 1100m. Never responded in the straight, and faded out.

Didn't kick early, and stuck 3 wide, initially worse than midfield but pushing to 4th by the 900m. Still 3 wide leading into the turn, but well placed up front. Plugged away to the line, losing ground late.

OK away before settling midfield, on the rail. Crowded and lost ground at 900m, before being steadied off heels and losing ground at 700m. Limited opportunities in the straight. Not vigorously pressed last 100m.
OK away and settled in midfield, 1 off the fence. Got clear running from the 250m, and ran to the line OK, wearing down 3rd but without threatening the first 2.
Dropped back early to settle worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Boxed in at the top of the straight. Ran well when clear, running the 2nd fastest last 400m.
Slow out, never seen with a chance despite repeated reminders while in rear of field.

Broke from a wide draw, with leaders early before shifting back to just better than midfield in 4th or 5th, came under pressure around the bend, fought hard to hold some chance inside final 200 metres out, but outsprinted close to home.
Worked hard from a wide draw to join the leader entering home straight the first time, remained well there until weakening badly 400 metres out.
Ridden early, settled just better than midfield in 4th, renewed pressure around final bend, fought on steadily but had interruptions run towards finish.
Jumped well settling just worse than midfield, slightly worse entering final straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Moderate start, always in last few.
Moderate start, soon recovered to midfield on rails, came under strong pressure to challenge entering straight, ran on to claim 3rd late.
Settled in last few, moved slightly closer up towards midfield far side, wide entering home straight, never nearer.
Jumped fairly but soon dropped to rear of midfield despite ridden along, remained similar until commenced move rounding home bend, gained upper hand under pressure 100 metres out.
Began well, never far off most of way to the 100 metres, dropped away quickly.
Soon took up running setting slow fractions in midway, folded up quickly inside final 150 metres.
Trailed the field most of way, saved ground turning in, ran on past well-beaten horses in the run home.
Pushed forward, 2 wide just off the leader, benefited by the slow tempo, soon out of fuel 300M.
Determined to hold the rail in midfield, not suited by the slow tempo, unleashed strong finishing efforts 250M to score.
Eased back but trapped wide, harmed by the slow pace, never progressed.
Eased at start, took rail behind the field, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot.
Settled in box seat, enjoyed the slow sectionals, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, harmed by the slow pace, emptied 300M.
Eased to sit just off the leaders 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Midfield 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Took rail and led easily at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on well until 50M overhauled.
Eased to rear, never a factor.
Eased at start, too cover at back, 2 wide, dashed well 200M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 250M.
Pushed forward to obtain the box seat, suite by the slow sectionals, kept on steadily until final 100M weakened.
Settled in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the slow tempo, dashed well to score by 1/2L.
Hard ridden along to settle in midfield, harmed by the slow pace, kept on one pace and weakened 150M.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never looked likely.
Eased back from a wide gate, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the slow sectionals, made some ground in straight.
Camped midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the slow sectionals, ran home well for 3rd.
Taken back from a wide barrier, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited by the slow pace, never ran on.
Camped handy, however trapped wide without cover throughout, one paced and weakened 100M.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the slow tempo, ran on nicely.
Jumped slowly, then rolled to settle in a prominent position, soon flattened after straightening. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Sent forward to take the fence and led at slow pace, kept on strongly until headed by the winner over the last couple of strides.
Crowded start & taken back from wide gate, sat last pair on rail, over-raced 1000m, driven 450m, kept on one pace.
Snagged back at break, raced 1 off with cover near tail, niggled 600m, driven into stretch, ran on for minor headway.
Broke ok & ridden from wide gate to sit 5th on rail, ridden along 400m, shifted out on turn, progress to 3rd 300m, driven to lead 120m, drew clear.
Started ok but lacked toe & rousted early, drifted back & niggled along 1 off with cover behind midfield, under pump 400m, wide into stretch, kept on moderately.
Sharp start, raced rail 1 back, shaken up 400m & grinding pursuit to lead 150m, all out & headed 120m, no extra.
Broke well, settled rail midfield, ridden along 400m, shifted out in stretch, ran on for closing 3rd at wire.
Restrained from widest gate, anchored last pair 1 off, over-raced 1000m, niggled 750m, under pump at tail turning in, plugged on evenly.
Broke ok, raced midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 500m, found nil in weakening run home.
Speed to led, to rail 1200m & set tempo, extended 1.5L clear turning in & driven, emptied 200m & soon headed, faded out.
Tardy break & midfield 3 wide no cover 1st turn, rolled to 4th 1 off 1 back, niggled 700m & scrubbed along 600m, struggled in fading run home.
Slow start & bustled, raced rail near rear, ridden along 450m, boxed on for minor inroads.
Broke well & rousted early to race 2nd 1 off no cover, under pump 500m, emptied turning in & faded out.
Taken back from wide gate, soon at tail 1 off, hard-ridden turning in, plugged on evenly.
Fast start & prominent, soon taken back & raced fore of midfield 3 wide with cover, ridden 400m & wide final turn, out-paced, bumped 220m & faded.
Taken back at start, raced rail 2nd last, driven into stretch, stayed on for late headway, off heels close home.
Sharp break, prominent early, steadied 620m to sit 1 back on fence 550m, edged out & driven turning in, kept on evenly.
Smart start & bustled to lead 1 off, to rail 550m, headed under pressure turning in, faded to wire.
Missed break & bustled to midfield 3 wide with cover, off heels 430m, staying on widest when bumped 220m, ran on thereafter.
Slow start, raced 3rd last 1 off, progress home turn but crowded, angled out of pocket & bumped rival 220m, quickened centre to lead close home.
Tardy start, raced midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out final turn & driven, boxed on centre track to nick 3rd late.
Broke ok, camped 1 back 1 off, shifted out final turn & driven 300m, quickened to lead 80m, all out when headed close home.
Broke ok, bustled rail midfield, driven 300m, found nil & wilted tamely.
Sharp break & bustled to race 2nd 3 deep no cover, moved to 1 off 550m, edged lead turning in & driven, soon all out & headed 80m, tapered.
Fair start widest, raced handily four deep no cover, rolled to press leading pair final turn, found nil & faded, beaten when checked 150m.
Sat outside the leader, a nose behind, despite benefitted by the slow tempo, swamped passing 200M.
In front of midfield, 1-1/2L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, finished off only one paced.
Raced in front of midfield, 1-3/4L off 3 wide without cover, despite suited to the slow tempo, no dash.
Towards the rear, 3-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, did not improve.
Settled in worse than midfield, 2-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, not suited to the slow tempo, closed off well in the Straight.
Urged forward to take the rail and led by a nose, suited to the slow tempo, finished off nicely to score.
At the rear, 4L behind 2 wide with cover, never competitive.
In midfield, 2-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, flattened at 200M.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, sat 1-1/4L behind, benefitted by the slow tempo, found no extra after 150M, just held on for 4th.
Raced in midfield along the rail, 2-1/2L behind the leader, progressed steadily, found extra at 100M to secure 2nd.
Toward the rear, 3-3/4L off 4 wide without cover, never ran on.
Travelled at rear along the rail, 4L off the pace, harmed by the slow tempo, made steady ground after straightening.
Began awkwardly, shifted in, bumped. Urged forward, kept wide, then eased behind pace. Raced fiercely and lost position entering straight, steadied 200m when giving ground.
Ridden to share early pace before crossed and shuffled two back first turn. Under pressure turning for home but didn't respond and faded.
Hard ridden to lead but overtaken 1000m. Held on to box seat to straight, boxed on gamely to 200m before tiring.
Shifted across behind runners from an outside draw, settling at rear along rail. Trailed field thereafter and never competitive.
Hampered start, last on settling, shaken up 800m but bumped and unbalanced 700m. Held at rear to straight and ran on fairly.
Ridden to hold forward position but not enough sped, crossed and shuffled back towards rear. Switched out 600m, circled field to hit front 200m, flattened late.
Bumped shortly after start, pressed forward 3-wide settling 2L from leader. Improved around turn, but tired soon after straightening and faded.
Pushed forward from an outside draw, racing wide till taking over lead 1000m and crossing to fence. Collared 200m and gave ground gradually.
No early speed, settling 3-back along rail. Got shuffled further back turning for home, took run between horses in straight and finished off nicely.
Jumped well, not pushed, held behind midfield in one-off position. Covered extra ground turn, very wide into straight, finished strongly down centre track for comfortable win.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide before settling outside hind quarters of leader back stretch. Rolled forward entering straight, looked winner 200m, run down.
Got off OK, ridden to hold one-off position in midfield. Got close to heels entering turn, switched out in straight, tightened 300m, finished strongly.
Chased leaders along the 2-path, kept on same pace final 300M, out of contention 150M.
Chased leaders in 3rd, responded well turning home but not finishing as well as the winner over final 200M.
Dropped back from widest barrier, in last 8Ls off the pace, stayed on well over final 300M but had too much to make up on leaders.
Settled down 5Ls behind midfield, saved ground on the inside, kept on steadily in straight but always held.
Held up behind midfield, 5Ls to make up 400M, ran on mildly and never a serious threat.
Broke well, eased back to midfield 3Ls off the pace, quickened up nicely to lead 200M, continued on well to the line.
Taken across behind runners from 10, 3-wide no cover from 900M, headway over home turn, closed off well down outside for 3rd.
Towards the rear, stayed on moderately from off the pace, not reached contention. (No Vet findings.)
Began awkwardly, held up near the rear, driven wide in straight but gave limited response.
Held up 2-wide in midfield, stayed on moderately for 4th, no serious threat to first two.
Crossed to the lead 800M, headed near 200M, no extra late stages.
Driven forward from wide barrier, pressed leader on outside, gave way 250M, eased when well beaten.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never competitive.
Moderately away, raced 2 lengths back in 5th, made no progress final 400M.
No early speed, raced at tail, just passed a few tired horses.
Moderately away from gate 12, raced behind midfield on the stands rail, made good progress final 400M to be nearest on line.
Slightly slow out, raced in midfield, finished off evenly.
Showed good speed to take the lead on the stands rail, headed near 500M, kept on fairly until weakened final 100M.
Jumped with them, raced in midfield close to the stands rail, made good progress final 400M to make frame.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced in the middle of the track 2 lengths back with no cover, finished off strongly to score narrowly.
Began smartly from gate 2, raced a length or so back in 4th, finished off very well to get 2nd, nice debut.
Bumped start, raced at rear throughout, never a threat.
Jumped well, raced prominently, took the lead near 500M, kept on well but couldn't hold off the first two late.
Jumped well from gate 14, raced in 3rd on the stands rail, showed no response to riding, eased final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced 4 lengths or so back at rear, made no progress and emptied in the final furlong.
Hard ridden forward to cross, sat 2 wide outside the leader, ran on well to the line and scored.
Hard ridden to keep up at back along the fence, no progress.
Hard ridden early, behind midfield, raced 4-5 wide, dashed well 200M despite negative racing situation.
Checked start, at rear, raced very wide, little dash 200M despite all negative racing situations.
Pushed forward, 2 wide, closed off strongly for 3rd.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, hung on well until 100M overhauled and flattened.
Eased to sit in midfield 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Raced very wide at rear, never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, 3 wide no cover, emptied 350M.
Hard ridden to obtain the box seat, ran on strongly for 2nd, just missed by narrow margin.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, ran on ok.
Hard ridden to keep up with the field, 3 wide, unleashed very strong finishing efforts 300M.
At rear, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite harmed by the slow tempo, made minor ground in straight.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, suited by the slow pace, finished off nicely to score comfortably.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow sectionals, ran on fairly.
Camped midfield, 2.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the slow tempo, ran on well for 3rd.
Jumped best, then dragged back to nearly last, trapped 4 wide with cover, never ran on. (Questioned rider and trainer for riding tactics)
Taken back to rear from a wide gate, 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, never ran on.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the slow sectionals, ran on nicely for 2nd when clear 250M.
Ridden forward to take the fence and led at slow sectionals, kept on well until final 200M headed.
Eased to midfield early, 3Ls behind the leader 4 wide without cover, gradually moved forward rounding the Home Turn due to the slow tempo, kept on one pace and weakened 150M.
Settled worse than midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never looked likely.
Settled worse than midfield about 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the slow pace, dashed well when clear 300M.
Sent forward to park outside the leader, despite suited by the slow sectionals, weakened 300M.
Broke ok , raced 3rd 1off no cover, gained cover 650m, niggled 500m & shaken up 420m, grinding run to lead 220m, all out & headed 100m, no extra.
Moderate start, bustled early to settle 1 off with cover fore of midfield, niggled a touch 530m, shaken up turning in & quickened, driven to lead 120m, drew clear.
Moderate start, soon recovered & rolled wide to lead, crossed to rail 1000m, niggled 520m & pressed, headed final turn & faded out.
Slow break, raced 11th 1 off with cover, shifted 3 deep 700m & ridden home turn, widest in run, solid closer.
Slow start, raced last pair on rail, switched 1 off 650m, driven final turn, ran on for minor headway.
Good break, raced rail midfield, niggled 1100m & never settled, under pump 500m, outpaced & struggled.
Broke well, snagged back to sit 3 wide with cover midfield, over-raced 650m, wide & driven into stretch, boxed on to claim 3rd late.
Smart break, lacked pace & slid back, soon under pump back of midfield, found nil in weakening stretch run.
Sharp start widest, trapped 3 wide no cover fore of midfield, driven turning in, found little in tepid run, weakened.
Disputed lead briefly, snagged to rail 1 back, 2 back from 1000m, driven 400m, shifted out 250m but struggled & tapered.
Disputed lead early, eventually sat 1 back on rail, switched 1 off 650m & worked upside leader, kicked to lead turning in, headed all out 220m, tapered & swamped.
Awkward start & bustled near tail, rolled to race 10th on rail, niggled 500m, driven into stretch, stayed on steadily.
Stumbled start, raced at tail 1 off, edged 3 wide on turn, hard-ridden into stretch, never a factor, eased when beaten.
Reared & missed break, last pair & niggled on rail initially, bumped 800m, niggled to advance a place thereafter, hard-ridden in stretch, found little.
Tardy start, recovered to race 2nd 1 off no cover, loomed upsides leader turning in, handed lead 350m, shaken up 300m & kicked, boxed on to wire.
Taken back, parked on inner behind midfield, shifted out & ridden 420m, switched wide 350m, stayed on for minor headway.
Broke ok, taken back to midfield 1 off with cover, driven 500m, unable to raise game, faded tamely final 300m.
Slowly away, bustled to race last pair 1 off, last & edged wide on turn, hard-ridden into stretch, hung across to outside rail, stayed on for minor inroads.
Rousted from gate, settled 4th 1 off with cover, edged 3 wide 550m, driven into stretch, fought on one pace.
Broke ok, raced mid rank 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven into stretch, progress to 2nd 290m, closed gap but always held.
Bustled from gate & soon prominent, settled back handy 5th 1 off with cover, hard-ridden 420m, struggled in tame run home.
Taken back from widest gate, caught wide no cover near tail, driven 430m, plugged on moderately.
