In mid-division, got its head up passing 1000M and proved difficult to settle, stayed on same pace on straightening, never threatened.
Never far off in 5th, 3Ls off the pace making the turn for home, made good progress along inside, switched 150M out and finished off strongly to lead from 100M, ridden out.
Restrained to sit just off leader, pushed along to challenge 450M, ran on steadily for 3rrd, not matched winner's pace final 150M.
Chased leaders in a 3-wide spot without cover, kept on steadily turning in but gradually outpaced by leaders over final 200M.
Tracked leaders along the inside, soon weakened turning home and out of contention.
Dropped back to the rear from wide barrier, 6Ls behind leader 400M, ran on moderately without threatening first two.
Settled 3-wide in mid-division on jumping from draw 12, made good progress to lead briefly inside 150M, couldn't match winner's finishing pace final stages.
Slow to begin, near last 6Ls off the pace, ran on mildly inside 400M but never seriously threatened.
Slow to begin, held up 3-wide behind midfield, showed signs of greenness in the race, brief effort early straight, couldn't sustain run final 150M.
Began only fairly, proved difficult to settle, in rear 8Ls off the pace home turn, brought wide and closed off strongly final 300M to just miss 3rd.
Held up along fence in mid-division, looked one pace early straight but did best work over final 200M, encouraging debut.
Inconvenienced start, no speed, dropping to rear along fence. Switched out in straight to make challenge but found nothing.
Bumped and unbalanced start, pushed forward to grab box seat before turn. Spent force on straightening and faded.
Ridden to hold rail, three-back from leader. Left fence turning for home but only one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from outside draw to lead on settling. Joined up front 600m, headed turning for home and weakened.
Crowded start, ridden to go forward but not enough speed, settling four-back along rail. Got clear run in straight and finished off strongly.
No early speed and soon at rear of main bunch in one-off position. Switched out in straight and ran on steadily.
Pressed forward from wide draw, settling a half length outside leader. Kicked ahead on straightening, held off late challenge while laying out against the whip.
Jumped well, ridden to hold forward position, settling one-off but 2L from leading pair. Chased leader throughout without closing gap.
Ridden along one-off but 4L from leader. Kept position around turn but gave ground quickly in straight.
Crowded out and bumped start, not pushed, settling 3-wide behind midfield. Urged forward 600m, finished strongly down centre track.
Blew the start, became intractable and unbalanced jockey, losing ground. Trailed field to turn, turned wide, finished off nicely.
Began well, urged forward to find cover in midfield, then travelled keenly middle stages. Got clear run in straight and ran on steadily.

Pushed forward from the wide barrier to be handily placed in 5th, 3wd no cover before forcing cover at 1000m. Came wider on the turn and ran on, taking the lead at 200. Chopped down late, but had just enough to hold the win.
Jumped well and allowed to roll forward early to be handily placed early. Restrained back at 1300m to sit midfield, 1 off the pace and over racing. Didn't finish off late.

Pushed forward through runners early to share the lead, 1 off the fence. Dropped out quickly from the 400m, and never ridden out in the straight to be almost 3L behind the 2nd last runner across the line.
Began OK, but only eased forward early to be placed towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Came widest on the turn and went well to the line for a promising Hong Kong debut.
Began awkwardly, and never fully settled early when finding a position near midfield, on the rail. Asked the question in the straight, but never responded and eased to the line late.

OK away and taken forward to be handily placed in 4th on the rail, 2.5L off the early leaders. Positioned OK on the turn, but didn't respond to hands and heels riding in the straight and never ran on.
Tried to find a position in midfield early, but stuck wide and on heels before getting in 1 off the fence at 1000m. Well placed and a clear run from the turn, but only ran on fairly in the straight.

Began well and pushed forward early to be handily placed in 3rd, 1 off the fence and 2L off the leaders. Loomed at the top of the straight and led briefly until 200m, before peaking and dropping back late.

OK away and elected to sit just worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Near last on the turn, but pushed forward when clear from 350m. Closed off impressively with the fastest last sectional of the race.
Began well and pushed forward early to share the lead, on the fence. Led at 350m, but began to fade soon after and dropped back. Eased to the line late.

OK away and eased forward early to settle midfield, on the fence. Sat back and smoked the pipe until the turn, but was boxed in looking for a run. Got clear at 200m, producing a huge run to the line and just missing late.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to be in the last pair, 10L off the leaders. Ran on OK late from a rear position, easing up late when out of contention.

Dropped back from the wide barrier early to sit last, 11L off the leaders at the 800m. Made up ground from that point, and ran to the line OK in the straight to finish near the first half of the field.
Only fairly away and dropped back early to sit near the rear of the field, on the fence. Never kicked, and drifted out under the whip when asked for anything in the straight.
Shake up early to obtain a forward spot just off leader, outpaced 400M, soon beaten.
Dropped back to a 2-wide spot towards the rear, closed off moderately but couldn't quite get to leaders.
Began awkwardly, recovered to a position behind midfield, not picked up on straightening, never reached contention.
Close up chased leaders along the 2-path, took keen hold 1200M, picked up strongly 350M, led 200M and sped off to a clear lead, held firm final stages.
Settled down in midfield 3-4Ls behind the pace, driven along 400M to chase leaders, got up for 2nd 100M, kept on but not reaching winner, beaten to 3rd near line.
Switched off to last 9Ls behind leader, waited with till 450M but gave only limited response, never threatened.
Strolled forward chasing leader, remained a presence until weakening nearing 200M. (No Vet findings.)
Held up 3-wide in mid-division, driven out 350M, closed off soundly to go 2nd near line but well held by winner.
Restless in stalls, raced further back than intended, 2nd last turning and had 7Ls to make up, found disappointingly little. (No Vet findings / Unacceptable Performance.)
Chased leaders along the 3-path with no cover, fought on to 250M, weakened.
Soon led, took them along slowly middle stages, driven out near 300M, headed 200M then gave way. (No Vet findings.)
Held up 3-4Ls off the pace in midfield and kept to the inside throughout, not clear run 200M, kept on mildly when every chance final 150M.
Never better than midfield, raced 3-wide throughout, couldn't sprint with the main rivals inside 400M, plodded home.
Restrained to near the rear, 7Ls behind leader, swung 3-wide home turn, closed off well early straight but run ended 150M.
Well there on stands rails, hit the front under pressure passing the 200 metres.
Handy early, folded up quickly inside final 300 metres.
Jumped well, settled just off the pace, came under pressure coming onto course proper, dropped out tamely.
Slightly slow to jump, settled in last few, produced good late impression along stands rails inside final 200 metres.
Settled near midfield from the one draw, produced short-lived effort to hold minor chance near the centre of the track over 200 metres out, no further impression.
Jumped well, settled not far off the pace, steadied for a stride 300 metres out, fought on well to miss narrowly.
Broke well, lost touch after first 200 metres, dropped further back coming onto course proper, produced some late impression closing stages.
Always thereabouts, failed to quicken under pressure to challenge inside final 200 metres.
Amongst leaders early racing near the centre of the track, dropped away quickly from the 400 metres.
Soon took up running, led until finding no extra over 200 metres out.
Soon dropped to last few, awkwardly placed behind runners 600 metres out, produced good late impression past beaten runners in the run home.
Soon dropped to last few, forced to check about 600 metres out, never a danger.
Settled near midfield but not far off the pace, commenced move inside final 300 metres, fought on steadily without threatening.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the rails, pace good, no turn of foot in straight, on heels 250M.
Raced very wide, never competitive at rear.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide, pace good, made steady ground 300M for 2nd.
Eased back, 2-4 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 300M.
Very slow away, never a factor.
Eased back, 2 wide, pace good, lack room 4-2, closed off strongly when clear.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, pace good, lack room 400, ran on strongly 250M to score.
Eased back, 3-4 wide, pace good, no progress.
At rear along the fence, pace good, never improved.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at good sectionals, reduced quickly 200M.
Eased back, trapped 4 wide, pace good, made some ground in straight.
In front of midfield, pace good, trapped 3 wide, flattened 200M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, ran on until 100M flattened.
Settled in box seat, pace good, lack room 400M, just held ground when clear.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite suited by the slow pace, one paced without any serious threats.
Always at rear, hung out badly rounding the Home Turn, finished tailed out.
Eased to settle worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, harmed by the slow sectionals, finished off nicely for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Taken back, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, never ran on.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite not suited by the slow sectionals, made minor ground in straight.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, suited by the slow tempo, ran on well to score by a head.
Raced midfield, 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on.
Eased back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, never ran on.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite suited by the slow tempo, kept on one pace without threatening.
Pushed forward to park outside the leader, enjoyed the slow sectionals, however weakened final 150M.
Prominent, however inclined to lay out throughout, weakened soon after straightening.
Eased to settle worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the slow pace, stormed home for 2nd, missed by a head.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, ran on gradually for 4th.
Speedy start, sat close 2nd inside leader, ridden 400m & took narrow lead 280m, all out & headed 120m, boxed on to wire.
Tardy start & bustled along on rail near rear, edged out & ridden 300m, close to heels & checked to rail 180m, stayed on for minor late headway.
Broke ok, raced handily 1 off outside fence, travelled well & shaken up 300m, lacked kick & tapered late.
Broke well, tracked lead in 4th, niggled 480m, switched inside & ridden to challenge 350m, quickened to lead 120m, no extra & headed 80m.
Fast start to lead, soon to rail, ridden 400m & drifted off fence, emptied & headed 280m, faded tamely.
Broke ok but soon bustled & outpaced behind midfield, under pump 500m, plugged on same speed, never a factor.
Fast break & sat handy 3rd without cover, driven 400m, out-paced but kept on.
Tardy break, taken to rail & soon 2.5L adrift at tail, niggled to chase 400m, shifted centre & stayed on for late inroads.
Taken back at start, settled near rear 1 off outside fence, advanced a spot 600m, strong traveler & held up until shifted inside & shaken up 50m, surged centre to lead 80m, driven clear.
Smart start, raced midfield in touch, ridden 500m, found nil & weakened tamely.
Broke ok, raced midfield on inner, edged out 450m, driven 400m, ran on centre track, just missed 2nd.
Sluggish break, pushed forward to fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & ridden final turn, one-paced, checked off heels 250m, tapered tamely.
Bustled to lead on rail, joined at fore turning in, ridden & all out when headed 300m, tapered to wire.
Missed break & bustled, raced 2nd last 1 off, edged 3 deep 750m, driven widest final turn, ran on centre track for solid headway.
Broke well, sat rail fore of midfield, shifted out & ridden 420m, quickened to lead 140m, edged ahead.
Fast start & rousted to dispute early lead, settled 0.75L 2nd outside leader, niggled 700m, ridden to share lead turning in, emptied & headed 300m, weakened.
Taken back from widest to race tail on rail, shaken up 430m, stayed on for minor inroads.
Tardy start, niggled along on rail near rear, driven 400m, edged out in run, kept on for minor headway.
Broke well, taken back from wide to slot 1 off near rear, edged 3 deep 750m, fanned wide final turn, driven & ran on strongly, just missed frame.
Fair start, sat back of midfield on inner, off heels 750m & shuffled back a spot, shifted to 1 off, checked 400m, driven 300m, plugged on evenly.
Broke ok, snagged to race back of midfield 1 off with cover, advanced a spot 1000m, over-raced 800m, shifted wide & driven home turn, outpaced & faded.
Fast start wide, slotted 1 off 1 back 4th, shifted out turning in, ridden 400m, driven to lead 220m, fully extended & headed 140m, boxed on in defeat.
Tardy break, pushed forward, sat 1 back on rails, shifted out 400m & quickened between horses to lead 300m, all out when headed 220m & faded.
Travelled in midfield along the rail, 4-1/2L off the pace, made no impression in the straight.
Sat in front of midfield, 2-3/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, took advantage of the slow pace, ran on well for 2nd.
Raced in worse than midfield, 6L off the pace 2 wide with cover, not suited to the slow pace, only improved slightly in the straight.
Settled in worse than midfield along the rail, 6-1/4L behind the leader, not suited to the slow tempo, made slight ground only.
Urged forward to take the rail and led at slow sectionals, unleashed once straightened, held off late challenge to score by a nose.
Always at the rear, was never competitive.
Raced outside the leader, 1-1/4L off the pace, little dash at 300M, out of steam passing 200M.
In midfield, 4-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, not competitive and dropped off significantly after 200M.
Travelled in front of midfield along the rail, 3L off the pace, niggled when rounding turn, finished off nicely for 3rd.
Settled in worse than midfield, 7-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, despite not suited to the slow tempo, dashed strongly and made vast ground in the straight.
At back throughout, never a factor.
Rolled forward to obtain box-seat, 1-1/2L behind, despite suited to the slow tempo, flattened after 250M.
At the rear, 9-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, despite not suited to the slow pace, made ground steadily in the straight.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/4L off 3 wide without cover, no dash and ran home one paced.
Began fairly, ridden forward, settling two-back, one-off. Switched out entering straight and ran on strongly under whip.
Hard ridden from outside draw to lead passing 950m before crossing to fence. Overtaken shortly after straightening and faded.
Jumped well, ridden to hold rail 2-back from leader. Switched out in straight to make run and kept on steadily.
Taken in shortly after start settling between horses at the rear. Got close to heels 500m, switched out straight, ran on fairly.
Taken in shorty after start, settling along fence at rear. Improved position around turn but one-paced in straight.
Began fairly, taken to fence 3-back from leader. Shaken up 400m, raced tight 350, switched out 300, kept on fairly till checked 75m.
Began well, pressed forward settling one-back, one-off 950m. Rolled forward top of straight, hit front 290m, hung in 200m and again 150m, kept on well.
Began best, led to 950m before taking sit. Angled out 400m, hit front 290m, tightened 200m, checked and unbalanced 150m, boxed on.
Ridden to hold forward position but kept wide without cover from 900. Covered extra ground throughout, one-paced in straight.
Bumped start, outpaced, dropping behind midfield. Hard ridden top of straight but little progress before tightened passing 200m.
Had feet off ground when gates opened and began fairly. Pressed forward but wide, settling outside leader 900m. Faded steadily in straight.
Steadied shortly after start and taken in but held 3-wide at rear before turn. Taken wider 400m and ran on steadily while hanging in under whip.
4-5Ls off the pace, never better than midfield, not travelled and had to be niggled along approaching home turn, had nothing to offer in straight and was left behind 200M. (no Vet findings.)
Contested the early pace, crossed to the lead 1500M and remained prominent to home straight, fought on early straight but no extra passing 200M.
Dropped back to rear 7-8Ls off the pace, driven out 450M, checked 250M when commencing his run, regrouped and stayed on final 200M to go 4th near line.
Lost ground when jumping in the air at start, ridden forward from rear but soon left with no cover, joined leaders from 1200M, faded away 250M when hard run took toll (Mucus.)
Near the rear early stages, moved closer to a midfield position middle stages, driven wide 500M, stayed on well early straight but run peaked 200M, no threat 150M.
Switched off to the rear 7Ls off the pace, waited with until reaching top of straight, angled out to clear 400M, pressed winner final 150M but was held.
Held up in midfield 4-5Ls off the pace first half, in touch home turn, wide bid 550M, ran on moderately, one paced 150M and no impression on leaders thereafter.
Slow to begin, held up near the rear 6-7Ls behind leaders, kept to inside throughout but not picked up turning in, never threatened.
From draw 1 got into a trailing position behind leaders, briefly held up top of the straight, closed off well to lead near 200M, kept responding when pressed by rivals both side final stages.
Contested early lead, taken across for cover behind leaders, proved difficult to settle 1400M then moved out to 3-wide position, not quickened in straight, got tired 200M.
Positively ridden, prompted the pace 2-wide, kicked on 550M, lost lead inside 300M, fought on same pace to line.
Chased the pace, travelled keenly, failed to pick up passing 400M, eased mid-straight. (No Vet findings.)
Never far off 3Ls off the pace, no clear run 300M- 200M before going through narrow gap to challenge, well held by winner final 100M.
Slow into stride and last on settling. Trailed field to 200m before making up some late ground.
Began well, ridden forward, settling two-back, one-off. Urged forward entering straight, finished strongly down centre track to just miss.
Knuckled over at start, pressed forward, settling1L behind leader. Crept closer around turn, gave ground quickly in straight. Substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Taken out shortly after start, steadied 1500m, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Taken wide in straight and finished off nicely.
Steadied soon after start and shifted across to rail but towards rear. Stayed on rail throughout, ran on steadily in straight.
Quickly into stride, taking clear lead on settling and slowing pace. Kicked ahead top of straight but collared 200m and weakened.
Quickly away, grabbing box seat and trailing leader to straight. Switched out 400m, tightened 300m, finished strongly.
Crowded start, taken to fence, 3-back from leader. Left fence around turn, ran on steadily in straight to be closest at finish.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, settling one-back, one-off. Urged forward top of straight, looked chance 200m, flattened 100m.
Bumped, unbalanced soon after starts, pressed forward along rail 2-back from leader. Took rails run entering straight, hit front 200m, battled strongly, just held.
Ridden along early but wide, before easing behind midfield in one-off position. One-paced in straight.

Kicked well, and pushed to hold the lead on his own early. Bumped and slightly unbalanced at the top of the straight. Still in front at 300m, but tackled by the chasers, and faded out quickly from there.
Began OK, but didn't push forward and settled worse than midfield, 3 wide. Race was run before the turn, and faded quickly in the straight to be tailed out 26L last. Unacceptable performance.
Taken forward from the wide draw to sit midfield, 3 wide with no cover. Well positioned with clear running on the turn, but ran flat and dropped back through the field quickly in the straight.
OK away and not used up early to settle just behind midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran home strongly in the straight, rolling past 4th horse but just losing 2nd on the line.
OK away and settled midfield early, on the rail. Battled on fairly in the straight, but never kicked and went to the line 1 paced.
Bumped on jumping and taken back from the wide barrier to sit at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Ran on steadily in the straight, without ever threatening to place.
Began well and taken forward early to be handily placed 3rd, on the rail. Never responded to pressure in the straight, and eased a long way out. Vet reported blood in trachea.
Began OK, but not used early and happy to sit midfield, on the rail. Had to force a run just before the 300m, but ran on strongly from there. Slowing down late, but had to much in hand and held.

Eased out of the barrier and dropped back to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Near last on the turn, but ran home strongly in the straight, clocking the fastest last sectional, but left with too much to do.
Jumped well and taken forward to be handily placed 4th, 2L off the leader and 1 off the fence. Lay out under pressure in the straight, and never fully tested.
Fairly away and not used up early to settle 3rd last early, on the rail and 7L off the leader. Held up in the run home until 300m, running on OK when clear.

Dawdled out of the barrier and settled at the rear of the field, 9L off the leader. In the last couple on the turn. Ran on fairly in the straight and picked up a couple of slower runners on the way to the line.
Settled midfield, 1 off the fence after beginning OK. Plugged away 1 paced in the straight.

Pushed forward from the wide barrier early to eventually settle in 2nd, outside the leader. Tackled the leader from the top of the straight and led from 300m. Weakened from 150m, and dropped out from 50m losing a place late.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back in midfield, same position on turn, in traffic early in straight, found daylight near final 200M and finished off very strongly thereafter to score.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 5 lengths back at rear, 3 wide with cover on turn, finished off very well, just beaten by the winner late.
Away with them, travelled keenly in the early stages, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths back in 5th, similar position on turn, unable to get clear running in straight, not tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 6 lengths back at tail, still well back on turn, made some progress in straight.
Average to begin, sent forward to race prominently, 2nd on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter, eased final 100M.
Moderately away, showed early speed to race prominently, a length behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened thereafter and eased final 100M.
Began awkwardly, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide with no cover throughout, failed to close off in straight when hard run took effect.
Taken back from gate 13, raced at rear to turn, made minor progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well, raced 2 to 3 lengths back on rail, there to turn, no clear running early in straight, finished off evenly when clear thereafter.
Bumped start, positioned 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear, 5 lengths back on turn, angled out after turning in, finished off well to get 3rd without threatening the first two.
Began well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well on turn, peaked early in straight, headed near 250M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Crowded out start, raced 4 lengths or so back on rail at rear, there to turn, no clear running until final 200M, made some progress thereafter to make frame.
Jumped with them, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover in 4th, still no cover on turn, took the lead early in straight, kept on well until headed final 150M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Settled in last few from the widest gate, slightly affected by the fall entering straight, made no impression thereafter.
Tailed-off early, joined back-markers rounding home bend, hampered by faller entering straight, made steady headway near the centre of the track without threatening.
Ridden to soon take up running, joined in front when pace slackened rounding home bend, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 200 metres.
Settled behind midfield on rails, hampered by faller entering straight, kept on steadily to finish.
Slightly slow out, given reminders before settling in midfield on rails, badly hampered by faller entering straight, never recovered. (Lame)

Broke well from the middle gate, settled 3L back in 5th travelling 3-wide down far side, took closer order from the Rock, improved under pressure from 1L 3rd into straight to hold minor chance briefly but winner too strong.
Jumped well, settled in midfield one off the rails, commenced run 3-wide rounding home bend, asserted authority passing the 200 metres.
Settled 2 back in 4th, gained slightly closer near the Rock, badly hampered by faller on home turn, never recovered. (Lame next day)
Jumped well from the middle gate, soon obtained one-back position on rails, apparently stumbled and dislodged rider entering straight.
Taken back to settle behind midfield, 3-wide rounding home bend and into straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Not far off, improved to dispute lead rounding home bend, failed to hold place under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Eased to rear, pace good, made some ground 200M.
On heels early, midfield, 2 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 250M.
Eased back, took rail, pace good, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed to taka rail and led at good pace, hung on until 200M flattened.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, on heels early, emptied 300M.
Hard ridden forward, sat just off the leader 2 wide, pace good, ran on strongly to the line for 2nd.
On heels early, pushed forward, box seat, out of fuel 250M.
Eased back, raced 2-4 wide, never competitive.
Eased back, raced keenly, checked 400M, tailed out.
Pressed forward, secured a prominent spot 2 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Trapped 3 wide throughout, never a factor, tailed out.
At back, 2 wide, pace good, dashed well 300M for 3rd.
Jumped slowly, then niggled along to settle in midfield, 6Ls behind the leader along the fence, never ran on.
Always at back, despite the fast pace, never looked likely.
At rear, travelled 12Ls behind the leader on the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, made some ground in straight.
Prominent, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite harmed by the fast tempo, kept on strongly until over the final few strides headed by the impressive winner.
Eased to settle worse than midfield from a wide barrier, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, ran on well for 3rd.
Rolled forward to settle outside the leader at fast tempo, kept on until weakened final 150M.
Taken back to settle worse than midfield, 9Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast sectionals, stormed home for a stylish win.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led at fast sectionals, flattened badly final 200M. (Bled)
Taken back as usual, travelled 11Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast sectionals, ran on without any real threats.
Punched forward along the fence, however, weakened rapidly rounding the Home Turn.
Rolled forward to settle midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast pace, one paced home.
Led at start, headed 1500m & settled 1 back on rail, driven 400m & shifted out, quickened to press lead 150m, held & peaked 100m, faded to wire.
Taken back at start to 1 off near rear, edged 3 wide with cover 900m, bustled to midfield 650m, ridden 500m, very wide final turn, stayed on for minor inroads.
Early speed, posted handy 1 off with cover, niggled 500m, edged out & driven 300m, flat-footed but boxed on & rallied late.
Sluggish start, rousted forward to rail fore of midfield, niggled 400m, under pump turning in, found nil in weakening run.
Smart break, restrained to midfield 3 wide no cover, rolled forward 700m, driven 4 wide into stretch, one-paced in tepid run home.
Broke well, restrained to race midfield 1 off with cover, over-raced 730m, shifted wide on tune, found nil & plodded home.
Speed to lead 1500m, bustled to rail 1250m & set tempo, shaken up 400m, pressed 150m, battled on, headed 50m, no extra.
Taken back at start to last, closed a spot & last pair 1 off 750m when over-raced, driven widest final turn, rattled home to make frame.
Broke well, taken to rail back midfield, shifted 1 off & niggled 500m, driven into stretch & fanned centre track, quickened 200m, sprinted to lead 80m, in command.
Rolled from widest to sit 1 off with cover behind midfield, over-raced 950m, off heels 750m, not clear run turning in, switched inside & driven, stayed on for late gains.
Broke well, parked 2nd 1 off no cover, niggled 600m, under pump 450m, soon beaten & faded in stretch.
Snagged from wide gate to race last near tail on rail, last pair 750m, driven into stretch, ran on for minor headway.
Broke with others, sat rail behind midfield, shifted 1 off & over-raced 820m, shifted out turning in & driven, stayed on moderately.
Shifted left at break & heavily impeded rival, recovered to race rail toward rear, niggled 500m, driven 400m, boxed on to 3rd 100m, gradual closer.
Broke with others, lacked toe & settled near rear 1 off, shifted 3 deep with cover 820m & advanced to midfield, shaken up 300m, plodded on tamely.
Tardy start & impeded heavily, raced last on rail, over-raced 750m, checked off heels & lost ground, 8.5L back & niggled 500m, driven into stretch, found nil.
Fast break, settled rail midfield, over-raced 700m, shuffled back a spot & niggled 620m, bustled for progress 500m, edged 1 off & ridden final turn, ran on centre track.
Broke well, raced 4th 1 off with cover, shifted 3 deep no cover 850m & advanced, narrow lead 600m & posted 1 off, headed 420m, driven but emptied quickly & faded.
Speed to lead, to rail & restrained 1070m, sat 1 back, closed on leader & switched out 260m, driven to lead 100m, edged away.
Bustled wide to lead 1070m, soon to rail, slowed pace & headed 600m, led again 420m, shaken up 300m & kicked 1L clear, all out & headed 100m, no extra.
Broke ok, rousted initially, trapped 3 wide no cover midfield, over-raced 820m, ridden 450m, wide & unbalanced on turn, found nil.
Fast start, bustled up to 2nd 1 off no cover, shuffled to 3rd 1 back 600m, soon niggled, 3 wide & driven turning in, plugged on one pace.

Travelled close to midfield, 4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, no dash in the straight.
Sat in front of midfield, 2-1/4L off 3 wide without cover, benefitted by the slow tempo, finished off nicely for 3rd.
Urged forward to take the rail and led by 1-1/2L through slow sectionals, ran on well and held off challenge from 2nd to score.
Rolled forward to obtain box-seat, sat 1-1/2L behind the leader, suited to the slow pace, finished 2nd with a convincing effort.
Raced prominently and outside the leader, 1-3/4L behind, despite suited to the slow pace, weakened gradually in the straight.
Jumped with field then taken to rail 2-back from leader. Left fence entering straight and ran on steadily.
Pressed forward from start to sit outside leader to straight. Gave ground steadily after passing 300m.
Began fairly, then pressed forward to lead on settling. Caught shortly after straightening but boxed on well until closing stages.
Began awkwardly, then taken to fence 3-back from leader. Hard ridden from 400m but failed to make headway.
Quickly into stride, grabbing box seat and trailing leader to straight. Ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Began fairly, ridden but didn't muster, dropping towards rear in one-off position. One-paced in straight.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw and taken to fence towards rear. Switched out entering straight and finished off fairly.
Began well, shared early pace before easing two-back, one-off. Turned 4-wide, hit front 300m, looked winner, nailed on post.
Shifted across behind runners but raced fiercely and unable to find cover, racing wide at rear. One-paced in straight.
Hard ridden from outside draw but didn't muster and trapped 3-wide in midfield. Kept wide throughout but boxed on gamely in straight.
Ridden to find cover, settling 3-back between horses. Raced fiercely turn, checked 650m, finished strongly while laying in. Just got there.
Began well, pressed forward, settling one-off, one-back. Under pressure on straightening and gave ground gradually.
Slow into stride and last on settling. Trailed field to straight, switched wide, and ran on fairly.
Restrained to near the rear 6Ls off the pace, into clear 400M, ran on well to just miss a minor placing.
Slow to begin, held up behind midfield first 800M then advanced 3-wide moving nearer to leaders, kept on steadily when driven out 400M, not reached winner.
Taken back from wide barrier, 8Ls back at the rear in middle stages, niggled along 600M, ran on only fairly on straightening.
Taken back from wide barrier, 7Ls off the pace in rear group, outpaced early straight, never able to challenge.
Held up 4Ls off the pace in midfield, took time to gather on straightening, closed off well final 150M, just missed 2nd while offered no serious threat to winner.
Positively ridden, crossed to lead 800M, pressed by rivals middle of the turn, kept on well early straight, headed 150M, faded towards line.
Up with pace along the 2-path but couldn't find much when the race got serious, dropped out 200M.
Up with early pace, travelled keenly when crossed by rivals middle stages, stayed on mildly over final 400M, always held by leaders.
Caught 3-wide no cover from 1000M, strode forward to join leader but unable to shift closer to fence, kept on same pace early straight, no extra 200M. (No Vet findings.)
Close up in 5th within 3Ls of leader, driven out 350M, led near 150M and pulled nicely clear for a commanding victory.
Began only fairly, restrained behind midfield 5Ls behind leaders, shuffled back to near the rear 600M, made limited progress in straight and never reached contention.
Prominently placed, had cover behind leader from 800M, ridden along nearing 400M, not finishing pace of winner but stayed on well enough to hold 2nd on the line.
Reared when gates opened, dislodged rider and stayed in stall. Took no part in race.
Steadied after start and shifted in behind midfield in one-off position. Improved around turn, very wide in straight, finished strongly.
Shifted out and bumped at start before crossing to rail 4-back from leader. Switched out in straight and finished off nicely.
Began well, ridden to hold rail 2-back from leader. Took inside run in straight and ran on steadily to 200m before turning one-paced.
Began well, pressed forward, settling one-back, one-off. Ran on strongly in straight but unable overhaul leader.
Pressed forward on jumping to hold rail, before slipping into slipstream of leader from 800m. Looked chance passing 400m before fading.
First into stride, clear leader to turn before steadying pace. Kicked 2L clear 400m, kept finding under pressure final 100m for narrow win.
Not used early, settling 3-back along rail. Left fence turning for home, ran on steadily in straight.
Quickly into stride, pressed forward but wide, settling outside leader approaching turn. Still in contention entering straight before giving ground.
Steadied soon after start and shifted in, settling at rear in one-off position. Still well back entering straight before running on steadily.
Steadied soon after start, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Trailed field thereafter and never competitive.
Got off with field, ridden along 2-wide in midfield 4L from leader. Kept wide in straight and ran on steadily to be closes at finish.
Began awkwardly, but pushed forward early to be handily place 3rd/4th, 1 off the fence. Well placed to kick from the 200m, but found nothing in the tank. Peaked late and was swamped on the line.
Bumped on jumping and then steadied to get cover, worse than midfield, on the fence. Pushed in the straight, but only went to the line fairly.
Began OK, and eased forward from the inside draw to be midfield, on the rail. Never responded when asked the question and ran to the line flat, before easing from the 150m.

Slightly awkward away and dropped back early to be 3rd last, 9L off the leader. One of the last on the turn, and came wider in the straight. Ran home strongly, and went head to head in run for 3rd, and lost the bob on the line.
Began well and taken forward early to be handily place 4th/5th. Under pressure before the turn. Showed nothing in the straight and eased out late.
Slow away, and dropped back early to be 2nd last, 10L off the leaders. Only battled on fairly when asked the question at the top of the straight, and not pushed to the line late.
Steadied early from the wide draw to settle in midfield, 1 off the fence. Plugged away steadily in the straight, but never threatened a place.

Pushed forward from the wide draw to take the early lead, before being crossed at 1000m and dropping back to 3rd. Let down from the top of the straight, but never responded and dropped out quickly from the 300m.

Pushed forward early to stake a claim, and was sole leader by the 1000m. Looked to have outlasted challengers in the straight, and was running strongly in front at 100m. Peaked in the last 50m, and picked off for the win late.
Dropped back from the wide draw to be 12L last at the 800m. Never improved in the run and last all the way until last 50m, only beat one who was easing out late.

Eased forward early to sit forward of midfield, 1-2 off the fence, but never fully settled in the back straight. Had to make up 3L on the leader in the straight, and gradually wore him down. Strong over the last 100m.

Only fairly away and settled worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Raced tight and off hindquarters at 350m. Pulled out from there and ran home strongly. Battled for a place late, and just got 3rd in a bob on the line.

Cruised across from the jump, and was stuck 3 wide with no cover up the back straight, just behind the leader. Came into 1 off the fence leaving the back straight. Stoked up on the turn, but didn't ignite and went home 1 paced.
OK to begin and taken up to be forward of midfield, on the fence. Ran on steadily in the straight without threatening a place, and raced tight briefly on the line.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, 2 wide on turn, one-paced in straight.
Jumped well from gate 11, sent forward to race prominently, got cover on turn, peaked near 200M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 8 lengths back at rear, similar position on turn, angled out early in straight and finished off very well to score.
Moderately away from a tricky draw, raced 2 wide, 4-5 lengths back in midfield, carried wider on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Moderately away, raced 4 lengths or so back in midfield, similar position on turn, no daylight early in straight, finished off very strongly when clear final 200M, just missed.
Slowly away, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Away with them, raced 6 lengths back at rear, saved ground on turn, no clear running early in straight, made good progress when clear after 250M, no threat to the winner.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 7 lengths back at rear, there to turn, taken wide in straight and made reasonable progress to be nearest on line.
Slightly slow out from gate 13, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide in 5th, no cover for the majority of the race, emptied early in straight when hard run took effect. (Bled)
Average to begin, raced 7 lengths back at rear, same margin back on turn, finished off one paced.
Began well, positioned 2 wide, 3 lengths back in 6th, same position on turn, finished off evenly in straight to make frame without threatening the first few.
Jumped well from gate 1, showed early speed to take the lead, shared lead on turn, peaked early in straight and weakened gradually thereafter, eased final 150M.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths back early, improved after 1200M to race outside the lead, shared lead on turn, kept on well early in straight, headed 150M, weakened thereafter.
Began well, raced 2-3 lengths back on rail, easy run on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Settled in 4th on rails within 3L of pace, drifted slightly backward far side, made modest progress without threatening.
Raced wide in rear of midfield, slightly worse turning in, produced some late impression closing stages.
Lost considerable ground at start, trailed the field to straight, kept on past beaten horses in the run home.
Settled in midfield and wide without cover down far side and around home bend, dropped away quickly from top of home bend. (Lame next day)
Waited with, snuck up towards midfield rounding home bend, sustained good progress down the straight to just fail to get up on line.
Towards the rear throughout.
Began well from a wide gate, settled 3-wide in 5th in forward of midfield, kept on well to finish.
Made all in a standard pace, held on well to the line.

Slow to muster despite hard ridden early, settled in midfield on rails before making headway from 1000 metres out, reached 3rd some 2L back on top of home bend, found no extra inside final 200 metres. (Lame)
Began well from the middle draw settling just off the pace, ran home one-paced.
Began well from a wide gate, raced wide around stables bend to obtain a prominent position in 3rd, remained similar until folding up quickly inside final 500 metres.
Settled well behind from a poor draw, never a danger.
Began moderately, settled behind midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield, slightly worse in position rounding home bend, made no impression in the final stretch.
Eased back, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Eased back, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 300M.
Pushed to hold the rail in front of midfield, not suited by the slow sectionals, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, trapped 3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, emptied 300M, checked 200M.
Took rail and lead easily, clocked advantageous slow sectionals, reduced 300M.
Never a factor.
Hard ridden early but never muster, behind midfield on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, lack room 400M, no dash when clear.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, unleashed strong finishing efforts 250M.
Pushed forward, enjoyed the slow sectionals, drifted away 300M to score.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, checked 350M then gave ground.
Eased back for cover, 2 wide, lack room 400M, dashed strongly when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, suited by the slow tempo, out of fuel 200M.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the very slow tempo, ran on well for 2nd.
Camped handy, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, suited by the very slow tempo, one paced to the line without any serious threat.
Sent forward to park outside the leader, enjoyed the very slow sectionals, accelerated strongly to score by 1L.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, hampered by the very slow tempo, ran on fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the very slow sectionals, ran on only fairly.
Failed to muster despite hard ridden along, taken back to settle 4Ls off the leader 3 wide with cover, not suited by the very slow sectionals, never ran on.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, soon dropped off after straightening.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Always at rear, made no impression in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, never looked likely.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, despite suited by the very slow pace, kept on only one pace without any threatening.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led at very slow tempo, kept on nicely until 250M headed by the winner, hung on for 3rd.
Sharp break, settled behind pace on rail, 2L back & niggled a touch 800m, shifted out to challenge 420m, boxed on in pursuit, to 2nd 250m, always held.
Tardy break, raced 1 off behind midfield, edged out on turn, shaken up 380m, stayed on centre track for minor headway.
Broke ok, raced rail midfield, shaken up 420m & shifted off fence, hard-ridden 350m, hung out 200m, shifted back in & kept on evenly to nick 3rd.
Broke ok, caught 3 wide with cover fore of midfield, 4 wide on turn & outpaced, driven 400m, found nil & faded right out.
Decent start, sat midfield 1 off with cover, shifted wide on turn & driven 420m, struggled & faded tamely.
Fast start to lead, crossed to rail 1500m & raced 1.5L clear, 1L ahead & shaken up 380m, all out & headed 250m, tapered & lost 3rd close home.
Slow start, niggled at tail, ridden along 500m, stayed on gradually under strong drive to just miss frame.
Broke ok & rousted initially, raced handy 1 off with cover, niggled 580m & shifted out on turn, hard-driven 400m, found nil & faded.
Tardy start & taken back of midfield 3 wide with cover, very wide into stretch, plodded on tamely centre track.
Sharp break wide, crossed to sit 2nd 1 off no cover 1300m, ridden to close 400m, battled to lead 250m, drew 1L clear & boxed on to wire.
Taken back from widest gate, trapped 4 wide no cover back of midfield, pushed on to mid rank 900m, gave ground on turn & driven 500m, widest into stretch, found nil & weakened.
Taken back from wide gate, raced 3 deep with cover near rear, niggled 1000m, shifted out & driven 430m, plugged on moderately.
Sluggish start & bustled to race rear rank 1 off, over-raced 900m, niggled 650m, driven turning in & dour progress, checked 200m, closed off for minor inroads.
Sluggish start & niggled along to race rail behind midfield, over-raced 1200m, under pump 500m & shifted out, plugged on evenly.
Fast break, tracked leader 1L back, easy progress to lead 440m, shaken up 320m, failed to shake off pursuers, headed 140m, no extra.
Sharp start, raced handy mid rank on rail, shifted inside 200m, closed off readily to just miss 2nd.
Broke ok, soon niggled centre track near rear, under pump 550m, plodded on same speed.
Tardy break, lacked toe & bustled a touch to race back of midfield, ridden under pressure 500m, one-paced in tepid run home.
Slow start & rousted initially to settle rail back of midfield, ridden 380m, drifted in & plugged on one pace.
Moderate start, soon niggled near tail, ridden 400m, outpaced & plugged on evenly.
Fast break, tracked leader close to stands' side fence, advanced to narrow 2nd 420m, ridden 320m, found little under pressure & faded out.
Smart start, raced handily mid rank, ridden 400m, hung to centre track & boxed on one pace.
Tardy start & outpaced, soon near tail on rail, last at 450m, driven 350m, kept on same speed to pass beaten rivals.
Broke well far side, raced handy mid rank centre track, cruised to leader's flank 440m, shaken up 350m, quickened under drive to lead 140m, driven clear.
Broke with others, raced centre track back of midfield, niggled early, under pump 450m, found nil & faded out tamely.
Slow start, raced tail centre track, niggled to advance a spot 450m, ridden 400m & edged towards far side, plodded on past fading rivals.
Speed to lead, crossed to snag stands rail 700m, headed 440m, under pump 400m, battled back into contention 260m, out-kicked & boxed on evenly.
Tardy break & crowded early strides, bustled a touch to race back of midfield, ridden 450m, struggled in weakening run to wire.
Travelled in midfield along the rail, 3L behind the leader, suited to the slow tempo, finished off nicely for 2nd, only lost out to an impressive winner.
Sat outside the leader throughout, suited to the slow tempo, kept on with the main field until 200M weakened.
Prominent, 1/2L off the pace 3 wide without cover, despite suited to the slow tempo, finished off only one-paced.
Slotted into box-seat and was 1-1/2L off the pace, suited to the slow tempo, ran on well in the Straight.
Travelled behind midfield, 3-3/4L off the pace 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, remained at rear in the Straight.
Travelled in front of midfield mostly but difficult to settle throughout, dropped off once straightened.
At the rear, 4-3/4L behind the leader 2-3 wide with cover, despite not suited to the slow pace, closed off nicely, just missed out on 3rd.
Raced towards the rear, 4-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited to the slow tempo, improved only slightly after straightening, did not run on thereafter.
Travelled in front of midfield, 1-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, shifted wide after turn for clear running, ran on okay.
Towards the rear and raced along the rail 4-1/4L behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, not competitive.
Travelled in front of midfield, 3L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited to the slow tempo and difficult to settle throughout, did not run on.
Settled in midfield, 2-1/2L off the pace 3 wide with cover, raced widest momentarily in the middle stages when pushed out, dashed until 200M only.
At rear, 5-3/4L off along the rail, no daylight in the Straight, not fully tested.
Rolled forward to lead by a short-head through slightly slow sectionals, once straightened unleashed strongly and cruised to a comfortable victory.
Ridden forward from wide draw before getting cover three-back, one-off 1000m. Not asked for effort till straightening, hit front 200m, kept on well while laying in.
Steadied shortly after start then shifted across behind runners towards rear. Last entering straight and never competitive.
Began well, settling one-back, one-off. Steadied turning for home, looked chance passing 300m, then one-paced.
Ridden along early settling two back along rail. Switched out after straightening and ran on well closing stages.
Bumped start, pressed forward three-wide without cover behind leading pair. Kept on till 200m before fading. Had mucus in trachea and entrapped epiglottis with ulceration.
Bumped start, pushed forward, taking box seat. Badly held up for run in straight before finishing well when clear 200m.
Jumped with field but no early pace, settling towards rear in one-off position. Switched out in straight to make run but only one-paced.
Crowded for room shortly after start, then taken forward one-off, two-back. Urged forward on straightening, hit front 300m, caught 200m, flattened 100m.
Steadied soon after start, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Never in the hunt.
Bumped start, ridden to hold rail behind midfield to straight. Gave ground quickly after passing 300m.
Pressed forward to lead on settling, then set steady pace to 300m when passed. Eased off heels 150m when giving ground.
Pressed forward to sit outside leader on settling. Put under pressure top of straight and kept battling to the line.
Began awkwardly from draw 13, towards the rear and no closer than 3-wide throughout, weakened turning in, soon left behind. (No vet findings)
Sent forward, tracked pace from 1200M, kept on steadily turning in but always held by leaders.
Shifted across behind runners from widest barrier, held up in last 6Ls off the slow pace middle stages, ran on well along inside, lacked room late stages not ridden out towards the finish.
Began awkwardly, pushed along the 3-path to obtain a more handy spot behind leaders, no cover from 900M, faded out of contention nearing 250M.
Broke down 1300M, retired out of the race.
Quickly into stride, led from 1200M at a well-handled pace, pressed by rival 500M, continued on well in the lead but ended near 50M, weakened into 4th near line.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield 4-5Ls off leaders, crept closer home turn, kept on same pace over final 300M.
Chased leaders along the 2-path, gave limited response when urged along 500M, gave ground mid-straight.
Eased to race in 2nd last 6Ls off pace, bustled along 550M, closed off strongly when driven wide in straight, got up near line.
Not hurried early stages, settled down 5Ls off the pace behind midfield, held up from top of the straight to 200M, finished off willingly when switched into clear, nearest finish.
Caught wide 1st turn, strolled forward from 1100M to join leader, strongly pressed leader from 400M, briefly in front 50M, headed late stages.
Had rail run from draw 2, held up in midfield 3Ls off pace, no clear run early straight, came through narrow passage 250M, closed off well to go 3rd just in time.
Began only fairly, driven forward but struck heels of rival and blundered 1500M, ended up 2-wide in midfield, stayed on moderately turning home, never a serious threat. (No vet findings)
Eased back early stages, towards the rear 5Ls back and saved ground along the fence, unable to obtain clear run in the straight, not tested.
Pressed forward to sit one-back, one-off behind leader. Had clear run entering straight, rolled forward from 300m, just got there, racing tight closing stages.
Began fairly, ridden along but kept very wide at rear, then became difficult to settle. Lost touch with field 400m and finished tailed off.
Began well, rolled forward along rail, two-back from leader. Held for clear run early in straight before finishing off nicely final stages.
Tightened start, attempted to savage another runner and stumbled. Niggled at throughout to hold midfield position before tiring in straight. Trainer warned of racing manners.
Bumped start, steadied, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Ran on fairly in straight.
Pressed forward from widest draw, taking clear lead before crossing to fence 1100m. Caught 300m but kept on well till swamped final 100m.
Bumped start, ridden along but left wide without cover at rear passing 1200m. Allowed to roll forward, swooped around field and 3rd into straight before tiring.
Began well, pushed along in midfield in one-off position to straight where ran on steadily to 100m before turning one-paced.
Began well, urged forward, taking box seat 2L from leader. Kept on well in straight before giving ground from 200m. Not ridden out closing stages.
Began well, pushed forward, sitting 1L behind leader on settling. Inched closer around turn, hit front 300m, battled strongly when challenged, pipped on post.
Began fairly, then taken to rail three-back from leader. Stayed on rail in straight and boxed on gamely without looking dangerous.
Crowded for room soon after start, crowded again 1300m, dropping 4-back along rail. Crowded passing 1000m, switched out in straight and ran on steadily.
Steadied soon after start, shifted across behind runners, settling at rear in one-off position. Switched wide 400m and ran on strongly closing stages.
Outpaced, dropping between horses at the rear. Lost touch with main field soon after straightening, finishing a long way back.
Taken across early to sit midfield 3 wide, before being sitting wide with no cover from 1000m. Well placed on the turn, but never kicked and not pushed vigorously to the line.

Began awkwardly and pushed forward early to be handily placed 1 off the fence, a ½ length off the early leader. Got the head up coming out of the back straight. Used up early and faded quickly in the straight.

Inconvenienced on jumping and dropped back to race in the last group, 4 wide with limited cover and pulling. 7L last on straightening. Ran steadily until held up from 200m-100m, running well when clear late.
Began well and taken forward to be handily placed 4th, 1 off the fence. Took on early leader on the turn. Pulled away from 400m, and went to the line unchallenged.

OK away and eased forward early to sit forward of midfield, on the rail. Held up on heels until 250m, and running on steadily until held up again over the last 75m and couldn't be ridden out, missing a place in a tight finish.
Pushed forward from the kick to take the lead early. Lost the lead at the top of the straight to the winner. Plugged away in the straight, weakening late, run down and missing a place.

Cruised forward early to settle midfield, 1 off the fence. Raced slightly tight on the turn, but had clear running at the top of the straight. Only plugged away 1 paced in the straight, and easing up late.

Broke well and pushed forward early to be handily placed in 3rd, 1L off the leader on the rail. Dropped back by the turn and plugged on steadily before rallying again late to take 3rd in a tight finish.

OK away, and eased forward early to sit just worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Forced a run through at the 400m, but had 4L to make up on the winner. Ran well in the straight, but left with too much to do.
Easy away, settling on the rail around midfield. Came inside to the rail after losing a run at 400m. Ran well to the line from there, and slightly on heels late.
Eased across early to sit around midfield, 3 wide with cover. Briefly tight on the turn. Ran flat when asked the question, and eased when jockey had concerns about the action.
Dropped back from the wide draw to be last early. Ran to the line steadily in the straight, picking off some of the slower ones.

Taken back from the wide draw to be placed in the last couple, 3-4 wide. Unsettled and off heels 700m. Came widest on the turn, and drifted wider in the straight. Only plugged away, and not pushed out late.

Dropped back early to sit at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Raced keen up the back straight, and came off heels at 1000m, and 900m. Near last on the turn, but improved steadily in the run home.
Ridden along travelling mainly 2-wide in 4th just over 2L off the pace, fought on steadily in straight to gain upper hand close to home.
Settled wide in a prominent position one off the pace, kept on same pace without threatening in straight.

Slightly slow out of the one draw, gradually improved to one-back rails position in 3rd passing the 600 metres, remained similar turning in, failed to quicken under pressure in straight and forced to steady nearing finish.
Niggled along 2-wide in midfield, fought on steadily in straight, forced to change course over 100 metres out when tightened.
Broke well, soon took up running, held narrow advantage to the 200 metres, folded up quickly.
Jumped fairly, travelled in rear on rails, saved ground turning in, switched out for a run inside the 200 metres, finished off race well.
Jumped well from a wide draw, settled outside the leader to straight, quickened under pressure to hit the front inside the 200 metres but only to be caught close to home.
Failed to muster, trailed the field to straight travelling wide without cover, made up good ground down the centre of the track.
Jumped fairly from the widest gate, settled wide in rear of midfield, awkwardly placed behind heels upon straightening, kept on before fading inside final 200 metres.
Close up early, gradually shifted backward behind midfield on rails, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards the rear, kept on without quickening in straight.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at good pace, hung on until 200M flattened.
Eased back, took rail, pace good, progressed steadily 300M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, mid-back 2 wide, pace good, made minor ground 200M.
Never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2-3 wide, pace good, ran on well for 2nd.
Pushed early, 2 wide at back, pace good, made some ground 200M.
Pushed to hold the rail in front of midfield, pace good, ran on well for 3rd.
Behind midfield along the fence, pace good, no turn of foot.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, pace good, just held ground in straight.
Rolled forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Pushed forward, pace good, emptied 250M.
Eased to rear, 2 wide , pace good, never improved.
Pushed to settle in a prominent spot, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily for 4th.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, dropped off soon after straightening.
Always at back, never ran on.
Pushed forward to share the lead, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, weakened soon after straightening.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, ran on well to score comfortably.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made no impression in straight.
Pushed forward, however, unable to cross from the outside, settled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made minor ground in straight without threatening.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well for 2nd.
Sent forward to take the fence and led at good pace, flattened 250M.
At rear, travelled 6L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made minor ground in straight.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, kept on nicely to hold 3rd.
Broke well & steadied to rail behind midfield, ridden turning in, staying on when crowded 200m, shaken up 100m, kept on for late inroads.
Outpaced & rousted, pushed forward to race 1 back on fence, niggled along, under pump 650m, boxed on to 2nd 200m, closed to wire.
Lacked pace at start, raced rail midfield, hung out on turn but held in by rival, hard-ridden 300m, driven to 3rd 90m.
Slow start & raced at tail until 1050m when advanced quickly 3 wide no cover, pressed leader 1 off at 600m, hard-ridden final turn, soon all out & tapered to wire.
Sharp break & led on rail1280m, set steady tempo until pressed 600m & extended, shaken up final turn, kicked clear, tapered but held on close home.
Broke well widest, restrained to slot behind midfield 1 off with cover, impeded badly 850m & many lengths detached from main group in 2nd last, tailed off & eased final turn.
Fast start to lead, restrained to 2nd 1 off, back to 3rd & niggled 650m, driven wide into stretch, boxed on one pace.
Broke well & bustled forward to 1st turn, snagged to sit handy 1 off 1 back, shuffled back a spot 650m & niggled, shifted out into stretch, one-paced in run.
Tardy start & rousted initially, sat 1 off with cover near tail, last at 1050m, shifted 3 wide 900m & minor advance backstretch, hard-ridden wide final turn, kept on evenly.
Started well, niggled to settle fore of midfield 1 off with cover, broke down 870m.

Allowed to settle at own pace three back from leader along rail. Stayed on rail around turn and ran on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.
Steadied and shifted across behind runners after start, settling at rear. Well back entering straight before finishing strongly between horses.
Bumped and unbalanced start, then crowded out, settling two-back along rail. Blocked for run early straight, switched out 100m, finished strongly.
Failed to muster speed, soon ended up in rear, pushed wide entering home turn, never involved.

Slow out, always well behind.

Settled in midfield, switched out for a run entering straight, ran on doggedly to just get up on line.

Ridden early, disputed lead briefly before shifting slightly backward to be just off the lead, weakened steadily after straightening.

Moderate start, soon picked to a prominent position in 5th, steadied for a stride coming out of back straight, similar turning for home, did not find much room and checked 200 metres out, fought on under pressure.
At rear, harmed by the slow pace, never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, 3 wide, reduced quickly 400M.
