Sat in front of midfield, 1-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, over-raced in the middle stages, did not run on.
Not pressed early and held 3-wide at rear back stretch. Four-wide around final turn, one-paced in straight. Lame left front leg.
Vigorously ridden to hold rail inside leader before settling in box seat passing 1300m. Took rails run in straight and boxed on gamely.
Inconvenienced start, then taken to fence 3-back from leader. Lost position final turn but stayed on rail and ran on steadily in straight.
Slow into stride, trailed field to 800m, hard ridden around turn to improve but only one-paced in straight.
Ridden early before settling one-off behind midfield. Took closer order around turn, four-wide entering straight, finished strongly to win close home.
Crowded start, shaken up but raced keenly first turn and back stretch. Got close to heels turn, one-paced in straight.
Jumped OK, holding rail behind midfield, before losing position final turn. Lost contact with field in straight. Had substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Urged forward from wide draw before crossing to fence 2-back from leader. Kept on well until 200m before fading.
Began well, pushed to lead in one-off position before crossing to rail 1200m. Caught passing 150m but kept on well to line.
Pressed forward 3-wide from outside draw, settling two-back, one-off. Rolled forward turn, hit front 150m, looked winner, run down final strides.
Jumped OK, settling in midfield close to fence. Switched out turning for home, ran on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.
Pressed forward, racing 3-wide before settling in one-off position 2L from leader. Urged forward top of straight but flattened 150m and faded.
Not hurried early stages, dropped back to the rear group 7Ls off leader, took a while to pick up in straight, did best work past 150M.
Soon hugged the rail and raced in mid-division, 4Ls to make up leaving 400M, made a mild bid entering straight but evened out late in the drive.
Began only fairly, unhurried and settled as the back-marker, 7Ls behind leader leaving 400M, didn't respond to riding and soon weakened.
Soon led, had uncontested lead, rallied on strongly when joined by rival 150M, dug in gamely late stages to prevail.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield 4Ls off the pace, gathered momentum passing 250M and closed off willingly late, nearest finish.
Positively ridden and gained a forward spot just off the pace, chased winner from 300M but always held, inclined to lay in late stages.
Began only fairly from 11, caught wide no cover throughout, moved closer to midfield before the turn, had little left and gave ground early straight. (lost LF plate at start)
Urged along soon after jumping from 12, obtained a 2-wide spot in the group chasing leaders, pursued to 150M then found no extra late.
Travelled strongly behind leaders, lodged a bid inside the winner 200M, drew alongside final stages and was just denied in a close finish.
Eased back to the rear from wide barrier, proved very difficult to settle down the back straight, 3-wide turning for home and not picked up to challenge.
Held up near the rear 5Ls behind leader, made some progress past 250M, altered course 150M and stayed on mildly down outside.
Restrained to race towards the rear 5Ls off leader, found less than expected when driven out 300M, never a threat to leaders. (Jockey : horse not suited by the way the track was racing)
Ridden along initially before restrained and taken to fence in last place 1200m. Took rails run in straight and finished strongly.
Began well, pressed forward racing 3-wide behind pace-makers. Left without cover from 800m, kept on to 200m when tired badly.
Pressed forward to lead passing 1550m, crossed to fence 1250m and slowed pace, Kicked clear entering straight and kept on strongly under hard riding.
Jumped OK, hard ridden but didn't muster and held wide behind the pace. Rolled forward from 1000m to sit outside leader 850m. Gave ground soon after entering straight.
Restrained on jumping and taken to fence at rear. Improved around turn, had to weave between horses in straight but finished strongly.
No early pace, settling at rear but away from fence. Kept wide around turn, very wide in straight but only one-paced.
Began well, stayed with pace but lost position after being crossed first turn. Switched out in straight and boxed on gamely.
Began awkwardly, bumped, pressed forward, settling one-back, one-off. Kept on well till 200m when tired and faded.
Inconvenienced start, not pressed settling at rear but wide. Improved around turn but one-paced in straight.
Not pushed, settling four-back along rail. Took inside run in straight and made ground steadily until steadied 50m.
Ridden along between horses in midfield before losing position around turn. One-paced in straight though no clear run 100m.
First out, taken to rail inside leader, grabbing box seat first turn. Under pressure entering straight but kept on well to line.
Slightly slow out but quickly recovered to just behind the leader on rails, kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 metres.
Prominent briefly, gradually settled in midfield on rails, dropped out tamely.
Ridden to keep up with pace early settling one-back 2-wide approaching home bend, kept on until finding no extra inside final 200 metres.
Settled wide in midfield from the widest gate, took closer order from the 800 metres to be 2L 4th 3-wide rounding the bend, sustained effort down home straight to just get up on line.
Prominent from a wide gate, lost position under pressure rounding home bend, ran home one-paced. (Lame next day)
Settled towards the rear, steadied briefly after straightening, finished off race well.
Soon took up running on rails gaining 2L advantage 200 metres out, flattered and caught final strides.
Settled wide in midfield from a wide gate, lost position passing the 800 metres and the widest runner rounding home bend, fought on steadily without threatening. (Tactic questioned)
Settled just worse than midfield, remained similar into straight, ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide without cover in better than midfield far side, lost position sharply rounding the bend, made no impression in straight.
Sluggish at start, trailed the field most of way, went past well-beaten horses inside final 200 metres.
Settled in rear, did not find much room early in straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, ran on strongly until 150M flattened.
At back, 2 wide, pace good, made early move around the field in 4 wide, made steady ground.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, pace good, no dash.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide no cover, pace good, ran on well to the line.
Behind midfield, trapped 3 wide with cover, pace good, progressed steadily 300M for 3rd.
Box seat, pace good, just held ground in straight.
Took rail and led easily at good pace, hung on well until 100M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Eased back, took rail, pace good, progressed steadily 300M.
Settled behind midfield, 2-3 wide, pace good, lack room 400M, little dash when clear, run ended 150M.
Midfield along the rails, pace good, no turn of foot in straight.
At back, took rail, pace good, held up 4-2, dashed well when clear and scored.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, pace good, soon emptied 350M.
At back along the fence, never improved.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, 2 wide, pace good, lack room 400M, made steady ground when clear.
Raced midfield, travelled 2Ls behind the leader middle part of the track, dashed well to score by 3/4L.
At back throughout, never in a competitive position.
Jumped slowly, settled at rear early, improved gradually mid stages down the middle part of the track, ran on steadily.
Sent forward to share the lead grand side, kept on until final 250M weakened badly.
At back, travelled 4Ls behind the leader middle part of the track, ran on only fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader grand side, ran on only fairly.
Failed to muster despite hard ridden along, travelled 3Ls behind the leader middle part of the track, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Camped handy, travelled nicely behind the leader grand side, ran on steadily when clear 300M.
Rolled forward to share the lead grand side, kept on until 250M weakened.
Showed good early pace to share the lead along outer fence, dropped off badly 350M.
Prominent, travelled 1L behind the leader grand side, ran on nicely for 2nd.
Always at rear, never looked likely.
Pushed to settle midfield along outer fence, kept on fairly and weakened 100M.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Broke with others, taken back & settled rail near rear, shifted 1 off 700m, not clear run on turn & back to rail, ridden 350m, closed for solid inroads.
Fast start to track lead on rail, 1 back from 700m, shifted out 340m & buffeted winner, no match & boxed on to 2nd close home.
Taken back, raced 1 off with cover near tail, shifted wide home turn, plodded on evenly centre track.
Broke well & prominent, raced close up 1 off no cover, 1 off 1 back at 500m, under pump 460m, found nil & weakened.
Decent break, taken back to 3 wide with cover midfield, shuffled back a spot 700m, bustled 450m & forced wide into stretch, struggled one pace, faded late.
Broke ok but soon outpaced, checked 1050m, settled midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out turning in, found nil in weak run home.
Broke ok & niggled along, trapped 4 wide no cover midfield, advanced 880m to press leader 580m, close 2nd & driven 420m, emptied 250m & weakened out.
Taken back at start to tail 1 off, driven into stretch, struggled in run home.
Dropped in at start to last pair 1 off, driven wide final turn, kept on one pace centre track.
Fast start wide, prominent no cover & taken back from 900m to midfield 3 wide, progress on turn, 3rd & driven 400m, buffeted 340m, quickened final 200m to lead 120m, drew clear.
Sluggish at start, settled rail midfield, over-raced on turn & head in air 550m, driven 350m & switched out, plugged on tepidly & tapered late.
Speed widest to lead, worked to rail 700m, pressured final turn, driven 0.5L clear 350m, all out & headed 120m, no extra & tapered, lost 2nd late.
Fast start, raced close up 1 off no cover, shifted 3 wide to challenge 600, ridden 450m, weakened in tame run home.
Moderate break, bustled to race 3 wide with cover midfield, lost cover 950m, wide advance to 3rd 550m, ridden 400m, found nil & faded.
Taken back at start, raced at tail, edged 3 deep 650m & widest turning in, driven 430m, closed centre track without threat.
Moderate start, raced rail midfield, driven into stretch, boxed on for moderate headway.
Sluggish break & bustled initially, raced 1 off near rear, shuffled to last 600m, ridden along 500m, plodded on one pace.
Slow start, raced rail near rear, switched out 400m & ridden, boxed on for minor inroads.
Speed to lead, to rail 1200m, headed 980m & raced 1.5L 2nd 820m, edged 1 off on turn, closed on bridle to vie for lead 400m, shaken up 350m, outpointed in duel to wire.
Started ok, sat handy 1 off with cover, shuffled back on turn, over-raced 750m & 640m, crowded & switched out 320m, shaken up 250m, plugged on one pace.
Outpaced & rousted initially, raced 3 wide with cover near rear, awkward turning in, found nothing under drive.
Sharp break, sat 1 back on rail, shuffled back a spot 820m, driven approaching final turn, boxed on dourly for 3rd.
Tardy start widest, raced 4 deep no cover back of midfield, checked 1050m & slotted 3 wide with cover, driven turning in, outpaced & tapered out.
Smart break, raced handy 3 wide no cover, rolled to lead 980m & to rail 820m, pressed & shaken up 400m, dueled in stretch & edged away close home.
Started ok, raced 1 off & shuffled to back of midfield, shifted out & ridden turning in, closed off for sound headway.
Prominent, 1-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, harmed by the fast pace, kept on until 200M when could not find extra.
Slotted in behind midfield, 5-1/4L off along the rail, checked near 250M, made slight ground thereafter.
In worse than midfield, 5-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, harmed by the quick sectionals, kept on one paced to the line.
At back, 8-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, ridden to improve from 800M, ran on nicely from thereon for the win.
Pushed forward to cross and eventually settled in box-seat, despite the fast sectionals, dashed well from 350M for 3rd.
Settled in midfield, 3-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, proved difficult to ride in the Straight, weakened after 200M.
Pushed forward to lead at quick sectionals in the first sections, not suited to quick pace, weakened near 200M.
Sat towards the rear, 6-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, suited to the fast tempo, finished off nicely for 2nd.
Travelled just in front of midfield, 3-1/4L off along the rail, bumped at 400M, after that was held up and not tested until 100M.
Sat outside the leader, not suited to the quick tempo, out of steam near 200M.
At rear along the rail, 8L behind the leader, despite not suited to the fast tempo, made ground steadily inside 200M.
Quickly into stride, pressed forward, taking box seat and tailing leader. Looked chance entering straight before tiring from 200m. Confirmed to be a "roarer".
Shifted across behind runners from a wide draw and last on settling while racing ungenerously. Never in the hunt.
Jumped with field, ridden along between horses behind tearaway leaders. Lost position turning for home, one-paced in straight.
Hampered start, urged forward, settling midfield in one-off position. Blocked when improving 300m, steadied 100m, boxed on in restricted room.
Shifted across behind horses from outside draw, settling 3-wide at rear. Took inside run in straight but badly held up 150m. Boxed on.
Began well, pressed forward to sit outside leader around turn. Boxed on gamely to 200m before tiring.
Hampered start, pressed forward but left wide without cover from 1300m. Stayed in contention to 200m before tiring.
No early pace, dropping to rear but wide. Covered extra ground turn, taken wider in straight, finished strongly.
Shifted across behind horses from wide draw settling at rear along fence. Stayed at rear to straight before making ground final 200m.
Began well, kept in one-off position and gradually shuffled back to rear between horses. Switched out in straight to make run but one-paced.
Not pushed, settling behind midfield but wide. Improved around turn, switched wide in straight, finished strongly to win close home.
Began well, quickly in front, crossing to rail. Set good pace, looked winner with 200m remaining, swamped final 50m.
Began well, rolled forward, stalking leader one-back, one-off. Closed in top of straight before running out of steam 200m. Unacceptable performance.
Slow, urged forward, settling two-back along rail. Took closer order around turn, took inside run in straight and ran on strongly.
Close up in 4th, advanced to 3rd 200M and kept up the chase on leaders, always held in the run to the line, lost 3rd late. (No Vet findings)
Tracked leaders along the fence, kept on steadily on straightening but lacked extra pace to challenge, raced in restricted room late and not ridden out towards finish.
Led slowly from the front, kept on well when pressed by rival early straight, lost lead 150M, faded late stages and held on for 2nd just.
Chased the pace from the outside, strongly challenged leader passing 350M, wrestled the lead 150M out and pulled away towards the line.
Began fairly, held up near the rear 4-5Ls off the pace, took a while to get going passing 400M, did best work final 200M, got up for 3rd near line.
Settled down in midfield 3Ls off the slow pace, in 5th place turning in, held up early straight, altered course 250M and stayed on mildly to the line.
Held up in midfield along the 2-path, unbalanced when bumped by rival 250M, ran on mildly without threatening late stages.
Reserved in the rear, 5Ls off the pace leaving 400M, not pace to challenge, never a threat.
Went forward early, was steadied to rear after 1100M but failed to obtain cover, not quickened in straight, left behind 200M and weakened towards the line. (No Vet findings)
Began OK but steadied 1500m, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Kept on fairly early in straight before tiring.
Urged forward but wide early, before travelling keenly from 1100m when left without cover. Bumped turn when improving, kept on steadily in straight.
Outpaced and soon at rear but wide. Kept wide around turn, taken wider in straight, but only one-paced.
Quickly in front from outside draw, racing wide till crossing to fence 1100m. Quickened tempo passing 600m, joined up front 400m, kept battling to line.
Jumped with field but pocketed on rail and shuffled back behind midfield. Switched out turning for home and boxed on fairly in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, dropping to last along rail. Checked off heels around turn and never likely thereafter.
Began well, ridden to stay with pace but 3-wide at 900m. Rolled forward to sit 3rd passing 650m, joined leader 400m, pulled clear final stages.
Began well, ridden along in one-off position behind pace before taking box seat around turn. Left flat-footed 600m when tempo quickened, one-paced in straight.
No early pace, dropping to rear but wide. Steadied passing 1300m, wide around turn, even wider in straight, kept on one-paced.
Crowded for room shortly after start, dropping to rear in one-off position, Switched out in straight to make run but never got going.
Urged forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide to 1000m before rolling forward to sit outside leader at turn. Kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Ridden along early but wide, then travelled keenly while improving position around turn. Looked a chance at 200m but unable to find extra close home.
Ridden to hold forward position, quickly crossing to rail and taking sit on leader. Got shuffled back around turn, one-paced in straight.
Began well, ridden along between horses 3L from leader. Not much room top of straight but kept on well to the line.
Not pressed early, and allowed to settle towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Came very wide on the turn and ran on fairly, without threatening the first half of the field.

OK away, dropping back early to sit near the rear of the field, on the rail. Took the short cut on the rails rounding the turn, before coming wider early in straight. Ran fastest in the straight to steal it right on the line.
Keen early when steadied to find cover in midfield, 1 off the fence. Raced keen down the back straight. Plugged on steadily in the straight, but never threatened.
Fairly away and found a position midfield, on the fence. Badly held up in the straight until the 200m when coming wider. Ran on steadily when clear and finished off well.

Pushed forward early to be handily placed in 4th, on the rail. Raced tight when aiming to push forward at the top of the straight, and briefly on heels. Ran OK to the line, but ran away from whip and weakening late.

Slightly tardy into stride, but pushed forward soon after to be handily placed in 5th, but tended to over race and stuck 3 wide with no cover from 800m. Fading before the turn, and dropped out in the straight, easing late.

Began well, but only cruised forward early to be midfield, 3 wide. Came wider on the turn and ran strongly in the straight. Raced tight at 200m, but kicked well to the line and was running down 3rd late.
Bumped early, and unsettled when being steadied back to sit at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Only 1 paced to the line.
Slow away and elected to drop back early to sit worse than midfield, 3 wide. Came wide on the turn and ran to the line steadily with minimal urging.
Pushed forward from the wide draw to eventually share the lead, 1 off the fence. Faded out from the 350m, and eased across the line late.

Fractious in the barrier before bounding out and losing ground. Stuck at the back of the field, 3-4 wide with no cover. Race had been run by the turn, and only plugged away to the line with little urging in the straight.

Bumped on jumping and pressed forward to be handily placed early, before dropping back towards midfield 1000m. Got in front at 250. Ran steadily and looked to have it before won, before being caught right on the line.
Pushed forward early from the inside draw to share the lead, 1 off the fence. Lead at the 400m, but never responded to pressure in the straight and not pushed out late.
Began well and taken forward to be early leader, before allowing to be crossed 1000m and settling 3rd. Ran steadily to the line in the straight, before weakening late. Just held 3rd.

Broke well from a middle draw, wide in midfield early before parked 2-wide behind runners just worse than midfield, obtained clear run over 250 metres out and ran on under pressure to claim race close to home.
Jumped fairly, settled about 2L off the pace in 5th, came under pressure rounding home bend, soon weakened in straight.

Trailed the field before making swift progress down far side to reach midfield 3-wide, came under pressure round home bend and a widest runner into straight, ran on steadily down the centre of the track. (Tactic questioned)
Raced wide without cover just better than midfield, gave ground from the 500 metres.
Worked his way across from a wide gate to lead or dispute lead, fought hard to gain slender advantage briefly 200 metres out but soon swamped.
Jumped fairly, settled in midfield on rails, came under strong pressure upon straightening, ran on doggedly to narrowly miss first two.
Slightly slow out, soon settled in rear of midfield, kept on same pace in the run home.
Led or disputed lead on rails, unable to sustain effort and retreated inside final 200 metres.
Tightened at start and dropped to last few, trailed the field most of way down back straight and around home bend, went widest turning in, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Taken across from a wide gate for rails run towards the rear, remained similar turning in, ran on down the inner of home straight to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well, settled just off the pace on rails, quickened to hold some chance inside final 100 metres only to be swamped final few strides.
Pressed forward, 2-3 wide, pace fast, ran on well to the line.
Midfield along the fence, favoured by the fast sectionals, made steady ground 300M to score by narrow margin.
Hard ridden early, at back, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M, run ended 100M.
Pushed to sit in midfield, 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, ran on fairly.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, benefited by the fast pace, made minor ground 200M.
Box seat, not suited by the fast pace, dropped off 300M.
Pushed forward, 2 wide, harmed by the fast tempo, emptied 200M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, clocked fast sectionals, hung on well until 100M flattened.
Eased back, benefited by the fast pace, worked around the field 600M in 3-4 wide, made steady ground.
Pushed to hold the rail in front of midfield, pace fast, flattened 200M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, not suited by the very slow sectionals, unable to make any impression in straight.
At back throughout, never a factor.
Settled midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the very slow pace, never ran on.
Taken back to the fence from a wide gate, travelled 7Ls behind the leader, hampered by the very slow pace, made minor ground in straight.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, despite benefited by the very slow tempo, faded soon after straightening.
Rolled to occupy the box seat, despite suited by the very slow tempo, kept on only fairly without extra acceleration.
Camped handy, travelled 2.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the very slow tempo, ran on well for 3rd.
Rolled forward to take the fence and led at very slow sectionals, hung on strongly to score by a short head.
Eased back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite harmed by the very slow pace, dashed well for 2nd, missed by a short head.
Prominent, however trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, suited by the very slow sectionals, kept on well until weakened concluding stages.
Settled worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the very slow pace, made some ground in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, not suited by the very slow pace, one paced home.
Began fairly, bumped, then taken to rail towards rear. Found little under hard riding in straight.
Steadied, shifted in, but raced keenly and held wide without cover. Improved around turn but one-paced in straight.
Shifted in from wide draw but no pace and soon at rear away from fence. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Away nicely, taking box seat on settling and stalking leaders to straight. Switched out 300m to challenge, hit front 70m, pulled clear.
Bumped start, rolled forward, settling one-off, two-back. Switched out in straight and ran on fairly.
Bumped start, not pressed, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Put under pressure on straightening and ran on steadily.
Hard ridden to lead 930m but shaded by inside runner 600m. Retook lead passing 400m, battled strongly when challenged, losing in final strides.
Pressed forward, stalking leading pair in one-off position to straight. Threw out strong challenge but unable close gap.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and last on settling. Never in the hunt.
First out, led to 930m when passed. Retook lead 600m, collared 400m, kept on well till 100m when flattened.
Began OK, taken to rail, three-back from leaders. Took inside run in straight and kept on fairly.
Jumped OK, not pushed, settling 3-back along rail. Made ground around turn, got rails run in straight, finished strongly to just fail.
Began well, urged forward but wide, settling one-off, two-back. Lost some ground around turn, one-paced in straight.
Bumped start, urged forward, settling one-back, one-off. Under pressure soon after straightening and gave ground gradually.
Pressed forward to sit outside hindquarters of leader. Swung wide entering straight, battled strongly but unable close gap.
Away nicely, grabbed box seat and tailed leader to straight. Got clear run when leader swung wide but unable close gap.
Began awkwardly, crowded, dropping to rear. Hugged rail around turn, making up some ground, ran on fairly in straight.
Steadied soon after start and shifted in but unable find cover and held three-wide at rear. Ran on fairly in straight.
Restrained, shifted across behind runners from wide draw, dropping to last approaching turn. One-paced in straight.
Bumped start, ridden to hold midfield position between horses, checked around turn, faded gradually in straight.
Jumped straight to the front when gates opened and made all. Swung wide entering straight but kept finding when challenged.
Began OK, ridden to hold forward position 2L from leader but wide. Taken wider around turn, boxed on in straight without looking dangerous.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide before easing back at turn. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Always at the back, never a factor.
Travelled just in front of midfield, 3L off on the rail, suited to the slow pace, found an extra gear near 200M for the win.
Sat just behind midfield, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, finished tailed out.
Travelled in front of midfield, 4-3/4L off 3 wide without cover, ran on until 250M then weakened.
Pushed forward to grab box-seat, sat 1-1/2L behind the leader, suited to the slow pace, ran on well for 2nd.
Towards the rear and raced on the rail, 9-1/2 off the pace, not suited to the slow tempo, dashed well and made good ground.
Fractious and missed start, remained at the rear, did not run on.
In midfield along the rail, 4-3/4L off the pace, finished off well once cleared passing 200M.
In midfield along the rail, 6-1/2L off the pace, not suited to the slow pace, improved slightly only.
Rolled forward into the lead and led by 1-1/2L at slow sectionals, kept on until headed and weakened passing 200M.
Raced behind midfield, 7-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, made slight ground down the outside straight.
Prominent, 2-3/4L off the pace 2 wide and without cover, benefited by the slow pace, found little for the final 200M.
Hampered shortly after start, dropping towards rear close to fence. Well back entering straight, switched out 200m, ran on well.
Bumped start, rolled forward, taking box seat and trailing leader to straight. Hard ridden to hold position to 200m before fading.
Bumped start but soon in front, setting steady pace. Collared passing 200m but kept on well till flattened 50m.
Steadied soon after jump but refused to settle and gradually lost touch with field, finishing tailed off. Unacceptable performance.
Steadied soon after start, ridden to find cover, settling at rear. Came off fence around turn, ran on steadily between horses in straight.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward but travelled keenly between horses 3L from leader. Found little in straight. Lost left hind plate 900m.
Pressed forward to sit outside hindquarters of leader on settling. Shaken up entering straight, hit front 200m, pulled clear final stages.
Checked shortly after start, refused to settle and checked again around turn. Switched out in straight and finished strongly.
Quickly away, settling one-back, one-off. Rolled forward on straightening, looked to overhaul leader 200m but one-paced final strides.
Snatched up on jumping and taken to rail behind runners, settling four-back from leader. Stayed on rail around turn but one-paced in straight.
Began well, taken to rail two-back from leader and settled. Took inside run in straight and kept on well to the line.
Ridden along from outside draw but unable find cover and held three-wide behind midfield. Wide throughout and one-paced in straight.
Strolled to the lead as expected, took them along evenly, fought on gamely when joined by eventual winner 200M, unable to match strides late but was clearly 2nd best.
Held up 2-wide behind midfield, 6-7Ls off the pace middle stages, bustled along 450M, stayed on mildly.
Caught wide early, used a bit to go forward finding the lead, emptied passing 250M and weakened.
Restrained to race near last, 10Ls off the pace in first half, kept to inside entering straight, made some progress without threatening.
From widest barrier soon taken across behind runners, settled last over 10Ls off the pace, not found much when pushed along, soon beaten.
Not hurried, settled down near the rear 8-9Ls behind leaders, ran on mildly on straightening, no threat to leaders.
Tracked pace along the inside, chased first 2 passing 250M but always held, faded late.
Travelled 2-wide in midfield, didn't respond to urging 400M, eased when beaten.
Settled down in 5th 4Ls off the pace, driven out nearing 400M, swiftly moved up to join leader 200M, gained narrow advantage under strong ride, held sway at the finish.
In midfield and saved ground along the fence, gave way passing 300M, eased.
Began awkwardly, tracked leaders and remained in touch to 400M, dropped away when placed under pressure, weakened rapidly. (No Vet findings)
Held up behind midfield 7-8Ls off the pace, stayed on moderately for non-threatening 4th.
Always well behind.
Settled in midfield or just worse, ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled wide in midfield from the widest gate, dropped towards the rear from rounding home bend, made up late ground under pressure in the run home.
Settled well behind, saved ground turning in, one-paced in the run home.
Never far off to straight, soon weakened.
Settled towards the rear, baulked for a run early in straight, switched and produced good late finish inside final 200 metres.
Pressed forward from a wide gate, remained wide rounding first bend and far side, obtained position outside the leader passing the 1000 metres, hit the front 350 metres out, hung on well.
Broke well, settled in forward of midfield, came under pressure entering straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled wide in midfield, lost position approaching home bend, made no show in straight.
Soon took up running and led the field to the 350 metres, folded up quickly.
Ridden from the one draw, settled about 2L off the pace on rails, gained closer and switched off rails to challenge turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Always in last few.
Ridden from a wide gate travelling wide prominently, drifted steadily backward to midfield far side, soon weakened in home straight.
Slowly away, quickly crossed to rails and picked up to midfield, saved ground turning in, kept on same pace without quickening under pressure.
Pushed forward to cross, led at advantageous slow sectionals, drifted away 300M to score.
Behind midfield, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Pushed forward, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on until 250M flattened.
Never competitive behind midfield.
Never improved at rear.
Eased back, dashed strongly 300M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Failed to muster, at back, not suited by the slow pace, no progress in straight.
Pushed forward, enjoyed the slow sectionals, ran on well for 2nd.
Midfield, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in final stages.
Behind midfield, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok.
At rear, trapped very wide, never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, benefited by the slow pace, ran on until 200M flattened.
Settled midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader, closed off well to take the victory by only a short head.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader, ran on strongly for 2nd, just beaten by a short head.
Rolled forward to take the outer fence and led by 1L, kept on strongly for 3rd in a tight finish.
Always at rear, never looked likely.
Rolled forward to settle 1L behind the leader, hung out and proved difficult to ride most trip, kept on one pace to the line for 4th.
Prominent, kept on steadily to the line without threatening.
On jumping was bumped, consequently raced back in the field, never a factor.
At rear throughout, unable to show any acceleration when asked.
Jumped OK, badly hampered near 1000m dropping 2-back along rail. Tracked eventual winner to 200m, switched out and finished strongly to just fail.
Began well, not pushed, hugging rail 2-back from leader. Pressed forward on straightening, took over lead passing 250m, held off late challenge.
Bumped on jumping, no pace, dropping to last before turn. Well back entering straight, taken to centre track, kept on well.
Jumped with field, ridden but didn't muster, dropping to rear. Held position around turn, swung wide into straight, ran on strongly under the whip.
Ridden forward to find cover, bumped 1000m, then held 3-wide in midfield. Put under pressure on straightening and boxed on gamely.
Began awkwardly, bumped and unbalanced, bumped again 1000m. Crowded 900m, tightened 600m, checked 350m. Boxed on.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling one-off, two-back. Ridden to hold position turn, one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from outside draw, settling 1L behind leader. Bumped and taken out 400m, checked 200m when giving ground. Minor wound on right hind paster.
Hard ridden to lead on settling, then slowed pace. Overtaken passing 250m and faded. Had substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Taken quickly to fence but outpaced, dropping to rear. Held up top of straight, switched in and out to get run, crowded out 150m, finished off nicely.
Away quickly, holding rail before settling in box seat. Bumped and unbalanced top of straight, boxed on to 200m before tiring.
Crowded out start, pressed forward but held wide without cover 2L from leader. Severely checked top of straight and faded. Had substantial amount of blood and mucus in trachea.
Began awkwardly, ridden to hold midfield position between horses. Improved around turn, kept on well to 200m before turning one-paced.
Ridden forward from outside draw but held wide and lost position around turn. Gave ground soon after straightening.
Jumped well, ridden forward, settling in one-off position 2L from leader. Lost position around turn, lay out under pressure in straight, one-paced.
Hard ridden to lead on settling, crossing to fence 900m. Overtaken approaching 650m, gave ground quickly in straight.
Began OK, crowded out 900m, dropping to last entering turn. Took inside run in straight and finished strongly.
Ridden but unable find cover and held wide behind midfield. Made some progress around turn but tired soon after straightening.
Began well, quickly taking box seat, tailing leader. Got shuffled back around turn, kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Began well, ridden forward settling 1L from leader. Shuffled back to 3rd passing 650m, rolled forward turning for home, hit front 300m and pulled clear.
Bumped start, ridden to hold rail 2-back from leader. Shuffled back around turn, held for run 400m, finished strongly when clear.
Pressed forward from outside draw settling 3-back but wide, then hard ridden to take over lead passing 650m. Caught 300m out but kept on well.
Began fairly, bumped, dropping behind midfield but difficult to settle. Swung wide into straight but only one-paced.
Began fairly, restrained to find cover, dropping to rear. Bumped and carried wider around turn, kept on fairly in straight. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Travelled in midfield, 4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited to the slow pace, closed off nicely, just missed out on 2nd.
Ridden forward to get box-seat, 1-3/4L behind the leader, suited to the slow pace, couldn't keep on passing 150M.
Sat towards the rear, 5-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, made marginal ground only.
Towards the rear along the rail, 5-1/2L off the pace, did not run on.
Pushed forward from a wide barrier to take the rail and led by 1-1/4L through slow sectionals, kept going until 150M headed, held on for 2nd.
Sat in front of midfield along the rail, 2-3/4L off the pace, suited to the slow tempo, finished off one paced.
Raced outside the leader, 1-1/4L behind, suited to the slow tempo, finished off nicely for the win.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, not suited to the slow tempo, not competitive.
Sat in front of midfield, 2-3/4L off 3 wide and without cover, despite suited to the slow tempo, found nothing after straightening.
At rear, 6-3/4L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite not suited to the slow tempo, made steady ground down the outside Straight.
At rear, 8-1/2L behind, not suited to the slow pace, not competitive.
In midfield along the rail, 4L behind the leader, weakened after straightening.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind horses, settling behind midfield. Dropped to last around turn, found nothing in straight.
Reared start losing considerable ground, last on settling. Made up some ground around turn but one-paced in straight.
Bounded in the air at start, ridden to make up ground, settling 4L from leader at turn. Taken wide entering straight, finished strongly down centre track to win on line.
First out, not pushed, settling 3L back but 3-wide before turn. Rolled forward entering straight to look chance 200m, battled to line.
Slow, then crowded, taken to rail behind midfield. Travelled keenly from 1200m, switched out 400m to make run but one-paced.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide 4L from leader. Lost position around turn, tired quickly in straight.
Pressed forward from inside draw to take lead on settling, pulling 2L clear entering turn. Collared passing 300m and faded quickly. Rider reported abnormal breathing noises.
Quickly away, ridden along between horses 3L from leader. Began forward move 500m, inconvenienced 350m, kept on to 200m, then one-paced.
Jumped well, pressed forward 2L from leader in one-off position. Urged forward on straightening, hit front 300m, battled to 100m when flattened.
Shifted across behind horses from outside draw, settling at rear but away from fence. Hard ridden from 900m but only one-paced.
Away nicely, rolled forward to hold rail 2-back from leader. Improved around turn, took inside run in straight, kept on fairly.
Jumped with field, ridden to hold rail, steadied 1200m but held on to box seat. Urged forward top of straight, inconvenienced passing 300m, boxed on.
Jumped with field, not pressed, racing in midfield between horses. Rolled forward top of straight, hit front 200m, pipped on line.
Began fairly, sifted across behind horses to find cover at rear. Switched out turning for home, very wide in straight, finished strongly.
Prompted the pace on outside, driven out 450M, battled on at the same pace, faded mid-straight.
Saved ground on the fence tracking leaders, steadily progressed to 2nd 150M, pushed winner to the line.
Held up 2-wide behind mid-division, 4Ls off the pace 400M, ran on only fairly, no threat to leaders.
Led evenly, couldn't sustain run entering straight, headed inside 300M, weakened towards finish.
3-wide no cover chasing leaders, loomed a strong chance early straight and briefly led passing 300M, kept on evenly but not finishing pace of first 2 final 200M.
Not hurried early stages, eased back to rear group 5-6Ls off the pace, saved ground but couldn't find the necessary response when asked passing 400M.
Failed to muster speed, ended up on outside of rear trio, swung wide leaving 500M but found little under urge, never involved. (No Vet findings)
Travelled mid-division along the fence, stayed on fairly entering straight, not reach leaders.
Held up 3-wide in mid-division but never far off from leader in a compact field, loomed a threat 300M, kept on steadily to the line, not pace of first 2 final stages.
Restrained to a 3-wide position behind midfield, quickened to lead 250M, shifted inwards under left hand whip but continued on well to hold persistent runner-up.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield 3Ls behind leader, weakened 350M, first to be beaten.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, reserved in the rear 5-6Ls off the pace, brought wide 400M and stayed on moderately.
Not pushed, settling four-back along fence. Stayed on fence around turn, took inside run in straight, boxed on steadily.
Began well, ridden along in midfield between horses but travelled keenly after 1000m. Improved around turn, got close 200m, then one-paced.
Ridden along one-back, one-off to 800m before edging forward 3-wide around turn. Looked chance 200, one-paced final strides.
Bumped shortly after start, pressed forward, settling two-back from leader. Shuffled back around turn, one-paced in straight.
Outpaced, shifted in to rail, and last on settling. Lost touch with main field around turn and finished well back.
Jumped well but shifted in and bumped. Ridden to hold rail inside leader before taking sit entering turn. Gave ground soon after straightening.
Began OK but no pace, dropping to rear along fence. Never in the hunt though ran past tired horses final stages.
Pressed forward from an outside draw but held 3-wide in midfield. Kept on well early in straight before tiring final 200m.
Quickly into stride, tailing leader in one-off position. Kept wide turning for home and gave ground quickly in straight, finishing tailed off.
Not pressed, dropping to rear in one-off position. Stayed at rear around turn, ran on fairly in straight between horses while hanging in under pressure.
Bumped, unbalanced after start but soon in front, crossing to fence 1000m. Joined 500m, kicked ahead 350m, held off late challenge.
Began well, pushed forward but wide, settling 1L behind leader. Joined leader passing 500m, kept on well to 200m, no extra final strides.
Had legs off ground at start, then crowded and lost ground, dropping to rear. Made ground turn, taken wide in straight, ran on steadily.
Bumped, unbalanced after start, eased back towards rear but 3-wide. Taken wider around turn, finished strongly down centre track to just miss.

Raced tight early and dropped back to his usual position towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Not suited to the slow pace in the back straight and pressed forward 800. Only fair to the line.
Taken forward early to sit just outside the early leader in 2nd. Dropped out in the straight, and not pushed out to the line late.
Dropped back early from the wide barrier to sit worse than midfield, 3 and 4 wide with limited cover. Came wider on the turn and ran strongly to the line.
OK away and found a spot around midfield, 1 off the fence. Under pressure before the turn, and dropped out quickly in the straight. Eased to the line late.

Pushed forward from the wide barrier, but stuck 5 wide around the first turn. Eventually sat forward of midfield, 4-5 wide with no cover. Race was run by the turn, and dropped back quickly in the straight.

Dropped back from the wide draw to sit at the rear of the field, 3-4 wide. Near last on turn, and came very wide in the straight. Finished off strongly with the 2nd fastest last 400m, but had too much to do late.

Briefly crowded on jumping and awkward on heels early before finding a position midfield early. Checked out of run at 700m and dropped back. Took the shortcut along the rails turning for home, but didn't kick in the straight.
Taken forward early to be handily placed 3-4th on the rail, trailing the leader. Ran strongly to the line, but couldn't kick with winner. Just took 2nd late.

Pushed forward to be handily placed early, 3 wide with no cover. Pressed forward from the 700m, to sit outside the early leader. Pushed to the line, but easily beaten by winner and peaked late to lose 2nd.
Pushed forward from the kick to go to the lead, before slowing the tempo in the back straight. Led at the 250m, but peaked soon after and dropped out late.
Didn't kick early from the inside draw and sat midfield on the fence early. Ran on steadily in the straight, but lacked a big kick and never threatened a place.
Began well, but not used up early and taken to sit in midfield, 3 wide with cover. Ran strongly to the line despite a tendency to lay in, and pulled away in the last 100m.

Began awkwardly, dropping back to last early, keen and on heels. Keen up the back straight before becoming unbalanced at 700m. Last on the turn, but ran steadily to the line and picked up some slower ones late.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths back, 3 wide with cover on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Raced at tail for the majority of the race, taken wide in straight and made reasonable progress to be nearest on line.
Jumped with them, raced prominently, 3 wide with no cover after 1000M, raced tight early in straight, severely checked and fell near 300M.
Average to begin, raced 6 lengths back on rail at rear, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide in midfield, wider on turn, no clear running early in straight, made some progress thereafter. (See Racing Incidents)
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced prominently in 2nd, same position on turn, kept on well in straight to get 2nd.
Jumped well from gate 10, raced 3 wide with some cover in midfield, bumped near 700M, 4 wide with no cover on turn, kept on well until near 150M, weakened closing stages.
Taken back from gate 9, raced 7 lengths back at rear, angled out turning in, finished off strongly in straight to be nearest on line.
Began well from a wide draw, slotted in to race 3 lengths back on rail, kept to inside after straightening, no daylight until after 300M, finished off one-paced.
Moderately away, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well to turn, kept on very well in straight and scored.
Moderately away, positioned 1 out 1 back, same position on turn, raced tight early in straight, one-paced thereafter.

Began well from gate 2, positioned 4 lengths or so back on rail behind midfield, 2 wide on turn, no daylight early in straight and severely affected by the fallen HARD BALL GET, made good progress thereafter to make frame.
Jumped with them, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths back at rear, same position on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off one-paced, never a threat.

Moderate start, soon recovered to join the leaders, hit the front at the 800 metres gaining rails run, kicked over 1.5L clear turning for home but unable to sustain effort and headed by the winner 150 metres out.
Jumped fairly from a middle gate, shared pace when very wide far side before shifted 2L back, widest runner entering straight, never recovered.
Began well, soon dropped to last few, ran on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well from the one draw, taken back just off the pace over 800 metres out, tracked leader into straight, hit the front under pressure 150 metres out.
Broke well, amongst leaders 4 wide early, taken back passing the 1000 metre bend, hampered and shuffled back to just worse than midfield 600 metres out, faded further after straightening.
Amongst leaders, raced keenly before successfully taken back for cover after first 400 metres, found nothing from 2.5L 5th into straight.
Soon dropped to the rear, remained well behind to straight, made steady progress after straightening but baulked for a run inside final 200 metres.
Moderate start, soon recovered to midfield, took closer order rounding home bend and snuck up to 3rd on rails turning in, sustained progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Taken back from a poor draw, trailed the field to straight, only ran past beaten horses.
Settled behind midfield, saved ground entering straight, ran home one-paced.
Broke well from a wide gate, settled just over 2L off the pace in 7th, lost position coming onto home bend, made modest headway under pressure in straight.
Broke well from the widest gate, raced wide and with leaders throughout far side, faded rapidly under pressure inside final 400 metres.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at good pace, hung on well until 200M emptied.
Behind midfield along the fence, ran on only fairly in straight.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, improved along the fence, lack room 300M, closed off strongly to score.
Dropped back, took rail, improved steadily 300M, dashed well 150M.
Hard ridden early, trapped 2-3 wide in midfield, ran on well to the line.
Very slow away, pushed to keep up behind midfield, 2 wide, made steady ground 250M.
Eased back, raced very wide, never competitive.
Pushed to obtain box seat, lack room 300M, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide off the good pace, ran on well for 3rd.
Trapped 2-3 wide at back, never progressed.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, reduced 300M.
Took rail behind the front runners, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, dashed strongly to get 2nd in a bunched finish.
Sent forward to take the fence and led at good pace, kept on steadily until 100M weakened.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader, kept on strongly to hold off all the challengers by a nose in a bunched finish.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, held up until 150M, stormed home for 5th in a bunched finish.
Camped handy, kept on only fairly until weakened final 100M.
Always at rear, never looked likely.
Never a factor, tailed out.
At back, 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in straight.
Rolled forward to occupy a prominent spot on the fence, crowded early straight, ran on fairly.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung widest turning in, closed off well for 3rd in a bunched finish.
Prominent, despite trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, kept on well for 4th in a bunched finish.
Settled midfield early, moved forward gradually 700M, kept on one pace to the line.
Started well, bustled at first to settle 1 off with cover fore of midfield, niggled 600m, 3 deep under pump 400m, dour progress to lead 190m, edged ahead readily.
Fast start & bustled to lead, pushed 1L clear & to rail 1150m, driven final turn, shifted out 300m, emptied & headed 270m & faded tamely.
Broke ok, rousted initially, soon parked 1 back on rail, crowded & bumped turning in, in pocket until shifted out 250m, found nil & weakened.
Settled back rail near rear, ridden 360m, strong closer to 2nd 150m, fought on but always held.
Taken back to last, shifted 3 wide 900m, back to 1 off 700m, checked turning in when wide but in pocket, switched back & widest 210m, kept on for minor inroads.
Held up at start, caught 3 wide no cover back of midfield, wide & driven into stretch, one-paced in tepid run home.
Broke ok & bustled to rail fore of midfield, niggled 500m, shifted 1 off & driven 400m, bumped turning in, switched out 250m, found nil & tapered.
Broke well but outpaced & squeeze out, shuffled to behind midfield 1off, in pocket turning in, driven 210m kept on evenly.
Decent start, settled rail back of midfield, shifted 1 off on turn & driven into stretch, closed soundly to 3rd but well held.
Smart break, pushed forward from widest to press lead 1st turn, 2nd & ridden 400m, handed lead 270m, all out & headed 190m, faded out.
Tardy start & taken back to 1 off near rear, bumped into 1st turn, shifted 3 deep 800m, driven wide into stretch, stayed on for minor headway.
Broke ok, sat midfield 1 off with cover, wide final turn, shaken up 300m, boxed on without threatening.
Broke fast to lead, 0.5L up & driven under pressure 350m, all out & headed 210m, boxed on to hold 2nd.
Sharp start, slotted 1 back on rail, locked in pocket into stretch, switched out & driven 160m, limited response in one-paced run home.
Tardy early, bustled & rolled wide to park 2nd outside leader 1200m, niggled 450m, hard-ridden 350m, responded to lead 210m, drew clear.
Broke fast, restrained to midfield, settled 3 wide no cover midfield, advanced on outer to sit 3rd 700m, niggled 600m, under pump 380m, tapered gradually to wire.
Sluggish start & bustled, parked rail behind midfield, hard-driven into stretch, lacked toe but stayed on dourly to wire.
Broke ok, raced wide with cover behind midfield, niggled 680m, driven home turn, lacked pace & struggled in run home.
Good start, handy when restrained 1620m to midfield 1 off with cover, niggled & edged 3 wide with cover 900m, advanced a spot 700m, under pump 600m, one-paced in run.
Broke well, settled rail midfield, ridden 350m, shifted off fence, crowded 150m, one-paced in tepid stretch run.
Slow start, bustled to rail & settled near tail, advanced a spot 800m, driven into stretch, stayed on for late gains.
Veered left start, lit up & crossed track to main group, over-raced 3 wide with cover, settled at tail, ridden 380m, found nil.
Smart start, taken back to 1 off near tail, niggled for progress 450m, switched off heels 300m & driven, closed centre track for solid gains.
Broke well & camped handily 1 off with cover, driven turning in, progress to 3rd, boxed on to wire without threatening.
Sat towards the rear, 5-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, made nice ground to come home for 4th.
Always at the rear, never a factor.
Ridden forward to sit 2L behind the leader but wide, little dash after straightening, one paced home thereafter.
Parked outside the leader, kept challenging until the final 100M when couldn't find extra, just hung on for 3rd.
Jumped slowly but showed good speed to settle in midfield, hampered and lost ground at around 600M, did not run on.
Slotted into midfield along the rail 3-1/4L behind, taken to 2 wide around turn, found break at 150M and finished off nicely for the win.
Jumped well, ridden forward and took box-seat after deciding not to lead, lost ground around turn, finished off only one paced.
Raced prominently, 1-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, hard ridden but couldn't find any in the straight.
Slow to begin and had to be ridden along at the rear to keep up with the field, made ground steadily in the straight.
In midfield, 3-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, taken widest after turn, did not improve.
Travelled just behind midfield, 5-1/2L off 3 wide with cover, ridden from 400M to maintain position, made marginal ground in the straight.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, remained on the inner Straight after turn, kept going until headed by a strong finishing effort at 50M.
Ridden along between horses behind midfield to straight, took inside run but found little under hard riding. Lost left front plate on jumping.
Quickly in front and then raced keenly in the lead, pulling 3L clear around turn. Overhauled passing 250m and faded.
Bounded in air as gates opened and lost several lengths. Trailed field to straight before running past beaten horses.
Pressed forward but held 3-wide before easing back and getting cover 900m. Taken to rail around turn, ran on well in straight.
Began well, taken to fence 2-back from leader and settled. Switched out 300m to get clear running and finished strongly to win close home.
Hard ridden from wide barrier, steadied 1000m to find cover but left wide from 700m. Switched wide in straight and finished off strongly.
Away nicely and soon in box seat trailing leader. Moved up sharply turning for home, hit front 250m but run down 50m out.
Began awkwardly, restrained and shifted across behind runners, settling at rear in one-off position. Never in the hunt.
Began well, ridden to hold forward position, settling one-off, one-back. Kept on well to 200m before turning one-paced.
Began well, taken forward, settling 3L from leader in one-off position. Taken wide in straight but only one-paced under pressure.
Hard ridden from widest draw to go forward, settling 2L behind leader back stretch. Kept on well to 200m before tiring.
No early pace, settling behind midfield along fence. Improved around turn, switched out in straight to make run but only one-paced.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, moved into contention 300M and loomed a threat mid-straight, kept on under pressure, beaten to 4th late.
In touch, on heels of weakening leader home turn, badly held up to 250M, couldn't pick up the pace thereafter.
Began awkwardly, strode forward to sit 2nd behind runaway leader, moved up to the lead 350M, not finishing pace of winner 150M, held 2nd till late stages.
Not hurried early stages, got shuffled back to the rear about 8Ls off the pace from runaway leader, keeping on fairly entering straight, never a threat.
Set good pace first 800M, opened up 3Ls lead mid-stages, caught by rivals 350M, weakened rapidly in straight.
Restrained to near the rear, well off the pace behind runaway leader early and middle stages, driven out nearing 400M but gave limited response, flattened 100M.
Held up 2-wide behind midfield, about 6Ls behind leader making the turn, mild effort early straight, weakened 200M.
Taken across behind runners, at the rear 10Ls off the pace middle stages, stayed on moderately over final 300M but always held by leaders.
In 4th place 3-4Ls behind runaway leader, pushed along 450M, progressed to the lead inside 200M, driven clear and continued on well to the line.
Held up in midfield along the inside, crept closer to pace 400M, kept on one paced under pressure.

Went forward early but caught wide, was steadied to obtain a position behind midfield but lost cover again 900M, pushed wider home turn, kept on fairly in straight but not a bad run considering tough trip.
Began only fairly, held up towards the rear 6-7Ls off the good pace, not much room early straight, closed off well when switched out 200M, got up for 2nd near line.
Jumped moderately but soon gained narrow advantage on rails, ceded lead passing the 1200 metres to sit one back, renewed effort to gain upper hand over 100 metres out.
Ridden early, settled in midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, did not find much room early in straight, quickened quite well inside final 200 metres.
Moderate start, soon picked up to 4th just over 2L back, settled in the similar position to straight, one-paced under pressure.
Taken back from a wide gate, waited with, switched wide entering straight, made modest headway down the centre of the track. (Lame)
Taken back from a wide gate, waited with, snuck up on rails turning in, sustained progress under pressure, nearest at finish.
Held back in last few, raced keenly around the bend, in similar position entering straight, ran home at the one pace.
Began well from a wide gate to race handily, disputed lead entering straight but faded under pressure inside final 250 metres.
Moderate start, soon picked up to just worse than midfield racing keenly at times, dropped out after straightening.
Pressed on from a wide gate, gradually worked his way up to lead on rails passing the 1200 metres, fought on under pressure only to be outlasted close to home.
Ridden early, settled towards the rear on rails, awkwardly placed behind runners approaching home turn and found no daylight early in straight, finished race off well.
Travelled keenly behind midfield, in similar position entering straight, one-paced before fading inside final 200 metres.
Took no part.
Moderate start, raced keenly in forward of midfield, came under pressure to challenge entering straight but had nothing to give.
Ridden from the one gate, settled over 3L back in 5th on rails, faded under pressure shortly after straightening.
Awkward away, at back, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, lack turn of foot.
Settled just off the leaders 2 wide, ran on strongly for 2nd.
Occupied a more prominent spot on the fence, lack room 400M, dashed well when clear and scored.
Took rail easily and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 200M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Pushed early but not muster, at back, held up 4-2, dashed strongly when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed forward, benefited by the slow tempo, emptied 300M.
Ridden forward to share the lead grand side, kept on steadily until weakened final 200M, hung on for 4th.
Settled midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader middle track, ran on fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader along the outer fence, ran home well for 2nd.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader middle track, one paced home.
Settled midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader grand side, never ran on.
Always at rear, never looked likely.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader along the outer fence, kept on one pace to the line without extra acceleration.
At rear, travelled 6Ls behind the leader grand side, blocked from 100M - 50M, stormed home for 3rd.
Settled midfield, 3Ls behind the leader middle track, kept on one pace to the line.
At rear throughout, never a factor.
Settled midfield in the middle part of the track, faded quickly when asked near the course proper.
Showed good early pace to settle in front, kept on until weakened badly final 150M.
Sent forward to cross to the outer fence, kept on strongly to score comfortably by 2-1/4Ls.
Prominent, travelled 3Ls off the leader grand side, never ran on and was badly interfered over the concluding stages.
Taken back to race 3 off near rear, progress from 600m, shifted out on turn & driven, closed off centre track to nick 3rd late.
Speed to lead & bustled initially, to rail 1300m, narrow lead & shaken up 400m, kicked clear & held advantage to wire.
Good start but rousted initially, camped rail midfield, niggled 750m, checked & lost place 700m, soon under pump, found nil in weak run home.
Slow start & raced last pair on outer, niggled forward 650m, advanced on turn, crowded 350m, boxed on one pace.
Sharp break to press lead into 1st turn, raced close 3rd 1 off until settled 1 back on rail 1000m, niggled 500m, driven 400m, boxed on evenly.
Good break, snagged back 1550m to race 3 deep with cover behind midfield, rowed along 1050m & pushed 4 deep no cover, shuffled back, driven 600m, widest into stretch, no impact.
Smart break, taken back to rail near rear, over-raced 830m, shuffled back 650m, switched out 500m & ridden, never a factor.
