Began awkwardly, tracked leader early stages, shuffled back to 4th entering home turn, remained one pace in straight, faded late stages.
Never far off the pace, 3Ls back in 5th making the turn, advanced to 3rd 300M, kept on without threatening the runaway winner, beaten to 4th late stages.
Eased to race towards the rear, kept to inside throughout, responded fairly over final 400M, no impression on leaders.
Slow to begin, settled in midfield 4-5Ls off the pace, kept on steadily inside 400M, got up for 3rd 100M out but was well held by first two.
In mid-division, overraced badly in early and middle stages, 3-wide without cover from 1000M, couldn't finish off in straight. (Jockey : defeat attributable to racing manner / No Vet finings.)
Held up 2-wide in mid-division, lacked a strong turn of foot leaving 400M, stayed on moderately for non-threatening 5th.
Ridden to find cover but held wide, dropping to rear. Ran on steadily in straight but held for run 150m to 50m, and then in restricted room concluding stages.
Hard ridden but slow to muster, gradually edging forward but wide to sit 3rd entering straight, Kept on well to 200m before tiring.
Ridden early between horses to hold midfield position but shuffled back around turn. Wide into straight, boxed on one-paced.
Pressed forward before cutting to fence in box seat at turn. Tailed leader to 200m then one-paced.
Quickly away, ridden to keep tabs on leader, led momentarily passing 800m before sitting outside leader to straight. Kept on well until flattened close home.
Pressed forward early but held wide without cover behind midfield. Made up ground around turn but found nothing in straight and faded.
Jumped with field, pressed forward settling one-back, one-off. Lost position turn, taken wide in straight, ran on steadily without threatening winner.
Hard ridden to find cover but held 4-wide behind midfield, gradually shuffled back to last around turn. Very wide in straight but finished off nicely.
Bounded in the air as gates opened and slow into stride, settling at rear. Switched out at turn and improved position but one-paced in straight.
Began awkwardly, ridden but didn't muster, dropping to rear. Never in the hunt.
Began well, pushed to lead 1250m, headed momentarily 800m, retook lead soon after, kicked clear 300m, won comfortably.
Outpaced early, settling at rear, made progress around turn, taken wide in straight and ran on steadily.
Came out running, led for a few strides before easing 2L back. Held for clear running early in straight, boxed on gamely. Had substantial mucus in trachea.
Began OK, ridden to hold rail behind midfield but lost position around turn. One-paced in straight.
Jumped OK from the inside draw and cruised forward to sit midfield, on the rail. Still well placed at the 300m, but found nothing and eased out.

Fairly away then crowded, dropping back to be towards the rear of the field, on the rail. Became unsettled at 700m, and was checked off heels for a distance. Was a beaten horse by 400m and subsequently found to have bled.

Pressed forward early before steadying to sit forward of midfield, on the fence. Kicked on when clear from the 350m. Had pressure on the outside, and brushed over last 100m, still finishing off 3rd in a tight finish.
OK away and cruised forward early to be slightly worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Awkward on heels and lost some momentum 700m. Never responded to pressure and only fair to the line.
Bumped on jumping and cruised forward early to sit midfield, 3 wide with limited cover. Came wide on the turn and ran on steadily in the straight.
Began OK and dropped back early, eventually settling in the last group, 3 wide. Never stretched out in the straight and only ran fairly to the line, easing late.
Fairly away, before pushing to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Never ran on in the straight, and wasn't pushed hard in the run to the line.
Cruised forward early to be placed midfield, 3 wide with no cover. Ran steadily in the straight with minimal urging.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit last by 800m, and throwing the head around early. Didn't respond to pressure in the straight, and eased a long way from home.

Dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Checked and lost considerable ground when a horse dropped in his lap 700m. Near last on turn, but plugged on OK in the straight with minimal urging.

Pushed from the wide draw to eventually sit in 2nd, 1 off the fence and 1L off the leader. Tight top of the straight, but held his line. Looked beaten at 100m, but kicked again and outmuscled the rest to win on the line.

Pushed forward early, then steadied and crossed, sitting 3rd 2L off the leader. Tight top of straight when looking for a run, before switching to the rail. Ran well late, barely missing a place in a blanket finish.

Pushed forward early, before steadying to find cover at 1100m and racing keenly. Settled handily in 4th, 1 off the fence. Ran to the line strongly and looked the winner at 50m, despite laying in. Just pipped for the win on the line.
Bumped and taken wider on jumping before pressing forward to take the lead. Still in front at the 50m mark, but run down late to lose a place late in a bunch finish.
Moderately away, raced 3 wide with cover in 6th, similar position on turn, kept on very well in straight to get 2nd.
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the early lead, shared lead in the middle stages, kicked clear early in straight, headed near 150M, weakened thereafter.
Average to begin, positioned 1 out 1 back, similar position on turn, peaked early in straight, stayed on one-paced.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 6 to 7 lengths back at rear, there to turn, no daylight in straight, nearest on line.
Slowly away, raced 5 lengths or so back at rear, no cover throughout, improved on turn, made some headway in straight without threatening.
Began well from gate 1, raced a length behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, one-paced in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 7 lengths back at tail, still well back on turn, angled out and finished off very strongly in straight to be nearest on line.
Average to begin, raced 3 lengths back in midfield, 2 wide on turn, in traffic early in straight, raced tight near 250M and steadied near 50M.
Away with them, raced 3 to 4 lengths back on rail in midfield, saved ground throughout, in traffic early in straight, finished off very strongly to score thereafter.
Began well from a wide draw, sent forward to race prominently, shared lead after 900M, peaked after turning in, weakened thereafter and eased final 100M.
Jumped well from gate 13, unable to slot in early, improved to race prominently, travelled wide with no cover throughout, stayed on well for 4th.
Jumped well from gate 12, taken back to race 5 lengths back at rear, 3 wide with cover, slightly improved on turn, closed off evenly in straight.
Slowly away, 5 to 6 lengths back at rear, similar position on turn, angled out early in straight, made some progress in straight.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, raced 2 wide in midfield, 4 lengths back, peaked turning in, emptied in straight.
Slightly slow out before tightened, behind early stages, apparently improved positions when pace slackened around first bend, yielded ground under pressure from home bend.
Began moderately, gradually picked up on rails to hold one back position in 3rd on rails, held similar into straight, fought on steadily to gain upper hand final stages.
In similar position in midfield on rails throughout, ran home one-paced. (Mucus in trachea)

Moderate start from a wide gate, travelled 3 wide without cover in prominent position first bend, remained racing keenly without cover far side, weakened steadily after straightening. (Tactic questioned)

Jumped fairly from a wide-ish gate, settled towards the rear, commenced move coming onto home bend circling the field to reach 3L 4th home turn, fought on steadily in straight without threatening first 3.
Broke well, settled one-out-one-back early before shuffling backward to 2L 5th on 1000 metre bend, unbalanced and lost position approaching home turn, never recovered.
Jumped well, settled in midfield one off the rails, left flat-footed on home bend, but made up some late ground closing stages. (Jockey warned)
Worked his way across from the widest gate of 11, settled just off the pace 2 wide from around first bend, fought on under pressure but unable to draw level throughout home straight.
Taken back to race in rear, similar turning for home, kept on steadily without quickening.
Soon took up running on rails from a wide gate attempting to make all, led until finding no extra inside final 200 metres and swamped.
Settled wide in last few, never a danger.
Eased to rear, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash.
Failed to muster early, took cover in midfield 2 wide, held ground in straight for 3rd.
Hard ridden to keep up in front of midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, emptied 300M.
Behind midfield along the fence, harmed by the slow tempo, little dash 200M.
Hard ridden early but not mustered, trapped 3-4 wide throughout, no progress.
Very slow away, never competitive.
Eased to sit just off the lead, 2 wide, closed off strongly 300M for 2nd.
Hard ridden to secure box seat, enjoyed the slow sectionals, ran on well to the line and scored.
Eased at start, 2 wide, hung out at bends, dashed well 200M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at slow sectionals, hung on until 250M weakened.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, not suited by the slow tempo, lack room 4-2, little dash when clear.
Eased back, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, never improved.
Hard ridden forward to share the lead along the fence, kept on only fairly, weakened badly over the last furlong.
Slotted into midfield from a wide barrier, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, switched wide turning in, ran on well for 2nd, beaten by a head.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, kept on one pace to the line.
Rolled forward to settle outside the leader, under pressure rounding the Home Turn, unable to run on thereafter.
Eased to settle worse than midfield from a wide gate, 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, made minor ground in straight.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on well for 4th.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily to get 3rd.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, made no impression in straight.
Pushed to settle midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, dashed well to score by a head.
Sent forward, however trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, emptied over the last furlong.
At rear, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, closed to the line well.
Prominent from off, led 1420m & crossed to rail, pressed & shaken up 330m, shifted of rail & headed 260m, battled on evenly.
Steady start, settled rail behind midfield, over-raced 1150m, shaken up 300m, kept on one-pace until eased when tight for room final 100m.
Fast break & led wide, snagged to 2nd 1 off from 1420m, pressed leader & ridden 350m, edged ahead 260m, all out & headed 180m, boxed on.
Started ok & sat midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 520m, shifted wide & driven 350m, kept on evenly for 4th.
Taken back to race at tail, driven into stretch, quickened through field for solid late inroads.
Broke well, keen & snagged to midfield 3 wide no cover, pushed on 1200m to handy 1 off with cover 950m, hard driven 420m, found nil & weakened.
Broke well, parked rail midfield, shifted out & driven 340m, tapered to wire.
Smart start & prominent, soon slotted 1 off 1 back until shuffled to 3 back on rail 1000m, niggled 650m, driven final turn, kept one pace.
Bumped start & bustled to rail near tail, over-raced 680m, bustled 550m & shifted 1 off for progress, driven wide into stretch, stayed on one pace.
Broke well, slipstreamed leader on rail, shaken up 320m & quickened down inner to lead 180m, drew clear.
Steadied start to settle 1 off with cover back of mid rank, niggled 680m, driven 440m, widest into stretch, plugged on evenly.
Bustled forward from widest gate, soon snagged to 1 off near tail, niggled 780m & edged 3 deep 550m, wide into stretch, found nil in tame run home.
Prominent early, taken back to rail fore of midfield, nudged along 400m, driven into stretch, switched out 250m, boxed on to 3rd 180m, one-paced & edged out of frame at line.
Reared start & left several lengths, closed to race 2L adrift at tail, niggled 750m, driven turning in but never a factor.
Sluggish at break & raced rail behind midfield, over-raced 1200m, shifted 1 off 830m, driven 300m, kept on moderately centre track, tight for room close home.
Bustled forward from widest gate, pushed outside leader, pressed lead 440m, ridden 350m, outpaced 300m, tapered to wire.
Taken back at start to rail near rear, over-raced 850m & to 2nd last, niggled 550m, driven turning in, shifted centre track & kept on for minor headway.
Started well & rousted initially, lacked toe & settled midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 600m, under pump 550m, kept on moderately.
Fast start to vie for lead, soon to rail & sat 1 back, over-raced 1000m, shifted 3 deep final turn & driven, kept on one pace.
Broke ok, bustled to midfield on rail, nudged along 400m, driven 350m, outpaced in tame run home.
Tardy start, snagged to 1 off with cover behind midfield, shifted 3 deep & advanced 700m, driven widest into stretch, grinding progress to nick 3rd at wire, tried to hang in.
Vied for early lead, led outright 1300m & to rail 1220m, pressed at 440m, driven into stretch, kicked on & battled to wire.
Prominent initially, settled 1 back 1 off, forced wide into stretch, driven 300m, closed centre track, held in run to wire.
Missed break & rousted to settle last of main body until improved a spot 850m, rousted for progress 550m, plugged on evenly, badly checked close home.
Positioned slightly behind midfield on the rail, 4-1/4L behind, harmed by the quick tempo, made slight ground only.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led at quick sectionals, ran on until 200M headed, hung on for 3rd.
Travelled behind midfield, 6-1/2L off on the rail, harmed by the quick tempo, no dash in the straight.
Parked outside the leader, 1-1/2L off the pace, not suited to the quick tempo, not competitive.
No early speed and remained at the rear, not competitive.
Sat in front of midfield, 3L off the pace 2 wide with cover, ran home only one paced.
Raced in worse than midfield, 6-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, taken widest in the Straight, only improved slightly.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, suited to the fast tempo, ran on nicely to score comfortably.
Raced in front of midfield, 3L behind the leader however trapped 3 wide without cover, faded quickly after straightening.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, 1-3/4L behind the leader, not suited to the quick tempo, did not run on.
Sat towards the rear, 8-3/4L off along the rail, slightly detached around turn, made ground steadily in the straight.
Travelled in midfield along the fence, 3-1/4L behind the leader, despite not suited to the quick tempo, finished off well for 2nd.
Restrained shortly after start and shifted across behind runners but kept 3-wide at rear. Dropped to last approaching final turn and found little in straight.
Began fairly, not pushed, settling between horses at the rear. Took inside run in straight but only one-paced. Lost right front plate near 900m.
Ridden early to hold rail, settling in slipstream of leader. Kept on well to 200m when one-paced.
Jumped OK, ridden along but unable find cover and kept 3-wide 3L from leader. Very wide in straight but only one-paced under pressure.
Hard ridden from widest draw to sit outside hind-quarters of leader 1000m. Shaken up 350m, hit front 300m, run down final 50m. Had superficial abrasion back of left hind fetlock.
Began well, taken to fence on settling, 3-back from leader. Switched out 350m, got clear run 300m, ran on steadily.
Jumped well to lead on settling. Set steady pace to 300m when joined up front. Kept on gamely to 100m when flattened.
Ridden along from an outside draw but unable to find cover until 800m but still 3-wide. Shaken up entering straight found little and eased down final stages.
Began fairly then crowded for room dropping to rear along fence. Switched out and made some ground around turn but a spent force in straight.
Hard ridden early to get forward position before seeking cover one-off, three-back at turn. Had clear run entering straight and finished strongly to win close home.
Ridden early but slow to muster, racing behind midfield before crossing to fence 800m. One-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from inside draw, settling one-back, one-off entering back stretch. Raced fiercely, ducked out and left 3-wide approaching 700m. Battled on gamely in straight.
Began well, steadied near 1100M, raced 2 wide in 6th, bumped after 600M, similar position throughout, failed to close off in straight.
Began fairly from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back in 8th, there to turn, emptied early in straight, never competitive.
Away with them, raced 3 lengths or so back on rail in midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Fairly away from a tricky gate, raced 3 lengths back on rail, same margin back turning, finished off evenly in straight without threatening.
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 7 lengths back at rear, well back on turn, one-paced in straight.
Average to begin, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide and without cover throughout, emptied early in straight when hard run took effect.
Average to begin, sent forward to take the lead, travelled comfortably to turn, kicked clear in straight and scored easily.
Moderately away, positioned 1 out 1 back, same position on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, kept on well in straight to get 3rd, no threat to the winner.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back at rear, 3 wide turning in, made some headway in straight to make frame.
Jumped well, raced prominently outside leader in 2nd, same position on turn, failed to close off in straight. (See racing incidents)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 8 lengths back at tail, still well back on turn, finished off very strongly to get 2nd.
Never better than midfield, made no impression in the run home.
Ridden early, settled behind midfield on rails, hampered upon straightening, ran home one-paced.
Taken back from a wide draw, wide entering straight, kept on past beaten horses.
Wide in midfield, dropped out tamely in straight.
Well there early, settled mainly in 5th within 3L of pace, similar entering straight, one-paced without quickening.
Settled towards the rear, finished off race well inside final 200 metres.
Moderate start from a wide gate, soon recovered to take up running on rails near the 1200 metres, led narrowly to the 200 metres, swamped under pressure.
Slow out, soon recovered to be just off the pace on rails, faded under pressure after straightening.
Held narrow lead early, ceded advantage under restraint for cover around the bend, close up in 3rd entering straight, ran home one-paced under pressure.
Began well, with leaders early, steadied coming out of back straight before improving to join the leader around home bend, hit the front at the 200 metres, just held on.
Taken back from the widest gate, remained in last few to straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Moderate start, travelled in midfield, commenced move entering straight, ran on under pressure.
Trailed the field to straight, only ran past well-beaten horses.
Midfield early, closer up when steadied coming out back straight, weakened out of contention after home turn.
At rear, trapped 4 wide throughout, favoured by the fast tempo, made some ground 300M.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, no progress.
At back along the fence, no progress, checked badly 250M.
Hard ridden early, behind midfield 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, raced flat until 200M, made steady ground.
Pushed early, failed to cross in front, trapped 3 wide in midfield, ran on until 200M flattened.
Pushed to take rail and led at fast sectionals, hung on until 200M weakened.
Pushed forward, 2 wide just off the leader, harmed by the fast pace, emptied 300M.
Failed to muster, at rear, never improved.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, flattened in straight.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, not suited by the fast tempo, on heels 250M, reduced afterwards.
Eased to rear, 2-4 wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M.
Pushed early to obtain a more prominent spot just behind midfield, favoured by the fast tempo, made steady ground 400M and scored with some in hands.
Hard ridden forward for box seat, not suited by the fast pace, lack room 4-2, flattened when clear.
Midfield along the fence, benefited by the fast pace, lack room 400M, progressed steadily when clear.
Missed break, then ridden forward to park outside the leader by 4Ls at good pace, 700M eased to get cover, kept on only fairly and emptied 300M.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Settled worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on well for 2nd.
Prominent, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, accelerated strongly to claim the trophy.
Rolled forward to share the lead along the fence, 800M led by 4Ls at good pace, flattened soon after straightening.
At rear, travelled 9Ls behind the leader on the fence, made no impression in straight.
Settled worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, made some ground for 4th without threatening to the placegetters.
Tardy start, advanced to sit rail fore of midfield, over-raced 880m & hung out, impeded rival & shifted in to 1 off with cover, edged out & driven into stretch, emptied 300m & faded.
Raced at tail until advanced a spot 550m, driven 480m, struggled in run home.
Broke ok, raced fore of midfield 1 off with cover, forced wide 880m & knocked back to midfield 3 wide no cover, ridden on turn, found nil & eased in stretch.
Sharp break wide & restrained handily, rolled forward 900m to sit outside leader, 0.5L down & driven 430m, outpaced but battled on in even pursuit.
Taken behind to rail back of midfield, rolled forward a spot 700m, driven 400m, kept on one pace.
Taken back at start to race 1 off with cover behind midfield, checked off heels 930m, ridden 500m, found nil & folded tamely in stretch.
Prominent at break, soon taken back to midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven into stretch, plugged on one pace.
Fast start & pushed on to lead, clear & to rail 920m, 0.5L up & ridden 370m, quickened clear & maintained advantage to wire.
Smart start, camped 1 back on rail, ridden turning in, pocketed until edged out 300m, boxed on one pace to wire.
Fast break & prominent, snagged to eventually race 1 back 1 off, ridden 500m, lacked toe into stretch, gradually tapered.
Taken back at start to rail near rear, ridden 400m & shifted centre track, plugged on for moderate headway.
Restrained at start to race 1 off near rear, shifted 3 deep with cover 700m, at tail & niggled 520m, driven 400m, plodded on past beaten rivals.
Sluggish start & bustled to midfield on rail, nudged forward a spot 800m, switched out turning in & driven, gradual closer centre track to press second.
Fast start & bustled early to 1 back on rail, trapped in pocket 300m & checked in tight running 200m, shuffled back, driven 100m, quickened too late.
Awkward & outpaced at start, bustled to race handily in centre, shaken up 320m, one-paced in run home.
Awkward start, rolled to dispute lead 600m, edged ahead 380m & driven 1L clear 300m, all out & headed 50m.
Smart start, tracked pace mid pack, niggled 400m, driven 260m, outpaced & kept on evenly.
Crowded start, bustled along back of midfield on stands' side, shifted inside 500m, under pump 400m & switched centre, closed strongly for 3rd.
Broke ok, raced midfield in centre, ridden under pressure 320m, boxed on one pace.
Good break, stalked lead 1 off stands' rail, travelled strongly, shaken up 300m, responded to whip from 200m & quickened to lead 50m, edged away.
Rousted along throughout, soon detached at tail, kept on one pace past beaten rivals.
Broke ok & rousted on rail to lead, joined 600m, headed & driven 450m but found nil & faded.
Broke ok but lacked toe & soon near rear, ridden along 650m, faded weakly from 350m.
Fast start & prominent initially, soon outpaced & rousted, raced centre track behind midfield, driven under pressure 500m, plodded on tamely.
Broke well & prominent centre track, pressed lead 600m & edged towards stands' side, driven 350m, soon peaked & tapered.
Smart start to race front rank centre track, vied for lead 600m & edged stands' side, shaken up 350m, soon all out & weakened final 150m.
Started ok, soon outpaced & bustled along, drifted back to race near tail, under pump 650m, found nil & weakened tamely.
Sat in midfield, 4-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the quick tempo, held up until near 300M, made slight ground only.
Raced towards the rear, 6L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace but improved slightly only.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 6L behind and on the rail, did not progress.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, sat 2L behind the leader, despite not suited to the quick tempo, closed off well until weakened inside 50M.
Settled in behind midfield, 5-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, suited to the quick tempo, ran on strongly to finish 3rd.
Raced in front of midfield, 2-3/4L behind 3 wide without cover, harmed by the quick tempo, weakened soon after straightening.
At the back, 7-3/4L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, suited to the fast pace, made up good ground in the straight.
Settled in midfield, 6L off the pace 3 wide with cover, not competitive.
Travelled in front of midfield, 3L off the pace 2 wide with cover, bumped heavily near 350M and became unbalanced, one paced thereafter.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/4L behind on the rail, shifted out abruptly near 350M and bumped another, became unbalanced but still ran on nicely to score.
Always at the rear, never in contention.
Prominent, 1-3/4L behind and outside the leader, harmed by the quick tempo, weakened near 250M.
Taken back and settled at the rear, 7-1/2L off but trapped wide, benefited by the quick tempo, improved steadily.
Rolled forward to take the rail and led at a quick tempo, headed approaching 100M, just held on for 2nd.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling last. Began forward move 700m, loomed 300m, run ended close home.
Began well, pressing forward with pacemakers but left without cover from 1200m. Gave ground shortly after straightening for home.
Got away nicely, settling between horses 2L from leader. Got shuffled back around turn, held for run early in straight, finished off nicely when clear.
A little slow to move, ridden forward 3-wide at 1200m when 3L from leader. Swung 4-wide into straight, surged forward to lead 300m, kept finding when challenged.
Began well, taken to fence to hold box seat. Left fence 400m to go past tiring horse, gave chase but unable to match winner.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw, settling at rear but away from fence. Taken widest in straight and ran home steadily.
Jumped with field, ridden to hold rail, gradually edging forward to lead 1050m. Collared 300m out and faded.
First out, leading to 1050m when passed. Tailed leader to turn, put under pressure 500m but gave ground steadily.

Dropped back to near the rear, ended up as back-marker 1500M, 8Ls adrift in middle stages but crept closer over the home turn, didn't have much luck in running when held up on the inside to 200M then awkwardly placed near 100M.
In midfield caught wide no cover from 1500M, strode forward and took over the lead form 1200M, headed 450M and outpaced by rivals in the run to the line.
Caught wide early stages, moved forward to race in the 2-path behind leaders, had not much to offer off the bend, gave way 300M.
Not far off early stages, shuffled back to midfield passing 1400M, found disappointing little off the home turn, kept on same pace to line. (No Vet findings)
Moved to the fore after first 200M, relinquished the lead near 1200M, regained it 450M, headed 300M, faded out of contention.

Held up behind midfield in 7th / 8th spot, travelled strongly throughout, made rapid headway entering straight to take charge inside 300M, soon well clear and kept on strongly in the lead, never in danger.
From wide gate taken across behind runners early stages, settled down 6-7Ls back in rear pair, brought wide for his run entering straight, ran on moderately for 3rd without threatening winner.
Switched off to the rear early stages, switched out to 3-wide approaching back-straight, improved to midfield but lost cover from 1200M, run ended 250M, eased when no chance. (No Vet findings)

Slow to muster, in mid-pack early, proved difficult to settle and shuffled back to near the rear passing 1500M, held up early straight, stayed on moderately over final 250M, no threat to runaway winner.
Close up early stages, sat back in midfield about 3-4Ls off the pace, had every chance turning in, briefly went 2nd 150M, one paced and beaten to 4th late stages.
Never far off from pace, well placed to strike turning in and loomed a threat 400M, ran on well early straight but couldn't sustain run over final 150M, faded towards the finish.
Bumped start, ridden forward but shifted out 900m losing ground in midfield. One-paced in straight.
No early speed, settling between horses behind midfield. Held for clear run early in straight, switched out 350m, finished off fairly.
Bumped and clipped heels shortly after start, then taken to fence 4-back from leader. Well back entering straight, finished strongly between horses to grab 2nd close home.
Bumped start, pressed forward in one-off position 2L from leader at the turn. Gave chase in straight but unable close gap.
Began well, holding box seat but 3L from leader on settling. Battled on gamely in straight but lay in under pressure final 200m.
Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind horses settling at rear. Held up for run 300m, shifted in 100m when improving, kept on.
Jumped with field, ridden forward settling one-back, one-off. Gave chase in straight but unable close gap.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to lead passing 850m. Kicked 2L clear soon after straightening and went to the post unchallenged.
Ridden along behind midfield early but wide, gradually losing place around turn and last into straight. Never likely.
Jumped OK, ridden to hold rail 2-back from leader. Kept on fairly early in straight before tiring final 200m.
Jumped well, not pushed, falling 3L back 800m. Wide in straight, one-paced. Jockey reported unbalanced action after losing right front plate at start.
Fractious before start, slowly away, and last on settling. Took inside run in straight and ran on steadily.
Began OK, pressed forward but unable find cover and left wide without cover from 800m. Wide into straight, one-paced.
Pushed forward early, sitting 3rd-4th, 3 wide before being allowed to press forward and lead from 900m. Easily caught from the 300m, and weakened out over the final stages.
Began awkwardly and had a tendency to over race early when 3wide with limited cover, before dropping back to last by 900m. Came widest on the turn, but made no impression in the run home.
Cruised forward early, eventually finding a spot in forward, but stuck 3-4 wide with no cover. Ran strongly in the straight and pulled away from the 150m, winning easily.

Eased forward early to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Awkwardly placed on heels at 800m, and slightly steadied. Had clear running in the straight, and went to the line strongly, but unable to close in on the winner.
Dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 8L off the leader. Came wider on the turn, and ran solidly to the line making up plenty of ground.

Dropped back early from the wide draw, sitting last 3L off the next horse at 1100m before moving up to rejoin the field turning out of the back straight. Only plugged along in the straight, with minimal impact.

Bumped on jumping before pressing forward to be handily placed 4th-5th early, before dropping back to be forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Steady to the line in the straight, stealing 3rd late under minimal urging.
Eased forward early, finding a spot in midfield, 3 wide with cover. Only ran fairly in the straight, and didn't respond to urging. Eased out over the last 150m.
Dropped back early to sit worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Pushed steadily to the line, catching late n adjust missing a place late in a tight finish for 3rd.

Pushed forward early to be well place behind the early leader, on the rail. Restrained off heels at 800m, and was checked off heels at the top of the straight. Never clear at any stage on the run home and never tested.
Cruised forward early to sit midfield, on the rail. Came wider on the turn, but only ran fairly to the line. Vet-epiglotic entrapment.

Pushed forwarded early from the wide draw, throwing the head and over racing early before briefly leading at 800m. Didn't get a lot of opportunity to stretch out in the straight and went quietly to the line.

Pushed forward from the wide barrier to sit just behind the eventual leader, 1 off the fence with limited cover. Well placed in the straight, and ran on well to the line, just peaking late and run down for 3rd on the line.

Dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, on the rail before moving closer to midfield by 800m. Tended to lay out under the stick in the straight, but never responded and dropped out late.
Settled in midfield, lost position 3-wide rounding home bend, made significant progress in straight, did best work late.
Led the field to 200 metres, faded under pressure.
Ridden along out wide on the far side improving to 3rd within 1L of pace, still handy turning into home straight but unable to sustain effort under pressure.
Lacked pace, soon dropped well behind, trailed the field most of way, ran past only one in the final 200 metres.
Taken back from the widest gate, remained well behind throughout, made no show in straight.
Ridden along in first few, settled in one-out-one back position before shuffling slightly back to 5th around the bend, lost further ground in straight.
Jumped only fairly, ridden along out wide to maintain prominence, settled outside the leader rounding home bend, yielded ground soon after straightening.
Slow out, settled towards the rear in 10th on rails, commenced move after straightening, did not have the best of runs until the 200 metres, finished off race well.
Gradually picked up from behind midfield to just better in 6th within 3L of pace, similar turning for home, kept on same pace without quickening.
Jumped well, settled in midfield on rails, saved ground turning for home, ran on steadily without threatening.
Never better than midfield, produced moderate progress in the run home.
Moderate start from the one draw but soon picked up to one back position on rails, hit the front under pressure 200 metres out, hung on well.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow sectionals, closed off strongly 300M, just beaten by narrow margin in 2nd.
Pushed to obtain a midfield sport on the fence, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 300M.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, ran on well to the line, just hold on to win.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, moved forward 600M, dashed well to the line.
At back, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
At back, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Hard ridden forward, took rail, lack room 4-2, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground when clear.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, made early move 800M to take advantages of the slow pace, flattened 250M.
Eased to rear, 2 wide, little dash 200M despite not suited by the slow tempo.
Behind midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok.
Eased back, trapped 4-5 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, made early move 600M, dashed strongly 300M.
Eased to rear, trapped 4-5 wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200M.
Settled in front of midfield, 2 wide, moved forward 800M, benefited by the slow tempo, flattened 150M.
Never a factor.
Sent forward to take the fence and led by 2Ls, kept on until flattened final 250M.
Raced midfield in 3rd position 2 wide without cover, ran on only fairly.
At back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, ran on steadily for 4th without threatening.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader along the fence, ran on nicely for 2nd.
At rear, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well for 3rd.
Hard ridden along to settle 2Ls behind the leader on the fence, accelerated well to score by 3/4L.
At rear, retired from the race 800M. (Lame right hind)
Driven forward at break, trapped 4 wide no cover midfield, began to labour 850m & pumped along, no extra in stretch & eased.
Smart pace, 3 wide no cover fore of midfield until nudged forward to slot 1 off with cover 4th at 1050m, under pump 650m, boxed to brief 2nd 320m, swamped & tapered.
Tardy start & bustled 3 wide with cover midfield until exposed 1050m, some progress on turn, buffeted into stretch, found nil & eased.
Speed to lead, to rail 1370m & set tempo 2L clear, pressed 450m & ridden, soon headed & weakened tamely.
Bustled up at start, trapped 3 deep with cover & taken back to near rear, ridden 600m & angled out, wide on turn & bumped, closing run to 3rd, held final stages.
Broke well but lacked toe & rousted to camp 1 back on rail, 2L 3rd & niggled 550m, driven turning in, plugging under pressure when impeded 340m, faded out.
Prominent at break, snagged to 1 off with cover fore of midfield, niggled 800m, driven 600m, 4 wide into stretch, boxed to 3rd 250m, tapered to wire.
Sharp start widest, snagged to camp 1 off with cover near rear, progress on turn, 5L down & checked 450m, forced between rivals 380m, quickened & charged to lead at wire.
Broke well & rousted initially, raced 2nd 1 off no cover, closed on turn & eased to lead on straightening, shaken up 400m & kicked 3L clear, all out in run & headed at line.
Tardy start & rousted to sit rail fore of midfield, ridden 550m & shifted out, failed to find more & faded.
Broke ok but lacked toe, to rail & bustled back of midfield, pushed forward a spot 850m, driven 500m, no run 380m & clipped heels, one-paced thereafter.
Broke ok, soon snagged to midfield 1 off & over-raced for some way, niggled 600m, driven into stretch but outpaced, plugged on past beaten rivals.
Awkward start & bustled in detached last, driven to join tail of pack 900m, detached again turning in, hacked home once beaten.
Sluggish & bumped start, bustled initially to race 2nd last , ridden 550m, 8L back & shifted widest into stretch, solid closer to claim 4th.
Missed break & raced last pair on rail, niggled 600m, driven into stretch, kept on for minor inroads.
Broke well & rolled to lead 1620m, to rail 1420m, 1.5L up & ridden 350m, all out & headed 170m, battled on until tapered out final 100m.
Taken behind from widest to race 1 off near rear, forced wide on home turn, hard-ridden but plodded on tamely.
Broke ok, lacked early toe, raced near rear on rail, shifted out 500m, driven wide into stretch, closed off for solid inroads.
Broke well, taken back but trapped 3 wide no cover near rear, very wide on turn, found nil & eased.
Smart start, sat 2nd 1 off no cover, slotted 1 back on rail 950m, shifted 1 off 700m, driven 370m & grinding run to 2nd, locked in duel, emptied close home.
Lacked toe & bustled early, parked rail midfield, shifted 1 off on turn, shaken up 380m & switched out for run, grinding closer to 3rd.
Smart break, sat 3rd 1 back on rail, shifted 1 off 1 back 1150m, lost cover 950m, pushed 3 deep 700m, ridden into stretch, duelled to lead 170m, edged away close home.
Slow start & last pair on outer, ridden along 600m, plugged on past beaten rivals.
Sharp start, soon snagged to handy 5th 1 off with cover, edged 3 deep final turn & driven, stayed on evenly.
Broke well but rousted midfield, soon pushed to 4th on rail, 2L back & ridden 470m, outpaced a touch, shifted 1 off in run, boxed on dourly.
Started ok, raced 1 off with cover back of midfield, driven wide into stretch, struggled in run home.
Moderate start & rousted to 1 off with cover midfield, niggled 620m & shifted 3 deep, hard-ridden turning in, kept on evenly.
Taken back from wide, snared rail 1st turn, rolled to back of midfield & over-raced into back stretch, niggled & shifted out 500m, stayed on one pace.
Parked outside the leader, 1/2 behind, stayed on gamely until 250M, one paced thereafter and got passed just before the line for 4th.
Fair break only, at back 5-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, not competitive in the straight.
Sent forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, headed by the eventual winner passing 100M, still ran on for a tight finish and missed out only by a nose.
In midfield, 3L off the pace however trapped wide throughout, dropped off soon after straightening.
Ridden forward and sat in one back, one off position, pressed the leader from 300M, went down to the wire and scored by a nose.
Settled in midfield, 3-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, niggled to keep up before turn, did not run on.
Taken back, raced 6-1/2L behind the leader at the rear, made up good ground when under whip from 250M.
Slotted into midfield along the rail, 2-3/4L behind the leader, dashed near 350M, finished off well for 3rd.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 4L off 3 wide with cover, improved slightly only.
Raced slightly behind midfield, 4L off along the rail, navigated out for clear running after turn, improved gradually for 4th.
At the rear throughout, not a factor.
Travelled in box-seat, weakened badly after turn, well beaten.
Began well, hugging fence, settling in box seat. Kept tabs on leader to straight, took inside run and kept on well without threatening winner.
Hard ridden from outside draw to lead passing 1500m, cutting to fence 1200m. Kicked 2L clear 300m to win unchallenged.
Jumped OK but checked shortly after then taken to fence 3-back but raced fiercely. Kept on fairly in straight while hanging out under pressure.
Began well, ridden to stay ahead of midfield in one-off position. Given reminders around turn but faded steadily. Irregular heart rhythm. Lame right hind leg.
Began fairly, taken in passing 1500m, settling at rear in one-off position. Held for clear running around turn, taken out in straight and ran on well.
Ridden along from an outside draw and held 3-wide without cover towards rear. Lost position around turn, found nothing in straight.
Began well, pressed forward but unable find cover and kept 3-wide 3L from leader. Under pressure turning for home but only one-paced.
Began OK, steadied 1500m, settling midfield in one-off position. Put under pressure turning for home and boxed on one-paced.
Shifted across behind runners early, settling last but away from fence. Four-wide back stretch with cover, five-wide into straight, one-paced.
First out but restrained, settling one-back, one-off entering back stretch. Shaken up passing 350m to challenge but unable close gap.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling 2L from leader in one-off position back stretch. Boxed on well under pressure to 100m before tiring.
Shifted across behind runners early, settling at rear. Came off bridle 700m, ridden but found nothing in straight. Unacceptable performance. Wound to left hind coronet.
Bumped start, hard ridden but didn't muster, dropping four-back along fence on settling. Stayed on rail in straight and boxed on one-paced.
Began well, not pressed, settling four-back, one-off. Switched 3-wide final turn, taken wider in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Held up in last 7Ls off the pace in middle stages, didn't find much leaving the bend and made no progress over final 300M.
Shifted across behind runners from wide barrier, held up in 2nd last well off the pace middle stages, brought wide 500M but found nothing under pressure. (lost plate 1100M)
Settled down behind mid-division, 3-wide trip over the turn, struggled to keep up 450M, soon beaten.
Fractious in stalls, began very awkwardly and lost a considerable amount of ground, got back to the field 900M, 5Ls off the pace 400M but not quickened under pressure, never reach contention.
Utilized inside draw and emerged as leader from 850M, opened up 2Ls lead entering straight, headed near 100M, faded to 3rd late stages. (Jockey lost whip 100M)
Pushed along to pursue the pace, couldn't get closer than 3-wide, lay out 600M, kept on same pace to the line, not reach leaders.
Up with early pace, sat in 3rd entering home turn, responded well from 300M, got up nearing 100M, kept on well to hold off 2nd late stages.
Slowly away, gradually improved along the fence to be within 3Ls of leader, advanced to 2nd nearing 400M, ran on well entering straight but was always held by winner.
Reserved near the rear, in 9th place about 5-6Ls off leader, lay out under pressure in straight, stayed on moderately without threat.
In midfield along the 2-path, pushed along to hold its position middle stages, went 4th 250M but not going the pace to challenge first 3.
Bustled along early stages but unable to get closer than 3-wide, 4Ls off the pace in mid-pack over the turn, kept on same pace in straight, no impression on leaders.
Caught wide no cover from widest barrier, 5Ls off leader making the turn, gave limited response only early straight, made no impression and eased when no chance late stages.
Soon took up running on stands rails holding a narrow advantage, unable to sustain effort and faded inside final 200 metres.
Soon outpaced.
Settled in 3rd just off the leading pairs, commenced move coming onto course proper, hit the front over 200 metres out, won readily.
Made no show.
Settled just inside the narrow leader near stands rails, came under pressure to challenge passing the 200 metres, failed to quicken to threaten.
Pushed forward, trapped 3 wide no cover, harmed by the fast pace, flattened 300M, hampered 200M.
Pushed to take rail and lead, clocked fast sectionals, hung on well to score.
Pressed forward along the fence, out of fuel 300M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, not suited by the fast tempo, reduced quickly 300M.
Behind midfield 2 wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 300M, on heels 200M, ran on ok.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, on heels 500M, emptied 200M.
Hard ridden to keep up at rear, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 200M.
Trapped 4 wide throughout, never competitive at rear.
Trapped 3-4 wide behind midfield, never a factor.
Slow away, hard ridden at back, favoured by the fast tempo, blocked 4-2, made good ground when clear.
Slow away, hard ridden at back along the fence, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M.
At back on the rails, suited by the fast tempo, held up 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
At rear, never improved.
Eased back, 2 wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 350M for 2nd.
Raced midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never ran on.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader, emptied 250M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, finished off well for 2nd.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on fairly.
Taken back from a wide gate, settled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed well for 3rd when clear 200M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made no impression in straight.
Camped handy, settled 1L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on until 300M faded.
Sent forward to take the lead along the fence, kept on until headed 150M.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, swung widest turning in, made plenty of ground to finish 4th.
Hard ridden forward to settle in a prominent position, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, dropped off soon after straightening,
Missed break, then rolled forward to obtain the box seat, never ran on.
Eased to settle worse than midfield, travelled 4Ls off the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed strongly to score when clear 200M.
Led at break, headed 1000m & raced in leading trio 1 off no cover, head 2nd & driven 420m, edged lead 200m, headed 120m & no extra.
Broke ok, raced rail midfield, shifted out turning in, driven 350m, outpaced & plodded home tamely.
Broke ok, settled 1 back 1 off, shaken up 400m & switched out to go 3rd 350m, emptied 150m & tapered.
Broke well, bustled initially to lead 1000m, raced 3 wide no cover & headed 800m, 0.5L 3rd & driven 500m, soon emptied & faded.
Moderate start, pushed on to handy 3 wide with cover, switched 4 deep home turn & driven, one-paced, emptied 150m & faded.
Broke ok, raced 1 back on rail, ridden turning in, boxed on to 3rd 120m, tapered & edged out of frame last stride.
Prominent at break, taken back & niggled 3 wide with cover midfield, wider progress 550m & ridden, 5 deep turning in, boxed on evenly.
Smart start, bustled to front rank & found rail, narrow lead 800m, shaken up 420m, tight duel & headed 200m, rallied to lead 120m, drew ahead.
Lacked pace, raced 2nd last on fence, to tail 550m, driven into stretch, found nil & eased when no extra 300m.
Slow start, raced midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 600m, shifted out & driven centre track, tepid run home.
Taken behind from widest gate to race at tail, progress from 550m, checked out 400m & driven, closed through field to nick 3rd at wire.
Moderate start, sat 3 wide with cover midfield, shuffled back 800m, soon 3rd last under pump, driven into stretch, stayed on for solid headway.
Broke ok, settled midfield 1 off with cover, progress to 4th 750m, niggled 500m, closed strongly to lead 250m & driven, all out & headed 80m, tapered.
Fast break to share lead, crossed to rail 1200m, outright lead 1000m & soon 3L clear of pack, pressed & driven 420m, all out & headed 250m, faded tamely.
Sharp break & immediately restrained to tail, rousted a touch 1250m, off heels 880m & niggled a long, outpaced &driven into stretch, plodded on past beaten rivals.
Broke with others, bustled initially to settle rail back of midfield, over-raced 900m, edged out & driven turning in, plugged on one pace.
Sharp start, raced 3rd 1 off with cover, led chasing pack 3L back of lead, niggled 550m, driven 400m, shifted out 300m, boxed on one pace.
Taken behind at break to rail near rear, off heels 890m, under pump final turn, boxed on evenly, shifted out 200m, stayed on to line.
Broke well, settled back near rear 1 off, 7.5L back & ridden into stretch, shifted out for progress, closed centre track for solid gains.
Started well, rousted initially to race back of midfield 1 off with cover, bustled 500m, hard-ridden into stretch, stayed on for dour minor inroads.
Started ok, bustled forward to share lead on outer, settled close 2nd 1000m & daylight to 3rd, pressed lead & shaken up 420m, emptied 350m & dropped out quickly.
Slow start, raced 2 wide with cover last pair, shifted 3 deep & niggled for progress 550m, 9L back centre track & driven 400m, rattled home to nick 2nd at wire.
Fast start & shared early lead, snagged rail & settled 4th, shifted out & driven turning in, not clear run 300m & checked inside, clear 200m, one-paced.
Taken back at start, raced 3 wide with cover back of midfield, niggled 550m, widest into stretch, plugged on evenly.
Broke ok, restrained to fore of midfield but trapped 3 wide no cover, niggled 650m, unable to hold spot under drive 500m, emptied turning in & faded tamely.
Broke with others, camped rail fore of midfield, shifted out & niggled for progress 520m, 4L back & shaken up 400m, gradual advance to lead 80m, kept on to line.
Sent forward to lead from barrier 1, raced centre track, pushed to the line and scored by a short head.
Raced handy on the outer fence, 2-1/4L off the pace, kept going and finished off well for 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 3-1/2L behind on the middle track, responded well when asked at 400M, ran on strongly for 2nd.
Travelled in midfield, 3-1/4L behind grand side, ran home okay to finish 4th.
Towards the rear on the middle track, 7-1/2L off the pace, not competitive.
Raced slightly in front of midfield, 3L off grand side, kept on one paced to the line.
Always at the rear, not a factor.
At rear, 8L off the pace initially along the outer rail, passed tiring runners inside the final 150M only.
In behind midfield, 4-1/4L behind the leader grand side, held up until 250M, improved slightly thereafter.
Settled in worse than midfield, 4-3/4L off on centre track, made slight ground only.
Raced behind midfield along the outer fence, 4-1/4L behind the leader, did not improve.
Raced behind midfield along the outer rail, 4-1/2L behind, did not run on.
Pushed forward to race prominently, 1-1/2L grand side, weakened badly passing 300M.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind on the centre track, couldn't find extra to run on near 300M.
Hard ridden from widest draw to sit second, 2L behind leader at turn. Rolled forward on straightening, hit front 200m, run ended close to line.
Ridden early to hold forward position but got close to heels 1000m, settling one-off, two back. Kept on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.
Jumped OK, not pushed, settling between horses behind midfield. Switched out entering straight to make run and finished off fairly.
Got off with field, shifted in but unable find cover and held three-wide in midfield without cover. Covered extra ground around turn, one-paced in straight.
Shifted in shortly after start but unable to find cover at held 3-wide at rear. Taken wide in straight but only one-paced.
Bumped inside of gate at start losing ground and then trailed field throughout. Never in the hunt.
Ridden forward, settling one-back, one-off. Moved forward 3-wide turning for home to look a chance 200m, one-paced final stages.
Hard ridden early to hold rail two-back from leader then switched off 800m. Had to shift twice in straight to get run before fishing strongly under hands and heel riding.
Pressed forward to lead from wide draw, crossing to fence 1000m. Caught passing 200m but fought back gamely to hold second.
Began OK, taken to fence but outpaced, dropping towards rear. Shaken up top of straight but found nothing.
Began well, pressed forward, holding box seat. Got shuffled back around turn, stayed on fence but only one-paced in straight.
Outpaced early and held wide without cover at the rear. Found nothing when put under pressure in straight.
Settled down in 11th place about 5Ls off the pace middle stages, difficult obtain run early straight, stayed on moderately over final 300M.
Dropped back to near the rear 7-8Ls off the pace, brought wide 500M, made limited progress down the outside lane, well held by leaders final 200M.
Pushed forward early, stopped pursuing for the lead after 1500M, sat behind leaders 3-wide without cover, fought on steadily in straight but always held by leader. (Jockey questioned re tactics.)
Urged along on jumping from wide barrier, crossed to the lead before home turn, soon tackled by rival leaving the bend, fought on briefly then gave way 250M.
Up with early pace, sat 2Ls behind leader making home turn but failed to keep up with rivals passing 450M, soon weakened entering straight.
Caught 4-wide in midfield, lost cover entering home turn, kept on same pace early straight, no extra inside 200M. (Lost right front plate)
Held up 3-wide behind midfield, 6Ls off the pace middle stages, responded well early straight but run ended passing 200M. (No Vet findings)
Reserved along the fence, settled down 3Ls off the pace ahead of midfield, came through to challenge winner 250M but always held, faded late stages.

Caught wide on jumping from 14, strolled forward to track leader entering home turn, took over 350M, kept finding in the lead under 10 lb claimer, fought off nearest challenger inside 100M, continued on well to line.
Began awkwardly, failed to muster speed, detached from the field 10Ls off the pace, brought wide 450M, closed off strongly outside, almost claimed 2nd at the finish.
Restrained in mid-division along the 2-path, into clear inside 400M, ran on well to 150M but couldn't sustain run late stages. (Lame LF leg)
Prominent from the start, tracked leaders in 3rd making the turn, had every chance entering straight, kept up with the pursue until 150M when flattened.
Began awkwardly, sat behind midfield 5Ls off the pace along the rails, kept on same pace final 350M and made little impression on debut.
Held up 3-wide in mid-division, gave no response when driven along nearing top of straight, soon out of contention, finished tailed out. (Unacceptable performance)
Jumped with field, then taken to fence 2-back from leader. Switched out turning for home, made ground to 200m, one-paced final stages.
Began well, rolled forward stalking leader before shuffled back to 3rd passing 1000m. Urged forward on straightening, hit front 200m, no extra close home.
Shifted across behind runners from widest draw and last on settling. Ran past beaten horses in the straight.
Restrained on jumping, taken to fence, then switched off 1400m. Switched out 600m, switched in 250m to get run, finished strongly to win close home.
Jumped well, travelled keenly from 1500m when unable find cover. Allowed to roll forward to eyeball leader 1000m. Kept on to 200m before tiring.
Outpaced, settling towards rear but wide. Well back entering straight, switched to centre track and finished strongly while hanging in under pressure final 200m.
Ridden early to hold rail, settling four-back from leader. Came off fence turning for home and battled on gamely under hard riding in straight.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling 3L from leader in one-off position. Turned wide, gave ground steadily from 300m.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw, settling towards rear away from fence. Taken wide in straight and ran on steadily.
Began well, ridden forward but kept wide in midfield without cover from 900m. Kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Rolled forward from an outside draw to lead on settling. Harassed by another around turn, kicked ahead on straightening, run down close to line.
Bumped start, pressed forward, grabbing box seat. Lost position turning for home, stayed on rail, one-paced.

Began OK and settled midfield, 3 wide with limited cover before being forced wider at the 800m with no cover. Kicked from 150m, but lay in late and forced to put the whip away, losing by the barest margin on the line.
Began well and pushed up to sit just behind the early leader, on the rail. Became unsettled and had to check off heels 900m. Under pressure before the turn, and dropped out quickly from the 300m.
Pushed forward early from the wide draw to sit a 0.5L behind the leader, 1 off the fence. Well placed at the 150m, but peaked soon after and dropped out of the tight finish.
Allowed to press forward early to sit 4th, 1 off the fence. Awkward on heels at 900m and lost some ground. Ran OK early in the straight and well placed at 200m, before dropping out from that point.
Dropped back early to sit 2nd last, 1 off the fence 7L off the leader. Stayed on OK in the straight, and still gaining some ground late.
OK away, dropping back early to be worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Came wider on the turn, but never responded to urging and was eased up a long way from home.

Taken back early to sit worse than midfield, on the rails. Moved from a rails run to 5 wide in the straight. Crowded at 300m and taken wider from there looking for a run. Ran on OK, but never a threat to place.
Fairly away, then steadied and taken back to be 3rd last, 1 off the fence. Improved to the turn and ran on steadily in the straight, without threatening a place.

Cruised forward from the inside gate to be handily place 4th/5th, 2L off the leader on the rail. Ran well in the straight and stepped up from the 150m. Nosed in front at 30m, before being rolled late.
Settled forward of midfield, on the rail. Plugged on OK late, and held up slightly concluding.
Slow to begin and only fairly into stride, sitting last early almost 10L off the leader. Still trailing on the turn and only fair in the straight, picking up a couple easing out late.
Taken forward early to set the tempo in front. Still in front at the 30m, but weakening and was swamped late in a big finish.

Slightly bumped on jumping before easing forward to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Came wide down the straight for clear running. Ran strongly late, and stuck the nose in front right on the line to win in the tightest of finishes.

Bumped on jumping before being steadily taken forward to sit 3rd, 3 wide with no cover. 2nd at the 200m, and best placed to take on the weakening leader, but swamped late in a tight finish to miss a place.
Fairly away from gate 1, raced 5 to 6 lengths back at rear, last turning in, eased early in straight, finished tailed out, unacceptable performance.
Taken back from gate 11, raced 3 wide with cover, 5 lengths back at rear, same position turning, taken widest in straight and finished off evenly.
Began well from a wide draw, raced 3 wide with cover, 2 to 3 lengths back in midfield, carried wider turning in, finished off very strongly in straight to score with something in hand.
Began fairly away from gate 13, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide with no cover, 4 lengths back, still no cover on turn, made some progress in straight without threatening.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 3 wide with cover, 4 lengths back at rear, difficult to settle near 800M, angled out turning in, finished off one-paced.
Jumped with them, positioned a length the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening, kicked clear 300M, but couldn't hold off the winner late.
Slowly away, recovered to race 3 lengths back on rail in midfield, same position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well on turn, peaked early in straight and headed near 300M, kept on evenly to the line.
