Sat towards the rear along the rail, 6-3/4L behind the pace, not competitive.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/2L off the pace 2 wide after taking cover near 700M, did not improve in the straight.
Travelled towards the rear, 7L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung widest after turn, did not run on.
Raced in just behind midfield along the rail, 5-1/2L behind the leader, never looked likely.
Raced behind midfield after checked near 1000M, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, improved gradually in the straight.
Sat in midfield after steadied near 1000M, 4-1/2L behind the leader along the rail, little response and finished off one pace.
Began awkwardly, dropping back, taken to rail but checked 1350m. Bumped running rail and unbalanced. Made up ground early straight before turning one-paced final 200m.
Got off OK, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Ridden to circle field final turn, getting to within range 300m, before turning one-paced.
Ridden to hold rail ahead of midfield, checked off heels 1400m. Lost position back stretch, shaken up 450m but only one-paced. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea, lame right front leg.
Steadied and shifted across behind runners soon after start, settling last. Bumped running rail and unbalanced first turn, found little in straight.
Jumped well, ridden to hold rail 3L from leader. Eased slightly along back stretch, tightened 450m, held for run 250m, finished off nicely.
Hard ridden early to hold forward position but held wide without cover 5L from leader. Wide into straight, faded gradually.
Away nicely, pressed forward outside leader before taking over 1280m and crossing to fence. Collared passing 200m but kept on gamely and held on for second.
Began OK, didn't stretch out and had to be ridden 1200m to hold position. Put under pressure 500m, got clear run 300m, kept on steadily.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, racing wide till settling 1L behind leader in one-off position 1200m. Lay in under pressure in straight and boxed on one-paced.

Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind runners towards rear but wide. Steadied top of straight when blocked for run, turning one-paced. Found to have continuous epiglottic entrapment, lame right front leg.
Began awkwardly, ridden forward, settling one-off 3L from leader entering back stretch. Swung wide into straight, hit front 200m, pulled clear.
Quickly away, leading field to first turn before taking sit on leader. Put under pressure turning for home but only one-paced.
Held up behind midfield, 5Ls to make up on leader 400M, picked up strongly passing 200M, motored home and was just denied narrowly.
Settled down 5-6Ls at the rear, saved ground on the inside, gradually improving over the home bend, came home strongly final 200M, nearest finish.
Sat 4Ls back behind mid-division, kept on same pace entering straight, no impression on leaders.
Crowded for room 1100M and pushed to a wide no cover position, strolled forward to chase leaders but had little left passing 250M.
Badly crowded for room 1100M, hung out and raced keenly after the incident, made the home turn awkwardly, gave ground from 400M and eased early straight. (Lame next day)
Began awkwardly, went forward tracking leaders along the inside, kept up the chase entering straight, held final 100M.
Eased back on jumping, settled behind midfield along the 3-path, ran on mildly over final 300M but never a serious threat to leaders.
Checked 1100M and pushed very wide by rivals, dropped back to the rear for cover, had plenty to make up 400M, closed off well down the outside making good late impression.
Driven forward from wide barrier, crossed to the lead 1000M, headed 200M, faded towards the finish.
Bounded in the air lost ground, hampered at 1100M and taken wide by rivals, at the rear 5Ls off the pace, became detached 600M out, soon out of contention. (Lame next day)
Began well, eased back to sit in midfield but remained in touch, driven along 400M but failed to pick up speed on his first run at the Valley.
Tracked leader, moved to the front 200M and continued on under maximum pressure, held off fast finishing 2nd just.

Dipped jumping out of the highest draw near stands rails, soon recovered and hit the front passing the 800 metres, came under pressure to resist challenge coming onto course proper only to be outsprinted final stages.

Broke well from the two draw near the centre of the straight course, restrained to just behind first few before let down to issue serious challenge passing the 300 metres, held every chance until run ended about 100 metres out.
Well there to halfway mark, yielded ground from approaching course proper.
Jumped fairly but lacked early pace, tailed-off from the 800 metres but picked up quite well inside the final 200 metres for a good closing.

Jumped quickly to soon take up running on stands rails, held narrow advantage until headed slightly passing the 400 metres, renewed effort to assert authority over 100 metres out, hung on under pressure.
Moderate start from the one draw near the centre of the straight course, trailed the field before going past one after the first 200 metres, kept on same pace in the final stretch without quickening.
Slow out, soon recovered to race keenly just off the pace, tight between runners 400 metres out, weakened noticeably passing the 300 metres.
Eased back, took cover, pace good, raced flat until 150M to make some ground.
Eased at start, took cover at back, 2 wide, pace good, ran on only fairly.
Very slow away, at back, 2-3 wide, pace good, no dash.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, made ground 250M.
Very slow away, at back along the fence, no progress.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, pace good, progressed steadily 200M.
Pressed forward to lead at good pace, emptied 200M.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, pace good, made steady ground 300M.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 300M.
Eased to rear, never competitive.
Behind midfield, along the fence, pace good, made steady ground 250M.
Pressed forward, pace good, led 400M, flattened 200M.
Box seat, pace good, just held ground in final stages.
Failed to muster, never a factor at rear.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader at fast tempo, emptied 300M.
Always at rear, finished tailed out.
Pushed forward to settle in a handy position, however, harmed by the fast sectionals, weakened soon after straightening, tailed out.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite suited by the fast sectionals, found nothing when asked.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast pace, ran on steadily for 4th.
Settled worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite suited by the fast tempo, never ran on.
Pushed forward from a wide gate, however, trapped 3 wide without cove throughout at fast sectionals, faded soon after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast tempo, ran on well for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led by 1L at fast sectionals, kept on strongly until headed by the winner final 150M, held on for 2nd.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast tempo, swung wide turning in, ran on only fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, ran on gradually.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, harmed by the fast tempo, weakened badly 300M.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite suited by the fast pace, made no impression in straight.
Settled worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, enjoyed the fast tempo, finished off strongly to score by 2-1/4Ls.
Taken back to tail on rail, shifted out final turn but crowded, driven 300m, switched out 200m, stayed on centre but just missed frame.
Bumped start & battled to lead 1st turn 1 off, worked to rail 1300m & niggled when pressed soon after, driven 750m, boxed on until faded out final 300m.
Disputed lead on rail until settled 1 back 1300m, 7L 4th & shifted 3 deep 600m, hard-ridden in pursuit to brief 2nd, emptied 300m & faded.
Taken back to rail behind midfield, shifted out on turn, shaken up 400m, driven to 2nd 80m, lost place final stride.
Raced 1 back on rail, over-raced 1500m & shuffled to midfield 1300m, crowded into stretch, not clear run 300m, shaken up 220m, stayed on to just miss frame.
Bumped start, raced handily 3 wide with cover, shifted 4 deep for progress to lead 1200m, clear & to rail 920m, rolled 5L clear, shaken up 400m & kept on for clear win.
Restrained last pair 1 off, driven wide final turn, chased leader centre track & battled to 2nd last stride.
Rolled forward from wide gate to press lead 3 wide, to 1 off 1250m, 3rd & driven 530m, found nil & tapered to wire.
Started ok & raced 1 off 1 back, shuffled to midfield, niggled 700m, driven 450m & shifted out, quickened to vie for 2nd, tapered & swamped final 150m.
Well away, dropped in 1 off with cover behind midfield & niggled along, shifted 3 wide 800m & soon under pump, last turning in, soon emptied & faded.
Prominent initially, 1 off 1 back & over-raced 900m, shuffled to midfield 1 off, not clear run in stretch, shaken up 250m, boxed on late.
Moderate start, raced 3 wide with cover midfield, niggled 800m, under pump 700m, wider on turn, grinding run to 2nd 250m, peaked 160m & tapered.
Broke well, settled back 1 off with cover, niggled 500m & driven wide into stretch, crowded & bumped 220m, tepid run home.
Started ok & bustled along to race handily, caught 3 wide no cover, under pump 550m, driven 4 deep final turn, found nil.
Broke ok, trapped wide in midfield, rolled forward to edge lead 1 off 800m, headed 720m, driven 400m, all out & weakening when hampered 200m, no extra.
Retrained to midfield 4 wide, over-raced early, no cover from 900m & minor progress, forced widest final turn, driven but found nil.
Sluggish start & rousted on rail to settle behind midfield, niggled on turn, crowded & buffeted in stretch, driven in clear 180m, kept on one pace.
Smart start, taken back to rear, last & ridden 500m, switched out for running 250m, shifted wider 100m, boxed on for minor headway.
Lacked early toe & bustled, raced rear 1 off, advanced a spot 850m, caught in traffic & shifted out on turn, driven 350m to challenge lead 150m, no match for winner.
Fast start to lead, soon headed & sat 1 back on rail, under hold & in pocket in stretch, switched out 250m, quickened to lead 150m, drew clear, in command.
Pushed wide to lead & crossed to rail 1000m, headed 800m, regained lead 720m, 0.5L up & shaken up 350m, all out & headed 150m, tapered.
Outpaced early & raced rail at rear, not clear run into stretch, driven 320m, plugged on past beaten rivals.
Started well, pushed on to race 1 off 1 back, shifted out final turn & driven to challenge lead, tapered final 150m.
Tardy start widest, raced 3 wide with cover at tail, minor advance 850m, driven very wide into stretch, stayed on centre track for solid headway.
Pushed forward and sat prominently, 1-1/2L off 3 wide without cover, benefitted by the slow tempo, challenged strongly to the wire.
Remained at the rear, no progress.
Settled in midfield, 2-1/2L off 4 wide without cover, finished off only one pace.
Rolled forward and occupied box-seat from barrier 1, suited to the slow pace, ran on well for 3rd.
Sat towards the rear, 4-1/2L behind the leader 4 wide with cover, swung widest and made minor progress only.
Initially in behind midfield but was niggled along to improve around turn, couldn't keep on in the Straight.
Stride forward and parked outside the leader, benefited by the slow pace, stayed likely until 200M, missed 4th in the last stride.
Travelled in midfield, 2L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite not suited to the slow tempo, finished off nicely for 4th.
Raced in behind midfield, 3-1/4L behind the leader, took rail from 800M, not suited to the slow pace, ran home one pace.
Sat towards the rear, did not improve.
Always at the back, never a factor.
Travelled in midfield, 2-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, did not threaten.
Raced in worse than midfield, 3-3/4L off 3 wide with cover, kept pushing but dropped off near 250M.
Ridden forward to take the rail and led through slow sectionals, kept pushing and battled off a strong challenge to score.
Slow, taken to fence and last on settling. Trailed field to straight, switched to centre track 400m and finished powerfully, going from last to first in final 300m.
Pressed forward from wide draw, racing wide but with cover 3L from leaders. Blocked for run early in straight, kept on fairly to 200m before fading.
Unable to match early pace, slipping behind midfield. Took inside run in straight but checked 300m and shifted out. Finished off nicely.
Ridden early but didn't muster, dropping to rear away from fence. Made up some ground around turn, but one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from wide draw to share pace before easing back 3L from leaders. Urged forward top of straight, hit front 150m before run ended.
Outpaced early, settling at rear close to fence. Switched out turning for home and ran on fairly.
Hard ridden from widest draw to stay with leaders but 3-wide without cover. Battled on gamely to 200m before tiring.
Ridden early but found pace too hot and settled behind midfield away from fence. Lost position around turn, taken wide in straight, ran on steadily.
Pushed forward to contest lead, taking over before final turn but unable to kick clear. Caught 250m and faded.
Hard ridden to lead and then engaged in cut-throat battle with another runner to straight. Collared 300m and faded. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea, lame right front leg.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide till getting cover 3L from leader at turn. Battled gamely in straight though severely checked 100m.
Ridden to hold rail behind leaders but allowed to slip back behind hot pace passing 1000m. Left fence 600m, 4-wide into straight, rolled forward to hit front 100, run down.
Hard ridden to stay with pace, keeping tabs on leading trio to straight. Crowded out 400m, checked 300m, one-paced.
Steadied shortly after start, dropping back towards rear in one-off position. Put under pressure turning for home but only one-paced.
Settled in 4th, well placed to strike turning in, quickened past leader 200M, produced the fastest finish of the day and proved too classy for rivals, won by extending 2Ls at the line.
Restrained on jumping from wide barrier, 6-7Ls off the pace in the rear group, had plenty to do turning in, ran on final 400M but not reached contention.
Sat 3-wide no cover in midfield, moved into contention 550M, ran on same pace entering straight, out of contention 250M.
Held up in mid-division 3Ls behind leader, ran on well on straightening, got past higher rated rivals to go 3rd 50M, career best performance.
Tracked leader in 3rd, responded well when driven out 400M, went 2nd 120M but no chance with the classy MAURICE.
Dropped back to the rear 6-7Ls behind leader, brought wide home turn, made limited progress only entering straight. (No Vet findings)
Soon led, took them along at slow sectionals in first half of the race, quickened up tempo 500M, headed 200M and faded towards the finish.
Not hurried early stages, 6Ls back towards the rear, swung home 3-wide, hit the line well over final 300M.
Held up behind mid-division along the fence, not picked up when pushed along 450M, weakened passing 300M.
Towards the rear 5Ls back, travelled keenly after 1400M, ran on final 400M without threat to leaders.
In mid-division tracking the path of race favourite MAURICE, had every chance in straight, kept on steadily without threatening.
Tracked leader 2-wide, not quickened turning home, dropped out of contention from 250M.
Began fairly, then difficult to settle, dropping behind midfield. Stayed on rail in straight, checked 200m, then raced tight and not properly tested.
Hard ridden to get forward position, settling between horses 3L from leader. Blocked for run from 400m to 200m, finished off nicely when clear.
Began awkwardly, taken back, settling at rear. Left fence approaching 700m, switched out to make run from 400m, hit front 200m, pulled clear.
Away nicely but outpaced, dropping to last on settling. Trailed field thereafter.
Got off OK but held wide behind midfield and allowed to roll forward from 800m, racing 4-wide around turn. Kept on well to 200m before tiring.
Away nicely, rolled forward, sitting outside hindquarters of leader. Urged forward top of straight, looked chance 300m but unable to get ahead.
Jumped well but eased out of speed battle and taken to box seat 3L from leader. Steadied soon after straightening, no clear run from 300m and not properly tested.
First to jump but unable to clear inside runners and kept 3-wide without cover 1L from leader. Kept on well to 200m before turning one-paced.
Began OK, racing behind early pace before easing back approaching turn. Shaken up entering straight but only one-paced.
Jumped well, ridden to hold rail, taking lead on settling. Set strong pace to straight. Joined up front 300m but kept battling to hold on to 2nd placing.
Pushed forward early to sit 1/2L off the leader, but stuck 3 wide with no cover. Nosed in front at the 200m, but couldn't maintain momentum and went to the line 1 paced late.
Began OK and taken forward early to sit 4th, 1 off the fence. Held up early in the straight, before coming off heels to run on from 250m. Slightly 1 paced to the line when clear late.

Pushed forward initially before easing back to a position in midfield, 2-3 wide with cover. Came wide on the turn, and looked gone at 300 before kicking. Went to the line strongly, and almost claimed 2nd late.

Pushed forward early to ensure he led, but unable to get to the rail. Still in front at 300m, but beginning to fade. Kicked again slightly late when well out of place position, and came off heels 50m.

Began well and pushed forward early to be well position on the leaders rump, along the rail. Battled along the rail in the straight, finally handing up the lead at 200m. Kept plugging along late and just held 4th.
OK away and pushed up to be just behind midfield. Over raced and got his head up from the 1200m, and lost ground. Started running straight from the 400m, but only fair to the line.
Slow into stride. Dropped back early onto rail, and pushed up to sit midfield. Came wider on the turn to get clear space, but only went to the line fairly.
Began well and eased forward early to be placed just forward of midfield, on the rail. Held up for the entire length of the straight, and was never tested.

Pushed forward from wide draw, coming off heels 1200m.Sat handily placed in 5th, 2L off the leader and 3 wide with cover. Worked up early in straight before kicking clear at 150m. Hands and heels to line, easing late.
Fairly away, and dropped back early to sit in the last couple, 2-3 wide with cover. Went for a run at 350m, but horse never responded and went flat to the line.

Steadied back from the wide draw to eventually sit towards the rear of the field, 3-4 wide with limited cover. On heels at 900m.Never responded to urgings of the jockey, and was eased out a long way from home.

Dropped back from the wide draw to sit at the rear of the field early, 2-3 wide with cover. Ridden for luck early in the straight, but kicked well from the 200m. Big effort late, and ran onto heels of easing winner on the line.
Dropped back from the wide draw and stuck wide with no cover, eventually settling last by the 800m with cover. Came wider on the turn, but only ran fairly to the line.
OK away but only fairly into stride, sitting midfield, 1 off the fence. Only fair in the straight, and never looked to threaten.
Slightly slow out, recovered to race 2 wide, 4 lengths back in 7th, same position on turn, showed no response to riding in straight, finished last.
Began well, raced 3 lengths back on rail, difficult to settle near 850M, angled out turning in, finished off evenly in straight without threatening.
Taken back from the widest gate, raced at tail, still well back on turn, made minor headway in straight.
Taken back to race 9 lengths back at rear, slightly improved on turn, made minor headway in straight without posing much of a threat.
Began well from gate 7, raced prominently, found cover on turn, kept on evenly in straight to make frame.
Jumped well, raced 2 lengths back on rail, easy run on turn, no daylight early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back, carried wide turning in, finished off evenly in straight.
Fast into stride, sent forward to race prominently, shared lead on turn, kept on well in straight but unable to hold off the challengers late.
Slightly slow out, raced 5 lengths back at 9th, same margin back on turn, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to be nearest on line, just missed.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide at rear, improved on turn, finished off strongly in straight to be nearest on line.
Average to begin, showed no early speed, raced 5 to 6 lengths back on rail in 10th, there to turn, failed to closed off in straight.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, showed no early speed, raced 10 lengths back at rear, still well back on turn, failed to closed off in straight, never competitive.
Moderately away from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well on turn, kept on strongly in straight to score.
Moderately away from gate 12, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide and without cover in midfield, similar position on turn, closed respectably given workload.
Jumped well, travelled keenly in midfield, switched out for a run upon straightening but failed to quicken under pressure. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Jumped fairly, always in last few.
Began awkwardly, soon picked up to handy position on rails, settled one back in 3rd from the 1200 metres, failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Jumped well, with leaders 3-wide early stages before settling just over 2L off pace in 4th, fought on steadily to reach 2nd passing the 150 metres but never threatening.
Settled at the back from a wide draw, remained similar on rails to straight, produced good late impression closing stages.
Sluggish at start, tightened on rails when towards the rear past the winning post the first time, raced keenly in midfield when pace slackened far side, found nil in straight.

Began from the widest gate, settled wide in rear of midfield, commenced move passing the Rock gaining to 4L 6th rounding home bend, similar when wide turning in, fought on steadily down the centre of the straight.
Poor beginning, soon recovered to better than midfield in 5th on rails within 3L of lead, similar turning for home, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Broke well from the middle draw, raced wide in prominent position around stables bend, settled just off the pace in 2nd far side, faded under pressure after straightening.
Moderate start, soon dropped to tail-end, never a danger.

Jumped well, took up running passing the winning post the first time, obtained rails run passing the 1200 metres, set sedate pace down back straight, kicked clear after home turn, hung on well under pressure.
Jumped fairly, never better than midfield, wide into straight, one-paced under pressure.
Settled just off the leader, 2 wide, closed off strongly 250M to score.
Behind midfield, along the fence, lack room 300M, dashed strongly for 2nd.
Hard ridden early but failed to cross in front, trapped 3 wide, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide just off the leader, ran on well for 3rd.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, lack room 4-2, little dash when clear.
Eased at start, never competitive.
Hard ridden to occupy box seat, reduced 200M.
At back, trapped 3 wide, lack turn of foot in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Bumped start, never a factor.
Hard ridden to take the rail and lead, hung on until 200M emptied.
Bumped start, hard ridden early but not muster, trapped 3 wide throughout, little dash 200M.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, kept on until headed final 150M.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on nicely along the inside for 4th.
Camped handy, however travelled 3 wide without cover throughout, kept on one pace until weakened final 200M.
At rear, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, swung widest 250M, dashed well for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, one paced home.
Sent forward to take the fence and share the lead, kept on fairly until weakened over the last furlong.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily without serious threat.
Failed to muster despite ridden along throughout, detached from the field, tailed out.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, blocked early straight until final 150M, made some ground thereafter.
Half missed on jumping, shifted to the fence and travelled 3Ls behind the leader, ran on well for 2nd.
Pressed forward, was steadied 1200M, 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, weakened badly soon after straightening.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, switched out turning home, ran on strongly to score by 1/2L.
Bustled at break to park midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 600m, under pump 500m, swung wide into stretch & hard-ridden, boxed on to wire.
Started ok, sat rail mid rank, rolled on a spot 900m, 5th & ridden 400m, edged centre, switched back inside 120m, one-paced.
Lacked toe, raced near rear 1 off with cover, driven 550m to hold position, widest into stretch, ran home evenly.
Speed to lead on rail, pressed & shaken up 380m, maintained narrow lead into stretch, headed 220m, no extra & boxed on.
Broke well, parked close 2nd outside leader, bustled a touch 550m to close, driven to vie for lead turning in, quickened to grab lead 220m, drew clear.
Fair start, raced rail near tail, advanced a spot 900m, shifted out final turn, switched centre & shaken up 250m, stayed on for minor headway.
Smart start & prominent, soon snagged to 1 off 1 back, under pump from 500m, kept on dourly centre track to edge 3rd late.
Broke ok, raced rail 1 back, ridden 450m, clear 3rd when switched to centre track 180m, no extra & tapered to wire.
Taken back at start, raced keenly & restrained to tail on rail, continued to over-race, driven 250m, outpaced in run home.
Smart start to press leader initially, settled 1 off 1 back, switched out & ridden 400m to challenge lead on outer, always held & tapered final 100m.
Outpaced at break, raced last pair on rail, ridden along 450m, found nil & soon beaten.
Taken back at start to 1 off with cover near rear, checked off heels 600m & shuffled back, niggled along, driven into stretch, strong closer centre track to nick 2nd.
Speed to lead on rail, driven into stretch, soon all out & headed 150m, tapered & mugged at post for 2nd.
Bustled forward wide, worked to brief lead 850m, snagged to 2nd 1 off no cover, ridden 400m, all out & emptied 300m, faded.
Broke ok, rolled to stalk 1 back on rail, switched out & shaken up 320m, driven to lead 150m, drew clear.
Smart start, trapped 3 wide no cover midfield until slotted 1 off 550m, driven into stretch, boxing on for minor inroads when hung in late & corrected.
Broke well & bustled initially to race handily 1 off with cover, shuffled back 700m, niggled 550m, driven 400m & widest final turn, boxed on one pace.
Broke well, 1 off with cover midfield, edged to rail 750m, shifted out & driven final turn, plugged on one pace.
Sluggish start, taken to rail & raced near rear, progress to sit back of midfield 600m, driven into stretch, stayed on dourly.
Unable to slot from wide, taken back to last pair 1 off with cover, shifted 3 wide with cover 620m, driven turning in, plugged on tepidly.
Broke ok widest & rowed long initially, trapped 3 wide no cover near rear, niggled 550m, driven turning in, boxed on evenly centre track.
Ridden up to take spot in front of midfield along the rail, 4-1/4L off the pace, weakened badly near 250M.
Remained at the tail, not competitive.
Settled in behind midfield, 6-3/4L behind and 3 wide prior to the first turn, swung widest and made good ground.
Pushed forward to cross from a wide barrier and led by 3/4L, ran on nicely to score.
Slotted into box-seat just before the first turn, kept on one pace to the line.
Raced in worse than midfield initially, however went wide around turn and then faded gradually.
At rear throughout, improved only slightly.
Began well and raced on the rail inside the leader, kept on until 150M and faded gradually thereafter.
Ridden up and sat one off one back, driven and closed off well to come home in 2nd.
Always towards the rear, never a factor.
Raced in behind midfield, 5-3/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, closed off strongly for 3rd.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/4L off 3 wide without cover, finished off the race fairly.
Worked way to the front soon after start then set steady pace to straight. Kicked 3L clear passing 200m and never threatened.
Ridden to obtain forward position, settling behind early pace. Left wide 900m, gave ground abruptly from 500m and pulled up. Bled from both nostrils.
Crowded on jumping, losing ground, then close to heels 1000m, dropping to rear. Improved into tight running 700m, not much room early straight, finished off nicely.
Steadied on jumping, shifted across, settling in last pair away from fence. Urged forward from 550m, taken to centre track in straight, boxed on fairly.
Began awkwardly, ridden forward between horses in midfield before moving 3-wide around turn. Gave ground gradually in straight. Confirmed roarer.
Jumped well but eased, settling on fence two-back from leader. Stayed on fence in straight but only one-paced under hard riding.
Steadied on jumping, crossed to rail, settling in last pair. Began forward move passing 500m, made ground to 250m, then one-paced.
Hard ridden from outside draw, racing 3-wide behind midfield to turn when lost position, dropping back. Found nothing in straight when asked.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide 2L from leader. Allowed to roll forward around turn, 2nd into straight, then one-paced. Lost right front plate near 1000m.
First out but didn't press forward, settling in slipstream of leader to straight. Angled out 300m to make run but unable close gap.
Began well, hard ridden to go forward, settling one-off, one-back passing 800m. Swung wide into straight, ridden but unable to close gap to winner.
Outpaced, dropping to rear but 3-wide. Lost touch with main field around turn and found nothing in straight. Lame left front leg.
Never far off from leaders, shifted out to 3-wide 800M when pace slackened, gave limited response under pressure, out of contention 200M. (No Vet findings)
Held up in midfield 3-4Ls off the pace, proved very difficult to settle when race tempo slackened 900M, given reminders passing 500M, took time to get going, did best work final 200M.
Prominent, caught 3-wide until 1100M, shuffled back a bit entering home turn, struggled to keep up and gave way from 500M.
Towards the rear early stages, strode forward along the 3-path when pace slackened middle stages, with leaders making home turn but had little left entering straight, soon beaten and eased.
Caught wide early stages, no cover from 1200M and strolled forward to join leader, battled on entering straight, gave way to pursuers 100M out.
Blundered at the start, in mid-division, proved difficult to settle especially middle stages when race tempo slackened, eased early straight. (Jockey : not able to see out the distance)
Slow to begin, taken back from wide barrier, raced as the back-marker for much of the way, closed off fairly down the inside on straightening, never a serious threat.
