Sent forward to park outside the leader at slow sectionals, kept on one pace until weakened over the last furlong.
Never looked likely.
Checked at start, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, harmed by the slow sectionals, ran on well for 4th.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, dropped off soon after straightening, tailed out.
Settled worse than midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, not suited by the slow pace, made no impression in straight.
Settled worse than midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, one paced home.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the slow tempo, ran on nicely for 2nd.
Speed to lead centre track, gradual move towards stands' side, pressed & driven 400m, quickened & edged away for cosy win.
Early pace, niggled along to track leader, driven under pressure 380m, found nil & weakened tamely.
Broke ok, raced 2L back , niggled 650m, 2.5L down & under pump 500m,kept on one pace until tapered final 50m.
Slow break, recovered to race midfield 1 off stands' fence, unable to hold position & drifted back, outpaced & driven 400m, found nil & faded.
Broke ok, camped back of midfield, switched outside 370m & shaken up, brushed rival 300m, ran on for minor headway.
Fair break & niggled along 2.5L back, under pump 500m, shifted centre 350m, plugged on one pace.
Broke ok, raced handily centre track, niggled 450m, driven along 380m, boxed on one pace.
Sluggish start & bustled across to stands rail, rousted along for minor progress until tightened up & checked 300m, tapered to wire.
Lacked toe & bustled early to race back of midfield, driven along 500m, plugged on tamely.
Broke well, soon settled back of midfield inner side of centre track, niggled 550m, driven 400m, plugged on evenly.
Broke ok, raced handily on rail, bustled to close from 450m, soon driven to challenge, some greenness, kept on well but no match for winner.
Reared start & raced last, soon detached & rousted from 650m, ran on greenly under strong drive to pass beaten rivals, best work at finish.
Smart start to stalk leader 2L back, over-raced a touch, 3L back & niggled 500m, under pump 450m & switched centre, stayed on to nick 3rd at line.
Started ok & rousted, lacked pace & soon 2nd last, plugged on one pace under drive.
Started well & bustled to fore of midfield on rail, over-raced 850m, awkward on turn, ridden into stretch, switched out 300m, stayed on dourly for 3rd.
Broke ok & raced fore of midfield 1 off with cover, switched out final turn & driven 400m, faded tamely in run home.
Slow break, raced 1 off near rear, edged 3 deep 600m & bumped rival, driven 400m, plugged on one pace.
Steadied start to 2nd last, soon bustled & last from 800m, ridden for progress 500m, shifted out 400m, stayed on for dour headway.
Missed break, recovered to rail midfield, shifted 1 off 600m, driven 420m, boxed on evenly centre track.
Sharp break & soon led 1 off until clear & to rail 850m, 1L clear & shaken up 400m, headed 250m, faded.
Fast start, close 2nd until settled 1 back on rail from 850m, crowded turning in, driven between rivals 300m to join leader, close duel final 100m, no extra last strides.
Speed wide & bustled forward to sit 2nd 1 off no cover 850m, niggled 500m, driven 430m to lead 250m, joined & tight duel final 100m, rallied final strides.
Lacked early toe & bustled initially, settled near rear 3 wide with cover, forced widest on turn & driven 500m, kept on one pace.
Broke with others, over-raced fore of midfield 3 wide, lost cover & bumped 850m, 4th & driven into stretch, outpaced & boxed on evenly.
Taken back from wide gate, soon last 1 off & bustled, advanced a spot 800m, shifted 3 wide 600m & bumped, last & driven 400m, kept on for late inroads.
Rousted to hold early position but lacked toe & drifted back to midfield 1 off with cover, nudged 3 deep 600m, wide into stretch, closed centre, just missed 3rd.
Raced in midfield, 2L off the pace grand side, finished off only one pace.
Rolled forward and led by 1/2L on the outer rail, headed and tapered passing 100M.
Raced at the tail and detached from the field, 6-1/2L behind grand side, did not threaten.
At rear and struggled to keep up all along, not a factor.
Raced prominently, 3/4L off the pace on centre of the track, kept on well to the line.
Sat behind midfield, 3-1/2L behind the leader centre of the track, never ran on.
Sat inside the leader, 1 horse off the outer rail, bumped and then crowded after 300M, did not run on thereafter.
Always in midfield, 1-3/4L behind the leader on centre of the track, ran on well to score.
Prominent, travelled 3/4L off the leader on centre of the track, remained in touch until final 100M.
Travelled slightly behind midfield, 2-1/4L behind centre of the track, kept on one pace only.
At the rear and detached, 7-1/4L behind centre of the track, made minor ground only from well back.
Travelled on the outer rail, 1-1/4L behind the leader, couldn't find racing room at 300M and 200M on the inside, closed off strongly inside the final 100M after being directed back out.
Prominent, travelled 3/4L off the pace grand side, dropped off when bumped prior 250M, made up ground nicely thereafter for 3rd.
Travelled behind midfield, 3L off along the outer rail, never looked likely.
Ridden to hold forward position but held 3-wide first turn. Rolled forward back stretch to lead 1200m but kept wide by inside runner. Collared 400m and faded gradually.
Away well, taken to fence behind leading pack, settling 4L from leader back stretch. Closed in around turn, looked chance 200m, no extra close home.
Slow into stride, taken to rail, settling towards rear. Improved position around final turn but only one-paced in straight.
Steadied after start to obtain cover, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Taken wide around final turn, ran on fairly in straight.
Vigorously ridden, taking first turn 6-wide. Kept 3-wide back stretch 2L from leader, 4-wide into straight, kept on to 50m when bumped and rider stopped riding.
Bumped start, restrained and shifted in, settling in last pair. Last turning for home, finished off one-paced.
Vigorously ridden from outside draw but held 8-wide first turn. Continued to race 4-wide back stretch, widest into straight, faded. Unacceptable performance.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Taken wide 600m to make run but only one-paced. Lost left hind plate.
Began well, ridden to hold rail inside leading pack, led 1250m but relegated to 2nd passing 1000m. Retook lead 400m, strongly challenged final 100m, just held.
Quickly into stride leading to first turn before steadied 1200m for cover 2L behind leader. Under pressure entering straight and finished off strongly.
Ridden early to hold forward position but shuffled back first turn, dropping to rear. Took inside run in straight but found nothing under pressure.
First out but 3-wide first turn and eased back. Shaken up 800m to hold position, picked up bit 300m, challenged leader from 100m but pipped on line.
Bumped start, pressed forward taking first turn 5-wide. Kept 3-wide back stretch 3L from leader, 4-wide into home stretch, boxed on gamely.
Began fairly, shifted across behind runners, settling at rear. Came off fence 600m, finished strongly between horses but blocked for run 100m.

In midfield early stages, travelled keenly 800M when pace slackened, shifted out to 3-wide without cover, kept on well chasing leaders in straight, drifted in and out under pressure, held final stages.
Crossed to the lead just before entering home turn, headed 500M, rallied to re-gain lead 300M, one paced final 150M and swamped by pursuers.
Settled in mid-division, switched wide to challenge 300M out did best work passing 200M, got up for 3rd near line.
Eased back to near the rear from wide draw, switched out to 3-wide 600M, had no clear run early straight, closed off well final 250M, late impression on leaders.
Settled behind midfield but caught very wide throughout, kept on same pace entering straight, not reached contention.
Went forward from 14, prompted the pace 2-wide, vied for lead until weakened 150M.
Held up 3-wide behind midfield, swung wide for home but no impression under pressure 300M, never troubled leaders.
Vied for early lead, dropped back to track leaders nearing home turn, moved up to a contending spot 500M, faded 200M out.
Fractious in stalls, slow to begin, recovered to race behind midfield but further back than intended, unable to quicken over final 200M, finished disappointingly.
Tardy away, in rear pair 8Ls off the pace middle stages, saved ground along fence home turn, limited progress early straight and lacked further response final 200M.
Reserved in midfield, checked 350M and held up for a short while, ran on only fairly to the line, not troubled leaders.
Held up along the fence in midfield, waited with till top of straight, angled out to challenge 300M, vied for lead inside over final 250M, hard pressed and gained upper hand final 50M.
Slow to begin, taken back to rear, outpaced and left behind passing 400M, never involved.
Led early stages, tracked pace from 900M, not clear run early straight, quickened up well 300M, went head to head with eventual winner, came up short final 50M.
Began well, racing with leading pack before crowded out 850m and losing ground. Boxed on one-paced in straight.
Urged forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide without cover 2L from leader. Kept on fairly in straight before tiring final 200m.
Slow into stride and last on settling. Trailed field throughout.
Pressed forward from wide draw but raced fiercely 1L behind leader in one-off position. Rolled forward top of straight, looked chance 200m, swamped final 50m.
Began well, ridden to get forward position, settling in box seat 3L from leader. Shaken up 400m but unable get clear run final 150m and not properly tested.
Not pushed early, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Swung wide into straight, finished strongly while shifting in 75m and bumping another.
Steadied shortly after start, dropping to rear but away from fence, Well back entering straight and plodded home one-paced.
Not pushed early, settling towards rear but wide. Taken very wide on entering straight but only once-paced under pressure.
Restrained after jump to find cover but then raced fiercely and refused to settle 3L behind leader. Held for clear run top of straight but battled on gamely.
Jumped well, not pushed, taking midfield position. Bumped and unbalanced 650m when starting forward move, hit front 250m, pulled clear, eased before line.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, dropping to rear along rail. Never in the hunt.
Hard ridden to lead, crossing to fence 1200, and setting comfortable pace. Tackled passing 250m but battled on gamely until swamped final stages.
Quickly out then eased 3-back from leader along fence. Switched out 300m to get run, finished strongly despite being bumped and straightened 50m.

Eased forward early to sit towards the rear of the field, 2-3 wide with cover. Came wider on the turn, before being checked at 350m. Not pushed out from that point and eased out late. Vet reported lameness.
Dropped back around the field early before pushing up to sit just behind midfield, on the fence. Went looking for a run at top of the straight, and OK initially, before running flay from 150m.

Pressed forward early from the wide draw, but dropped back after being stuck wide with fast early speed to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Still had plenty to make up at the 200m, but switched on from there and went home well.
Began well and taken up early before easing to sit midfield, 3 wide with cover. Plugged away early in the straight, and lay in around 150m and had to straighten. Ran on OK after that.
Pulled to the front early, eventually leading by 4L, and setting a cracking pace up front. Eventually headed by the 150m, and fading quickly, but had just enough in the tank to hold onto 2nd late.
Hampered on jumping and eased forward early, eventually sitting worse than midfield and 1 off the fence. Came widest in the straight, but only used sparingly in the run home.

OK away before dropping straight to the rail to find a position midfield, on the fence with cover. Looked to be travelling well rounding the turn, but never responded to riding in the straight and petered out in the run home.

Began well, and taken forward early, before electing not to take on leader and dropping back to be 2nd, 4L off the leader. Fading before the turn, and never responded in the straight. Eased up from 200m.

Dropped back from the wide draw to sit last by the 1200m, 15L off the leader. Ran solidly in the straight as the field compacted back to. Held up on heels through 200m, losing some momentum, and OK to the line when clear late.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit 2nd last by the 1200m, 14L off the leader. Patiently ridden in the straight, finding a run at 200m. Finished off well, and only just missed a place.

Happy to ease forward early and be handily placed 5th on the rail, with the fast early pace. Pushed forward from the 350, and tackled the leader under hands and heels at 150m. Kicked clear and easing late.
Cruised out early and allowed to settle at the rear of the field, on the fence. Never travelled at all, and gave nothing in the straight. Eased up from the 100m.

Went to push forward early, but foiled by the early pace and dropped back, eventually finding a spot 4th/5th, 3 wide with no cover. Trapped on heels at 350m, but was already on the wane and never ran on in the straight.

Taken up to sit clear 3rd 5L off the leader, mostly 2-3 wide with no cover and trying to chase the fast early pace. Shifted out on the home turn and came wider, before dropping out in the straight. Quick race tempo didn't suit.
Moderate start, soon ridden to rear of midfield within 3L of pace, slightly lost position rounding home bend, one-paced under pressure in the run home.
Began from the widest gate, soon obtained inside run towards the rear hugging the rails turning in, made modest headway under pressure but never threatening.
Raced wide in a prominent position, took closer order to share 2nd passing the 800 metres, dropped back to 3rd coming onto home bend, kept on under pressure before fading close to home.
Began nicely from the one draw settling one back on rails just behind the eventual winner, failed to quicken to challenge after straightening.
Jumped fairly, settled just worse than midfield on rails, saved ground on rails around home bend and into straight, kept on well to finish.
Sluggish early stages, trailed the field to straight, finished off race strongly near the centre of the track, did best work late over an apparently insufficient trip.

Jumped only fairly from a wide gate, worked his way up early in back straight to join the leaders 4-wide up the Rock, bumped and unbalanced for a stride when a 1L 2nd upon straightening, never recovered.
Pressed on to race wide in rear of midfield, remained similar to home bend when coming under pressure, folded up quickly after straightening.
Began fairly and ridden along, steadied back to 4-wide in 6th down back straight, lost position turning in, no further impression thereafter.
Jumped fairly, prominent to home bend, faded under pressure into straight. (Lame next day and blood in trachea)
Waited with, saved ground on inside turning in, fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Not the best to jump but soon took up running on rails, set a steady pace for narrow lead to straight before drawing clear under pressure upon straightening.
Behind midfield, 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made steady ground 300M.
Eased back, never a factor.
Pushed to hold the rail, led under pressured throughout, harmed by the fast pace, flattened 150M.
Hard ridden forward to pressure the leader, 2 wide, clocked fast sectionals, out of fuel 200M.
Pressed forward, sat 2 wide off the fast pace, hung in whilst weakening 250M.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, no progress.
Settled just off the fast pace along the rails, drifted away 200M to score.
At back, along the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M.
Very slow away, never better than midfield along the fence.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, checked badly 250M, reduced afterwards.
Eased to rear, took rail, favoured by the fast tempo, made some ground 200M.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide off the leaders, pace very fast, completely emptied 500M.
Eased to settle worse than midfield, however, travelled 4 wide without cover from 1100M, weakened soon after straightening.
Travelled wide without cover throughout, dropped off 500M, tailed out.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, moved forward 600M, kept on strongly to score again by 1-3/4Ls.
Settled worse than midfield about 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, improved nicely rounding the Home Bend, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, improved nicely rounding the Home Bend, however, finished off only one pace for 4th.
At rear, travelled 9Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, moved forward around the field 700M, weakened soon after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, held up rounding the Home Bend, one paced home without any serious threat.
Never looked competitive.
Settled worse than midfield about 8Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, moved forward around the field 600M, ran on nicely to get 2nd.
Camped handy, dropped off 500M, tailed out.
Sent forward to take the lead early, found cover 1300M, found nothing when place under pressure rounding the Home Bend.
Pressed forward to race outside the leader early, took fence and led 1300M, kept on nicely until weakened 200M.
Slow start, bustled to settle rail back of midfield, driven final turn & shifted out, stayed on for minor headway.
Taken back to 1 off with cover back of midfield, overraced 870m, driven wide final turn, plugged home one pace.
Snagged at break, sat 1 off with cover near tail, shifted 3 deep for progress 400m, very wide into stretch, kept on evenly centre track.
Broke ok, bustled to vie for lead, soon settled 1 back 1 off, 3rd & no cover 700m, niggled 450m, driven into stretch, one-paced & tapered closing stages.
Led from gate, clear & to rail 900m, headed 870m & slipstreamed 2L 2nd, shifted out 320m & shaken up, quickened to lead 130m, drew clear.
Taken back to rail, 2L adrift & niggled 550m, hard ridden into stretch, never a factor.
Fast start & pressed lead 4 deep 1st turn, led 1 off 870m, to rail 700m & scooted 2L clear, driven 300m, all out & headed 130m, no extra.
Taken back from wide gate to rail near tail, niggled along, under pump 400m, hard-ridden & plugged in for moderate progress.
Speedy start, settled 1 back on rail, 4th & shuffled to 2 back 700m, ridden into stretch, lacked toe, tapered in run home.
Broke ok & bustled early strides, settled rail midfield, niggled 650m, under pump 500m, stayed on to 3rd 170m, kept closing without threat.
Solid break out wide, slotted midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 750m, driven 500m, boxed on evenly centre track.
Lacked early toe & 3L detached from main pack in 2nd last, to tail turning in, found nil & eased.
Sluggish at start & rousted, soon 5L adrift of 2nd last at tail, improved a place turning in, driven & closed past beaten rivals, never a threat.
Broke ok to park midfield 1 off with cover, shifted 3 deep 400m, driven into stretch, stayed on for solid late headway.
Broke well & driven to race 1 off 1 back, ridden in 5th 450m, kept on evenly.
Started ok, bustled to sit midfield on rail, ridden turning in, found nil in tame run home.
Fast start, sat rail, shaken up 400m, 2nd & shifted out 320m, gradually closed under strong drive to press winner at finish.
Tardy start & raced 1 off near rear, niggled 400m, driven into stretch, closed to 3rd 90m, kept on but no threat.
Driven from wide gate to press lead 1 off, niggled along in 2nd, 1.5L back & hard-ridden 450m, weakened in run home.
Smart start & handy 3 wide no cover, nudged along for progress 450m, ridden in 4th 300m, struggling & lugged close to heels 150m, no extra.
Speed to lead on rail, pressed until asserted 500m, 2L clear turning in & shaken up, tapered close home but held on.
Settled in midfield, 6L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited to the quick tempo, ran on strongly to score.
Slotted into box-seat, despite not suited to the quick tempo, closed off okay for 4th.
At back throughout, retired from the event when rounding the home turn.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 7-1/4L behind the pace 2 wide with cover, benefitted by the quick tempo, ran on for 3rd.
Raced in front of midfield, 4-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, ran on well and just missed out on the prize.
Settled in worse than midfield along the rail, 6-3/4L behind the leader, despite suited to the fast pace, one pace home.
Pushed forward and camped handy, 2-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, ran on until 150M and emptied.
Ridden forward and sat outside the leader, dropped off badly after straightening.
Travelled at the tail-end, 8-1/2L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited to the quick tempo, improved steadily.
Hard ridden forward from an inner draw to lead by 1/2L, harmed by the fast pace, emptied after 150M.
Raced in midfield along the rail, 5-1/4L behind the leader, made minor ground in the straight.
Always at the back, never a factor.
Crowded shortly after start, steadied, taken in for cover and last on settling. Taken out in straight for clear running but only one-paced.
Allowed to stride at own pace, dropping to behind midfield along rail. Got rails run entering straight but had to switch out 180m before finishing strongly to win close home.
Began awkwardly, ridden along to hold rail position, settling 2L from leader. Kept on well in straight to 200m before tiring.
Outpaced early, dropping to rear in one-off position. Switched out entering straight and finished powerful down centre track to just miss.
Steadied after start, shifted across to rail, became unbalanced first turn, then made up ground settling 3-back from leader. Kept on early in straight before tiring final 200m.
Began OK, not pushed, settling behind midfield. Lost position final turn when blocked for running, kept on one-paced in straight.
Began fairly, crowded, but pressed forward 3-wide in midfield to first turn when shuffled back. Rolled forward from 500m, 4-wide into straight, one-paced.
First out, set steady pace to straight, joined up front from 250m but kept finding until swamped close home.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 4-wide first turn then left without cover 1000m. Rolled forward 3-wide till outside leader final turn, kept battling in straight.
Ridden early to hold position 3L from leader. Became unbalanced 1000m, hard ridden from 500m but little headway while laying in badly. Lame right front leg.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide until settling outside leader approaching turn. Joined leader 200m, kept battling until final strides.
Jumped well, ridden to stay outside leader to 1000m when allowed to drop 2L back. Disappointed for run top of straight, boxed on one-paced when clear.
Began only fairly, caught wide no cover early stages, allowed to stride forward 1100M,vied for lead 700M, had every chance entering straight, always held by winner, lost 2nd last stride.
Began very awkwardly, failed to muster speed and raced back in the field 8Ls off the pace, made some progress final 250M, steadied 50M from home.
Not hurried, eased back to near the rear 7Ls off the pace, ran on fairly down inside on straightening, well held by leaders.
Held up in midfield, wide no cover from 800M, couldn't pick up entering straight.
Settled down behind midfield 5Ls off, travelled nicely to straight, steady headway from 250M, hard pressed late stages to challenge winner, just denied.
Chased leaders, held 3rd position turning in, turned one pace 150M and faded towards the line.
Reserved in midfield 3-4Ls behind leaders, moved into contention 350M, fought on steadily to line, out-finished by a few late stages.
Raced keenly early stages, restrained to race ahead of midfield, closed off well down outside final 200M, late impression on first 3.
Held up 2-wide in mid-division, lacked a strong turn of foot final 300m, kept on moderately for non-threatening 5th.
Led steadily first half, pressed by a rival 800M and went quick in 3rd quarter, kept on well in the lead entering straight, sustained effort final 200M to hold off rivals. (Blood in trachea)
More prominent than usual, tracked pace to 800M, came under pressure nearing home turn, gave way gradually.
Dropped back to near the rear 8Ls behind leaders, kept on same pace in straight, never threatened.
No early speed, settling at rear along fence. Kept on rail in straight and ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
First out, hard ridden but unable to cross to fence and allowed to travel one-off 2L from leader. Under pressure from 350m, flattened 100m.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, taking lead passing 1050m, crossing to fence 900m. Caught passing 150m, battled on gamely.
Began OK but travelled keenly behind midfield and difficult to settle until after 900m. One-paced in straight.
Restrained on jumping and taking in for cover, dropping to last. Found little in straight when pressed.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground racing 3-wide until settling outside leader approaching turn. Kept on gamely in straight under hard riding.
Began OK, not pushed, settling 3-back some 4L from leader. Came off fence 400m, ran up behind horses, got clear run 100m, finished off well.
Jumped OK, ridden to hold one-off position 3L from leader. Lost position turn, switched out straight, ran on well to 50m when rider stopped riding to straighten horse.
Began well, ridden to hold rail, taking box seat 3L from leader. Switched out 280m to make run, hit front 150m, pulled clear.
Lifted feet when gates opened, losing ground, then ridden to make up ground racing 3-wide mostly some 3L from leader. Kept on fairly in straight until tiring final 200m.

Moderate start, recovered to close-up position of the small field, hung out and lost position coming onto home bend, 5th over 2L behind 3-wide entering straight, ran on under pressure to hold every chance briefly 200m out, no extra.
Bumped twice at the start losing ground, soon crossed to rails and recover to one back position in 3rd, remained similar into straight, fought on steadily without threatening.

Broke well from the one draw, snatched back for cover but found itself in front when race leader went off the track coming onto home bend, held 1L advantage entering home straight, faded gradually under pressure.
Shifted out jumping out, soon pulled to the front and led until running off the track coming onto home bend, never recovered. (Lame)
Broke well but soon taken back to a handy position, similar turning for home, one-paced when steadied over 100 metres out.
Minor inconvenienced jumping out, settled in rear of small field within 3L of pace on rails, baulked briefly after straightening, quickened well to hit the front inside the 200 metres, won readily.
Worked forward from a wide draw, carried extremely wide by erratic race leader towards the outside rails coming onto home bend, never recovered.
Hard ridden early, 2 wide in midfield, no turn of foot.
Pushed early but not muster, trapped 3 wide, ran on ok in straight.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, trapped 4 wide throughout ,dropped off rapidly 400M.
Hard ridden early, behind midfield on the fence, no progress.
At back, along the fence, dashed well 300M for 3rd.
Never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, ran on strongly for 2nd.
Pushed early, trapped 3 wide, continued forward to take rail and led at good pace, out of fuel 250M.
Pushed to hold the rail in midfield, just held ground in straight.
Never competitive at rear.
Trapped 3-4 wide throughout at rear, never nearer.
Pressed forward, took rail in front of the field, then eased to have box seat, drifted away 250M to score.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, ran on well until 150M flattened.
At back, 2-3 wide, never improved.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and share the lead, kept on steadily until final 100M weakened.
Niggled along throughout, dropped off rounding the Home Turn, tailed out.
Pushed forward to settle in a prominent position with cover, kept on one pace to the line without any serious threat.
Settled worse than midfield, 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made no impression in straight.
Settled worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, swung wide turning in, dashed well for 3rd.
Camped handy, faded badly soon after straightening,
Always at rear, never a factor.
Pressed forward to park outside the leader, kept on strongly to score by 1-1/4Ls.
Settled worse than midfield, 6.5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never ran on.
Raced midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on fairly and weakened final 100M.
Rolled to occupy the box seat, had every possible chance in straight, however, finished off only one pace.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader, however, trapped wide without cover throughout, never looked likely.
Jumped fairly, travelled 8Ls behind the leader along the fence, finished off impressively for 2nd.
Missed break, hung out rounding the Home Bend, never looked likely.
Sharp break, raced 3rd 1 off no cover, 3 deep final turn & close-up, driven 360m, found little & plugged on dourly.
Speed to lead, headed 1150m & raced 1 back on rail, shifted out on turn to join leader, shaken up to lead 420m, quickened clear, in command.
Broke ok, lacked toe & bustled along 1 off with cover back of midfield, shifted out & driven final turn, grinding progress to 2nd 200m, held in run.
Started well, sat 4th on rail, shifted 1 off 500m, driven 350m, boxed to 3rd 100m, kept on evenly.
Steady start, taken to rail & raced back of midfield, steadied off heels 700m, shaken up 400m, switched out 250m, stayed on for late headway.
Started ok, steadied to sit near tail 1 off, shifted out final turn, driven 420m, kept on evenly.
Fast start, raced to lead 1150m & scooted 3L clear, keen in front & restrained out of back, joined turning in, headed 420m, hard-ridden 360m, tapered.
Taken back at start & raced at tail 3 wide no cover, niggled 800m & minor progress, pushed wide into stretch, driven 350m, outpaced & tapered late.
Broke well, bustled to go on & race 2nd 1 off no cover, pressed leader 400m & driven, unable to impose but dug in for gritty duel, led close home.
Smart start, pace to soon lead & snag rail, bowled along until pressed & driven 400m, found more & battled on, no extra & finally headed close home.
Started ok & sat rail midfield, under pressure 550m, shifted out into stretch, ran home tepidly.
Broke ok in midfield, niggled & drifted back a spot 1 off with cover, driven 600m, plugged on one pace.
Broke well & raced front rank, settled 1 back 1 off at 1150m, ridden 400m, edged out 320m, one-paced.
Missed break & bustled initially to park rail behind midfield, driven 400m, found little in run home.
Snagged back to race at tail 1 off, niggled 850m, edged 1 off 700m, wide into stretch & driven 400m, bumped 350m, kept on past beaten rivals.
Smart start & prominent initially, settled back rail fore of midfield, not clear run into stretch until driven 300m, closed off to narrowly claim 3rd.
Taken back from widest gate to sit last pair, shifted 3 deep 700m, ridden turning in, bumped rival 350m, never a factor.
Prominent early, settled 1 back on rail, caught in a pocket turning in, pushed out 300m & driven to clear 3rd, peaked & swamped late.
Tardy start & niggled initially, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, niggled 500m, wide into stretch, driven home centre track for modest headway.
Broke well to race fore of midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 650m & soon driven, shifted 3 deep 500m for progress, plugged on one pace.
Sharp start wide, raced fore of midfield 3 wide no cover, overraced 1100m, shunted 4 wide 500m & ridden, emptied 300m & faded.
Fast start, snagged back to camp midfield 1 off with cover, edged out & ridden turning in, switched out from heels 250m, closed to just miss frame.
Ridden forward, eased one-off one-back, despite not suited to the fast pace, dashed at 200M, finished off well for 3rd.
Jumped away very slowly and remained at the back.
Travelled at the tail, 6-1/2L behind, despite suited to the fast pace, flattened near 200M.
Raced in midfield, 4L behind 3 wide with cover, suited to the fast pace, ran on strongly for 2nd.
Sat in front of midfield, 2-3/4L off 3 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, ran on fairly in the straight.
Settled in worse than midfield, 5-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, harmed by the quick tempo, never ran on.
Prominent, but trapped 3 wide and without cover, despite the quick tempo, drifted away from 200M to score.
Settled at the rear, 6-3/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited to the quick tempo, improved steadily.
Travelled in midfield, 3-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, favored by the quick tempo, one pace home.
Pushed forward to cross and led by 1/2L, not suited to the quick tempo, weakened passing 250M.
Raced inside the leader along the rail, not suited to the quick tempo, couldn't find extra near 150M.
Rolled forward and obtained box-seat, no daylight until 250M, ran on okay thereafter.
Settled in behind midfield along the rail, 5-1/4L behind the leader, not suited to the quick tempo, never threatened.
Travelled in midfield along the rail, 4L behind the leader, hard ridden but closed off one pace only.
Began well, steadied 1600m, then travelled keenly and left wide without cover 1400m. Allowed to stride forward to lead 1050m, collared on straightening and faded.
Began fairly, restrained and shifted across behind horses, settling at rear but 3-wide. Kept wide around turn, wider in straight, found nothing when asked.
Began well, pressed forward to share pace, bumped 1600m, settling one-out, one-back 1000m. Three-wide into straight, kept on well to 200m, flattened.
Jumped with field, ridden to hold rail in box seat before shuffled two-back passing 1050m. Left fence around turn, looked chance 200m, battled on gamely.
Taken back shortly after start, settling in one-out position at rear. Taken to centre track on straightening, finished strongly to win on the line despite hanging in.
Began OK, taken in for cover, settling behind midfield in one-out position. Taken 3-wide around turn, even wider in straight, finished off strongly.
Ridden along from outside draw, racing three-wide behind midfield then left without cover 900m. Kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
First out but kept 3-wide by inside horses giving up lead 1200m, then dropping to 3rd 1050m. Moved up to 2nd 800m, took over 400m, kept on to 150m before tiring.
Began well, ridden to hold rail, taking lead 1200m before dropping into box seat 1050m. Blocked for run early in straight before running out of steam 100m.
Hampered start, ridden to make up ground settling midfield. Switched out in straight to make run, closed in to 200m before running out of gas.
Bumped, unbalanced start, taken to fence 4-back from leader. Got close to heels 700m, rolled forward on straightening, hit front 200m, run down on line.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear along fence. Took close order around turn, kept on well in straight to 200m before tiring.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide till getting cover in midfield passing 1200m. Taken wide in straight and boxed on well.
No early speed, dropping to last pair along rail 1400m. Stayed on rail around turn, made ground to 200m before turning one-paced.
Tracked leaders in 3rd, within 2Ls of pace home turn, driven and every chance final 400M, hard pressed vying for lead over final 200M, narrowly beaten to 3rd on the line.
Reserved in near last, 7Ls off the strong pace early and middle stages, made his move 800M round the outside, stayed on well but always held by first 3 final stages. (Jockey lost whip 200M)
Taken back from wide barrier, reluctant to stretch out and soon detached 10Ls off the pace, moved closer home turn, no further progress over final 400M. (LAME LF)

Never far off in 4th, chased pace 2-wide, responded strongly to pressure entering straight, vied for lead from 200M, bravely fought off challengers from both sides to win Chater Cup for the second time.
Soon led, set good pace up front making it a true stamina test for all, keeping on well early straight, headed 150M, faded to 5th near finish.
Held up 4Ls off the strong pace, picked up well chasing leaders from 300M, still 1L down 150M, surged late under strong drive, just denied at the post.
Held up 4Ls behind leader, 5th of 8, came under pressure 600M, dropped away inside 400M.
Tracked leader in a strongly run race, shaken up to hold its position 500M, out-finished by higher rated rivals passing 300M, out of contention mid-straight.
Outpaced and soon at rear of main bunch. Never competitive.
Ridden forward early before slotting into one-out position behind midfield passing 1000m. Taken wide in straight but only one-paced.
Began OK but not pushed, settling four back from leader. Improved position around turn but one-paced in straight.
Began well, ridden to hold fence settling three-back from leader. Kept on one-paced in straight without looking dangerous.
Restrained early to find cover, slipping behind midfield but three wide. Swung wide entering straight, finished strongly under whip to grab 2nd on line.
Hard ridden from outside draw to sit outside leader on settling. Co-leader passing 400m but unable to get past and boxed on gamely to line.
Pressed forward from outside draw to lead on settling, crossing to fence 900m. Under pressure from 400m but kept finding until swamped final 50m.
Began well, grabbing box seat and tailing leader from 900m. Stayed on rail in straight but only one-paced under hard riding.
Ridden to hold forward position before settling one-out, one-back. Given reminders entering straight, picked up bit 200m and surged forward to win close home.
Outpaced early, dropping to rear. Left fence around turn but failed to make ground and plodded home one-paced.
Jumped OK but outpaced, dropping to last from 1100m and trailing field thereafter.
Fractious in gate, lifted front feet as gates opened, losing ground. Tagged on to main field 1100m, taken to centre track on straightening and ran on fairly.
Began well, steadied off heels passing 1000m then raced keenly between horses 4-lengths from leader. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Ridden to hold forward position before settling three-back, three wide from 900m. Turned wide, kept on gamely in straight under hard riding.
Sat worse than midfield early, 1 off the fence. Dropped out in the straight. Jockey reported unsound action and found to be lame.

Began awkwardly and taken forward early, trapped very wide around the first turn before electing to push forward and sit 2nd, 1 off the fence. Used up early and under pressure before the turn, and dropped out in the straight.
Steadied back early to sit 3rd last, on the fence. No clear run in the straight, and had to go searching for a run. Finally got clear running after the 200m, and finished off well.

Eased forward early to sit just behind midfield. Awkward onto heels, becoming unsettled and throwing the head around until the 900m and losing ground. Tried to run on in the straight, but had little in the tank late.
Placed forward of midfield, 3 wide early before being taken up to sit ½ a length off the leader, 1 off the fence at 800m. Well placed on the turn, but only 1 paced in the run to the line.

Dropped back from the wide draw to initially sit 2nd last. Taken forward in the back straight to sit behind midfield, 3 wide with cover. Came widest in the straight, but only plugged away and never threatened.

Began well from the wide draw, before dropping back to eventually sit around midfield, 3 wide with no cover from the 800m. Ran on OK initially in the straight, before running out of steam and dropping out from 150m.
Taken forward early, sitting very wide rounding the first turn before finding a position in 5th, 1 off the fence. Didn't respond in the straight, and was eased a long way from home.

Pushed forward early to be handily placed 4th, on the rail. Held the rail in the straight, and looked to be easily in at the 100m. Had to pick up the stick and go again, before being beaten by a huge run on the line.

Settled worse than midfield, 1 off the fence early. Held up and looking to go in the straight before finally getting a clear run from the 200m. Came back to the rails and sprouted wings late, flying home to take the win late.

Began well from the inside draw and cruised up early to sit midfield, on the rail. Attempted a skinny run at the top of the straight, but steadied out at 300m and held up until 200m. Ran well when clear late.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit at the rear of the field. Struggling to keep up with the field in the back straight, but kept in sight until dropping out in the straight.
Pressed forward early to lead. Used up early in front and didn't have much left in the straight. Dropped out quickly from the 300m.
Ok away, eventually settling in midfield, 1 off the fence. Found a gap at the top of the straight, and ran well early, before slight 1 paced late but holding onto 4th.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 6 lengths back at rear, there to turn, finished off very strongly in straight to get 2nd.
Out in line, restrained to race 6 lengths back on rail, saved ground on turn, one-paced in straight.

Began well from a wide draw, failed to muster, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, hampered and carrier wider near 700M, still made some progress in straight despite hard run. (Lost right front plate at the start)
Inconvenienced shortly after the start, raced 2 wide in midfield, same position on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Slightly slow out, recovered to race in midfield on rail, there to turn, kept to inside after straightening, finished off one-paced.
Taken back from gate 12, raced 4 wide with no cover, 5 lengths or so back at rear, hampered and carrier wider on turn, failed to close off in straight. (Found to be a roarer)
Jumped with them, sent forward to take the lead, travelled keenly throughout, emptied early in straight and eased thereafter, finished tailed off, unacceptable performance. (See racing incidents)
Hampered shortly after start, settled towards rear, 3 wide with cover on turn, angled out in straight and made reasonable progress to make frame. (See racing incidents)
Jumped well from gate 10, sent forward to race prominently, 2nd on turn, kicked clear early in straight, headed near 150M, stayed on, just missed frame.
Began awkwardly, recovered to race 3 wide in 5th, no cover after 900M, hampered and carried wider on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back in 9th, similar position on turn, finished the race well to score a strong win.
Began well, sat comfortably behind the leader on rail, 1 to 2 lengths back, easy run on turn, kept on well in straight but couldn't hold off the first two.
Moderately away, positioned 1 out 1 back, difficult to settle near 900M, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at last, still well back on turn, failed to close off in straight, never a threat.

Travelled wide in first few within 3L of pace after beginning from a wide gate, 4 wide effort rounding home bend to be close up entering straight, unable to sustain effort and faded passing the 200 metres.

Ridden early, settled towards the rear on rails, saved ground on home turn, shifted off rails to challenge after straightening, finish off race well but unable to peg back winner throughout closing stages.
Moderate start, soon recovered to last few while 3-wide, similar rounding home bend before dropping to tail-end into the straight, soon detached.
Ridden along in mid-division from the jump, found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Broke well from a wide gate before eased to last few, kept on past one beaten horse in the final 200 metres.
Broke well from the one draw to share early pace, taken back to handy position coming out of back straight, remained well there turning for home but unable to quicken to threaten in straight.
Jumped fairly from a wide gate, settled mainly 3-wide in mid-division, quickened well upon straightening to just get up on line.
Lacked early pace, travelled well behind on rails, produced some late impression in the run home. (Lame next day)

With leaders early, soon taken back to 5th on rails just over 2L off, snuck up on inside turning in but baulked early in straight, renewed effort inside the final 200 metres, ran into heels again just over 100 metres out.
Jumped well from a poor gate, took up running passing the 1000 metres and rails run coming onto home bend, held slender lead to straight, kept on until swamped inside final 100 metres.
Amongst leaders early before settling in 3rd within 2L of pace, in similar position turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Jumped well, settled in rear of mid-division, kept on at the one pace in the run home.
Worked his way forward to midfield from the widest gate, similar into straight, one-paced.
Soon dropped to the rear, no further impression.
Pushed forward, 2-3 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, on heels 200M, flattened 150M.
Hard ridden early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, moved forward 800M to take advantages from the slow tempo, emptied 300M, checked 250M.
Midfield, 3 wide, made early moved 700M, closed off strongly for 3rd.
Eased at start, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 400M, run ended 200M.
Eased back, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress.
Hard ridden forward, suited by the slow pace, but dropped off quickly 400M.
Pushed to take rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, soon out of fuel 300M.
Eased to rear, trapped very wide, harmed by the slow pace, never improved.
Eased back, trapped 4-5 wide, harmed forward by the slow tempo, little dash in straight.
Eased to rear, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Slow away, at back 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 300M, won with plenty in hands.
Hard ridden early, sat midfield, lack room 400M, unleashed strong finishing efforts when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200M.
Slow away, pushed to hold the rail in front of midfield, suited by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 2.5Ls behind the leader in the middle part of the track, kept on steadily to the line.
At back early, 4Ls behind the leader in the middle part of the track, kept on fairly until weakened final 100M.
Pressed forward to take the outer fence and share the lead, kept on gamely until 100M weakened.
At back throughout, never looked competitive.
Settled midfield, 3.5Ls behind the leader on the grand side, unable to show any dash.
At rear throughout, never ran on.
Pushed forward to share the lead on the grand side, kept on strongly to score by 3/4L.
Missed start and lost a considerable amount of ground, raced in the middle part of the track, never looked likely.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader near the grand side, kept on steadily to the line for 3rd.
Pushed to midfield, niggled along throughout, dropped off near the course proper, tailed out.
Showed some good early pace early, however, weakened after passing the course proper.
Raced midfield, travelled 2.5Ls behind the leader in the middle part of the track, closed off strongly for 2nd, missed by 3/4L.
Camped handy along the outer fence, finished off one pace and weakened over the concluding stages.
Failed to show early pace despite hard ridden along early, 4Ls behind the leader in the middle part of the track, one paced home.
Smart start, taken back, midfield & checked 1000m, niggled 600m, driven 430m, plugged on one pace.
Reared & missed break, raced rear rank on rail, driven turning in, checked off heels 200m & shifted out, rolled home once beaten.
Fast break wide to lead, 3 wide & headed 1130m, continued to press & 1 off from 800m, led 400m & driven, all out & headed 290m, weakened.
Fast break, taken back, last trio & niggled 980m, ridden 600m, struggled in tepid run home.
Sharp start, crossed to rail & led 1130m, driven turning in, headed 400m & faded out.
Rousted from widest gate, soon drifted back to behind midfield, trapped wide & driven throughout, stayed on in stretch for minor late headway.
Lacked toe & bustled from gate to race midfield on rail, switched out 450m but in traffic, ridden 350m, switched out 250m, scrambled to lead last stride.
Fast break & front rank, soon niggled fore of midfield 1 off with cover, progress into stretch, 3rd & driven 300m, plugging on evenly when checked 100m, no extra.
Started well, prominent wide no cover, close 2nd & driven 350m, led 290m, boxed on but pressed all sides & mugged last strides.
Smart start & soon front rank 1 off, eased 850m to 1 back 1 off, driven 360m & pressed to challenge, tapered final 100m.
Tardy start & bustled to sit midfield 3 wide with cover, ridden 500m, lacked toe in stretch but stayed on for minor headway.
Taken back from wide, raced rear rank 1 off, in traffic off home turn, snatched off heels 380m, shaken up 250m, quickened but bumped 140m, just failed.
Moderate break wide, lacked toe, raced rear rank 4 deep with cover, last & ridden 600m, hard driven turning in, plugged on for even headway.
Broke ok & bustled to 1 back on rail, shuffled back a spot 800m, ridden turning in, plugging on evenly when checked 150m, eased.
Speed & led 1050m, worked 0.75L ahead but unable to snag rail, challenged & driven turning in, maintained lead until headed 100m, rallied but just held.
Broke well & camped rail fore of midfield, overraced 750m & shifted 1 off, close to heels 680m & overraced 500m, shaken up 400m, driven to narrow lead 100m just edged it.
Fast start & prominent, settled 1 back 1 off 950m, rolled to 3rd 750m, niggled 500m & shifted out, driven 400m, found nil & weakened.
Slow start, raced near tail 1 off, checked 800m & lost 1L, switched 3 deep 700m, ridden widest into stretch, quickened centre track & closed for good headway.
Fast start but soon outpaced & rowed along, raced rail midfield, shifted out in stretch & driven, stayed on centre track for gradual inroads.
Led wide until headed 1050m, raced rail inside leader, pressed for lead 400m, unable to impose & peaked 250m, tapered.
Fast start & raced handily, checked off heels 880m & slotted fore of midfield 1 off with cover, forced 3 deep 750m, driven into stretch, wilted in run.
Taken back at tail on rail, smooth progress until driven 300m, closed for minor inroads, flattened out final 50m.
Lacked pace & race d 1 off behind midfield, snatched off heels 820m & shuffled back, last at 400m & switched centre track, plodded past beaten rivals.
Broke with others, bustled forward to front rank, to rail 950m & settled back 4th, ridden into stretch, crowded 400m, kept on evenly.
Prominent at break & rousted, slid back to midfield 1 off with cover, crowded turning in, clear ground & driven 350m, plugged on one pace.
Broke steadily, rolled 3 wide with cover to sit back of midfield, progress ono turn, wide & driven 430m, found nil in weakening run.
Settled back at start & niggled rail near tail, advanced a spot 800m, niggled 500m, shifted out 430m & driven, stayed on moderately.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led through quick sectionals, despite that ran on and only headed by the winner inside the final 100M.
Travelled just behind midfield, 6L off 2 wide with cover, suited to the quick tempo, made ground steadily.
Settled in midfield, 4-3/4L off along the rail, not suited to the quick tempo, weakened badly after 300M.
Raced at the rear along the rail, 9L behind the leader, suited to the fast pace, ran on nicely for 3rd.
Sat towards the rear, did not improve.
Settled in midfield, 4-3/4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, ran on well until final 50M, just held onto 4th.
Raced in front of midfield, 3-1/4L on the rail, not suited to the quick tempo, slight dash near 200M, never threatened.
Settled near the tail-end, 7-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, harmed by the fast pace, not competitive.
At the rear throughout, no progress.
Travelled towards the rear, 7-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, steadied 350M, one pace thereafter.
Rolled forward and sat outside the leader, not suited to the fast tempo, dropped off after 250M.
Raced in worse than midfield, 6L behind and 3 wide without cover, benefited by the quick tempo, closed off strongly to score.
Awkward start and then taken back, never a factor.
Slotted into box-seat, not suited to the fast pace, hard ridden but couldn't find extra approaching 200M.
Bumped start, hard ridden to go forward, settling on outer rail 2L from leader. Shaken up passing 400m, kept on gamely to line.
No early toe, racing between horses towards the rear. Lost position 700m, hard ridden from 500m but little headway.
Jumped OK, not pressed, taken out to find over and last on settling. Put under pressure from 400m and ran on moderately.
Allowed to stride forward at own pace while looking for cover. Raced fiercely passing 800m, shaken up and kept on steadily without looking dangerous.
First into stride while edging closer to outer rail. Temporarily shaded passing 400m but kicked ahead 250m and pulled clear for easy win.
Bumped start, rolled forward at own pace 2-away from outer fence 3L from leader. Under the pump from 550m, shifted in abruptly 150m, one-paced.
Began fairly, no pace, settling in last pair. Taken to centre-track 600m to go forward but tired after passing 400m and finished tailed out. Displayed post-race distress.
Allowed to find feet behind midfield, well away from outer fence. Lost position approaching 400m when given reminders, one-paced.
Began OK, pressed forward between horses, getting to girth of leader 600m. Started to feel the pinch passing 400m and faded. Lost left front plate near 850m.
Hard ridden from inside draw to go forward, racing down centre track 2L from leader. Under pressure from 500m, fading gradually.
Began fairly, then steadied 900m losing ground. Hard ridden from 600m but didn't muster, eased down final stages.
Began well but unable match early pace, dropping behind midfield along outer rail. Shifted in 400m to get clear run and finished off well to grab 3rd on line.
Began well, sitting outside leader on settling. Bustled approaching 400m to lead but soon headed. Kept on gamely to hold down 2nd.
Jumped OK, ridden along before crowded out approaching 700m. Pressed to go forward, kept on well to 200m before turning one-paced.
Took early lead, tracked leader home turn, driven to re-gain lead 300M, headed by winner inside 200M, turned one pace final stages.
Travelled strongly in 5th, moved within striking distance 450M, quickened up well to lead inside 200M, sustained effort to the line.
Held up near the rear and travelled 3-wide throughout, had partial cover only, brought wide to challenge, brief effort early straight, flattened final 200M.
Caught wide no cover after 1400M, strode forward to the lead, headed 300M, one paced and no threat over final 200M,
Held up near the rear, 4Ls off the pace 400M, ran on well under top weight and hard pressed to chase leader final 200M, held.
Dropped back to the rear, 8Ls off the pace in middle stages, stayed on between horses but no threat to top 3.
Chased leaders in 3rd, kept on same pace entering straight, swamped by pursuers over final 150M.
Slow to begin, recovered to race in 4th, not quickened entering straight, weakened 150M.
Began only fairly, settled down behind midfield 4-5Ls back, stayed on evenly to go 3rd concluding stages.
In mid-division along the 2-path, made limited progress over final 300M, not reached leaders.
Towards the rear, 6Ls behind leader 400M, took time to muster in straight, did best work towards finish but no threat to leaders.
Pressed forward from outside draw racing 3-wide from 1200m when 3L from leader. Rolled forward from 600m, hit front 400m and pulled clear, tiring final 100m but held.
Bumped, restrained, shifted across behind runners to find cover, settling between horses at rear. Shuffled back to last around turn, wide in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Began fairly, hard ridden to lead passing 1400m, joined up front 600m, kept on to 400m when gave ground abruptly. Unacceptable performance.
Away nicely but restrained, looking for cover, dropping 6L behind leader but 3-wide. Rolled forward around turn, 4-wide into straight, finished off strongly.
Began well, pressed forward, grabbing box seat on settling. Tailed leader to 400m when swamped, then one-paced.
Began OK, not pushed, settling on rail 3L from leader. Lost position around turn, blocked for run early in straight, switched out 250m and finished powerfully to just miss.
Jumped OK, didn't settle 1000m, racing between horses 6L from leader. Raced tight around turn, caught in pocket top of straight, switched in 180m, finished off well.
Steadied on jumping to find cover, settling close to rail towards the rear. Never in the hunt and finished well back.
Bumped start, shifted across behind runners from widest draw, and last on settling. Improved position turning for home but one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide to 1200m before getting cover 1-back, 1-off. Boxed on early in straight before tightened 170m and faded.
Restrained on jumping to find cover, settling in last pair. Stayed on rail around turn, blocked for run early in straight, switched in 240m and ran on steadily.
Ridden early but slow to muster, settling between horses 3L from leader. Taken 4-wide around turn to move forward, joint leader 400m, kept on well to 100m when swamped.
Away with field, restrained to find cover but caught 3-wide at rear. Was 4-wide around turn, taken to centre track in straight, kept on fairly.
Hard ridden to sit outside early leader to turn, before dropping 1L back in 3rd approaching straight. Kept on fairly to 300, before tiring.

Crowded early and eased back to sit at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Never got a run early in the straight, before finally getting clear, then bumped at 200m. Improved well in the limited time he had late.
Eased forward early to sit at the rear of the field, on the fence. Awkward on heels 800m. Never responded early in the straight, and not persevered with over the last 200m.

Attempted to come across from the wide draw and sat midfield, but never closer than 3 wide. Became unsettled on heels 800m, before steadying and taken wider at 700m. Steady until 200, before fading out.

Bumped and unbalanced on jumping. Attempted to press forward before sitting behinds the leader 4-5 wide, no cover. Wide on the turn, but questionably ridden early in the straight and not fully tested late. Jockey questioned.

Began well, and dueled up front, eventually settling 3/4L off the leader, 1 off the fence. Nosed in front at 300m and still challenged until 150m, before pulling away. Had too much in the tank and held off late challengers.
Taken forward early and sat forward of midfield, 3 wide with cover. Eased out of a run at 300m and lost ground, and only went hands and heels from that point and was eased out late.

Struggled to keep up with the field early, sitting last and 3L off the next horse at 900m. Caught up by the home turn, and had to go wide for a run. Powered home from the 250m, catching first 2, but had too much to do.
Eased back after jumping to sit worse than midfield, 3 wide. Had no run in the straight until coming to the extreme outside passing the 250m, and ran well, picking up horses late.

Began OK and taken forward early to be well placed 4-5th, 1 off the fence behind the leaders. Came off heels and lost some ground at 900m. Ran flat in the straight and didn't respond to urgings, before easing out late.

Taken forward early, before allowing leaders to cross and settling in a handy position, 4th on the rail. Had clear running in the straight, and ran strongly to the line, but lacked a big kick to take on those ahead.
Began well and taken forward early, before electing to drop back and settle midfield, on the rail. Plugged along the rails with little impact and was easing late.

Pushed forward from the widest draw, but couldn't get in with the bunched field and stuck 3 wide no cover up front. Burnt a lot of gas early, and had nothing left in the straight and faded out from the 300m.
Not pushed hard early, eventually settling around midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran steadily in the straight. Picked up the bit in the last 100m to run strongly, but too late to pick up the winner.
Taken forward from the jump to ensure she led, on the rail. Ran OK early in the straight before peaking at 200m and dropping out late.
Jumped fairly, brief led early stages, ceded lead entering back straight, similar in 2nd spot turning for home, soon faded under pressure.
Settled behind midfield, commenced move out wide leaving the Rock gaining to within 3L of lead approaching home turn, sustained progress in straight but just failed to peg back the winner.
Jumped fairly, ridden along to hold midfield position on rails, dropped away quickly after straightening.
Jumped well from the middle draw settling in forward of midfield, slightly worse around home bend, kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Prominent early, dropped back to 5th some 5L back far side, faded gradually under pressure in straight. (Tactic questioned)
Taken across from a poor draw for rails run behind midfield, carried backward rounding home bend, kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Slowly away, travelled mainly just worse than midfield, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Broke well from a wide gate, worked around first bend to take up running from the 1000 metres, maintaining 1L advantage to straight, just staved off runners-up's late challenge closing stages.
Lost a considerable amount of ground at the start, trailed the field to the Rock before circling them around home bend, sustained progress down the centre of the straight, nearest at finish.
Settled one back in 2L 4th on rails, remained same into straight, one-paced under pressure. (Lame next day)
Settled well behind from the widest gate, waited with, finished off race strongly inside final 200 metres.
Jumped best to lead 4-wide early stages, taken back to 2-wide in 3rd within 2L of lead entering back straight, faded from approaching home straight. (Struck into)
Hard ridden to secure box seat, enjoyed the slow sectionals, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, lack room 300M, just held ground.
Pressed forward, trapped 3 wide, throughout, reduced quickly 350M.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 200M overhauled.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, flattened 250M.
Slow away, at rear, raced very wide, never competitive.
Hard ridden early but not muster, at back, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200M.
Very slow away, took rail at rear, harmed by the slow tempo, blocked most straight, not tested.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 250.
Pushed early, trapped 3 wide in midfield, not suited by the slow tempo, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
Very slow away, took rail at back, held up 4-2, dashed strongly when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the slow sectionals, kept on steadily to the line without any serious threat.
Taken back to rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the slow pace, finished off strongly for 4th.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader at slow tempo, kept on until final 150M weakened.
Jumped awkwardly and rider almost being dislodged, at back throughout, never a factor.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, switched wide and under pressure rounding the Home Turn, kept on until flattened over the last furlong.
Always at back, not suited by the slow pace, never ran on.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the slow sectionals, made minor ground in straight.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow sectionals, ran on well to score by just a nose.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, one paced home.
Pressed forward to take the fence and led at slow tempo, kept on strongly until passed by the winner over the last stride.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide without cover, harmed by the slow pace, kept on one pace to the line.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the slow tempo, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Began awkwardly from outside draw, rushed forward, travelling three-wide before getting cover back stretch. One-paced in straight.
Began well, pressed forward, racing outside leader from 1400m. Under pressure 600m, hard ridden entering straight but faded quickly final 200m.
Began fairly, restrained, settling one-off towards rear. Rolled forward 1150m, then steadied in midfield. Three-wide into straight and finished off nicely.
Slow into stride, taken to fence, trailed field 2L behind second-last runner. Closed in final turn and ran on steadily between horses in straight.
Jumped well, held, dropping to rear in one-off position. Not asked for an effort till entering straight but only one-paced.
Slightly inconvenienced on jumping, restrained and taken to fence, settling at rear. Took inside run in straight and ran on well.
Given early reminders to stay with pace, settling two-back on fence 1400m. Stayed on rail entering straight but raced tightly concluding stages and not ridden out.
Jumped well, pressed forward, crossing to fence 1400m to sit in slipstream of leader. Came off fence 500m to challenge but unable close gap.
Made use of inside draw to lead on settling, then set steady pace to straight, kicked ahead passing 300m and kept finding when challenged.
Ridden aggressively to hold forward position but trapped wide 3L from leader. Niggled at passing 600m, one-paced in straight.
Began OK, taken to fence, settling 3-back. Allowed to stride at own pace to 500m when gave ground quickly. Had irregular heart rhythm.
Pressed forward racing wide till getting cover 1400m. Under pressure 400m, found little in straight. Had substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Jumped well, taken to box seat and trailed leader to straight. Threw out strong challenge from 300m but pipped on the post.
Jumped OK but threw head about when restrained and shifted across behind runners. Came off fence turning for home and ran on fairly.
Ridden early, settling one-off 3L from leader. Bumped 600m, ridden but didn't respond, fading quickly in straight. Unacceptable performance.
Jumped best, taken to fence and set good tempo. Put under pressure turning for home but kept battling till swamped final strides.
Got off nicely, pressed forward, settling one-back, one-off. Lay in soon after straightening, shifted out 200m, then one-paced.
Bumped, restrained, shifted across behind runners, dropping to last. Trailed field to straight, boxed on one-paced.
Bumped on jumping, held, shifted across behind runners, settling at rear. Switched out entering straight but only one-paced.
Began fairly, taken in for cover, settling towards rear in one-off position. Swung wide into straight and ran on fairly.
Pressed forward on jumping to race outside leader from 1000m. Shaken up entering straight and battled on gamely until flattened 200m.
Jumped OK, not pushed, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Taken to fence turning for home and ran on steadily.
Got off OK, taken to fence, settling behind midfield. Stayed on fence throughout and one-paced in straight.
Began OK, not pushed, settling on rail 5L from leader. Left fence 500m, swung wide into straight, ran on strongly to win on the line.
Travelled just behind midfield, 8-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, taken widest after turn, finished off strongly for 3rd.
Raced just behind midfield along the rail, 6-1/2L behind, no response when under pressure in the straight.
Ridden forward and parked outside the leader, ran home only one pace.
Rolled forward to take the rail and shared lead, no dash but ran on until 150M when headed.
Travelled towards the tail and did not improve.
Slotted into midfield, 6-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, made early move rounding turn, ran on well to score.
Rolled forward and took box-seat, kept on nicely until 100M when couldn't find extra.
Raced in front of midfield along the rail, 4-1/4L behind the leader, finished off nicely for 2nd once cleared at 250M.
Settled in front of midfield, 4-1/4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, never threatened.
Couldn't gather speed and then taken back. Never a factor.
Travelled at the tail, 9-1/2L behind the leader along the rail, made minor ground only.
Took one-off one-back position, did not run on in the straight.
Ridden forward to grab good spot one-back, one-off. Got shuffled back to 5th around final turn but kept on well in straight.
Began OK, ridden along but hung out first turn, dropping behind midfield. Hard to settle back stretch, hung out 600m, found little straight. Racing manners unacceptable.
Began well, taken to fence inside early leader before taking over running from 600m. Battled strongly in straight but run down close home.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners, dropping to last. Switched out entering straight to get run but blocked 200m. Got clear 100m and finished strongly.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide without cover 3L from leader. Improved position around final turn, 3rd into straight, boxed on gamely.
Bumped shortly after start, ridden forward but wide, dropping behind midfield. Lost position turn, taken to centre track in straight, one-paced.
Lifted feet at start and slow into stride, shifted in behind runners to get cover, settling at rear. Switched out entering straight and finished strongly to grab 3rd on line.
Began well, pressed forward, snatching box seat and trailing leader to straight. Shaken up passing 200m but found little and faded.
Began awkwardly, ridden to make ground between horses, settling 4L from leader. Under pressure on straightening and faded.
Jumped best, led to 600m but held wide by inside runner, easing to 2nd passing 600m. Shaken up 300m, picked up momentum 200m, finished strongly to win close home.
Bumped shortly after start, no early toe, dropping to rear in one-off position. Shuffled back to last turning for home, boxed on fairly in straight.
Began well, holding rail 2-back from leader. Crowded passing 800m, tightened soon after straightening, finished off nicely when clear final 250m.
Behind midfield, settled down in 8th 7Ls off the pace middle stages, had smooth run along the rails, responded well under hands and heels riding, led 50M from home.
Positively ridden, prompted the pace early stages, in similar position home turn, kept up the chase on leader but always held.
3Ls off the pace in 4th, within striking distance 400M but always held by leaders in the run to the line. (Jockey dropped right rein 100M.)
Waited with near the rear, 8Ls behind leader mid-stage, closed off moderately final 300M, not reached leaders.
Raced in midfield along the 2-path, switched 3-wide 500M, failed to quicken turning in, weakened rapidly 150M.
Raced against rail in midfield, pushed along 400M, responded moderately, tight for room mid-straight and late stages, never a serious threat.
Began awkwardly, dropped back to rear over 10Ls off the pace middle stages, didn't pick up when driven out 400M.
Settled 2-wide in midfield, never far off from leader, outpaced passing 400M, soon beaten and no impression.
From wide barrier shifted across early stages, held up 2nd last, driven along 500M, made limited progress only.
Reserved behind mid-division, 8Ls off the pace middle stages, brought wide to challenge 350M, did best work towards finish.
Set good pace upfront, kept on well turning home, caught by winner 50M,
Chased leaders, pushed to a 3-wide spot without cover when pace slackened down the back straight, lacked a strong finish leaving home turn, kept on steadily to line.
Moderate start, gradually picked up along rails to be just off the lead, kept on same pace in straight without threatening.
Jumped awkwardly and soon dropped to the rear, made modest progress past beaten horses closing stages. (Tactic questioned)
Failed to muster and soon dropped to tail-end.
Broke well from a poor gate, travelled very wide in midfield far side, taken back towards the rear for cover rounding home bend, produced good late impression past beaten horses closing stages.
Close up early, gradually dropped back to wide in midfield, found nothing straight.
Crowded at start, gradually recovered to rear of midfield, saved ground on inside rounding home bend, found nothing in the run home.
Jumped fairly from the one draw, gradually took up running, kicked over 1L clear over 200 metres out, won well.
Moderate start, always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Moderate start, picked up gradually to 5th just over 2L back, similar turning for home but soon became 4th, ran home one-paced.
Raced wide towards the rear, gained closer rounding home bend, ran home one-paced.
Ridden early, wide without cover in prominent position to straight, dropped out under pressure.
Moderate start, soon recovered to just off the pace in 2nd, came to challenge entering straight but unable to peg back the winner throughout.
Eased at start and took rail at rear, checked first bend, benefited by the fast tempo, ran on ok in straight.
Trapped 3 wide in front of midfield, then pushed forward to take rail and led at fast sectionals, reduced quickly 300M.
Box seat, not suited by the fast sectionals, led 300M, ran on well until 100M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Pushed early, midfield 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, just held ground in straight.
At back, took rail, benefited by the fast tempo, lack room 400M, progressed steadily when clear.
Trapped 3 wide throughout in midfield, dropped off badly 400M.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, faded 600M, eased out of race.
Eased to sit behind midfield along the fence, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M to score.

Eased back, trapped 3 wide throughout, suited by the fast pace, ran on ok.

Pushed early, behind midfield 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, no progress in straight.
Pushed to settle midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on one pace to the line without threatening.
Raced midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced to the line.
Taken back, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, unable to show any dash in straight.
Sent forward to take the fence and led by 1.5Ls, kept on well until headed by the impressive winner final 250M, hung on for 2nd.
Failed to muster speed despite hard ridden along, trapped very wide without cover throughout, never looked likely.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide without cover, one paced until final 250M flattened.
Eased to midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in straight.

Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on.
Pushed forward to settle in a prominent spot, 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on steadily for 3rd.
At rear throughout despite hard ridden along, never a factor.
Camped handy, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 4th.
Moderate start wide & driven forward, posted close 2nd 1 off at 1100m, 1L back & ridden 520m, struggled in fading run home.
Taken back from widest gate, slotted behind midfield 1 off with cover, switched wide final return & driven into stretch, stayed on centre for minor headway.
Broke well & rousted initially in front rank, settled 1 back on fence, niggled 550m, driven into stretch, found nil & weakened tamely.
Fast start & rolled to lead, to rail 1200m, bowled along under a hold. 1L clear & shaken up 380m, boxed on until all out & headed 90m.

Broke ok, raced 1 off with cover fore of midfield, ridden 530m & forced wider, tepid effort & weakened.

Broke ok but lacked toe & scrubbed along, drifted back to 1 off near tail, niggled 700m, forced 3 wide & ridden 600m, widest into stretch, found nil.
Sluggish start & bustled to settle midfield on rail, shifted out 430m & driven, quickened into contention, led 90m, drew clear.
Sluggish start & rousted to midfield 1 off with cover, under pump 850m, shifted wider 500m & outpaced, stayed on to 3rd under vigorous drive.
Tardy & rousted to front rank, settled 1 back 1 off, shifted out 520m & ridden, progress to 2nd 380m but emptied & faded final 250m.
Smart start, settled back on rail fore of midfield, shifted out 520m, switched centre 400m & driven, kept on dourly without threatening.
Missed break, taken to rail behind midfield, shifted out 520m, driven turning in, kept on evenly.
Moderate start, bustled forward to race 3 wide no cover fore of midfield, forced wider into stretch & driven 420m, found nil in tame run home.
Smart start, raced 1 back on rail, shuffled back a spot 700m, shifted out 430m & shaken up, quickened to 2nd 300m, kept closing to nick win at line.
Started ok, raced handily 3 wide with cover, overraced 1000m, checked 4 wide no cover 620m, driven wide final turn, strong closer centre, just failed.
Rear rank at break, gradual advance 4 wide to lead 850m, to rail 700m, headed 600m, driven 500m, soon emptied & faded tamely.
Broke ok, rolled to sit on leader's flank, shuffled back 850m, impeded 650m & soon niggled in 5th, driven turning in, struggled in weakening run.
Speed at break, sat 1 back 1 off until shuffled back 700m, ridden 500m & shifted out, plugged on one pace.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover near tail, niggled 800m, hard-ridden turning in, stayed on moderately centre track.
Fast start, raced 3 deep no cover close up, to 2nd & impeded rival 650m, led 1 off 500m, kicked 450m & scooted 2L clear, emptied close home & headed.
Moderate start & bustled along 1 off with cover midfield, unbalanced 600m, kept on soundly without threatening.
Speed to lead, soon snared rail, headed 850m & shuffled 1 back, shifted 1 off 600m & tracked leader, driven in pursuit 430m, boxed on evenly.
Broke ok & raced midfield initially, settled 3 wide with cover back of midfield, driven 300m, found nil in tame run home.
Started ok, raced rail back of midfield, ridden turning in, boxed on moderately.

Travelled in midfield, 4-3/4L off 3 wide without cover, difficult to settle throughout, did not improve.

Raced at the rear and on the fence, 7-3/4L off the lead, kept on only one pace and crowded near 200M.
