Travelled in worse than midfield along the rail, 5-3/4L behind, steadied approaching 150M, did not run on.
Bumped, unbalanced shortly after start, pressed forward to sit outside leader before dropping 2L back passing 600m. Kept on gamely in straight.
Hard ridden early to hold position behind hot pace, settling one-off 4L from leader. Taken wide entering straight, ran on steadily under whip. Rider dropped left rein passing 200m.
Steadied after start and taken in for cover but outpaced, dropping behind midfield. Urged forward after 600m, ran on nicely under hard riding.
Began well, grabbing box seat 4L from leader. Angled out top of straight to get running, picked up speed passing 200m, hit front in shadows of the post.
Scrambled through to lead on settling and then set hot pace, stretching out field. Looked winner 200m but caught final strides.
Crowded out and bumped on jumping, last on settling. Trailed field through and finished tailed out.
Shaken up on jumping but unable handle pace dropping to rear in one-off position. Checked 700m, taken to centre track 400m, boxed on under whip.
Began well, rolled forward three-wide 4L from leader. Put under pressure turning for home and boxed on gamely but unable close gap.
Began OK, ridden but unable handle fast pace, dropping behind midfield but wide. Dropped further back around turn before running on fairly in straight.
Jumped well, hard ridden to hold forward position, settling 4L back in 3rd. Kept tabs to 200m before fading. Bled from both nostrils, confirmed roarer.
Ridden but outpaced, dropping to rear along fence. Severely checked passing 700m, took inside run in straight, one-paced. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Jumped OK, ridden along behind midfield in one-off position. Switched out in straight to make run and ran on steadily.
Switched off to near the rear, 7-8Ls off the strong pace, driven 500M,made limited progress and well held by rivals final 200M.
Chased leaders in a strongly run race, left flat footed entering straight, soon dropped out of contention.
Urged to the front, set strong pace to straight, headed nearing 400M, weakened rapidly from 300M. (Jockey dropped whip 200M)
Slow to begin, taken back from wide draw, 8Ls away near the rear, stayed on only fairly final 400M, not reached leaders.
Chased pace, moved up to press leader home turn, took over 400M, couldn't repel winner inside 200M, kept on well to hold 2nd.
Crowded for room on jumping, ended up in last over 8Ls off the pace and much further back than intended, failed to pick up and only ran past some well beaten rivals.
In midfield raced along the 3-path, ran on steadily final 350M, just missed 3rd.
Caught 3-wide no cover in mid-division, made rapid headway 400M, pressed eventual winner until no extra final 100M. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled down in 9th, 5Ls off leaders making the turn for home, into clear nearing 300M, ran on moderately, no threat to leaders.
Held up in midfield, difficult to settle 1000M, no response when ridden along leaving home bend, eased when well beaten mid-straight. (Bled)
Held up 2-wide in midfield, 3Ls off the pace 400M, fought on under pressure but not making headway on leaders.
Failed to muster speed despite ridden, behind midfield 6Ls off the strong pace, no clear run to 300M, made headway until 50M when not clear again.
Tracked leaders in a strongly run race, well placed to strike top of straight, quickened to the lead 200M, shook off pursuers closing stages and won in class record time.
No early pace, taken to rail 4-back from leader. Made some progress back stretch and turn, kept on fairly in straight.
Outpaced, taken to rail and last on settling. Stayed at rear mostly and one-paced in straight.
Pulled way to front, then set strong pace, pulling 4L clear passing 800m. Kept on well to 150m when ran out of stamina and faded. Jockey severely reprimanded.
Began fairly, dropping to rear before rolling forward 5-wide from 1500m, circling field to sit outside leader 1200m. Dropped 4L back turning for home and spent force from 400m.
Slow into stride, ridden to make up ground settling midfield in one-off position. Got shuffled back passing 1200m, ran on steadily in straight.
Bounced well, outpaced, dropped quickly to rear in one-off position. Widest into straight, ran on steadily under hard riding.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground, settling 2-back passing 1300m. Urged forward 300m, hit front 150m, unable to hold off winner.
Jumped OK, ridden along but unable handle early pace, dropping to behind midfield but without cover. Wide into turn, given reminders 350m, ran on nicely.
Off OK, ridden along early in midfield before losing position approaching 1200m. Boxed on one-paced in straight.
Jumped with field but soon outpaced, dropping to last passing 1450m. Shaken up entering straight but found little.
Away well, mixing it with pace makers before easing 2L back passing 1500m. Dropped back further as pace hotted up, picked up momentum from 400m and finished off strongly.
Began well, ridden to hold forward position but found pace too strong and slipped back to behind midfield. Under pressure turning for home, one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from wide draw, racing outside leader to 1200m when dropped to 3rd, taking box seat. Took inside run in straight, challenged from 150m, just made it.
Quickly out, sharing early pace before settling 2L from leader but 3-wide. Dropped to 4th around final turn, picked up momentum 300m, finished well.
Taken forward early before eventually settling forward of midfield, on the rail. One paced in the straight, and not used over the last 200m.
Pushed forward early to eventually sit a length off the early leader, 1 off the fence. Didn't respond to urgings in the straight, and hands and heels to the line from 150m.

Fractious before the jump, then bump and unbalanced away. Settled behind midfield. Came inside off heels 400m for run, but only fair early. Started to run on 200m, but out of contention and only hands and heels from 150m.
Fairly away and dropped back to sit at the rear of the field, 2-3 wide. Detached from the field before the turn, and was eased a long way from home. Unacceptable performance.
Pushed forward early to be handily place in 3rd, but 3 wide with no cover. Never responded to rider early in the straight, and was eased out from the 200m.

Looking to push forward early, before being severely checked at 1100m and losing 3L and dropping to the rear of the field. Not used early in the straight, and began to hang badly under the whip from the 200m.
Didn't try to keep up with the quick early pace, and sat back midfield, 1 off the fence. Only ran flat in the straight, and subsequently found to have bled.

Taken up early to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence with cover. Fought all the way down the straight, challenging the winner from 200m. Nosed in front at 100m, before winner kicked again and got away from 50m.
OK away and settled forward of midfield, 3 wide with cover. Came wider on the turn. Initially ran flat at the top of the straight, before picking up the bit and running OK over the last 200m.
Fairly away and dropped back early to sit last, 10L off the leader. Came widest in the straight, and flew home with a wing on every hoof. Made up a lot of ground and was catching first two late.

Began awkwardly, then bumped and unbalanced. Recovered well to lead easily and set some fast early sectionals. Still working well in front at 300m, but started to burn out soon after and drifted out of contention from 200m.
Dropped back early to sit with the back trio, 10L off the early leader. Pressed on well in the straight, and claimed a lot of positions in the run to the line late.

Took a while to get across from the wide draw, eventually settling midfield, 3 wide with cover by the 900m. Ran on from the 400m and challenged down the straight. Looked gone at 100m, before kicking again late.
Pushed forward early before being hampered at 1200m and settling midfield, on the fence. Never responded to riding in the straight and eased late.
Slightly slow out, raced on rail in midfield, angled out turning in, finished off strongly to score.
Began fairly, raced 2 wide, 6 lengths or so back, there to turn, emptied early in straight and eased, never competitive.
Began well from gate 8, raced prominently, shared lead turning in, kept on well but couldn't hold off the first few late.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 9 lengths back at tail, still well back on turn, failed to close off in straight, never a threat.
Average to begin from gate 1, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well on turn, peaked and headed near 200M, weakened thereafter. (See racing incidents)
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths back in midfield, improved on turn, made some progress in straight without threatening.
Away with them, raced 1 to 2 lengths back in 4th, easy run on turn, closed off well but couldn't hold off the winner late.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off one-paced.
Slowly away, raced 6 lengths back in 9th, slightly improved along the rail on turn, finished off one-paced in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear throughout, never a threat.
Jumped well from a tricky gate, positioned 1 out 1 back, kept on well in straight to get 3rd.
Moderately away, raced 7 lengths back in 10th, same position on turn, made some ground in straight without threatening.

At rear throughout, never ran on.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, ran on steadily for 2nd without serious threat to the winner.
Raced midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, dropped off soon after straightening.
Always at back, never looked likely.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide without cover, finished off strongly to score by 1-1/4Ls.

Settled worse than midfield about 10Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in straight.
Pressed forward to take the fence and led by 2Ls, kept on until flattened final 150M.
Raced midfield, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on fairly.
Away quickly, ridden forward, racing outside early leader. Dropped to 3rd 1000m but moved up to race outside new leader. Under pressure 400m, gave ground quickly from 200m.
Slow, dropping to rear but wide. Lost position back stretch, under pressure turn, boxed on one-paced.
Began OK, shifted across behind runners, dropping to last pair in one-off position. Last turning for home, ran on fairly in straight under the whip.
Began well, settling one-back, one-off first turn. No change in position back stretch, shaken up entering straight but only one-paced.

Vigorously ridden but no pace, dropping to behind midfield close to fence. Under the whip final turn, boxed on in straight under hard riding.
Jumped OK, over-raced first turn, settling one-off 4L from leader back stretch. Three-wide final turn, given reminders top straight, finished strongly to just miss.

Began fairly, taken in to find cover, settling towards rear in one-off position. Not asked for effort until 350m when switched wide and finished strong to just miss out.
Began well, grabbing box seat and keeping tabs on leading pair. Took split between front-runners passing 100m and surged forward for close win.
Pressed forward on jumping, taken to fence a half length inside leader. Under pressure top of straight but battled on well until swamped final stages.
Bumped several times after start, ridden but failed to muster, got close to heels 1000m, dropping back sharply. Stayed at rear thereafter.
Began well but unable handle pace, dropping to midfield. Took closer order turning for home, switched out 250m, finished strongly to just miss.
Shifted out and bumped at start, ridden along but wide, dropping to rear. Left wide without cover back stretch, very wide in straight, one-paced.
Speared to the front from outside draw but kept away from fence by inside runner. Kept up strong gallop to 100m when joined up front and faded.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide before settling behind leading pair in one-off position. Started long run from 400m, looked chance 100m, flattened final strides.
Away well before taking hold first turn settling one-off, one-back. Shuffled three-back 800m, bumped and unbalanced turn, ran on well to finish just behind place-getters.
Shifted across behind runners from an outside draw, dropping to rear. Never in the hunt.
Began fairly, then bumped and unbalanced. Shifted across behind runners to rail settling 4-back. Ran on well in straight to just miss out on a placing.
Bumped shortly after start, ridden forward holding rail in midfield. Left fence turning for home, very wide in straight, kept on fairly.
Settled in midfield, 3-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, crowded 400M, did not run on.
Raced on the rail, 5-1/4L behind the leader, not suited to the slow pace, not competitive.
Taken back, 6L behind 3 wide with cover, despite not suited to the slow tempo, closed off strongly to score.
Settled in worse than midfield, 4-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, made good ground until checked at 150M.
Rolled forward and settled in one-off one-back position, despite suited to the slow pace, dropped off passing 200M.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led through slow sectionals, headed by the winner prior to going to the line.
Raced in midfield, 3-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, little dash 100M, ran on well thereafter.
Initially in front of midfield, improved to sit outside the lead at 1000M, closed off only one pace.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L off along the rail, kept on one pace to the line.
Always at the rear, never in contention.
Raced behind midfield, 4-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, niggled forward near 500M, no dash.
Rolled forward and shifted in to take box-seat at 1500M, suited to the slow tempo, kept going, just hung onto 3rd.
Away well, settling 2-back 4L from leader. Took inside run in straight but had to switch out twice to get clear running before surging ahead final strides.
Began well racing outside leader to 800m before dropping 2L back when pace hotted up 400m. Found little in straight. Lame right front leg.
Began awkwardly, shifted in, settling behind midfield. Took inside run in straight and ran on solidly to be closest at finish.
Restrained and shifted across behind runners, settling at rear in one-off position. Switched out wide entering straight and finished off strongly.
Jumped with field, ridden along in one-off position behind leading pair before dropping 4L back entering straight. Boxed on one-paced.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners to rail in last place. Made up some ground around turn but found nothing in straight.
Pressed forward to race with leading pack but held wide without cover. Dropped 4L back around turn, wide in straight, finished strongly to just miss.
Stumbled at start, restrained, shifted across to rail, settling towards rear. Improved around turn, took rails run in straight, finished strongly.
Began fairly, pressed forward, taking box seat. Switched out in straight to challenge and kept on strongly while shifting under pressure. Bled from both nostrils.
Began well but not pushed, settling 4L from leader but wide. Shaken up entering straight but only one-paced.
Began fairly, taken in for cover, settling at rear. Shuffled back to last around turn, taken wide in straight but found nothing.
Quickly into stride, setting strong pace. Pulled 2L clear turning for home, kept on well to 100m when flattened and swamped.
Settled down in 5th 3-4Ls behind leader in the first half, travelled strongly into contention 400M, quickened up well and briefly in front nearing 100M, couldn't fend off winner late.
Behind midfield, struck heels of rival 850M, lost ground and almost dislodged rider, dropped back to last 350M, had little left in reserves.
Caught 3-wide in midfield, moved closer to pace home turn, kept on steadily for modest 4th.
Switched off to near the rear, 8-9Ls off the pace early stages, driven wide passing 400M, stayed on down outside but held by always by leaders.
Failed to muster despite ridden, held up in last over 10Ls off the pace, made no progress on leaders entering straight.

Held up 5Ls off the pace in midfield, driven along 400M and closed off well, pressed winner to 100M, came nearest to 2nd at the finish. (lost plate and sustained cut to RH heel when galloped on by rival 850M)
Prominently placed just off the pace, responded well early straight, led 200M out, flattened nearing 100M and swamped by rivals.
Fractious in stalls, began awkwardly, took inside run in midfield, 4Ls off the pace 400M, no clear run early straight, did best work final 150M.
Chased leader in 3rd but soon weakened turning home. (Roarer)
Positively ridden from wide barrier, crossed to the lead 1300M, led uncontested to straight, headed 200M, no extra towards finish.
Never far off, 4th in touch making the turn for home, stayed on strongly final 200M, got up nearing 50M.
Dropped back to near last 8Ls behind leader early, switched to 3-wide back straight, kept on only fairly final 300M, never threatened.
Jumped OK, outpaced, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Shaken up entering straight and kept on fairly. Lame left hind leg.
Ridden early to hold forward position, settling one-off 4L from leader. Over-raced back stretch, wide into straight, kept on fairly before eased near 250m.
Away quickly but snagged back passing 1300m, dropping 3-back along rail. Took inside run in straight and surged through gap for solid win. Rider dropped right rein final stages.
Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind runners, dropping to last. Raced keenly back stretch, plodded home.
Pressed forward from wide draw, racing 1L behind leader in one-off position. Dropped to 3rd passing 700m, rolled forward top of straight and kept on well to the line.
Began well, tended to over-race when steadied, settling one-off, two-back 900m. Urged forward from 400m, looked chance 200m, flattened final 100m.
Jumped fairly, ridden to hold fence, settling 2-back from leader. Took inside run in straight, got split 150m to look chance before swamped final 50m.
Pressed forward to lead on settling, crossing to fence 1250m. Joined up front 700m, kept on well to 250m before tiring.
Began OK, allowed to find feet, settling behind midfield. Taken wide 900m and allowed to improve to eye-ball leader passing 700m. Hit front 250m but soon swamped.
Jumped fairly, taken closer to fence, settling toward rear. Improved position slightly 850m, taken to centre track on straightening and let down strongly to miss narrowly.
Ridden to hold rail inside leading pack before settling in box seat 1250m. Came off fence 400m, got split 250m, hit front momentarily before run down close to post.
Shifted across behind runners, settling in last pair away from fence. Made some progress around turn but soon tired and faded.
Pushed forward from the kick to make sure he led, 1L over next placed runner. Pulled away at the top of the straight and ridden out to the line, but never in any doubt.
Pushed forward early to sit 2nd, 1L off the leader and 1 off the fence. Ran solidly to the line and challenged with 2nd all the way down the straight.
Didn't respond to early riding, and stuck 4-5 wide at the rear with no cover, before pushing forward at 700m to be closer to midfield, but still 3 wide no cover. OK to the line, kicking on late.

Bumped on jumping, and cruised forward early to sit near the rear of the field, on the fence, before pushing up at 800 to sit midfield. Came out for a run from 300m, and ran home well and gaining on first 4 late.
Dropped back early to sit at the rear of the field, 4 wide with cover. Slightly keen up the back straight. Came widest on the turn, but never responded to riding and went weakly to the line.
Bumped on jumping before being taken up to be handily placed 3rd, on the fence. Ran solidly late, holding off sustained challenge from 3rd.
Crowded on jumping and dropped back early, eventually settling midfield. Became unsettled and checked off heels, losing ground, at 800m. Only ran fairly in the straight, and never threatened.

Dropped back from the wide draw early to sit at the rear of the field. Pushed forward at the rock, and switched back inside at the top of the straight to run along the rail. OK to the line and made up ground on 2nd and 3rd.
Settled midfield, 1 off the fence early. Never stretched out at any stage, and was a beaten horse early in the straight. Faded quickly last 200m.
Couldn't get forward early, eventually settling forward of midfield, 3 wide with no cover. Only battle on 1 paced in straight before dropping out late. Vet-Cardiac Arrhythmia.
Shuffled back early to sit toward the rear of the field, 3-4 wide with cover. Switched back into the rail on the turn, but only went to the line fairly in the straight.
Taken up to sit midfield initially, before dropping out at 800m to sit 2nd last on the turn. Plugged away fairly in the straight, picking up a few slower ones late.
Slowly away, raced in the middle of the track, 2 lengths or so back without cover, finished off evenly.
Showed early speed, raced closer to the middle of the track, a length back without cover, finished off well to get 2nd, just narrowly beaten by the winner.
Raced near to the stand side, 2 lengths or so back with cover, finished off evenly without threatening.
Showed early speed to take the lead near to the stands rail, kept on well until headed final 150M, just stayed on for 4th.
Began well, raced prominently on the stands rail, weakened in the concluding stages.
Difficult to settle shortly after start, raced at rear in the middle of the track, failed to close off.
Inconvenienced start, raced at rear on the stands rail, made no impression in the concluding stages.
Raced near to the stands rail, a length or so back with cover, no daylight near 300M, made some headway when cleared thereafter to get 3rd.
No early speed, raced at rear throughout, never a factor.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 to 3 lengths back on the stands rail, finished off very strongly to score narrowly.
Raced at rear throughout, never competitive.
Began smartly, raced prominently near to the stand side, peaked near 200M, weakened thereafter.
Bumped start, raced at rear on the stands rail, finished off one-paced.
Average to begin, travelled in midfield near to the middle of the track, made no impression final 400M.
Eased back from wide draw, trapped 3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, ran on ok in straight.
At back along the rails, favoured by the fast pace, made steady ground 400M to score.
Settled behind midfield along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, however held up 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Raced very wide, never competitive at rear.
Never improved at rear.
Hard ridden forward, not suited by the fast sectionals, dropped off 400M.
Sat just off the leaders, trapped 3 wide, not suited by the fast sectionals, ran on well until 150M flattened.
At back, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400M for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, 2-3 wide, harmed by the fast pace, ran on well until 200M, out of fuel.
Hard ridden to keep up in front of midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the fast tempo, weakened 200M.
Hard ridden forward, harmed by the fast pace, reduced quickly 400M.
Pushed to hold the rail and led at fast sectionals, hung on until 300M weakened rapidly.
Hard ridden forward, took box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on strongly for 2nd.
At rear, 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, ran on ok in final stages.
Sent forward to park outside the leader, enjoyed the slow tempo, kept on until weakened final 150M.
At rear throughout, never looked competitive, tailed out.
Ridden forward to take the fence and led by 1/2L at slow tempo, kept on steadily until weakened final 150M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on only fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, kept on only fairly until weakened 150M.
Hard ridden forward, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, one paced home.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the slow pace, blocked 200M, finished off well for 2nd when clear.
Always at rear, never a factor, tailed out.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the slow sectionals, kept on one pace to get 4th without serious threat.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, not suited by the slow sectionals, unable to show make any impression in straight.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on well to score by 1/2L.
Slow to muster despite hard ridden along, travelled about 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the slow tempo, dashed well for 3rd when clear 250M.
Settled midfield, however, nearly fell when clipped heels near 1000M, eased down shortly after straightening.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 4Ls behind the leader, however, trapped very wide without cover throughout, never looked likely, tailed out.
Hard ridden to lead on settling then slowed pace. Kicked clear passing 400m, joined up front 200m, kept battling to go down narrowly.
Steadied on jumping to find cover but bumped, dropping to last. Trailed field to turn, switched very wide in straight, kept on fairly.
Pressed forward to race outside leader to 400m when pace-hotted up. Battled on gamely to 200m before tiring.
Jumped well, ridden along between horses holding midfield position to turn before dropping back slightly. Gave ground from 300m.
Outpaced early, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Steadied approaching turn, switched out 500m but blocked for run until after 300m when finished strongly.
First out but kept wide without cover by inside runners and eased to 3rd, 1L behind leading pair. Kept wide through but stayed with pace to 200m before tiring.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide until settling one-out, one-back. Taken 4-wide entering straight, rolled forward to hit front 200m, collared close home while shifting out 50m.
Began well, then ridden to hold rail two-back from leaders. Left fence turning for home, wide in straight, finished strongly to win narrowly despite being taken out final 50m.
Ridden to find cover but held 3-wide behind midfield on settling. Switched wider turning for home and ran on fairly down centre field.
Began well, taken to fence behind leader. A little flat-footed when pace hotted up 400m, kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Ridden early from outside draw before seeking cover 1000m, dropping to rear but wide. Made up some ground final turn but spent force in straight, and eased down final stages.
Began awkwardly, taken closer to rail, settling at rear. Stayed on rail around turn, but only one-paced in straight.
Allowed to stride forward at own pace while looking for cover, before slotting in three-back, one-off passing 1200m. Under pressure from 400m and weakened gradually.
Outpaced and soon in last pair. Lay out approaching final turn but never in the hunt.
Pressed forward from wide draw to race outside hind quarters of leader. Looked a chance passing 300m when got the staggers and eased back through the field.
Ridden early to hold forward position 3L from leader. Nursed along to hold position until passing 300m when gave ground gradually.
Outpaced, dropping to rear along fence. Stayed at rear before switching wide into straight. Boxed on one-paced.
Ridden forward from an outside draw, settling one-out, one-back. Stayed with pacemakers until passing 200m when tired.
First out, pulling clear but wide before crossing to fence 1150m. Under pressure from 400m, battled strongly when challenged 150m, losing in final strides.
Began well, racing with pacemakers before being eased back to 6th in one-off position. Angled out tuning for home to make run, loomed alongside leading pair 150m, run ended.
Began well, quickly moving into slipstream of leader. Blocked early in straight, got split 300m, rolled forward to join leader 150m, edging narrowly ahead final strides.
Got off OK, taken to fence, settling behind midfield. Tightened round turn, switched out in straight, ran on fairly while laying in under pressure.
Jumped OK, taken in for cover, settling in one-off position towards rear. Swung wide entering straight but found nothing under hard riding.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across to find cover, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Not asked for effort until entering straight when finished off nicely.
Slow into stride, then steadied, dropping to last but away from fence. Still well back entering straight, switched wide and ran on fairly.
No early pace, settling towards the rear close to rail. Left fence turning for home, taken very wide in straight, ran on steadily.
Slotted in behind midfield along the rail, 4-3/4L behind the leader, held up early and steadied at 200M, recovered well for 4th.
Rolled forward and took box-seat, remained in touch and dashed inside 100M to take the prize.
Always at the rear end and finished tailed out. Not competitive.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 3/4L, pushed all the way but swapped inside the final 100M.
Raced slightly in front of midfield, 3-1/4L behind 3 wide without cover, weakened badly after straightening.
Taken back and raced on the rail, 8L behind the leader, made good ground in the straight.
Settled in worse than midfield, 5-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, niggled 600M to keep up, did not run on.
Travelled towards the rear along the rail, 6-1/4L behind the leader, strong dash at 300M to finish 2nd.
Sat in front of midfield, 3-1/4L off the pace and along the rail, finished off only one pace.
Raced prominently, 2-1/4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, kept pushing and finished off well for 3rd.
In midfield, 4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, out of steam approaching 200M.
Showed no early speed, settled in worse than midfield, 5L off 3 wide with cover, ridden around turn, finished detached.
Rolled forward and parked outside the leader, kept going until couldn't find extra at 200M.
Raced at the rear, 7-1/2L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ridden from 600M, did not threaten.
Began well, ridden along between horses 2L behind leading pair. Came under pressure turning for home and spent force on reaching straight. Plodded home.
Had feet in air at start and slow into stride, shifted across behind runners, last on settling. Began forward mover 600m, circling field 4-wide to be 4th into straight. Boxed on gamely.
First out, taken to fence 1500m and set good pace to straight. Overtaken 250m but kept on gamely before flattened final 50m.
Hard ridden from outside draw but slow to muster, racing 3-wide without cover 3L from leader. Under pressure from 400m and faded badly in straight. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Ridden to hold forward position but checked off heels 1500m, dropping behind midfield but wide. Covered extra ground final turn and one-paced in straight.
Crowded out start, dropping to rear close to fence. Switched out entering straight and ran on fairly.
Began well, hard ridden from outside barrier to race a half length outside leader to straight. Took over running 250m, but unable hold off winner close home.
Bumped start, ridden to hold rail 2-back from leader. Travelled smoothly to straight when put under pressure but only one-paced.
Outpaced, dropping to rear on settling. Kept 3-wide around turn, last into straight, switched out 300m and ran on steadily.
Bumped and unbalanced start, pressed forward, bumped again first turn. Boxed on between horses back stretch, lost position final turn, one-paced in straight. Lame left front leg.
Bumped start, pressed forward, snatching box seat passing 500m and trailed leader to straight. Came off fence 300m and surged forward to win close home.
From wide barrier shifted across early stages, raced as the back-marker 8Ls off pace, no major progress, ran past beaten horses only.
Positively ridden, up with leaders early, tracked leaders 900M, fought on same speed turning in, no extra towards finish. (Jockey dropped whip 350M)
Reserved near the rear 6Ls behind leader, saved ground along the rails, ran on from off the pace, got up for non-threatening 4th near line.
Never far off from the pace, caught 3-wide no cover from 900M, responded only fairly early straight, no threat from 200M.
Sat 2-wide in mid-division, not quickened leaving the home bend, kept on same pace to line.
Pushed along after the start, not pace of leaders early, sat behind midfield 4Ls off leader, kept on same pace in straight, eased final 100M when beaten.
Settled down 4Ls off the pace behind midfield, responded well passing 300M but unable to match stride with winner final 150M.
Strode forward to race outside leader, outpaced 350M, dropped away and eased 200M out when well beaten.
Emerged as leader 1000M, had every chance and led to 250M, faded over final 100M.
Up with leaders early, eased off to midfield before home turn, challenged along inside passing 400M, ran on well for 3rd, no match for winner final 150M.

Strode forward from wide barrier, unable to cross and dropped back to near the rear 900M, no closer than 3-wide home turn, failed to pick up entering straight. (Jockey : didn't handle track conditions)

In mid-division, raced keenly early stages with blinkers on for the first time, 3-wide turning for home, quickened up strongly to lead 250M, wandered about under pressure late stages but well in control already.
Slow to begin, soon rushed along and got back to a position near the tail, 6Ls off the pace 400M, offered no response. (Jockey : inclined to hang out during race)
Held up 3-wide behind midfield, 4Ls off the pace top of straight, stayed on moderately over final 350M but no impression on leaders.
Began OK, unable get cover and raced on own down centre track 6L behind the pace. Kept on gamely final 400m without looking dangerous.
Began awkwardly, losing ground, and last on settling. Trailed field thereafter.
No early pace, ridden along between horses towards the rear to 300m before giving ground gradually.
First out, racing hard against the outside fence. Overtaken passing 400m but batted on gamely to hold down second spot.
Jumped with field, switched out but held between horses 6L from leader. Lay in when put under pressure 400m, one-paced.
Began OK, ridden along between horses behind midfield to 400m before running out of gas and fading.
Jumped well, taken to fence in slipstream of leader. Got close to heels 600m, kept on steadily before blocked final 50m and not fully tested.
Crowded out at start and then steadied, settling 3L off the pace. Picked up momentum passing 400m and ran on solidly final 200m to just miss 2nd placing.
Away nicely, ridden forward, racing on own 4-away from outer fence but 1L from leader. Rolled forward to draw level with leading pack 400m before turning one-paced.
Jumped well, racing a half length inside leader to course proper. Under pressure from 400m but boxed on fairly to the line.
Began well, taken towards outer fence, racing between horses 2L from leader. Took closer order approaching 400m but one-paced from 200m.
No early pace, taken to outside fence and made some progress but still well back. Kept on fairly final 400m.
Jumped sideways but quickly into stride, racing a neck inside leader before taking over passing 400m. Skipped clear 250m and went to the line unchallenged.
Began fairly, race at rear before switching out and making some progress. One-paced final 400m.
Pushed forward at any cost early, eventually sharing the lead, 1 off the fence. Ran flat in the straight, dropping out from the 250m.
Pressed forward early, before being hampered at 900m, eventually settling 3rd 1 off the fence. Drifted wider in the straight, but only went to the line fairly.
Slow into stride and had to settle at the rear of the field, 10L off the leaders. Ran fairly to the line late, and only managed to pick up a couple of slower ones.
Began well and taken forward early to share the lead, on the fence. Pulled away from the 300m, and was well clear late, Running out of gas late, but too far ahead to be caught.

Eased back from the wide draw, eventually settling just behind midfield, on the rail. Stayed closer to the inside in the run home and ran strongly, with the fastest last 400m and taking 2nd in the last 25m.

Pressed forward early to be well placed 4th/5th, 1 off the fence. Checked at 900m. Came wide on the turn, and taken further out when off heels in the straight. Nice run when clear late down extreme outside.
Didn't kick early and settle 2nd last. Showed nothing and was quietly ridden in the straight, before easing out late.
Began well before dropping back to sit midfield, 2-3 wide with limited cover. Plugged on OK in the straight. Only went hands and heels late, and no threat for a place.
Pushed forward from the inside draw to be well placed 4th/5th, on the rail. Held up early in the straight, but ran solidly when clear from the 300m. Peaked near the line and lost 2nd late.
Eased back from the wide draw and stuck wide and unsettled early, before settling towards the rear of the field. Gave nothing and was eased a long way from home. Unacceptable performance.
Bumped on jumping, but recovered to go forward and sit around midfield, on the rail. Came wider on the turn, but never responded to urgings in the straight and was eased up over the last 100m.
Eased back early to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Came widest in the straight, and only went 1 paced to the line.
Slowly away, recovered to race prominently, took the lead after 1200M, travelled well on turn, kept on very well in straight and scored narrowly.
Began well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, saved ground on turn, showed no response in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths or so back in 5th, wider after 1000M, no cover on turn, emptied early in straight and eased.
Slightly slow out from gate 11, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, same position on turn, made minor progress early in straight, peaked near 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began fairly from a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced wide in prominent position, no cover after 900M, emptied early in straight and eased. (Lame next day)
Began well, positioned on rail in midfield, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening and made very good progress to get 3rd.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, finished off one-paced in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced 2 wide at rear, 4 lengths or so back on turn, finished off one-paced in straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently early, found cover near 900M, angled out turning in, finished off well but just couldn't catch the winner.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced at tail for the majority of the race, taken widest in straight and made reasonable progress without threatening the first few.
Began well from a tricky gate, taken back to race 3 wide at rear, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight. (See racing incidents)
Moderately away, raced 4 lengths or so back on rail, same position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Slowly away, raced 6 to 7 lengths back at rear, there to turn, taken wide in straight and made reasonable progress to make frame.
Moderately away, unable to slot in early, raced 3 wide in 4th early, found cover after 1100M, 4 lengths or so back on turn, emptied early in straight and eased.
Jumped well from gate 1, raced in midfield, still 6 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.

Began well from the widest draw, sent forward to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead until headed after 700M, positioned a length behind the leader on turn, finished off evenly to get 2nd without posing any threat to the winner.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 6 to 7 lengths back, improved gradually after 750M, 3 wide turning, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 3 to 4 lengths back on rail, saved ground on turn, made minor progress in straight without threatening.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced in 2nd until near 700M, 3 lengths back in 4th on turn, finished off evenly in straight. (Lost right front plate near 1750M)
Jumped well, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, same position until 700M, 3 lengths back on rail turning, finished off evenly.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at rear in the early stages, sent forward after 900M and took the lead, kicked clear after turning in, easily scored.
Raced at tail early, sent forward in the middle stages to race in 2nd, kept on well after turning in, but couldn't catch the winner.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths back early, 7 lengths back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start, positioned 2 wide in midfield early, 6 lengths back on turn, showed no response in straight.
Slowly away, raced at rear for the majority of the race, made minor progress after turning in without threatening.
Midfield along the fence, suited by the fast tempo, flattened in straight.
Pressed forward, took rail and lead, clocked fast sectionals, emptied 200M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 2 wide, benefited by the fast sectionals, lack usual dash, only made minor ground in straight.
Hard ridden early but not muster, midfield on the rails, suited by the fast pace, lack room 4-2, ran on ok when clear.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, out of fuel 250M.
Settled behind the leaders, 2 wide, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, made steady ground 300M for 2nd.
Eased back, took rail, benefited by the fast tempo, made steady ground 200M.
Eased back, trapped 2-3 wide, no progress.
Eased back, never a factor.
Pushed forward to cross, occupied box seat, drifted away 250M to score.
Eased to rear, took cover, 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, kept on one pace until weakened final 100M.
Settled worse than midfield about 5.5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, swung widest turning in, ran on fairly.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, kept on nicely until emptied inside 50M, hung on for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed well to score by a short head.
Taken back from a wide draw, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on impressively for 4th.
Settled worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, made minor ground in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Raced midfield, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, kept on steadily to the line.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led by 1L, kept on one pace until weakened final 150M.
Camped handy, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on well for 2nd.
No early speed, dropping to rear in one-off position. Made a forward move around turn but effort short-lived and plodded home.
Bumped heavily start, then ridden to hold rail position, two back from leader. Switched out entering straight and ran on steadily.
Bumped start, pressed forward to lead 1500m before cutting to fence. Pulled 2L clear passing 600m, collared shortly after straightening, faded.

Pressed forward but 3-wide before settling midfield. Covered extra ground turn, very wide into straight, finished powerfully to win close home.
Began OK but hampered and taken out on passing 1100m, dropping to last. Made up some ground around turn, took inside run in straight before switching out passing 200m.
Hard ridden on jumping, surging into the front 1150m before crossing to fence. Collared approaching 200m and gave ground gradually.
Began fairly, ridden along behind midfield but wide. Took turn 3-wide, kept on fairly to 200m before giving ground.
Jumped well, sliding into box seat and following leader to straight. Threw out challenged 350m, hit front 200m, run down close to line.
Began awkwardly, bumping twice, before pressing forward to race 2L from leader in one-off position. Shifted wider in straight and tired quickly final 200m.
Jumped OK, not pushed, setting towards rear in one-off position, Severely hampered and taken very wide around home turn, dropping to last. Never a factor after that.
First out but eased behind the speed battle, sliding to rail 2-back from leader. Left fence on straightening and finished off nicely.
Taken keen hold behind midfield, saved ground on fence but didn't respond to riding leaving home turn.
Dropped back to last over 8Ls behind leader, wide bid 500M, made only limited progress down outside.
Towards the rear 6-7Ls off the slow pace, not quickened to challenge when driven 400M, never in contention.
From 12 quickly crossed to the lead, allowed easy lead in front, kept on well final 300M, just failed to hold off winner near line.
Caught wide no cover behind midfield, found disappointingly little when asked, never reached contention.
Settled down in 6th, 4Ls off leader in a slowly run race, sprinted strongly to draw alongside leader final stages, got up near line.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, held up behind midfield 5Ls back, stayed on final 300M without threat to leaders.
Close up in 4th, always within striking distance, loomed 250M, beaten off by first two 100M but held 3rd comfortably.
In mid-division, 3Ls off the pace home turn, kept on same pace in straight, never a serious threat to first few.
Tracked leader in slowly run race, had every chance leaving home turn, fought on same pace only.
Chased leaders in 3rd, lacked a finishing response 300M, faded away mid-straight.
Settled near last over 7Ls off the pace, couldn't keep 400M, soon left behind.
Moderate start, settled in handy position far side, hit the front under pressure upon straightening only to be caught close to home.
Settled just worse than midfield, made steady headway out wide down far side to be prominent around the bend, one-paced from 3rd into straight.
Settled just better than midfield on rails, carried slightly backward approaching home bend, found nothing in straight.
Settled in midfield, commenced move entering home straight, 4-wide when close up turning in, fought on steadily to get up final strides.
Soon dropped well behind, only ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled just better than midfield, steadied and lost position 1200 metres out, finished off race nicely from behind midfield into straight.
Broke well from the middle gates, soon settled just off the pace on rails, shuffled back to 2L 6th coming out of back straight, found nil in the run home. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Worked early from a poor gate to keep in touch while very wide, improved far side to take up running at halfway mark, led until headed shortly after straightening, dropped away quickly.
Settled in last few, produced late impression past well-beaten horses in the run home.
Always in last few, soon tailed-off after straightening. (Irregular heart rhythm)
Travelled wide in midfield, raced keenly far side before shuffled back to last few, produced good late impression.
Well back despite given reminders at the start, took closer order down far side to reach midfield before home bend, very wide entering straight, kept on without quickening.
Driven to lead from the widest gate to obtain rails run first bend, led until narrowly headed halfway down back straight, chased leaders to home turn, one-paced.
Began from a poor gate, took up a handy position early stages, not far off in 5th around home bend, faded steadily under pressure in the run home.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide no cover, pace good, ran on until 150M flattened.
At back, 2 wide, pace good, unleashed strong finishing effort 300M to score.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield along the fence, pace good, dashed well 300M for 2nd.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, pace good, raced 3-4 wide, little dash 100M.
Pushed to take rail and led at good pace, overhauled 300M, flattened 100M.
Hard ridden early, midfield, 2 wide, pace good, made some ground 200M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, led 300M, hung on well until 100M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Checked start, at rear, never nearer.
Pushed early, hold the rail in front of midfield, pace good, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, pace good, no progress.
Never competitive at rear.
At back, trapped 2-3 wide, pace good, ran on ok in straight.
Midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, pace good, emptied 400M.
Pushed forward, box seat, pace good, however no turn of foot.
Pushed to settle midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, finished off strongly to score by a head.
Jumped very awkwardly, always at rear, never a factor.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, ran on gradually in straight.
At back throughout, never ran on.
At rear throughout, never looked competitive.
At back, never in a competitive position throughout the trip.
Settled worse than midfield 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, made minor ground in straight.
Pressed forward to take the fence and share the lead, kept on steadily until weakened final 100M, just held for 3rd.
Eased to settle worse than midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, finished off steadily.
Pushed forward to park outside the leader, stayed on one pace without any extra acceleration, held for 4th.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, made no impression in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, kept on one pace until weakened final 100M.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on nicely until headed by the winner over the latter stages.
Bustled at break to sit fore of midfield 1 off with cover, 3 deep & driven into stretch, advanced to 2nd 300m, all out to lead 180m, emptied & headed 150m.
Moderate break, soon bustled to run midfield 1 off with cover, slid back a spot 850m, 3rd last & ridden 500m, struggled in weakening run.
Broke well, battled to sit close up 1 off no cover, shuffled to one back one off 900m, niggled 520m, driven turning in, checked off heels 310m, no extra.
Prominent 4 wide no cover, pressed lead until edged ahead 1120m, headed 1000m & backpedalled, soon bustled mid rank, found nil & tailed off.
Moderate start & bustled 3 wide with cover behind midfield, driven wide on turn, plugged on tepidly centre track.
Taken back at start to rail 2nd last, strong traveler on turn, progress & switched out 370m, quickened smartly to lead 150m, driven to hold rival.
Snagged at start to race near rear 1 off, off heels 930m & shuffled to 2nd last, flat-footed last turning in, responded for moderate inroads.
Sharp start, led outright on rail 1400m, headed 1120m, continued to press & led 750m, 1L clear & kicked on into stretch, emptied & headed 200m, tapered.
Stumbled start & rousted at tail, shifted 3 deep 600m, very wide into stretch & driven, stayed on past beaten rivals.
Taken back at start to rail midfield, niggled along, in pocket turning in, switched out 320m & shaken up, quickened to close 2nd 130m, held in duel.
Broke ok but lacked early toe, parked rail fore of midfield, rolled to handy 1 back exiting backstretch, 3rd & driven turning in, tapered in run home.
Driven forward at start to press lead 3 wide no cover, edged lead 1000m & shifted 1 off, headed 750m, struggling 2nd 500m, emptied 300m & faded.
Broke with others, soon outpaced & rousted 3 wide with cover midfield, checked to 1 off 750m, under pump 500m & bumped 4 deep final turn, impeded 320m, no extra.
Slow start & rousted to race rail behind midfield, niggled 650m, shifted 1 off 500m, driven into stretch & bumped rival 320m, stayed on without threatening.
Awkward start, raced rail midfield, driven behind runners turning in, switched out 300m, rattled home centre track to claim 2nd.
Prominent wide 1st turn, settled fore of midfield 1 off with cover, ridden under pressure 400m, plodded on tepidly, squeezed up close home.
Started ok but niggled along 3 wide with cover near tail, soon settled, shifted widest 550m, driven turning in, closed for minor inroads.
Bustled start & settled last pair 1 off, clear last 800m, shifted wide 550m & driven into stretch, plodded on ineffectively.
Broke well, raced close 2nd no cover on fence until snagged to 1 back 1400m, edged 1 off no cover 1300m, pressed lead on turn, ridden 430m, one-paced.
Tardy start, settled rail behind midfield, niggled a touch 1150m, snatched off heels 600m, shifted out & driven 400m, kept on for minor late headway.
Shifted in at break, sat fore of midfield 3 wide no cover until checked off heels 1300m, shifted 4 wide & driven turning in, found nil & faded.
Good break, sat handy 3rd 1 off no cover, pushed 3 deep 1300m, driven to challenge 430m, outkicked but kept on with grinding run to lead close home.
Sharp break, rolled wide to lead 1st turn, eventually to rail 1400m, 0.5L up & driven 430m, surged 2L clear, peaked 150m, tapered & headed close home.
Broke well, snagged to midfield 1 off with cover, overraced a touch 1650m, niggled 800m, driven into stretch & shifted out, plodded on tamely.
Started ok, dropped in to back of midfield 3 wide with cover, shifted wider final turn & driven, kept on for moderate headway until tapered final 100m.
Broke ok, lacked toe & bustled back of midfield, overraced 1600m, snagged off heels 620m, found nil in stretch & soon beaten.
Smart start, niggled a touch to park rail fore of midfield, closed to slipstream leader 850m, driven 430m, closed to wire but always held.
Missed break & bustled to settle last pair on rail, advanced a spot 800m & niggled, switched out & driven 400m, stayed on past beaten rivals.
Travelled at the rear, 8-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, ran home strongly and just missed out on the prize by a nose.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 5L behind 2 wide with cover, run ended when checked at 150M.
Rolled forward and took one-off one-back position, steadied 350M, one pace thereafter.
Pushed to sit in midfield along the rail, 3-3/4L behind, never threatened.
Slotted into midfield, 4-1/4L off the pace but trapped 3 wide and without cover, ran on fairly.
Slightly slow start, sat in behind midfield 5-1/2L off along the rail, steadied 400M, did not run on.
Prominent but raced wide initially, improved to share lead at 700M, kept going and held on to win by a nose.
Rolled forward into box-seat, held up most Straight until 150M, closed off well in final stages.
Eased back and travelled at the rear, 8-3/4L off on the fence, no progress.
Urged forward to take the rail and led, headed at 100M but still ran on okay.
Pushed to settle midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 5-3/4L behind trapped 3 wide with cover, improved steadily.
Raced in behind midfield, 6-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, made ground despite being interrupted at 350M and 150M.
Rolled forward to sit outside the leader until crossed at 700M, remained in touch until 250M.
Ridden forward from an outside draw, racing fiercely 3-wide before settling behind midfield around turn. Very wide in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Jumped OK, not pressed, settling midfield along rail. Left fence turning for home, blocked for run 300m, ran on steadily when clear.
Began awkwardly and bumped, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Taken to rail around turn, took inside run in straight but only one-paced.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward looking for cover, slotting into one-off position three-back passing 1000m. Under pressure from 500m but kept on well to line.
Began awkwardly, losing ground, then shifted across to rail, settling at rear. Stayed on rail around turn and ran on fairly in straight.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear and gradually becoming detached from field. Never likely.
Crowded out start, steadied, and taken in, racing towards rear in one-off position. Shaken up entering straight but little response. Lame left front leg.
Began fairly, taken in from outside draw but held 3-wide at the rear. Very wide into straight, found nothing under hard riding.
Began well, ridden to hold position one-back, one-off to straight when switched out to make challenge. Kept on well without threatening winner.
Quickly away, holding rail inside leading pack before throwing head about when crossed 900m. Tailed leader to straight, not much room to 300m, one-paced when clear.
Began well, pressed forward, sitting 1L behind leader in one-off position. Shaken up top of straight to challenge but unable close gap to winner.
Pushed forward 3-wide to stay with pacemakers, but left without cover after 900m when 3L from leader. Continued to race wide entering straight, tiring noticeably after passing 200m.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling 3-back along rail, Kept tabs on leaders to straight when came under pressure and gave ground gradually.
First out, pressed forward but wide, crossing to fence 900m and stacking up field. Travelled strongly with head on chest to 300m when shaken up and pulled clear for comfortable win.
Chased runaway trio, moved strongly into contention 200M, kept on stoutly to go past weakening leader 100M.
Soon led, proved very difficult to settle when being steadied passing 1000M, vied for lead setting strong pace, no extra inside 300M, weakened rapidly.
Positively ridden from draw 12 but unable to cross the rivals on its inside, vied for lead 3-wide throughout, led 400M-100M, no extra final stages. (Jockey severely reprimanded for his handling.)
Slowly away, raced back in the field over 10Ls off the strong pace, took a while to get going entering straight, did best work late. (Jockey's riding came under notice.)
Held up in midfield along the rails, 5Ls to make up on leader 400M, not quickened under pressure, kept on same pace to line.
From widest barrier shifted to a position behind midfield, 6Ls off the strong pace at 400M, closed off well to go 3rd near line.
Towards the rear 10Ls off the strong pace, not picked up leaving the bend, soon left behind.
Behind midfield settled down 7-8Ls behind runaway leaders, inclined to lay out home turn, closed off steadily final 400M, encouraging debut.
Positively ridden, vied for lead along the 2-path setting strong pace, kept on well early straight, run ended 150M, swamped by rivals late.
Not hurried, dropped back to last over 10Ls off the strong pace, gave limited response entering straight, not reach contention.
In mid-division but couldn't get closer than 3-wide, 7Ls to make up 400M, ran on mildly without threat.
In 5th, 4Ls off the strong pace, hung in and proved a difficult ride in straight, did well under the circumstances to claim 2nd final stages, not reached winner though.
Settled 2-wide in midfield about 5Ls off the strong pace, kept on fairly, well held by leaders final 200M. (Bled.)
Shifted across behind runners from outside draw but held 3-wide towards rear on settling. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Punched forward from outside draw, racing wide till slotting in one-off, one-back passing 1000m. Rolled forward top of straight, steadied 200m, kept on gamely to line.

Ridden along to find cover, shifting in passing 1200m but left without cover from 1100m. Under pressure soon after straightening and not ridden out final 200m, finishing tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Jumped OK, not pressed, racing in midfield away from fence. Taken wide entering straight and ran on fairly without looking dangerous.
Began well, bumped near 1400M, ridden to stay with pacemakers before settling in slipstream of leading pair 1200m. Had dream run from 450m, hit front 300m, kept on well till run down final strides.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners, and last on settling. Made some progress around turn but found nothing in straight.
Allowed to stride at own pace, settling along fence behind midfield. Stayed close to fence throughout. Only one-paced in straight when put under pressure.

Pressed forward but wide to 1400m when shifted in and bumped, settling one-off, three-back. Switched out to challenge 400m, finished strongly to win close home. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
No early pace, settling towards rear in one-off position. A little wide into straight, switched in 450m to get run, kept on gamely to line.
Began fairly, taken to face, settling at rear. Shuffled back to last turning for home, boxed on one-paced in straight.
Began well, pressed forward to lead passing 1200m, overshadowed by outside runner 1000m, retook lead 600m, overtaken passing 300m but kept battling to line.
Hard ridden to hold forward position, racing outside leader to 1000m before taking narrow lead. Overtaken entering straight and tired gradually.
Began fairly, ridden to stay close to pace, settling 3-back at turn. Given reminders shortly after straightening but only one-paced to line.

Dropped back from the kick to sit at the rear of the field. Raced keen from the 1200m before running onto heels at 1000m and racing wide with limited cover. Plugged away in the straight without threatening.

Dropped back early to sit worse than midfield, 3 wide with cover. Looked to push forward at 500, but awkwardly placed on heels until 300. Came close to heels again late, but not going well enough to make an impact.
Bumped and unbalanced early, before steadying to find a position around midfield on the rail. Never responded to riding in the straight.
Pushed forward from the wide draw to lead. Competitive at the 250m, before the tank ran dry and dropped out quickly. Vet reported blood in trachea.
Ok away and taken up early to settle just forward of midfield, on the fence. Hung in the straight, but still ran strongly, finishing off well and just missing a place late.

Only eased forward early to sit at the rear of the field, on the rail. Held up early in the straight, before cutting across heels near the 300m. Ran strongly from the 150m to get close in a tight finish.
Crowded on jumping, dropping back to sit behind midfield, 1 off the fence. 6L off the leaders as they rounded for home, ran strongly in the straight and flew late to take the win.
Pushed forward initially before easing back at 1200m to settle 4th, on the rail. Held up early in the straight. Kicked strongly late and was running down 2nd in the closing stages.
Bumped on jumping, and steadied back early to eventually sit last passing the 1200m. Only fully clear from the 250m, but only plugged away to the line.
Taken forward and settled handily in 5th, 1 off the fence. Ran solidly in the straight, but missed a big kick to figure in the close finish.
Cruised forward early and managed to get trapped 3 wide with no cover around midfield. Only fair in the straight and was eased out late.

Lunged at the gates just before the kick, but stood flat footed, losing early ground. Pushed forward to sit just outside the leader by the 800m. Fading slightly, but looked to still be in control late before winner swooped.
Pushed forward from the wide draw to sit 2nd/3rd, 1 off the fence. Always prominent in the run home, but was battling late and swamped in the tight finish.
Taken up early, before dropping back to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. 1 paced for the majority of the straight, before kicking in the last 100m to finish off OK late.
Jumped fairly, gradually improved down far side to join race leader on top of home bend, disputed the lead most of way down straight but unable to peg him back throughout. (Tactic questioned)
Moderate start, travelled in last few on rails, found nothing in straight.
Jumped in air losing ground, travelled behind midfield, checked when racing keenly behind runners on home bend, one-paced in straight.
Never far off to straight, folded up quickly after straightening.
Ridden along in first few, settled just over 2L back in 4th on rails, kept on before coming one-paced closing stages.
Moderate start, raced wide behind midfield, wider entering straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Niggled at throughout far side travelling mainly in midfield to straight, finished off race nicely.
Broke well, settled in midfield on rails, soon came to challenge after straightening, only produced moderate progress under pressure.
Soon dropped well behind, ran past well-beaten horses in straight.
Shaken up at start, close up briefly before gradually dropping towards last few coming out of back straight, no response under pressure in the run home.
Very sluggish at start, tailed-off to straight, showed a great turn of foot inside final 300 metres down the centre of the track, won going away.

Began well from a wide gate, worked his way to lead on rails passing the 1000m but soon joined on top of home bend, resisted challenge from the same horse throughout home straight, outclassed by winner final stages.
Broke well before settling in mid-division, faded into straight.
Began from a wide gate, raced wide in prominent position in back straight and around home bend, dropped away quickly from approaching home turn.
Very slow away, not competitive.
Hard ridden forward, pace good, closed off strongly for 2nd.
Hard ridden to keep up midfield, pace good, emptied 400M.
Very slow away, pace good, never improved on inner part of track.
Checked early, midfield, pace good, no turn of foot on inner part of track.
Took lead easily, pace good, hung on strongly to score.
Eased back, pace good, no progress.
Pushed forward to cross towards outer part of track, pace good, ran on until 250M flattened.
At back, pace good, ran on ok on inner part of track.
Very slow away, hard ridden throughout to keep up with the field, no progress.
Hard ridden but not muster, checked early, pace good, ran on ok on inner part of track in final stages.
Pushed forward, pace good, ran on well for 3rd.
Never a factor.
Hard ridden forward, checked early, pace good, no dash.
At back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung widest turning in, despite the slow sectionals, made some ground in straight.
Always at back, never a factor.
Settled midfield, 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, not suited by the slow pace, made no impression in straight.
Pushed forward to settle in a prominent position, however, trapped wide without cover throughout, one paced only.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the slow tempo, kept on one pace to the line.
Failed to muster despite hard ridden along throughout, never looked likely, tailed out.
Hard ridden forward to occupy the box seat, suited by the slow sectionals, ran on strongly to score by 1.5Ls.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the slow pace, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, found nothing when asked. (Roarer)
Pressed forward to take the fence and led by 1/2L at slow sectionals, kept on until weakened over the final furlong.
Pushed to settle midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, harmed by the slow tempo, ran on only fairly.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader at slow tempo, kept on nicely until headed by the winner final 100M.
Missed break, bustled up to sit rail behind midfield, shifted 1 off 800m, ridden 500m, closed off centre track to claim 3rd.
Smart break, bustled up to slot fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shaken up & shifted out 500m, driven for grinding inroads centre track, led close home.
Outpaced at break & raced 2nd last 1 off, shuffled to tail to rail 600m, shifted put final turn & driven 400m, tepid run home.
Missed break & rousted near rear 1 off with cover, hard-ridden final turn & widest into stretch, stayed on for minor inroads.
Started well, settled midfield 1 off with cover, ridden 500m & shifted out, plodded on tamely.
Moderate start, settled back of midfield 1 off with cover, edged 3 deep 800m, driven wide home turn, struggled in run to wire.
Broke well, niggled initially to rail fore of midfield, switched out 500m but trapped in pocket, driven 200m, blocked 150m, clear run close home & closed too late.
Speed to lead, soon to rail, narrow lead turning in, shaken up 400m & kicked 1.5L clear, all out & pressed 200, headed 150m, tapered.
Fast start widest, crossed to park 1 off 1 back, shifted out home turn, driven 400m, vied for lead & edged narrow advantage 150m, headed close home.
Missed break, bustled forward to midfield 3 wide no cover, driven turning in but found nil & weakened.
Smart start to race 2nd 1 off, shaken up to press lead 500m, emptied 350m, weakened tamely.
Prominent early, taken back to rail midfield, driven 350m but trapped in pocket on fence, clear final 50m & plugged on.
Lacked toe from wide gate & taken to tail, advanced a spot 650m, switched out final turn, shaken up centre track 360m, closed for sound headway.
Good break & prominent early, settled 1 back on rail, switched out 400m, driven 300m to press lead, vied for advantage until faded final 50m.
Good start wide, snagged to midfield wide no cover, slotted in 3 deep 1000m, wide into stretch, one-paced & impeded 330m, no extra thereafter.
Smart break, restrained to handy 3 back on fence, progress to slipstream leader 900m, shifted out & driven 400m, grinding run to lead 140m, drew clear.
Lacked toe & bustled 3rd last detached from pack, advanced to rail behind midfield 1000m, niggled 650m, driven 430m, kept on for solid gains.
Started well, parked 3 deep no cover 3rd & overraced, given its head 800m to lead 700m, headed 420m & faded.
Broke ok, taken back to race 3 wide with cover behind midfield, widest into stretch & driven, stayed on for minor inroads.
Tardy start, raced behind midfield 1 off with cover, overraced 900m & shuffled back, shaken up 420m, checked & switched in 370m, kept on tepidly.
Sluggish break, niggled along detached 2nd last, joined main group 850m, driven turning in, stayed on for minor headway.
Started ok, raced midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out final turn, driven 300m, closed late for minor headway.
Bustled forward & to rail, parked 1 back, edged 1 off no cover 1000m, close 3rd turning in, driven to lead 420m, soon 1.5L clear, emptied 200m, headed 140m & swamped.
Broke ok to sit 1 off with cover midfield, raced keenly under restraint, advanced a spot on turn, ridden 500m, shadowed winner to go 2nd 110m, tapered last strides.
Taken back from widest gate to race detached at tail, under pump 600m, found nil, tailed off.
Early pace, restrained to track handily but trapped 4 wide no cover & overraced, slotted in 3 deep 800m, wide into stretch, plugged on tamely.
Smart start & rousted to lead, to rail 1100m, headed 700m but continued to vie for advantage, driven 430m, tapered in run home.
Moderate start, raced rail midfield, shaken up 400m, stayed on for dour gains down inner to claim 2nd close home
Travelled behind the lead, 1-3/4L off the pace on centre track, drifted away at 150M to score.
Race behind the leaders, 1L behind stand side, held up until 100M, finished off strongly thereafter.
Sent forward, shared lead on centre track, kept on until 200M when couldn't find extra.
Pushed forward and shared lead, remained on stand side, out of steam passing 250M.
Raced in midfield, 3L behind the leaders on centre track, ran on only one pace.
Awkward start and taken back, initially 5-1/2L off stand side, shifted to centre track at 500M, made slight ground.
Always at the tail end, did not improve.
In midfield, 3L behind on the stand rail, steadied 300M, did not run on thereafter.
Travelled in midfield, 2-3/4L behind stand side, remained one pace to the line.
Pressed forward and sat just off the speed on the stand rail, ran on gamely and just missed out on 2nd.
Eased to settle at the rear, 6-3/4L behind stand side, made ground steadily from 400M.
Ridden forward and shared lead on stand side, kept on well until 200M, held on for 4th.
Raced in worse than midfield, 4L behind stand side, never threatened.
Raced centre track, initially behind the leaders, improved to share lead at 600M, ran on until 200M weakened.
Restrained, shifted across behind runners to rail, settling towards rear. Caught in traffic early in straight and awkwardly placed closing stages.
Bumped and shifted out start, pressed forward but very wide, settling 3L behind leader back stretch when left without cover. Covered extra ground turn, boxed on to 200m before tiring.
Jumped well, rolled forward, sharing pace to back stretch before settling 2.5L back in one-off position. Under pressure turning for home, weakened badly in straight. Unacceptable performance.
Ridden early to find cover but held 4-wide passing 1700m and allowed to roll forward to lead 1350m. Set strong pace to 200m when flattened and gave ground gradually.
Bumped start, pressed forward, chased leader to 1400m before easing out of pace battle, settling 3-back, one-off. Under pressure soon after straightening and boxed on one-paced.
Quickly into stride, grabbed rail and led narrowly to 1350m when passed and settled in box seat. Rolled forward top of straight to look a chance 200m before swamped final strides.
Began well, bumped and unbalanced approaching first turn before slotting into one-off position behind midfield. Blocked for run 500m, wide into straight, boxed on gamely.
Began fairly, checked, dropping towards rear but wide. Kept wide along back stretch, taken wider around final turn, boxed on gamely in straight.
Began well, racing one-off behind pace around first turn. Lost position back stretch, shuffled further back final turn, swung wide then finishing strongly to win close home.
Jumped with field, restrained, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Took inside run on straightening and finished well though blocked for run final 100m and not ridden out.
Jumped with field, shifted in to find cover but held 3-wide in midfield. Kept wide back stretch, bumped entering straight, boxed on gamely down centre track to just miss a place.
Restrained on jumping and shifted in, settling at rear in one-off position. Taken 3-wide back stretch, then 4-wide from 600m to go forward. Hit front 200m, hung in 100m, kept battling.
Crowded out start, taken to rail, settling 4-back behind midfield. Blocked on run top of straight, stayed close to rail and finished off nicely.
Quickly into stride but eased to sit 2-back behind the pace first turn. Travelled smoothly to 450m, angled out to make run but shifted back in and finished strongly to miss narrowly.
Settled down 3-4Ls off the pace, responded readily to pressure, lay in early straight, clipped heels and blundered, responded readily to pressure final 250M, not reach winner though.
4-5Ls back in midfield along the inside, kept on fairly entering straight, not pace to challenge leaders.
Settled down in midfield, wide no cover after 1000M, crept closer to pace home turn, every chance, weakened 150M.
Not mustered pace , ended up in last 8Ls off leader, switched 3-wide 650M, ran on fairly down outside of straight.
Contested lead early, eased back to 4th entering home turn, kept on steadily under pressure, flattened final 100M.
In 5th about 3-4Ls off leader, found no extra passing 300M, soon beaten.
Urged along after the start, crossed to the lead 900M, kept on well when driven out 300M but not pace of winner final 150M, held on to 2nd from unlucky 3rd.
Towards the rear and no closer than 3-wide throughout, 4Ls off leader 400M, quickened up strongly to lead near 150M, won going away.
Held up 2-wide behind midfield, 4Ls off the pace 400M, no clear run until passing 200M, did best work late closing on the runner up with every stride.
Taken back from wide draw, near the rear 7Ls off the pace, proved difficult to settle 900M, inclined to lay in when driven out in straight, checked 200M, lacked further response towards finish.
Went forward, tracked leader 2-wide, unable to quicken entering straight, gave way 250M. (Jockey : raced flat.)
Dropped back to the rear, 8Ls off the pace middle stages, no clear run early straight, stayed on well final 200M.
Vied for early lead, tracked leader from 900M, no extra and gave way rapidly inside 300M.
Held up towards the rear, saved ground on the inside, 5Ls behind leader 400M, switched out for clear run, stayed on mildly and not serious threat to leaders.
Hard ridden to hold rail inside leader to and around turn. Kicked ahead 350m, kept finding under intense pressure final 200m, to be beaten on line.
Hard ridden to hold forward position, racing wide without cover 2L from leader before losing position around turn. Gave ground quickly in straight. Lame left front leg.
Began awkwardly losing ground, then pressed forward, settling 3L from leader at turn. Kept on gamely in straight without threatening.
Began OK but beaten for early pace, gradually dropping back. Last into straight, boxed on one-paced.
Jumped OK, restrained and taken back looking for cover, settling one-off towards rear. Began forward move 350m, picked up steam 200m, finished strongly to just fail.
Ridden vigorously between horses to hold forward position but started to over-raced and eased one-back, one-off 700m. Kept on well to 200m before tiring.
Hard ridden from outside draw to take lead passing 800m but kept away from fence by inside runner. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, racing 3-wide without cover mostly. Lost position around turn, plodded in straight.
Jumped OK, pressed forward, settling midfield in one-off position. Got shuffled back around turn and one-paced in straight.
Slow into stride, dropping to rear but holding rail. Made progress around turn, stayed on rail in straight and ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Began well, beaten for pace, settling in box seat 2L from leader. Closed in steadily around turn, switched out 350m to make challenge, vigorously ridden to win on the line.
Steadied soon after start, shifted across behind horses and last on settling. Made up ground around turn, took inside run in straight and kept on fairly.

Began awkwardly and didn't muster early, settling towards the back of the field, 3-4 wide with cover. Awkward on heels and got head up at 800. Began to run on early in the straight, but faded quickly from 300m, easing late.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit at the rear of the field, 3-4 wide with limited cover. No kick in the straight, and eased to the line late.
Pushed forward early, settling midfield, 1 off the fence. Became unsettled and checked off heels at 1100m, and lost ground. Came wider on the turn and ran strongly to the line, holding 3rd late.
Taken forward early to be early leader, before eventually settling 3rd. Drifted back rounding the home turn, before running on again in the straight. Strong late, closing hard on 3rd on the line.

Hampered and lost ground on jumping, eventually settling around midfield, on the rail. Awkward on heels from 800m, before being checked and unbalanced at 700m and lost ground. Wider on the turn and ran on OK late.
Taken forward early, sitting wide early before settling 2nd, 1 off the fence and 1L off the leader. Went to the line 1 paced in the straight.
Pressed forward early, but couldn't find cover and left 3 wide with no cover in midfield. Came forward to be 2nd on the turn, challenging winner. Nosed in front 100, but winner kicked again.

Eased back early and stuck 4-5 wide early around midfield. Pushed forward from the 1000m to lead by the 800m. Pushed hard in the straight, and looked beaten at 50m, before kicking again late and just holding on.
