Taken forward early to be handily placed, before easing back mid race to sit forward of midfield. Looked to be finished and was losing ground at 500m. Ran strongly over the last 200m, gaining ground quickly.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit last, 1 off the fence and 7L off the leader. Last at 200m, and plugged to the line fairly late.
Stuck widest, without cover early from the 14 barrier before pushing forward to lead by the 1000m. Under pressure before the turn, dropped out in the straight and eased late.

Hampered on jumping and lost ground, but still managed to push forward and find a position forward of midfield, on the fence. Under pressure before the straight and ran flat in the straight. Vet-cut to off hind tendon.
Taken forward early to be handily placed 4th, 1 off the fence and 2.5L off the leader. Pressed forward with the winner at 500m, and sat 3rd until the 100m, before running out of puff late.

Eased forward early to take a position at the rear of the field, on the rail. Pushed forward to be midfield by 800, before being bumped and losing some ground at 700m. Came off heels 250m, and solid to the line late.
Slightly slow out, raced at tail, 7 lengths back, still well back on turn, angled out early in straight and made good progress to make frame. (See racing incidents.)
Slightly slow out from a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide throughout, emptied early in straight when hard run took effect.
Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover in 4th, still no cover on turn, weakened gradually after turning in.
Away with them, raced 5 lengths or so back at rear, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after turning in, finished off evenly without threatening.
Began well from the widest draw, unable to slot in, raced wide and without cover throughout, finished off one-paced. (See racing incidents.)
Average to begin, sent forward to race prominently, travelled well on turn, took the lead near 200M, kept on well to score.
Began well, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, weakened after 600M, finished tailed out, unacceptable performance.
Taken back from a tricky gate, raced 4 lengths or so back on rail, similar position on turn, angled out in straight and finished off strongly to get 2nd.
Away well, taken back to race 5 lengths back at rear, same margin back on turn, finished off one-paced.
Jumped well from a wide draw, showed early speed to take the lead, still uncontested on turn, headed near 200M, stayed on for 3rd. (Lost right front plate near 500M.)
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 4 lengths or so back, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Slowly away, recovered to race 2 lengths or so back on rail in 5th, there to turn, angled out early in straight and finished off evenly.
Moderately away, positioned a length behind the leader on rail, easy run throughout, finished off evenly. (See racing incidents.)
Began well from the one draw holding narrow lead on rails most of way to straight, unable to sustain effort after straightening.
Moderate jump, niggled along early stages in maintain position in mid-division, slightly worse coming out of back straight, produced good late impression final stages despite tight between runners.

Moderate start, raced 3 lengths back on rail, came closer rounding home bend but didn't find much room early in straight, fought on doggedly closing stages while shifting ground to just fail to get up on line.
Soon dropped to last few despite ridden along, never seen with a chance.
Jumped fairly, gradually settled in rear of midfield, baulked for a run after straightening, one-paced under pressure inside final 200 metres.
Moderate start, travelled within striking distance of 2L back on rails most of way before overhauled inside final 200 metres. (Blood in trachea next day)
Away with them, positioned 2 wide in 5th, similar position on turn, angled out early in straight, raced tight and carried wider after 200M, finished off evenly.
Settled at the back on rails, finished off race well, did best work late.
Taken back to race in rear from a poor gate, trailed the field to the straight, ran on well under pressure near the centre of the track.
Ridden along from the widest gate from forward of midfield to settle 3-wide in 3rd with the leaders, hit the front under pressure 200 metres out and just held on to the line.
Raced wide better than midfield after beginning from a wide draw, remained in similar position when 3-wde in 6th turning in, ran home one-paced.
Ridden along to share the pace hitting front briefly in back straight, held every chance early in home straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, out of fuel 250M.
Settled in front of midfield, 2 wide, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Hard ridden forward, took rail and lead, clocked fast sectionals, hung on until 150M flattened.
At back along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, lack room 300M, progressed steadily when clear.
Eased back, 2 wide, never nearer.
Very slow away, never a factor.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, reduced quickly 400M.
Settled in box seat, not suited by the fast pace, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, made steady ground 300M for 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, checked early, emptied 300M.
At rear, along the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, no turn of foot in straight.
At rear throughout, made minor ground in straight.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader, kept on fairly until weakened final 250M.
Eased back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, swung wide turning in, made plenty of ground in straight.
Taken back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Settled worse than midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, switched wide turning in, dashed well for 3rd in a tight finish.
Sent forward to lead along the fence, kept on strongly to score by only a nose.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, one paced home.
Raced midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on steadily for 4th without threatening.
Camped handy, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, flattened badly soon after straightening.
Pushed forward to obtain the box seat from gate 7, kept on one pace until weakened over the last furlong.
Settled midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never ran on.
Camped handy, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on strongly to miss by only a nose in a tight finish.
Smart break & prominent early settled midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 600m, shifted wide & driven home turn, buffeted in stretch run, one-paced.
Started ok, raced rail midfield, shuffled to back of midfield 800m, bustled 600m, shifted out 400m & driven, buffeted in stretch run, not clear & checked 60m, one-paced.
Squeezed up at start & raced at tail until wide advance from 1120m to sit close-up 730m, driven 2nd 380m, pressed lead until emptied 100m, tapered.
Broke ok, raced fence near rear, checked off heels 950m & switched 1 off, niggled 500m, driven & shifted out final turn, boxed on for minor inroads.
Broke well & prominent, settled handy 1 off no cover, niggled 500m, under pump 400m, found nil & weakened out.
Led early, to rail 1400m & headed 1220m, settled 1 back & overraced 1050m, driven turning in & switched out 300m, hard-ridden to lead 40m, just held on.
Moderate start, raced near rear until switched 3 deep & advanced a spot 900m, overraced & shifted 4 wide no cover until tucked in 650m, wide home turn, kept on.
Bustled from gate, raced 3 wide no cover midfield, niggled 550m, driven wide home turn, plodded home tamely.
Crowded start & raced rear rank 3 wide with cover, driven very wide home turn, stormed centre track for headway to 3rd.
Tardy break, rousted wide to press lead 1st turn, led 1220m & to rail 1150m, set steady tempo, driven under pressure 380m, dug in & forged on, emptied & swamped close home.
Minor bump early, rolled to sit back of midfield on rail, checked off heels 1000m & overraced 900m, shuffled to rear rank, ridden into home turn, kept on evenly.
Broke ok to park back of midfield 1 off, overraced 950m, fanned wide & driven home turn, closed strongly, just failed.
Lacked early toe & rousted, settled rail near rear, bustled 520m, plugged on for minor inroads.
Broke ok, raced midfield 3 deep no cover, advanced 800m to press lead 650m, slotted 1 off, ridden 400m, soon all out, tapered.
Sharp start, snagged back to park 3 back on rail, shifted off fence home turn, ridden 300m, switched out 200m, one paced in run home.
Missed break & raced 5L adrift of main pack, ridden to join tail turning in, soon emptied, never a factor.
Outpaced early stages, settled back of midfield 1 off, driven into stretch & shifted out, stayed on for late headway.
Taken back to midfield from wide gate & trapped 4 wide no cover, advanced 820m to sit handy 3 deep, driven 380m, found nil & faded weakly.
Broke with others, soon niggled to rail at rear of pack, shifted 1 off for progress 750m, steadied 430m, not clear & checked 250m, no extra.
Outpaced initially, bustled to settle back of midfield, edged 3 deep 750m, niggled 500m, driven very wide into stretch, closed to make frame late.
Led at break, headed 1090m & raced 1 back on fence, overraced & steadied off heels 700m, driven into stretch, faded in run home.
Speed wide & driven to lead 1090m, to rail 950m, 1L clear & shaken up turning in, all out & headed 180m, kept battling but tapered.
Taken back from wide gate, soon niggled to sit 3 wide with cover back of midfield, checked off heels 780m, hard-ridden turning in, plodded one pace.
Fast break, raced handy 1 off with cover, shifted 3 deep & niggled 400m, driven into stretch, quickened to lead 180m, drew clear.
Niggled forward to race prominently but wide and without cover throughout, weakened gradually in the Straight.
Settled in midfield, 3L off 2 wide with cover, improved gradually and hit the line well for 2nd.
Raced in midfield along the rail, 3-3/4L behind the leader, finished off well inside final 150M for 3rd.
Sent forward to take rail and led by 1-1/4L, continued well in the lead and finished off with ease to score by 2-1/2L.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, kept on only one pace to the line.
Awkward start and consequently had to race at the rear, did not improve.
Eased back and raced at the rear, 6-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, made slight ground in the Straight.
Travelled in midfield, 5-1/4L behind the leader and stayed widest throughout, taken out at 250M, did not run on.
Pushed forward and raced outside the leader, 1-1/4L off the pace, remained in touch until weakened 150M.
At the rear and detached by 9-1/4L, made slight ground in the Straight.
Slotted in just behind midfield, 4-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, closed off well after switching wide at 250M for clear running.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, sat 2-1/4L behind, weakened badly passing 200M.

Began fairly, urged forward then steadied 1500m when kept wide. Made long forward move from 1300m, looping field back stretch to get 3rd entering straight when flattened, finishing tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Beaten for early pace, racing at rear to 900m when forced to switch out to avoid horse being pulled up. Kept wide around turn, taken to centre track in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Began well, pushed forward, settling two-back from leader. Lost position around turn, one-paced in straight.
Outpaced early, dropping to rear along rail. Switched out around final turn to go forward, taken to centre track in straight, ran on steadily without threatening.
Slow into stride, taken to fence, and made up some ground around first turn before breaking right front leg 900m and pulled up.
Began well but not pushed, settling 3-back first turn. Not asked for an effort until passing 450m when urged forward, hitting front 200m and then finding more when challenged.

Crowded out start, pushed forward inside leading pack before taking lead 1000m and slowing pace. Picked up momentum from 800m, boxed on to 200m before tiring. Restricted action behind and sore over the quarters.
Jumped with field, holding rail and settling in midfield. Got shuffled back to last around turn and only one-paced in straight under hard riding.
Hard ridden from an outside draw to get a forward position, settling one-off, three-back at first turn. Ran on steadily in the straight to grab 3rd position on the line.

No early pace, settling towards rear. Taken wide to go forward around final turn, loomed alongside leader 200m, battled strongly but just failed. Stipes reported jockey had restricted use of whip closing stages.
Slow to move, hard ridden to go forward, racing 4-wide before getting cover first turn 2L from leader. Kept tabs on leading pack to straight, then one-paced.
Pressed forward on jumping to share early lead, before settling three-parts of a length behind leader. Rolled forward around turn, joint leader 200m, no extra final stages.
Settled down behind midfield 4Ls off the good pace, severely checked near 250M, regrouped and kept on late under top weight, went 3rd before line.
Unhurried, detached last 9Ls off the pace middle stages, made no progress in straight, never a factor.
Away quickly, chased leaders in 3rd, lacked further response inside 250M, dropped away. (Blood in trachea / Irregular Heart Rhythm.)
Towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, not picked up entering straight, made no impression on debut.
In mid-pack 4Ls off the good pace, kept on same speed only passing 300M, never threatened.
Given a waiting ride, 6-7Ls towards the rear, brought wide into straight, gave limited response only.
Broke well, restrained in midfield along inside, switched out into clear 250M, quickened strongly to lead 80M out, won going away.
In mid-division 5Ls off the pace, driven wide passing 400M, ran on only fairly, never troubled leaders.
Never far off leader but 3-wide no cover from 800M, moved into contention nearing top of straight, advanced to 2nd 250M, one paced and no impression on leaders final 100M, lost 3rd late.
Driven forward from wide draw, prompted the pace, couldn't sustain run passing 300M, weakened towards the finish.
Rushed along after the start, led 900M at good pace, continued on well entering straight, headed by impressive winner near 80M, held 2nd comfortably.
Chased leaders in 4th, kept on fairly final 300M and not going the pace to challenge leaders.
Began well, used inside draw to hold rail, settling in taking box seat. Closed in turning for home to look a chance 200m before turning one-paced.
Began OK, taken to fence, settling 5L from leader. Put under pressure turning for home, boxed on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Hard ridden from outside draw, racing 4-wide outside leading pack before settling outside leader 900m. Rolled forward on straightening, hit front 200m, run down on line.
Jumped well, not pushed, settling 3L from leader in one-off position. Lost position around turn, got going again on straightening and finished strongly.
Jumped with field, pressed forward to race one-back, one-off. Turned a little wide, picked up momentum from 200m, finished strongly to just fail.
Checked when crowded out at start, dropping to last in one-off position. Stayed at rear to straight where ran on fairly.
Began fairly, then crowded out, dropping to rear along rail. Shuffled back to last around turn and found nothing in straight.
Pressed forward three-wide before taking over lead 1000m and crossing to fence. Collared approaching 200m and faded. Lame left front leg.
Beaten for early pace, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Taken a little wide entering straight and ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Began fairly, then crowded, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Shifted to rail around turn, shaken up on straightening, found gap 150m out and powered home to win on the line.
Began OK, ridden but didn't muster, settling midfield in one-off position. Swung wide into straight, picked up momentum why laying in 200m, raced tight concluding stages and not ridden out.
Began from a wide draw, ridden along when wide in first few before hampered, dropped to 6th about 4L off the pace turning in, ran home one-paced.
Crowded at start dropping to last few, commenced move rounding home bend, made up good ground from 10th into straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in prominent position when clipped heels, blundered and lost ground passing the 800 metres, dropped to near last entering straight.
Ridden along to hold prominent position, steadied to just over 2L back in 4th rounding home bend, kept on at the one pace under pressure to the finish.
Gradually dropped to last few after beginning from the widest gate, saved ground on rails turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Jumped fairly, gradually settled 2-wide in rear of midfield, unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Soon took up running, led until joined by two runners around the bend, kicked about 3L clear 200 metres out but soon flattered, caught inside final 50 metres.
Settled in forward of midfield, badly hampered passing the 800 metres dropping well back, never recovered.
Jumped fairly, settled in rear of midfield on rails, switched out for a run entering straight, ran on well under pressure to assert authority closing stages while hanging in throughout.
Given reminders at the start from a wide gate, worked his way forward to join the leaders coming onto home bend sharing the pace to straight, soon tired after racing wide throughout.
Moderate start, soon recovered along rails to better than midfield reaching within 3L of speed around home bend, weakened under pressure after straightening. (Lame)
Gradually dropped towards the rear despite ridden along, remained in last few turning in, made no impression in the run home.
Crowded at start but ridden to soon join the leaders, lost touch under pressure shortly after straightening.
Sluggish at start and soon dropped to tail-end, trailed the field to straight, finished off race well between runners down the inside of the track.
At rear at usual, pace good, 3-5 wide, made early move 600M around the field, just beaten by narrow margin in 2nd.
Hard ridden early, at back along the rails, pace good, just ran on ok in straight.
At rear, along the fence, pace good, made minor ground 300M, checked badly 200M, ran on ok.
Eased back, trapped 2-4 wide, pace good, dashed well 300M.
Never a competitive at rear.
Midfield, pace good, no progress.
Settled in prominent spot, 2 wide, pace good, lack room 400M, flattened 150M.
Behind midfield, never nearer.
Hard ridden forward to cross, 2 wide, pace good, lack room 300M, ran on ok.
Took rail and lead easily, pace good, hung on until 300M emptied.
Settled in midfield on the fence, pace good, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide in the lead, pace good, out of fuel 250M.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 2-3 wide, pace good, ran on well for 3rd.
Failed to muster early, moved forward to park outside the leader gradually from 1200M, weakened soon after straightening. (Roarer)
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, switched wide turning in, dashed strongly to score by 1-3/4Ls.
Camped handy, travelled 1L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, one paced until final 250M weakened.
Ridden forward, however, trapped wide without cover throughout, well beaten rounding the Home Turn.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, made early moved rounding the Home Turn, kept on strongly until weakened over the concluding stages for 3rd.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, dropped off rounding the Home Turn, tailed out.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, however, was checked 350M, never ran on thereafter.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never ran on and passed some tired horses only.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, was held up until final 250M, ran on nicely thereafter.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, made some ground in the straight.
Hard ridden to settle midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on.
Pressed forward to take the fence and share the lead, kept on gamely until headed by the winner final 50M.
Camped handy, travelled 1.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily for 4th.
At rear, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, swung widest turning in, ran on steadily until weakened final 100M.
Moderate break, raced 1 off with cover behind midfield, driven wide into stretch, tepid run home.
Missed break & bustled forward to race midfield on rail, niggled 550m, shifted out & driven turning in, kept on for one-paced inroads.
Smart start, raced 2.5L 3rd on rail, edged 1 off 520m, ridden 420m, boxed on & closed to wire but never a threat.
Broke well, taken back to race a touch keen midfield 1 off with cover, switched wide final turn, niggled for minor progress, hard-ridden 300m, soon emptied & tapered.
Missed break & stumbled, rousted on rail to settle near rear, niggled 500m & driven into stretch, plodded on same speed.
Restrained from widest gate to race at tail, shifted 3 deep & driven 550m, unable to make noticeable inroads, never a factor.
Tardy start, raced near rear 1 off with cover, driven into stretch, found little in tame run to wire.
Bustled at break to race rail fore of midfield, driven 520m, plugged on for even inroads.
Speedy break & initially bustled in 2nd, led 1off 920m, clear & to rail 780m, pressed & driven 430m, headed 350m, rallied to nick win on nod.
Slow start & rousted initially to race 2nd last, niggled along, driven final turn, struggled in weak run home.
Dashed to lead on rail, headed 920m, 1L 2nd & shifted 1 off to challenge 520m, cruised upsides & driven to narrow lead 350m, unable to impose, emptied 50m & headed at post.
Broke well, restrained wide fore of midfield, soon rolled to clear 4th & slotted rail 800m, shifted 1 off 500m & driven 430m, kept on one pace.
Tardy start, raced rail behind midfield, niggled 800m & driven into stretch, boxing on when impeded 300m, one-paced thereafter.
Broke ok, sat fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven 520m, boxed on dourly for minor late headway.
Smart start, restrained to handy rail berth & overraced, shifted out & driven home turn, boxed on one-pace, drifted & checked off heels140m, plugged on.
Taken back from wide gate to race 1 off near tail, niggled along, under pump 500m, struggled in run home.
Snagged start & crossed to rail near rear, overraced 870m, shifted out turning in & driven, checked inside 300m, stayed on for minor late headway.
Broke well & bustled from wide gate, raced handy 3deep no cover, niggled 600m, hard-ridden into stretch, emptied 300m & weakened.
Speed to lead, clear & to rail 880m, 2L clear turning in, shaken up 360m, all out & headed 230m.
Prominent at break, soon outpaced & bustled to settle rail fore of midfield, ridden 450m & quickened to lead 230m, all out & headed 50m.
Tardy start, niggled rail back of midfield until bustled forward a spot 950m, driven into stretch, gradual closer to claim 3rd.
Taken back to settle 4th last 1 off, switched 3 deep 650m & shaken up 420m, switched inside & checked off heels 300m, quickened smartly, led 50m.
Taken back at start to behind midfield 3 wide no cover, advanced 700m, driven widest in stretch, kept on evenly.
Smart break & prominent, eased back 1200m to handy 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven 430m, one-paced & checked 180m, no extra.
Outpaced & soon 2L detached at tail, close up turning in & driven, plugged on past beaten rivals.
Started ok, raced midfield on rail, edged 1 off 1000m, shifted out final turn & driven, switched inside 350m, not clear run 300m, one-paced.
Sharp break, raced 2nd 1 off no cover, 2L down & shaken up turning in, soon hard-ridden, emptied 320m & faded.
Moderate start & bustled widest, slotted fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shuffled back a spot 880m, ridden wide on turn, emptied 300m, impeded 250m & faded.
Eased back, travelled 7L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, hampered 400M, made ground steadily thereafter.
Raced in front of midfield, 2-3/4L off 3 wide without cover, harmed by the fast pace, dropped off gradually.
Initially at the rear but improved to midfield rounding turn, never looked likely in the Straight.
Travelled just behind midfield, 4-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, finished off nicely when cleared at 350M.
Slow start and at the rear, 6-3/4L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, benefited by the fast tempo but one paced home.
Ridden forward to take the rail and led at quick sectionals, kept on going to the line and scored by 2L.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/4L behind but trapped wide and without cover, slight dash before 200M only.
Settled just fore of midfield, 3-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, harmed by the fast pace but still ran on well for 4th.
No early speed and had to race in midfield 3-1/2L behind along the rail, not suited to the fast pace, did not threaten.
Settled towards the rear along the rail, 6L behind the leader, swung wide at the exit, checked at 400M, did not run on.
Raced just behind midfield, 4-1/2L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, run ended when taken out at 400M.
Rolled forward and raced 3rd 1 off, not suited to the quick tempo, remained in touch until couldn't find extra at 150M.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, despite not suited to the fast pace, stayed on gamely, only lost out on 2nd inside final 50M.
Shifted out abruptly at start and bumped, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished off strongly.
Shifted out and bumped at start, ridden to make up ground but tightened 1400m. Hampered 1200m when trying to improve, dropping behind midfield along fence. One-paced in straight.
First to jump, then ridden along inside pace makers, before settling 2nd, 2L from leader at 900m. Closed to within a half length passing 400m before tiring.
Jumped with field, not pushed, settling along fence in midfield. Switched wide on straightening and finished strongly to grab minor placing.
Jumped OK, allowed to stride forward at own pace, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Switched wide on entering straight and ran on strongly to win close home.
Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling towards rear in one-off position. Tired quickly soon after straightening and finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Steadied on jumping, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Taken very wide entering straight and ran on steadily to be closest at finish.

Pressed forward from wide draw to lead passing 1400m, pulling 2L clear 1000m before crossing to fence and slowing pace. Kicked ahead 400m and kept finding when challenged before losing in final strides.
Pressed forward, racing wide 2L from leader to turn. Rolled forward top of straight to look a chance 200m when steadied, then one-paced.
Began well, taken to box seat, then kept tabs on pacemakers to straight. Kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Outpaced soon after start, then taken to rail, settling at rear. Came off fence entering straight and kept on fairly under hard riding.
Began fairly, ridden to find cover but trapped wide and allowed to roll forward from 1400m, swooping around field to place 3rd passing 900m. Spent force on straightening and weakened gradually.
Ridden to hold forward position, settling one-back, one-off 3L from leader approaching turn. Rolled forward top of straight to look a chance before flattened final stages.
Settled down behind midfield along the rails, crept closer to pace home turn, came through inside 250M, quickly dashed to the front under top weight, kept on strongly to win in class record time.
Share lead on the inside, couldn't find extra when hard pressed 300M, shifted out abruptly near 200M, one paced towards the finish.
Shared lead on the outside, outsprinted mid-straight, faded final 150M.
Held up at the rear, stayed on moderately to go 3rd near finish, no impression on winner though.
Tracked leaders but caught 3-wide no cover throughout, kept on same pace in straight, no threat final 150M.
Waited with in the rear, challenged down outside passing 400M, ran on well to go 2nd 200M, couldn't get on terms with the impressive HELENE PARAGON.
Chased leaders, kept on steadily on straightening, held 3rd until concluding stages.
Settled down 3-4Ls near the tail, stayed on fairly final 300M, no threat to leaders.
Chased pace early on, shuffled back a bit middle stages but never too far off leaders, ran on only fairly from 400M, not reach contention.
Hard ridden to lead passing 1000m before headed 750m. Retook lead passing 600m, pulled clear 300m, caught passing 200m, battled gamely to hold down 2nd.
Jumped OK, no early pace, dropping to midfield along fence. Awkwardly placed turning for home, one-paced in straight.
Ridden early to get box seat then settled, sitting 2L behind fast pace set by joint leaders. Left fence 400m, strolled up quickly to take lead 200m, won eased down.
Crowded out soon after start, dropping to last and taken to fence. Made some progress around home turn but spent force on straightening.
Began well, sharing early pace but wide, before settling 2L behind leading pair entering final turn. Got shuffled back slightly turning for home and tired quickly soon after straightening.
Began fairly, then crowded, dropping to rear but kept away from fence. Last on entering straight before running past beaten horses.
Outpaced and soon at rear in one-off position. Crowded out making the turn at 900m but never competitive.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to settle in one-off position 3L from leaders. Bumped and unbalanced soon after entering straight, boxed on one-paced.
Not much early speed, settling towards rear but wide to turn. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished strongly to just miss a placing.
Began awkwardly, losing ground, settling towards rear along rail. Made some progress soon after straightening but one-paced final 200m.
Pushed forward from wide draw, racing outside leader before taking narrow lead from 750m to 600m. Battled on well to 300m before giving ground gradually.
Away well, ridden forward, settling close to rail 3-back from leaders. A little flat-footed top of straight before picking up momentum and flashing home for close 3rd.
Began awkwardly, ridden to make up ground, settling between horses behind midfield. Under pressure soon after entering straight, giving ground gradually.
Ridden to hold midfield position but kept wide mostly. Taken to centre field on straightening but found little under hard riding.
Fairly away, and eased forward early to sit around midfield, on the fence. Faded from the top of the straight, and not persevered with late.
Taken forward early to be handily placed 4th, 1 off the fence and 5L off the early leader. Ran steadily to the line late, but was no threat to those up front.
Settled around midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran steadily to the line late, but slightly 1 paced.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit last in the early stages, 10L off the leader. Went to run on early in the straight, but ran flat from the 300m and only hands and heels late.
Taken forward early and resisted temptation to take on the leader, settling clear 2nd, 2L behind. Challenged leader from the 400m, but took until 100m to get clear before clearing out late.
Pushed out early to lead by 2L up the back straight. Challenged at 400m, but didn't give up until peaking at 100m and fading. Just held onto 2nd late.
Taken forward early to be well placed 3rd, on the fence and 4L off the leader. Ran solidly in the straight, and catching 2nd towards the line.

OK early, finding a position just forward of midfield. Over raced when steadied at 1200m, and wide no cover from 1000m. Came off heels and very wide on turn. Nothing in the tank in the straight, easing late.
Eased forward early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Keen on heels from the 1000m. Came off heels and taken wider in the straight, before battling to the line fairly late.
Briefly crowded on jumping, but easily found his position just behind midfield, 1 off the fence. Only ran fairly to the line, and not used too much late.
Eased ahead early to sit forward of midfield, on the fence. Loomed up on the turn, but nothing came of it, and went to the line 1 paced under hands and heels.
Dropped to the rear of the field soon after jumping, and never in it.
Looked to press forward early, before dropping back to sit at the rear of the field, 3 wide. Bumped and taken to 4 wide no cover at 900m. Plugged away, making no inroads in the straight.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to loop behind the field and sit 3rd last, on the fence and 9L off the leader. Ran steadily in the straight, showing an OK turn of foot in the last 100m.
Checked start, raced at tail, 8 lengths back, improved after 600M, taken wide in straight and finished off very strongly to score narrowly.
Jumped well from a wide draw, showed early speed to take the lead, shared lead turning in, emptied early in straight, unacceptable performance.
Jumped well from gate 11, raced 2 wide in 5th, 3 wide turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away, raced 4 lengths or so back on rail, shifted out on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well from a tricky gate, raced 2 wide in midfield, shifted out after 800M and gradually improved, shared lead turning in, finished off evenly in straight.

Bumped start, raced 5 lengths back on rail at rear, saved ground on turn, made good progress in straight, severely checked near 50M and not able to be ridden out thereafter. (Lost right hind plate near 400M.)
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to position a length or so back on rail, there to turn, severely checked near 400M and got traffic, made no progress thereafter and eased final 100M.

Began well, raced 3 lengths back on rail, got its head up on a number of occasions when awkwardly placed close to the heels after 800M, dashed well early in straight and took the lead near 100M, just couldn't hold off the winner late.

Bumped start, raced 5Ls back at rear, travelled keenly and proved difficult to settle for some distance after 1000M, carried very wide on turn, made good progress early in straight, peaked and shifted in abruptly near final 50M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide at rear, carrier wider near 800M, gradually improved thereafter, dashed well early in straight, peaked near 100M, just stayed on to take 3rd.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced 2 wide in 2nd, shared lead turning in, peaked near 250M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Crowded out start, raced 3 wide without cover behind midfield, carried wider on turn, emptied early in straight.
Moderately away from a wide draw, positioned 1 out 1 back, same position on turn, no daylight early in straight, one-paced thereafter. (Dead-heat for 8th.)
Bumped start, raced 6 lengths back at rear, slightly improved after 600M, awkwardly placed near 350M, finished off evenly thereafter. (Dead-heat for 8th.)
Jumped fairly, settled in forward of midfield, came to challenge upon straightening but could only keep on steadily without quickening.
Settled in last few on rails, commenced move and snuck up on rails turning in, finished off race well to assert inside final 100 metres.
Broke well from a poor draw, travelled wide in midfield before drifting backward rounding home bend, dropped further back turning in, made no impression in straight.
Close up early before dropping to midfield travelling wide without cover around home bend, made no impression in the run home.
Soon taken back from the widest gate, waited with, made good progress on rails in straight, did best work late.
Began well and amongst leaders early, steadied to 4th just over 2L back coming onto home bend, soon shaken up and fought on steadily in straight, nearest at finish but never threatening.

Jumped only fairly but took up running after the first 200 metres, obtained rails run coming onto home bend setting a steady pace, kicked about 2L clear after straightening but unable to sustain effort and headed close stages.
Jumped awkwardly losing about 3L at the start, soon recovered to rear of midfield along rails, in similar position turning in, had no more to give in straight.
Ridden along from a wide gate racing wide without cover in midfield, widest runner around the bend and into straight, ran home one-paced down the centre of the track.
Broke well from the one draw, niggled along before ceded advantage to assume one-back position on rails coming onto home bend, faded gradually in straight.
Prominent when crowded and lost position early, soon given reminders to hold place in forward of midfield on rails, one-paced in straight.
Raced mainly 3-wide with leaders down far side, travelled just offside the leader around home bend, gave ground steadily in straight.
Soon dropped to the rear despite hard ridden early, remained well behind to home straight, ran home one-paced. (Roarer.)
Moderate beginning, settled just worse than midfield in 9th, pulled out off heels for steady progress from 300 metres out but hung in under pressure and a difficult ride throughout.
Hard ridden forward, sat outside the leader, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on well for 2nd.
Pushed early, at back, 3-4 wide, dashed well 300M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Settled in midfield, 3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Took rail and led easily, clocked slow sectionals, however soon dropped off 400M.
At back, harmed by the slow pace, trapped 4-5 wide, checked badly 300M, no progress.
Hard ridden to keep up behind midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow pace, lack room 400M, dashed well for 3rd.
Pushed early, at back, 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, checked severely 300M, ran on fairly.
Eased at start, took cover at rear, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 300M to score with some in hands.
At rear, trapped 4-5 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, no dash.
Hard ridden to occupy box seat, favoured by the slow tempo, run ended 200M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, 3 wide at back, not suited by the slow pace, blocked 400M, no progress when clear.
Hard ridden early but not muster, took rail at back, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash in straight.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, ran on until 200M flattened.
Very slow away, at rear, harmed by the slow tempo, dashed well 400M, lack room 200M.
Pushed to midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily without serious threats.
Sent forward to settle 1L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced until weakened 250M.
Taken back to rear, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, finished off strongly for 2nd, missed by 3/4L.
Taken back from a wide gate, trapped wide without cover throughout, never looked likely. (Questioned rider for disappointing performance)
Camped handy, however, hampered rounding the first turn, made no impression in straight.
Sent forward to take the fence from a wide gate, kept on until faded final 200M.
Camped handy initially, however, was checked badly rounding the first turn and lost about 2Ls, ran home strongly for 3rd, missed by 1L.
Rolled forward to settle in a prominent spot, 2Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on strongly to take the trophy by 3/4L.
Eased back, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 – 4 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Camped handy, despite travelled wide without cover, kept on nicely for 4th.
Settled worse than midfield about 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, one paced home.
Sharp start, stalked lead, shifted to fence 400m & driven in pursuit, rail run to lead 130m, punched out hands & heels.
Speed to lead until headed 800m, settled rail, niggled 450m, checked off heels 350m, driven & plugged on one pace.
Pacey break, tracked handily, niggled 500m, driven 450m, finished well to get 2nd.
Broke well, tracked pace, niggled 500m, driven 450m, boxed on determinedly, just missed frame.
Tardy start, raced back of pack on rail, shifted in for progress 400m, impeded 300m, recovered to rattle home for 3rd.
Missed break & raced last pair 6L detached from body, gradual progress to close late.
Tardy start & rousted initially, niggled behind midfield, under pump 450m, bumped rival & unbalanced 300m, tapered to wire.
Smart start, settled 1 off fence back of mid rank, bustled 430m, shifted in & driven 350m, stayed on for minor inroads.
Reared & lost ground, raced last pair 6L detached from main pack, unable to make inroads.
Broke well, tracked handy on outside rail, soon back to mid rank, shifted in 400m & tapped for toe, picked up but route blocked final 130m, not fully tested.
Broke ok, niggled centre track behind midfield, driven 500m, boxed on evenly.
Broke ok, raced rail back of midfield, overraced & checked 450m, driven 400m, plugged on one pace.
Fast start far-side, rolled to lead 800m, bustled across to rail & driven 380m, rolled off fence & headed 130m, tapered.
Smart break, camped 3 wide with cover midfield, cruised into stretch centre track, shaken up 300m, quickened to lead 100m, drew clear.
Lacked toe & bustled at tail, ridden along 500m, wide into stretch, forced wider 300m, stayed on for moderate gains.
Dropped in from wide gate to 3 wide with cover near rear, over-raced 1150m, driven wide home turn, stayed on for solid headway.
Speed wide to lead, to rail 1200m & joined, narrow advantage & shaken up turning in, all out & headed 250m, faded.
Sharp start but rousted & unable to hold spot, settled midfield 3 deep no cover, ridden home turn, buffeted in stretch, boxed on evenly.
Good start, settled rail midfield, niggled on turn, kept on for minor headway without threatening.
Started well, raced fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out turning in, tight for room, clipped 320m & unseated rider.
Taken back at break & raced rail behind midfield, crowded & bumped 400m, stayed on moderately.
Tardy start & bustled to midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 700m, hard-ridden 450m, gradual closer to make frame.
Moderate start, raced rail near tail, driven under pressure turning in, plodded on tamely.
Bustled forward to share lead 1 off, snagged back 1050m to park 1 back on rail, 3rd & shaken up turning in, emptied 250m.
Broke ok, bustled forward to share lead 3 deep, snagged 900m to race 1 back 1 off, under pressure 550m, weakened tamely.
Settled back 1 off with cover near rear, niggled 600m, under pressure when heavily impeded 320m, never a factor.
Broke ok, rolled 4 wide to front rank 1000m, pressed lead 1 off 800m, ridden to lead 250m, all out & headed 100m, no extra.
Parked outside the leader and always in touch, finished off gamely only to be beaten by a strong winner.
Taken back and remained the same, did not look likely.
Settled behind midfield, 4-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, made steady ground once cleared 250M.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, finished off only one paced.
Always at the back, never a factor.
Raced in midfield, 2-3/4L off along the rail, out of steam approaching 150M.
Raced just behind midfield, 3-3/4L off along the rail, made steady headway in the latter part of the Straight.
Travelled behind midfield, 6L behind 2 wide with cover, dashed strongly from 250M to score.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, kept on only one paced to the line.
Sent forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, headed approaching 100M, just hung on for 3rd.
Rolled forward to race prominently but trapped wide throughout, found nothing in the Straight.
Ridden forward and settled in one-off, one-back position, kept on steadily and just missed out on 3rd.
Travelled at the rear, never competitive.
Settled in midfield, 2-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, not competitive.
Badly crowded out at start, dropping to rear. Picked up momentum from 600m, inconvenienced passing 400m, shifted in 150m to get run, finished well.
Jumped OK, pressed forward along outer fence 5L from leader. Switched in 400m to get run before one-paced from 200m. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Began well, pressed forward, sitting behind pace but without cover and well away from outer fence. One-paced final 300m when put under pressure.
Outpaced early, dropping back. Long last passing 400m before taken to centre track and finished strongly to just miss out on a placing.
Began awkwardly, beaten for speed, dropping to near last 800m, taken to centre track passing 300m, finished strongly under whip to snatch second.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward on own down centre track to sit half a length behind leading pair 600m. Battled on gamely to hold fourth.
Got away nicely, pressed forward to share lead passing 650m. Under pressure passing 400m, kept on gamely until flattened 100m.
Badly crowded out start, dropping back. Driven forward between horses 4-away from outer fence before switching out 300m to get run. Pipped on post for 2nd.
Began OK, pressed forward, settling between horses 3L from leader. Lay out passing 800m, losing position gradually, eased out final 150m.
Jumped well, quickly in front, taken to outer fence 800m. Joined upfront 650m but kicked ahead 400m, went to the post unchallenged.
Began well, rolled forward between horses, settling 5L from leader. Lost position 500m, then one-paced.
Ridden early to hold forward position, settling 2L behind pace along outer fence. Under pressure passing 400m, steadied 200 when crowded, faded.
Jumped with field, taken to outer fence, settling behind midfield. Lost ground passing 600m dropping back gradually. Not pressed final 200m.
Jumped with field, ridden forward, settling 4L from leader but well away from outer fence. Kept on gamely final 200m without threatening.
Soon guided to the fence, settled behind mid-division, unable to quicken passing 350M, no impression.
Not mustered speed despite ridden along early, settled down 3-wide towards the rear, kept up effort till 200M, flattened.
Dropped back to the rear passing 1000M, 6Ls to make up 400M, closed off fastest but had too much to do and not able to threaten leaders.
Never far off, raced along the 3-path from wide draw, kept on mildly final 300M, not reached leaders.
From wide draw shifted across to a 3-wide spot in midfield, ran on well down outside, held by leaders final 100M.
Soon led and crossed to the fence 900M, set steady pace to straight, kept finding extra when challenged by rivals 200M, held on gamely.
Fractious in barriers, slow to begin, held up near the rear 6Ls off the pace, modest progress final 300M, never involved in the finish.
Close up behind leaders along the 2-path, fought on well final 250M, went 2nd 50M, shifted in late and just held by winner.
Settled in midfield 3Ls back on fence, travelled strongly behind leaders early straight but no clear run final 200M and not properly tested.
Eased back to near the rear 5Ls off the slow pace, gave limited response in straight, weakened 150M.
Caught wide early, moved forward to track leader, hung on to 2nd spot until 250M, soon no extra and faded towards the finish.
Strode forward chasing leaders but caught 3-wide no cover, gave ground passing 300M, weakened to last.
Tracked leader along the fence, loomed a strong threat 250M, held by winner in the run to the line, lost 2nd 50M and tightened for room concluding stages.
Held up in midfield along the 2-path, 3-4Ls off the pace 400M, stayed on fairly, not reached contention.
Jumped OK, ridden along behind horses to sit 3-wide behind the pace passing 800m. Under pressure from 600m and gave ground gradually.
Jumped with field but soon outpaced, dropping to rear close to fence. Switched out turning for home, picked up speed passing 300m and finished off nicely.
Began well, not pushed, settling midfield in one-off position. Given reminders top of straight, hit top gear 200m and finished strongly.
Began OK, ridden along but trapped wide and allowed to roll forward to sit 3-wide outside leader passing 800m. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded final 200m.
Quickly into stride, sharing early pace before easing one-back, one-off passing 1000m. Shaken up entering straight, battled on gamely to 100m when flattened.
Began well but eased back, dropping to last passing 1200m. Trailed field to straight, given reminders 400m, ran past beaten horses. Rider said did not stretch out.
Began fairly, pressed forward 3-wide to midfield, then 4-wide from 600m. Limited response when asked 400m and ridden hands and heels final 200m.
Began awkwardly, then hard ridden to make up ground along fence, settling behind midfield. Shaken up top of straight but spent force passing 200m and eased down.
Began well, pressed forward 3-wide before settling outside leader passing 950m. Hit front soon after straightening, looked winner 200m, run down final stages.
Pressed forward from start, taken to fence, settling behind the pace. Not much room top of straight, got clear run 300m, finished off nicely.
Taken back soon after jump, dropping to rear in one-off position. Not asked until straightening for home when taken to centre track and finished strongly while hanging in under pressure final 200m.
Aggressively ridden to lead on settling, crossing to fence 900m. Overtaken soon after straightening, kept on gamely to 200m before tiring.
Eased forward early to settle behind midfield, 1 off with plenty of cover. Came out away from heels when a run closed at 250m, and finished off well. Just peaked late, losing 3rd on the line.
Looked to press forward early, sitting 3rd but trapped wide with no cover. Only went to the line fairly in the straight.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to sit last, and never improved from there. Never in it.
Pushed straight to the lead from the inside draw to set his own tempo. Comfortably in front late, and went to the line without being challenged.
Taken up to sit 3 wide in midfield, before being forced 4 wide at the 750m. Came off heels at 400m, faded from that point and eased late.
Dropped back to the usual position at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Came wider on the turn and progressed steadily until the 200m, before flying home late and just missing 2nd on the line.
Pushed hard early to ensure he led, before easing off near the 1000m to sit a length off the leader. Had nothing left in the tank from the 350m, and dropped out quickly.
Slow into stride, looking to press forward to sit mid early before dropping back to settle at the rear of the field at 1000m. Plugged away to the line, picking up a few slower ones in the straight.
Eased forward early and initially near the back of the pack before moving forward at 800m to sit midfield, 2-3 wide. Never responded in the straight, and cruised to the line late.
Dropped back early from the wide draw and struggled to get in, stuck 3-4 wide at the back of the field with limited cover. Wider on the turn, but only went to the line fairly and was easing late.

Taken across to settle midfield, on the fence. Ran strongly for the majority of the straight, but couldn't match it with the winner. Started to wobble late, and just held off fast finisher to hold 2nd.
Taken up early to be handily placed in 4th, 1 off the fence. Ran home steadily, but slightly 1 paced and lost a placing late.
Taken forward early to be handily placed 5th, on the rail. Battled on gamely until the 100m, before peaking and fading out late.
Taken up early to eventually settle midfield, 1 off the fence. Plugged away 1 paced in the straight.
Settled in midfield, slightly worse around the bend, wide into straight, fought on steadily under pressure. (Lame) (Tactic questioned)
Crowded at start losing ground, niggled along behind midfield on rails, angled out for a run early in straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield on rails, ran on steadily under pressure in straight, never threatening.
Ridden along for pace early, settled just better than midfield far side, dropped out in straight.
Ridden along behind midfield without cover, widest runner turning in, minor interference 250 metres out, fought on.
Moderate start, worked his way forward to lead after first turn, obtained rails run in front on top of the Rock, led to 200 metres, tired badly. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
With leaders early settling just better than midfield in 4th some 3L back on rails, saved ground turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Broke well, taken back behind midfield, made good progress in straight, nearest at finish when tight between runners.
Ridden from a wide-ish gate, settled 2L back in 3rd, found nil under pressure in straight.
Taken to rear from the widest gate, remained well behind to straight, given reminders before straightening, ran on past beaten runners.
Settled behind from a wide gate, saved ground home turn, ran home one-paced.
Began well from the one gate, settled just off the speed on rails, came to challenge upon straightening, hit the front under pressure inside final 200 metres, held on.
Hard ridden early, settled in front of midfield, 2 wide, dash strongly 250M for 2nd.
At back, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200M.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, dashed well 200M.
Behind midfield, 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, lack turn of foot.
Hard ridden forward, took rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on well until 200M flattened.
Bumped start, held up behind midfield, 2 wide, raced very keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, never improved.
Pushed to occupy box seat, benefited by the slow sectionals, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Eased back, harmed by the slow pace, never a factor.
Took rail at back, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 150M.
Hard ridden early, 3 back along the fence, ran on strongly to the line for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, favoured by the slow sectionals, ran on until 250M flattened.
At rear, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, made no response in the Straight.
At rear, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never ran on.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, flattened badly rounding the Home Turn.
Ridden forward to take the fence and led by 1/2L, weakened badly soon after straightening.
Settled worse than midfield early, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, moved forward from 800M, kept on well for 2nd.
At back, travelled 4Ls behind the leader along the fence, made ground steadily for 4th.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dropped off rounding the Home Turn.
Eased back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in Straight.
Raced midfield, traveled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, switched wide turning in, ran on strongly to score by 2-1/4Ls.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, kept on one paced and weakened final 150M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, moved forward from 800M, kept on well for 3rd.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 3 wide without cover, kept on only fairly and weakened final 150M.
Broke through gate before start and reloaded. Hard ridden to lead, racing wide till crossing to fence 1400m. Set good pace to 200m when flattened and eased down.
Hard ridden early to hold forward position but held 3-wide ahead of midfield and without cover after 1000m. Turned very wide, boxed on one-paced.
Vigorously ridden to hold forward position, settling fourth 4L from leader entering back stretch. Swung wide entering straight, rolled forward to look a chance 50m, caught on line.
Got away nicely, sharing early pace before settling in box seat passing 1300m. Under pressure from 500m but boxed on fairly to 200m before giving ground rapidly.
Steadied soon after jump, taken across behind runners, settling at rear in one-off position. Under pressure turning for home, ran on fairly.
Jumped with field, taken in approaching first turn, settling in one-off position 4L from leader. Taken out turning for home, bumped soon after straightening, ran on fairly.
Jumped OK, not rushed, settling 4L behind leader in one-off position. Bumped shortly after straightening, boxed on one-paced.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, racing three-wide until settling second in one-off position back stretch. Boxed on gamely in straight until running out of steam final 150m.
Began OK, taken back and crossed to rail in last place 1400m. Improved position slightly back stretch, got inside run in straight, looked a chance final 100m before swamped.
Jumped with field, racing wide till getting cover behind midfield approaching first turn. Blocked for run turning for home, switched out 250m, got split 200m, finished strongly to win close home.
No early pace and last passing 1300m. Trailed field to straight when ran on fairly to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly unbalancing rider, quickly taken to fence behind midfield and switched off. Taken out turning for home, rolled forward to momentarily hit the front before swamped.
Flat-footed at start, ridden to make up ground, settling in box seat. Disappointed for run 500m, blocked top of straight, switched out 180m to get run, boxed on.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, racing wide 2L from leader. Taken 3-wide turning for home, hit front momentarily in straight, turning one-paced final 200m.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners, dropping to rear in one-off position. Last passing 800m, last into straight, ran past beaten runners.
Eased after jumping and shifted across behind runners but kept wide at rear. Rolled forward passing 500m but only one-paced in straight under hard riding.
Jumped OK, outpaced, dropping towards rear along fence. Improved slightly back stretch, got inside run in straight, but found nothing under pressure. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Bumped and unbalanced start, taken to rail, settling 4L from leader. Got inside run in straight and ran on well to grab minor lacing.
Vigorously ridden to lead on settling. Set decent pace to turn, collared entering straight, kept on fairly to 150m before tiring.
Ridden to hold forward position, settling 1L behind leader in one-off position. Rolled forward turning for home, hit front 400m, tired quickly passing 200m.
Crowded and lost ground at start, dropping to rear. In last pair from 900m, last soon after straightening, finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Began well, ridden forward, settling midfield in one-off position. Began forward move 500m, four-wide into straight, hit front 200m, won comfortably.
Steadied soon after start, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Raced fiercely passing 800m, three-wide final turn, taken to centre track and finished off nicely.
First out but eased out of pace battle, settling 5th 4L from leader. Came under pressure 500m out, did not respond and spent force 300m out. Had slight wounds back of right hind leg.
Initially in midfield but improved to be more prominent along the Back Straight, one paced home thereafter.
Niggled forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, kept on until weakened and headed 150M.
At the back, 6-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, made nice ground despite passing some tiring runners only.
Raced at the rear, 6-1/2L behind along the rail, made good ground in the Straight.
Rolled forward to take box-seat and remained upon entering the Straight, however, soon weakened 250M.
In midfield, 4-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, not competitive in the Straight.
Raced towards the rear, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, finished off strongly but missed out by a nose.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L off along the rail, kept on well to come home for 4th.
Slotted into midfield, 4L off the pace 2 wide with cover, little response and finished off one paced.
Urged forward and sat outside the leader through to 150M, then led but headed 100M, ran on to take 3rd.
Always at the rear, never a factor.
Slotted in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, kept going and clinched the win in a photo finish.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across, settling at rear close to rail. Switched out turning for home, made ground early in straight, turning one-paced final 100m.
Hard ridden to get forward position, taking over lead passing 900m. Swung wide entering straight, kept on gamely to 100m when swamped.
Taken back from wide draw, settling at rear in one-off position. Taken to fence turning for home, boxed on one-paced in straight.
Jumped well, outpaced, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Shaken up entering straight but found nothing.
Ridden along from an outside draw, racing three wide without cover in midfield until 800m when lost position. Switched in halfway up the straight and finished off fairly.
First out, pressed forward 3-wide to lead before overtaken by inside horse passing 900m. Stayed a half length behind leader to straight, boxed on gamely.
Quickly away, sharing early pace before settling one-back, one-off passing 900m. Switched out on straightening to make run but only one-paced.
Ridden early to hold forward position, racing wide to 800m when left without cover. Widest into straight, steadied passing 250m, one-paced.
Reared at start, losing several lengths. Trailed field to 600m when ran past a couple of runners before tiring soon after straightening and falling back.
Eased back soon after jumping and taken to rail, four-back from leader. Improved position 800m, had clear run in straight, made ground to 200m before tiring.
Began well but not pushed, easing to midfield in one-off position. Taken 4-wide turning for home, taken to centre track on straightening and finished strongly to win pulling clear.
Quickly away, shared early pace before settling in box seat. Got clear run entering straight when leader swung wide, co-leader 100m, unable match winner final strides.
Taken back from wide barrier, soon became detached from the field, never got back to contention.
Chased leaders along the 2-path, stayed on well for 3rd without threatening first 2.
Never far off from pace, 3-wide with cover, lay in when placed under pressure in straight, kept on mildly without threatening first 2.
Held up behind midfield 4Ls off the pace, switched wide 500M and made rapid progress on the outer, produced sustained effort to lead 70M out, well on top at the finish.
Held up in midfield 3-4Ls back along the rail, not quickened under pressure, no impression.
Slightly slow out, waited with in 2nd last 7Ls off the pace, switched widest 300M, ran on moderately.
Well placed behind leaders along the rail, hit lead 200M, continued on well but just couldn't hold off fast finishing winner final stages.
Pushed along from draw 9, unable to cross and caught 3-wide no cover throughout, run ended passing 200M.
Settled down behind midfield 4Ls back, switched to clear 250M, some late headway without ever threatening.
Made some use early stages to find the lead from wide draw, led to 250M then weakened rapidly to last.
Outpaced early stages, crept closer home turn, some progress final 250M but not reached leaders.
Strode forward chasing leader, unable to quicken passing 300M, faded mid-straight.
Well there early, dropped out under pressure from half-way out.
Dwelt at start, not far off early stages, drifted backward to midfield half-way out, no further impression.
Jumped awkwardly, never far off racing near the centre of the track, came to challenge under pressure 400 metres out, outsprinted by the winner inside final 100 metres.
Settled well behind after beginning from the one draw, one-paced under pressure.
Jumped fairly, lost touch after the 600 metres, shifted in to the centre of the track coming onto course proper but made no progress.
Slow out, in last few early, soon picked up to just over 2L off the pace near the centre of the track, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Broke well from a low draw settling just off the pace with cover, hampered and switched off heels 400 metres out, kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began well from the middle draw, raced amongst leaders before drifted backward approaching course proper, one-paced under pressure in the run home.
Held up in forward of midfield, shifted in towards to the centre of the track for short-lived effort coming onto course proper, no extra inside final 200 metres. (Bled)
Close up early on stands rails, shifted back to about 3L off the paces while hanging in coming onto course proper, kept on to finish.
Soon took up running near stands rails, held narrow advantage most of way before drawing clear inside final 100 metres, won comfortably.
Jumped awkwardly and gradually dropped to tail-end, found nil in the run home.
Shared pace while racing ungenerously at times, dropped out from 400 metres out.
Quickly taken across from a low draw to stands side in rear of field, commenced move inside final 200 metres but could not find much room closing stages.
Settled just of the leader, 2 wide, benefited by the slow tempo, closed off strongly 300M with some in hands.
Midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, no dash in straight.
Pushed to take rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on well until 200M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Eased to sit in midfield, raced very wide, harmed by the slow pace, never improved.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, favoured by the slow sectionals, just held ground in final furlong.
Pushed to keep up in midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, not suited by the slow pace, ran on fairly.
Eased back, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, lack room 400M, little dash 300M.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, ran on well for 3rd.
Hard ridden to hold the rail behind midfield, harmed by the slow tempo, no turn of foot.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, dashed strongly 300M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to rear, 2-4 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, ran on ok in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, dashed well to score by a short head.
Settled worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, finished off well for 4th.
Eased back as usual, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast sectionals, made no impression in straight.
Rolled forward to take the lead along the fence at fast sectionals, kept on strongly until headed by the winner over the last couple of strides.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite the fast pace, kept on one pace until weakened final 250M.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, never ran on.
Settled worse than midfield, however, trapped very wide without cover throughout, weakened soon after straightening.
Camped handy, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, flattened 300M.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader along the fence, dashed well for 3rd.
Camped handy, however, under pressure rounding the Home Turn, never looked likely.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, unable to show any dash in straight.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, harmed by the fast tempo, flattened soon after straightening.
Rolled to occupy the box seat, despite harmed by the fast sectionals, kept on nicely.
Tardy break & bustled initially to 1 off back of midfield, niggled 520m & driven 450m, staying on when checked for running 180m, not tested thereafter.
Taken back to 4 wide no cover back of midfield, very wide into stretch & shaken up 350m, rattled late to nick 3rd.
Rousted from gate to lead, eased & headed 1100m, sat close 2nd 1 off with cover, driven to press final turn, outpaced from 350m, battled on evenly.
Smart start, sat 1 back 1 off, niggled 700m, soon under pump, faded out in stretch.
Tardy start, parked fore of mid rank 3 wide with cover, driven 4 wide turning in, ran on centre track to closing 2nd, held at wire.
Slow start & bustled to rail back of midfield, overraced 850m, driven 350m, outpaced & plugged on.
Dropped to rail at tail from wide gate, switched out final turn, ridden 350m, checked off heels 220m, stormed late, just missed frame.
Good break, camped 1 back on rail, overraced 850m, shaken up 350m, boxed on evenly & not clear running final strides.
Taken back from wide gate to last pair 1 off, shifted out & driven home turn, kept on one pace.
Broke ok, bustled mid rank & rolled to 3rd 3 wide no cover 800m, niggled under pressure 650m, soon driven, boxed on dourly until faded final 100m.
Tardy start, taken back to 3 wide with cover back of midfield, driven wide home turn, ran on to press for minors.
Bustled forward to lead 1100m & snagged rail, shaken up when pressed 400m, kicked 1L clear, all out to hold on at wire.
Slow start & taken to rail, settled back of midfield, switched out & ridden into stretch, one-paced in run.
Broke with others, raced midfield 3 wide no cover until shuffled back a spot & niggled 750m, driven 500m, bumped 320m, boxed on for minor headway.
Smart break widest, soon outpaced & bustled wide in midfield without cover, under pump turning in, found nil & faded.
Broke ok, raced rail midfield, shaken up 450m to close behind lead, shifted 3 deep for run 150m, closed fast & late.
Lacked pace & rousted, soon in rear, checked 1100m, niggled along 4 wide with cover, widest home turn, plodded on tepidly.
Speed wide & crossed to park 2nd 1off no cover, slipstreamed leader from 800m, shifted out & cruised to lead 340m, shaken up 300m & duelled to wire.
Smart start, settled 4th 1 off, no cover from 900m & niggled, under pump 500m, progress to challenge 300m, tight duel, just failed.
Broke ok, lacked toe & gradually drifted back on rail to tail 750m, soon niggled, found nil in tame run.
Taken back to rear, overraced & checked 1100m, switched widest no cover & advanced to back of midfield, driven very wide home turn, found nil.
Broke well, niggled along in 3rd on rail, shifted 3 deep home turn, tapered in run home.
Smart start, restrained 1220m to midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven home turn, stayed on solidly.
Speed to lead on fence, raced 1.5L clear, headed & shaken up 340m, emptied & faded.
Started ok, snagged back to race 3 wide with cover near rear, switched out & driven 420m, kept on moderately.
Started moderately, settled back 1 off with cover near rear, driven into stretch, shifted out & bumped rival 320m, plugged on dourly.
Eased back to sit near the rear, 7-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Pushed to assume the lead, one horse off the rail, weakened badly near 300M.
Settled in midfield, 3L behind along the rail, battled for lead over final 250M, just a head short on the line.
Niggled forward before settling into box-seat, went head to head battle to the line, all out to just score.
Raced prominently, 1-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, found nothing and finished off one paced.
Raced behind midfield, 5-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, switched widest in the Straight, ran on well for 3rd.
Sent forward and sat inside the lead before assuming lead rounding turn, weakened and headed passing 200M.
Trapped wide just in front of midfield, soon dropped off after straightening.
Travelled in midfield, 2-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, no dash but kept on going to the line.
Slow start and remained at the back, never a factor.
Sat towards the rear, 6-3/4L behind along the rail, not competitive in the Straight.
Began fairly, ridden forward between horses, settling one-off in midfield. Lost position passing 850m, urged forward turning for home, ran on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.
Began fairly, over-raced early before settling between horses at the rear. Switched out soon after straightening to make run but only one-paced.
A little slow to muster, scrubbed up along fence to sit 2L behind leader passing 1200m. Came off rail 400m to challenge but unable to make ground on first two.
Began well, pressed forward behind leading pair, then taken 3-wide outside leaders passing 1200m. Started to give ground around home turn and plodded home in straight.
Quickly into stride, shared pace before easing a half length behind and outside leader. Shaken up to challenge on straightening but unable close gap on winner.
Jumped well, shared pace before pulling a half length ahead passing 1200m. Quickened pace turning for home and kept finding more when strongly challenged up the straight.
Hampered at start, ridden forward between horses settling behind midfield. Lost position passing 1200m, shuffled back passing 600m, struggled on to 200m before dropping out. Unacceptable performance.
Ridden along early, settling between horses 3L from leader. Had every chance on straightening but only one-paced final 200m.
Bumped from behind shortly after jump and unbalanced. Shifted in, three-wide at rear. Swung widest into straight and boxed on one-paced under hard riding.
Allowed to stride forward from outside draw, racing wide till getting cover passing 1200m. Taken 4-wide around home turn. Boxed on one-paced in straight.
Began OK, eased and taken to fence 4L from leader passing 1200m. Stayed on rail entering straight, boxed on one-paced.
Shifted out and bumped soon after start, then taken in, eventually settling along rail at rear passing 1200m. Under whip on straightening but made no headway.
Bustled along after the start, not mustered pace soon ended up in last over 10Ls off leader, never involved.
Dwelt slightly, 7-8Ls off the pace towards the rear, limited response turning home, not reached leaders.
Settled behind midfield, pushed along 500M, took time to get going, hit top gear final 200M, went 2nd late stages without ever threatening to runaway winner.
Held up in mid-division, not quickened to challenge leaders, never threatened.
Held up 5Ls back in midfield, no response when niggled along 500M, weakened 250M. (See Racing Incident)
Close up behind pace but 3-wide no cover to straight, ran on same pace final 300M, no threat to leaders.
Moved up along inside, raced keenly when crossed by rival, tracked leader 2 wide from 900M, gradually outpaced by winner in straight, held 2nd till late stages.
Eased back to rear, well off the pace middle stages, never reached contention.
Tracked leaders, every chance final turning home, kept on fairly and unable to make ground on first 2, lost 3rd 70M.
Aggressively ridden from wide barrier to find the lead, set steady pace to straight, found extra when pressed and soon extended its lead, well in control final 200M.
Jumped fairly, pressed forward along rail to share lead passing 1200m. Moved a half left clear 800m, caught passing 300m, boxed on to 100m before fading.
Ridden along from outside draw but didn't muster, eased, shifted across behind horses and last passing 1000m. Not much room top of straight, taken to centre track 200m and finished well.
Jumped well, pressed forward in one-off position before sliding into box seat passing 1000m. Tailed leader to straight, got split 250m to look a chance before losing narrowly in three-way finish.
First out from widest draw, shared pace to turn before dropping a half-length back passing 800m. Urged forward 420m, hit front 350m, fought off strong challenges for narrow win.
Began OK, raced wide in midfield before losing position quickly passing 1000m. In last pair around turn, found nothing in straight when asked.
Got away nicely, shared pace before easing one-back, one-off 800. Shaken up top of straight, battled on gamely to look a chance 200m, snatched up final stride when crowded out.
Unable match early pace, dropping towards rear but three-wide. Taken four-wide entering straight, urged forward under hard riding, crowded out 200m, kept on fairly. Lame left front leg.
Taken back soon after start and shifted closer to rail before picking up speed. Taken very wide in straight and powered home down centre track while hanging in to just fail.
Began fairly, picked up speed along rail to settle behind midfield 1200m. Blocked for run on entering straight, got split 260m, battled on gamely.
Began OK, ridden but unable to hold position, dropping to behind midfield in one-off position. Took inside run in straight and boxed on gamely.
Began fairly, pressed forward between horses 3L from leader. Shaken up passing 400m, tightened 250m, crowded out 200m, faded, Lame right front leg.
Jumped with field, pressed forward three-wide but only 3L from leader. Kept wide around turn, rolled forward top of straight to look a chance before running out of steam 200m.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit at the back of the field, 2-3 wide. Awkward on heels 700m. Finishing off well late, before running onto heels at 100m and again 50m and not fully tested.
Settled forward of midfield, 1 off the fence early. Loomed up from 400m, and showed good turn of foot to kick clear from 200m. Slightly weak late and just held out fast finishing 2nd.
Kicked well early and pushed up to be well placed, 2nd/3rd on the rail. Nosed in front at 400m, before losing it at 200m. Battled OK to the line, and just lost 3rd placed dual late.
Cruised forward early to sit midfield, on the rail. Briefly held up at the top of the straight. Ran home well late, and was still gaining on those on front towards the line.
Eased forward early to settle worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran fairly to the line without making any inroads.
Dropped back early to sit at the back of the field, on the rail. Held up briefly at the top of the straight, before coming wider and running on steadily, without making too much impact.
Pushed up to challenge early for the lead, before dropping back to 2nd at the 1300m, 1 off the fence. Dropped out quickly from the 400m, and not persevered with over the last 200m.
Pushed out early to make sure he led. Used up early and had nothing left in the straight, dropping out quickly from 400m.
Dropped back early, settling towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence with cover. Wide on the turn. Stayed on OK in the straight, without threatening a place.
Taken up early, eventually settling 5th, on the rail. Plugged away solidly in the straight, but slightly 1 paced late.

Began well and cruised up early to be handily placed 4th, 1 off the fence. Loomed up at 350m, but didn't have a huge kick. Slightly 1 paced late, and wasn't able to match the pace of the winner, and lost 2nd in the last 50m.
Found a position midfield, 1 off the fence early. Gave nothing in the straight and eased out late. Vet reported blood in trachea.
Checked on jumping, got back and settled at the tail of the field. Widest on the turn and only went to the line fairly, picking up a few slower ones late.

Dropped back behind the field early, looping around to sit behind midfield, on the rail. Ran strongly over the last 300m, and gathering momentum late. Chasing down winner last 150m and only just ran out of room.
Worked from the widest gate to reach 3L 5th wide in back straight, gained 3rd when a similar distance from race leader entering home straight, faded gradually.
Towards the rear, made no impression in straight.
