Hard ridden from the one draw, settled in 3rd on rails just over 2L off the pace, dropped out in straight.
Tracked the leader, fought doggedly to prevail inside final 200 metres.
Always well behind, never seen with a chance and very wide into straight. (Lame)
Settled well behind, circled the field around the bend to reach distant 5th entering straight, soon faded.
Drawn wide and raced wide in midfield to straight, made no impression.
Waited with in rear, given reminders turning in, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield, came under pressure turning in, soon faded. (Epiglottic entrapment)
Ridden positively from a wide gate to soon take up running, set a smart pace down far side, unable to sustain effort and worn down passing the 200 metre mark.
Settled behind midfield, switched off rails for a run turning in, kept on steadily.
Settled just better than midfield in 4th to straight, folded up quickly. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Settled in forward of midfield on rails, kept on without quickening.
Always in last few, raced wide without cover down back straight, never a danger. (Lame)
Hard ridden forward, trapped 4 wide in the lead without cover, held ground in straight.
Pushed early, took box seat, lack room 400M, closed off strongly when clear for 2nd.
Eased at start, took rail at back, harmed by the slow tempo, never improved.
Hard ridden but not muster, behind midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no dash.
Midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow pace, ran on well to the line despite rider lost the use of his stirrup iron after 250M.
Very slow away, at rear, raced 3-4 wide, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Settled 1 out 1 back, raced strongly throughout, drifted away 300M without being fully tested.
Pushed forward, just off the leader 2 wide, favoured by the slow sectionals, soon flattened 200M.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 300M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Behind midfield, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot.
Slow away, midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on ok.
At rear, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Pushed to settle in a prominent spot, weakened badly rounding the Home Turn.
Failed to muster early, made an early move to park outside the leader along the back straight, hampered soon after straightening, weakened thereafter.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Pushed to midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well to score by a short head.
Sent forward to park outside the leader from a wide gate, kept on nicely for 3rd despite hampered by the riderless runner near 200M.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, finished off strongly for 2nd, missed by a short head.
Soon after the start blundered badly and rider was dislodged.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and share the lead, checked badly soon after straightening, weakened thereafter.
Rolled to occupy the box seat, dropped off shortly after straightening.
Settled worse than midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, finished off strongly for 4th. (Questioned for riding)
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced home.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on gradually.
Taken back, travelled 5Ls behind the leader along the fence, never ran on.
Vied for early lead, soon niggled & unable to hold position, 5th & scrubbed along 450m, weakened out.
Speed to vie for initial lead on rail, soon nudged along under pressure, 4th & driven 400m, drifted in & boxed on evenly.
Broke well enough but settled rear rank, driven 400m, closed off to nick 3rd.
Tardy break, tracked mid rank stands' side, driven 400m, chased down rail to claim 2nd, always held.
Good break, sat handily centre track, shaken up 350m, found nil in weakening run.
Speedy start & led centre track 750m, soon clear & edged stands' side, driven out 450m, drifted back to centre but in command.
Moderate start, bustled along mid pack, driven 400m, plugged home tepidly.
Broke ok, crowded early strides, raced near tail, under pump 750m, never a factor.
Broke with others, raced rear rank down inner, ridden under pressure 500m, plugged on one pace.
Slow start & bustled on rail, raced rear rank, hard-ridden 300m, plodded on same speed.
Broke well, raced handily, progress to 2nd 350m, tapered & edged out of frame close home.
Broke with others, niggled along near rear, driven 550m, boxed on evenly for moderate headway.
Started ok, bumped & unbalanced early strides, rear & taken to stands' side, tight for room 550m, last & driven 400m, kept on for minor inroads.
Speed out in track, raced prominently, vied for 2nd & niggled 400m, hard-ridden 3rd 300m, tapered out.
Rolled forward to lead 4 wide 1180m, to rail 850m, 0.5L ahead & shaken up 350m, quickened 1L clear, emptied final 50m & headed.
Tardy start, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield, driven very wide final turn, stayed on moderately stands' side.
Fast start wide, snagged to race fore of mid & trapped 3 wide no cover, overraced, shaken up 400m, tapered out centre track.
Started ok but soon outpaced, niggled midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven home turn, plodded on evenly centre track.
Bustled to lead, headed 1180m & snagged back to rail 2 back, shifted out to 3rd turning in & driven, boxed on dourly.
Lacked early toe, settled 3 wide with cover midfield, shifted wider home turn, struggled in run to wire.
Broke well, raced fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out final turn & driven, closed centre track to nick 2nd.
Broke ok & urged forward, niggled 3rd 1 off no cover, under pump 520m, 3 deep on turn, wilted tamely early in stretch.
Outpaced initially & rousted to settle midfield on rail, driven into stretch, kept on evenly.
Smart start wide, taken back to rear of main group 1 off with cover, shifted wide on turn for progress, hard-ridden 300m, charged down centre, just got there.
Good break, pushed forward on rail to vie for lead, settled 1 back 2nd 850m, shifted 1 off 700m, pressed lead turning in but outpaced, swamped close home.
Missed break & long way detached at tail, bustled & closed to within 2L of pack 450m, driven wide in run, never a factor.
Missed break & 2L detached 2nd last on rail, tagged on at 600m, plodded on one pace.
Slow break & bustled, raced rail back in field, minor inroads into stretch, kept on for minor headway.
In behind midfield along the rail, 3L behind the leader, run interrupted at 250M when running into tiring runners.
Settled in midfield, 2L behind 2 wide with cover, kept on one paced to the line for 4th.
Always at the rear, never a factor.
Pushed forward and sat outside the leader, stayed in touch early in the Straight but out of steam near 200M.
Crowded start before settling in behind midfield, 3-1/4L off 3 wide with cover, unleashed strongly from 350M to score.
Sent forward to take the rail and led by 3/4L, headed approaching 250M and failed to close off.
Rolled forward and tracked the leader in box-seat, looked likely from 200M but couldn't hold on and missed by a head.
Eased to sit towards the rear, 3-1/2L behind 4 wide with cover, improved slightly around turn, ran on well for 3rd.
Travelled in front of midfield, 1-3/4L off but trapped very wide, found nothing and dropped off badly at 150M.
Taken back and raced at the rear, 4-1/2L behind 4 wide with cover, ran on but passed tiring runners only.
Sent forward 3 wide to race outside the leader, remained in touch until weakened gradually passing 200M.
Raced in midfield, 2-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, awkwardly placed near 200M, one paced thereafter.
Began fairly, ridden but slow to muster, settling behind midfield one-away from outer fence. Hard ridden from 500m but only one-paced.
Began well, ridden to hold forward position 3L behind leading trio. Switched in 450m to move forward, joint leader 200m, battled on gamely, losing in final strides.
Jumped OK, raced on own down centre track behind midfield to 300m when under pressure. One-paced.
Began well, pressed forward to lead on settling, before slipping a half-length behind leading pair 700m. Under pressure from 300m, lay out and difficult to ride final 200m, faded.
Began awkwardly, bumped, dropping to last. Trailed field to 500m, switched in to get run and ran on fairly close home.
Began fairly, ridden but didn't muster, dropping to rear. Struggled to hold position from 500m, one-paced. Rider reported was never comfortable.
Quickly into stride along outer fence, sharing pace with two others before taking clear lead passing 500m. Collared 200m but kept on gamely to hold minor placing.
Bumped start, shifted out and bumped again, dropping to rear. Shuffled back to last passing 400m, plodded home.
Began fairly. Picked up speed between horses, settling midfield. Under hard riding from 400m but only one-paced.
Got off nicely, showing good speed to sit 3L behind leading trio on settling. Shaken up 350m and kept on gamely.
Quickly into stride, sharing early pace to 700m before edging ahead slightly. Under pressure passing 450m, giving ground gradually before tiring quickly final 150m.
Bumped start, pressed forward before switching out 850m, settling 4-wide 3L from leader. Urged forward 300m, hit front 200m, pulled clear close home.
Bumped start, ridden along between horses, settling midfield 3-away from outer fence. Put under pressure from 300m and kept on fairly.
Began fairly, ridden but outpaced, dropping towards rear between horses. Switched in 350m to make run but spent force passing 100m and faded quickly.
Crowded for room at the start, ended up near last 7Ls off the pace, had nothing to offer final 400M. Never involved.
Prominent behind leaders, well placed to strike at 400M, moved up to lead 250M, kept responding when pressed by rivals both sides, headed late stages.
From draw 1 pushed forward sharing lead, led to 250M, weakened towards the line.
Raced along the 3-path towards the tail of the field, not quickened when placed under pressure, no impression.
Held up 2-wide in mid-division, stayed on evenly over final 400M but not reach leaders.
Positively ridden from widest gate, shared lead on outside from 900M, no extra 350M, soon weakened.
Failed to muster speed despite ridden along from draw 11, ended up 3-wide in midfield, kept on same pace entering straight, faded final 150M.
Never far off from pace, in 4th rounding home turn, closed off well on straightening, went 2nd 200M and strongly pressed leader, held final stages and lost 2nd close home.
Placed ahead of midfield, in touch 3Ls off the pace turning in, responded well early straight and had every chance, well held by leaders final 150M.
Caught 3-wide without cover in mid-pack, dropped out 350M, soon eased when no chance.
Taken across behind runners from 13, 7-8Ls off the pace in the rear pair, brought wide on straightening but lacked a finishing response.
Settled down along the rails 4Ls back in midfield, travelled smoothly to straight, moved out into clear 350M and chased leaders strongly, got up late stages.
Eased back and not hurried early stages, guided to the fence 8Ls back in the rear, picked up pace turning in making good progress along inside, shifted out 100M and continued on well to the line.
Towards the rear along the rails, ran on fairly over final 300M, not reach contention.
Jumped with field, took time to pick up speed, getting to within 2L of leader passing 600m. Urged forward 400m to look a chance but unable match first two closing stages.
Bumped start, pressed on between horses to sit fourth along inside fence, 2L from leader. Under pressure from 300m and faded.
Began well, pressed forward to sit 2L between leading pair at halfway mark. Hard ridden from 300m but faded gradually.
Quickly away, raced on own down inside track, 2L from leader. Shaken up 400m, kept on well to 100m before flattened.
Began well, sharing early pace before sitting clear second inside leader. Kept pace to 400m when ran out of steam and faded gradually.
Began OK, allowed to slide forward to lead on settling and taken to outside fence. Under pressure passing 150m, joined up front 100m, edged out close to line.
Began well, ridden to hold forward position 3L from leader. Got shuffled back 700m, taken out 300 but unable get clear running and not fully tested.
Began best, not pushed, settling 2L behind leader passing 700m. Shaken up 400m, battled on gamely without looking dangerous.
Got off OK but beaten for early speed, dropping to rear along outside fence. Switched in 200m to get clear running and finished off nicely.
Jumped OK, taken quickly to outside fence before switching in again passing 600m. Gradually picked up speed between horses and ran on steady.
Ridden along behind early pace before losing position 800m. Kept on gamely between horses, under whip from 300m, one-paced.
Began well, switched out 850m, picked up speed between horses passing 600m, joint leader passing 100m, edged ahead for narrow win.
Began fairly, ridden along down centre track 4L from leader. Switched in passing 300m and ran on fairly.
Beaten for early speed and clear last passing 850m. Shaken up 400m and ran past beaten horses. Had small amount of blood in both nostrils but none in trachea.
OK away and taken up early to sit forward of midfield, 2-3 wide with cover. Maintained position until 300, but didn't respond to pressure and dropped out from there.
Taken forward early to be well place 3rd, on the rail. Only fair to the line, and easing late.
Settled forward of midfield on the fence. Came off heels at 900m. Plugged along OK in the straight without threatening.
Pushed forward early from the wide draw to challenge for the lead, before settling 2nd outside the leader. Progressed OK until the 150m, before running flat late.
Taken up early to be well placed in 4th, 1 off the fence. Didn't run on in the straight and 1 paced in the run home.
Taken forward early to be handily placed 5th, but stuck 3 wide and without cover after 900m. Ran on OK late, before being disappointed for runs at 150m and 100m and not persevering from that point.
Settled around midfield, 3 wide with cover. Hung down the straight, and proved difficult to ride out late.
Not pressed hard early, settling worse than midfield. Snuck along the rails to briefly lead at 150m. Ran well to the line and had no threat for 2nd, but had no response for the leader.

Blew the start, settling clear last 10L off the leader. Still last & 6L off the leader on the turn, before showing an enormous turn of speed to roll over the top of the field & win easily. Not used last 150m & still pulling away.
Didn't muster early, settling midfield, on the fence. Unsettled and checked off heels at 900m. Dropped back and made no further impression on the race.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to settle 2nd last. Cut the corner on the turn, but only plugged away 1 paced in the straight and eased up late.
Pushed forward from the outside draw to ensure he led by the 1000m. Ran strongly in the straight, but unable to match it with the first two.
Dropped back early to settle at the rear of the field. Held up from the top of the straight until 250m, before coming across heels for a run. Finished off strongly when clear.
Eased forward early to sit midfield, on the fence. Battled on gamely in the straight, just peaking late.
Moderate start, ridden and soon settled in 6th in midfield about 4L off the pace, switched out for a run entering home straight, one-paced. (Blood in trachea)
Began well from the widest gate, soon led obtaining rails run coming onto stables bend, held 1L advantage most of way, held on well under pressure in straight. (Questioned for improved performance)
Settled 2L back in 4th one off the rails, came under pressure approaching home turn, failed to quicken in the run home.
Broke well, taken back to race in 5th in midfield on rails, held similar position to home bend, gained 3rd 1.5L back on rails turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled towards the rear after beginning from a wide gate, commenced move rounding home turn, continued to come under strong pressure in straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, tracked the leader on rails, angled out for a run turning in but unable to draw level the length of the straight.
Sluggish at start, well behind early stages, headway far side to reach midfield leaving the Rock, yielded ground under pressure from home bend.
Soon dropped to last few, became last halfway out, no further impression.
Moderate start, settled behind midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, made modest headway without threatening.

Jumped fairly, vied for lead early before settling 1L back in 2nd one off the rails, unable to sustain effort and faded steadily under pressure from approaching home straight. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Slow away, hard ridden early but not muster, 2 wide at back, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, never nearer.
Midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, weakened 300M.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, unleashed strong finishing efforts 250M for 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, out of fuel 250M.
Bumped start, took rail at back, dashed strongly 250M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Pushed to take the rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 250M flattened.
Hard ridden to obtain a midfield spot 3 wide no cover, harmed by the slow pace, soon emptied 500M.
Bumped start, checked early, 2 wide at back, harmed by the slow pace, checked badly again 450M, ran on ok in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Harmed by the slow tempo, never competitive at rear.
Midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, never improved.
Settled in box seat, enjoyed by the slow sectionals, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Pushed forward to obtain the box seat, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Sent forward to take the lead along the fence, kept on until weakened badly final 250M.
At back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, made plenty of ground in straight.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made minor ground in straight.
Prominent, travelled 2.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, finished off nicely for 2nd, just beaten by a short head.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader without cover, kept on steadily without serious threat to the place getters.
Pushed to midfield from a wide gate, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on only fairly.
Settled in front of midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, weakened soon after straightening.
Settled midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well to score by a short head.
At rear throughout, never ran on.
Failed to muster, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on fairly.
Settled back rail behind midfield, advanced on turn out of back, shaken up on straightening, charged down rail under strong drive, nicked it last stride.
Sluggish start, bustled initially to settle 1 off behind midfield, shifted 3 deep & ridden 450m, found little, plodded home tamely.
Awkward start, bustled initially to midfield 3 wide with cover, soon niggled & shuffled back without cover, last at 500m & soon detached, tailed off.
Prominent initially, soon snagged to race fore of midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 700m, outpaced & hard-ridden on turn, shifted wide, kept on evenly.
Rolled forward to lead 1550m, to rail 1300m, raced 1L clear out of back straight, pressed & driven final turn, headed 300m & tapered.
Fast start widest, parked close 2nd outside leader, shuffled to 3rd 980m & settled 4th 1 off with cover at 750m, under pump 450m & wilted in run.
Tardy start, raced last pair on rail, scrubbed & reminders 640m, boxed on under drive for moderate headway.
Slow start, raced last pair 1 off, niggled 500m, driven home turn & shifted out, stormed late, just missed frame.
Taken back at start, overraced initially & sat midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out 600m & widest into stretch, driven 300m, closed late to edge 3rd.
Smart start, handy but trapped 3 wide no cover, advanced 1050m & slotted 2nd 1 off at 750m, niggled to close 400m & driven to lead 300m, all out & mugged at line.
Bustled at break, settled midfield on rail, progress exiting back stretch, driven & shifted out 320m, boxed on evenly.
Broke well, sat 1 back on rail, niggled 450m, Hard-ridden home turn & shifted out, boxed on one pace.
Speed to lead on fence, pressed & driven into stretch, all out & headed 170m, boxed on.
Front rank at break, snagged & drifted back, outpaced & niggled 3rd last 800m, 4 deep no cover on turn, last into stretch, found nil.
Slow start, raced 1 off near rear, switched 3 deep 500m & driven widest into stretch, closed centre track, just missed frame.
Broke ok, settled fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven 320m, one-paced in tepid stretch run.
Broke well & bustled to vie for early lead, settled close 2nd 1 off, driven to challenge final turn but outpaced, 3rd when emptied 100m, tapered.
Broke well, parked 1 back on rail, driven & shifted out 300m, boxed on evenly.
Started ok, raced 3 wide with cover back of midfield, checked 600m, shifted out & driven 320m, tame effort.
Sharp break widest to press lead 3 deep, snagged 1000m to 1 back 1 off, strong traveller, switched out 300m & driven, swept to lead 170m, kicked clear.
Started ok, raced fore of midfield 3 wide no cover, drive wide into stretch, outpaced in run home.
Taken back from wide berth to rail at tail, driven into stretch, stayed on evenly.
Decent start, bustled initially & 5wide midfield into 1st turn, overraced until eventually slotted 3 wide with cover 600m, struggled in run home.
Tardy break, raced fore of midfield on rail, driven into stretch & switched out, stayed on for closing 3rd.
Eased back from a wide barrier, stayed 5L behind the leader along the rail, improved gradually in the Straight for 3rd.
Sent forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, held lead until headed approaching 200M, kept on thereafter to finish 2nd.
Rolled forward and raced in one-off one-back position, one paced in the run home.
Pushed forward and settled 1/2L outside the leader, kept on one paced to the line, just clinched 4th.
Travelled in behind midfield, 3-1/2L behind the pace 2 wide with cover, made ground steadily in Straight.
Settled in midfield, 2L off 3 wide with cover, switched widest after turn, did not run on.
Began well and settled into box-seat, pulled clear at 200M and closed off strongly to score by 2-3/4L.
Travelled in front of midfield, 1-1/2L behind but trapped wide, found nothing and weakened gradually.
Taken back, sat 6-1/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made slight ground only in the Straight.
In behind midfield, 4-3/4L off 3 wide with cover, showed no response from early in the Straight, not competitive.
Raced in midfield, 3L behind the leader along the rail, flattened passing final 100M.
Awkward start, raced in midfield 2-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, awkwardly placed at 300M, run ended when steadied at 200M.
First out, led field to 1050m before crossing to fence and easing back to 3rd. Got split between horses 300m, skipped clear 150m, held off late challenge.
Got off OK, racing with pace before easing 3-back along fence passing 800m. Took inside run in straight and boxed on fairly.
Began fairly, taken to rail and made up some ground, settling behind midfield. Stayed on rails in straight, boxed on fairly to 100m when tightened and eased.
Hard ridden to go forward from widest draw, racing wide till settling half a length behind leader passing 850m. Boxed on to 200m before tiring.
Began awkwardly, ridden to hold midfield position, checked 800m, struck heels and blundered 700m. One-paced in straight.
Jumped well, pressed forward but travelled keenly passing 800m when one-out, one-back. Given reminder 250m and finished off strongly. Had superficial wound to inside right hock.
Hard ridden to hold forward position, racing mostly wide 4L from leader. Swung wide entering straight and boxed on gamely under hard riding.
Began fairly, allowed to stride at own pace, racing behind midfield in one-off position. Severely checked 700m, took inside run in straight and kept on fairly.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, racing wide till taking lead 1000m and crossing to fence 850m. Led to 200m when spent force and faded.
Pressed forward but kept 3-wide behind midfield mostly. Swung wide, hung in 300m, got clear 250m and ran on steadily.
Steadied, shifted across behind horses and last on settling. Checked 700m, switched out 500m to make run, taken to centre field 300m and powered home.
Outpaced, dropping to last pair 900m. Clear last entering turn, still last at 200m, ran on nicely final 100m.
Taken back from wide barrier, held up 2nd last 7Ls behind leader, stayed on without threat over final 300M.
Reserved near the rear in a strongly run race, 5Ls off the pace 400M, strong finish to go 2nd post.
Utilised inside draw and obtained a trailing position just behind leaders, kept on mildly entering straight, lacked the extra.
Soon led, took them along at sound pace, still going on well passing 150M, caught by winner final 40M, lost 2nd post.
Restrained on jumping from wide barrier, guide to the fence 5-6Ls back, kept on fairly entering straight and never seriously threatened.
Tracked leading pair, advanced to 2nd 300M and loomed a chance, kept up the chase on leader, faded final stages beaten to 6th.
Chased pace, caught wide no cover until 800M, with leaders to 500M then gave ground abruptly. Unacceptable Performance.
Eased back from draw 10 on jumping, detached last 8Ls off the pace, made limited gains from 350m, not reach contention.

Broke well, a shade keen early stages, settled down ahead of midfield 3Ls off the pace, taken out 400M for run, flattened final 200M. (Jockey : could be better suited to races over a shorter distance.)
Held up behind mid-pack 4-5Ls behind leader in a strongly run race, took inside route on straightening and made good progress from 300M, dived late to score.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled down in midfield 3-4Ls back, switched out 250M and did best work towards line.
Held up 3-wide in mid-division, lost cover from 800M, beaten early straight, eased when no chance.
Settled towards the rear from the widest gate, switched out for a run passing the 300 metres, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Moderate start, driving forward when checked just over 1000 metres out, persevered to gain slender advantages rounding home bend, but unable to sustain effort after straightening.
Slowly away and then tightened dropping to tail-end, remained in last to straight, ran on under pressure near the centre of the track, did best work late.
Ridden along out wide in midfield far side, drifted back to last few rounding home bend, made no impression in straight.
Jumped fairly, not far off in 5th before hampered and shuffled back to joint 8th onto home bend about 4L off, in similar position entering home straight but ran home one-paced.
Jumped fairly, raced keenly alongside the leader far side, restrained to one-out-one-back position rounding home bend, folded up quickly after straightening.
Travelling in 7th just better than midfield when inconvenienced and lost position 800 metres out, baulked when 6th and within 3L of pace early in straight, kept on without quickening.
In last few, commenced move on rails rounding home bend, ran on doggedly between runners in straight, nearest at finish.
Moderate start, ridden out wide to gradually pick up to 2L 4th coming out of back straight, in similar position turning for home, fought on to hold some chance 200 metres out, no extra near finish.
Settled in midfield, gained closer order coming onto home bend, tracked leader into straight, soon came to challenge and led passing the 300 metres, worn down close to home.
Broke well, amongst leaders early before taken back to just better than midfield, commenced run over 300 metres out, asserted authority closing stages.
Crowded at start settling just worse than midfield, improving towards midfield when inconvenienced on home bend, obtained run passing the 300 metres, finished off race well.
Moderate start, soon recovered to rear of midfield along rails, came under pressure approaching home turn, faded inside final 200 metres.
Broke well to lead on rails, held slender advantage until narrowly headed 800 metres out, came to share the pace upon straightening but soon found no extra.
Hard ridden to obtain a midfield, 2 wide with cover, blocked 400M, made steady ground when clear.
At back, 3-4 wide, ran on only fairly in straight.
Slow away, hard ridden forward, box seat, lack room 4-2, flattened 100M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and lead, hung on strongly until 100M flattened.
Pushed early but not muster, took rail at back, not suited by the slow pace, little dash 200M.
Eased to rear, never a factor.
Settled in midfield, 2 wide, lack room 400M, closed off strongly when clear and scored.
Eased back, 3 wide, progressed steadily 300M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Settled in front of midfield, 3 wide, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the fast pace, one paced until weakened 200M.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast pace, ran on only fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide without cover, suited by the fast tempo, accelerated strongly to score by a neck.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, finished off well for 4th in a tight finish.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, hampered by the fast tempo, weakened soon after straightening.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader at fast sectionals, kept on strongly until weakened inside 100M.
Settled worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast sectionals, ran on fairly.
Settled worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the fast tempo, never ran on.
At back, travelled 9Ls behind the leader on the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, ran on strongly for 2nd when clear 300M, missed by a neck.
Taken back to rear, travelled 9Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast sectionals, dashed well for 3rd in a tight finish.
Ridden forward to take the fence and share the lead at fast sectionals, weakened badly 300M.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 7Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, benefited by the fast tempo, made some ground in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast tempo, ran on steadily.
Stood flat-footed at start and lost significant amount of ground, never looked competitive.
Good break, vied for lead & snared rail, headed 950m & shuffled 1 back, 2L down & driven 400m, found nil & weakened.
Slow start, raced last pair on outer, overraced 700m, peeled widest home turn & shaken up, strong closer centre track.
Tardy start & bustled, raced rail near rear, driven into stretch, struggled in run.
Sharp start, vied for early lead, snagged 1000m to handy 1 off no cover, driven to press turning in, boxed on & gradually closed, lost 2nd late.
Fast break, bustled in front, soon outpaced & passed, raced fore of midfield 1 off with cover, under pump 500m, outpaced & tapered.
Lacked toe & raced tail on rail, shifted 1 off 700m, wider final turn, stayed on for solid headway.
Broke well, settled rail midfield, driven 400m & shifted out, boxed on evenly.
Prominent break, trapped wide & soon snagged back, checked 800m, slotted 3 deep near rear 650m, forced widest home turn, one-paced in run.
Lacked early toe & rousted, soon settled midfield but caught 4 deep no cover, shaken up 400m, stayed on evenly.
Started well, slid back to midfield 1 off with cover, driven 400m, kept on for minor inroads.
Taken back, soon advanced to midfield 3 wide with cover, driven 400m, crowded in run, kept on moderately.
Smart start, speed outside to lead 950m, to rail 800m, 1L clear & shaken up 380m, soon all out & pressed, kept on but headed 50m.
Taken back from wide, sat 1 off near rear, overraced 700m, shifted out 550m, 4 deep & driven home turn, picked up final 300m to lead 50m.
Tardy start, bustled forward 3 deep, overraced 800m & parked fore of midfield without cover, driven 400m, tapered in run home.
Fast break, rousted to press lead, led 920m, driven under pressure 400m, headed 300m, tapered to wire.
Broke with others, soon outpaced & bustled to race fore of midfield on rail, driven 430m, plugged on evenly.
Fast start, not pace to cross from wide, taken back near rear & trapped on outer no cover, progress on turn, stayed on for solid headway.
Fast start, raced close up 3 wide no cover, pushed on to press lead 1 off 650m, shaken up 300m to narrow lead, headed 200m, no extra.
Prominent at break, snagged to midfield 3 wide with cover, outpaced final turn, driven 350m, found nil.
Speed to lead then restrained 920m, taken back 650m to 1 off 1 back, 3 deep on turn & driven 400m, quickened to lead 200m, held on.
Snagged start to rear rank wide with cover, crowded 900m & buffeted, last & to rail 550m, under pump 450m, struggled in run home.
Missed break, taken behind to race 3 wide with cover behind midfield, shifted widest on turn, hard-ridden for dour late progress.
Broke well but outpaced & bustled to race midfield 1 off with cover, driven into stretch, shifted out & bumped rival 310m, fast closer centre, just failed.
Taken back from widest to race rear rank, lugged in 900m, stuck wide with cover, last & driven 500m, podded on tepidly.
Sharp break, sat fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven 400m, picked up for closing 3rd at line.
Rolled forward and took box-seat, remained in touch throughout and finished off nicely for 3rd.
Awkward start, taken back and towards the rear, 5-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, made good ground in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 2-3/4L off albeit trapped wide and without cover, slight dash near 300M, dropped off 200M.
Pushed forward and assumed lead 2 wide, handed up around turn and weakened on straightening.
Settled in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, kept going and held onto 5th.
Awkward start, settled in midfield, 2-1/2L behind the leader on the rail, ran on only fairly.
Taken back, raced at the rear 6-3/4L behind along the rail, showed good response and made nice ground to finish 4th.
Slotted into midfield, 3-3/4L off the pace 3 wide with cover, kept on one paced in the run home.
Hampered at the start, then raced at the rear 6-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, swung wide and finished off strongly for 2nd.
Bumped start, raced prominently in one-off one-back position, kept on well and hung onto the prize.
Rolled forward to sit inside the lead on the rail, assumed lead 700M out, headed at 300M, did not run on.
Travelled in behind midfield, 4-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, not competitive in the Straight.
Travelled slightly in behind midfield, 4L off along the rail, showed no turn of foot in the Straight.
Settled towards the rear, 4-3/4L behind the leader 4 wide with cover, couldn't find any in the Straight.
Jumped with field, not pushed, racing behind midfield in one-off position. Ran into a dead-end top of straight when attempting to improve, then one-paced.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide to turn before cutting in 600m to sit outside leader. Shaken up entering straight, took over lead 200m, kicked clear.
Began well, pressed forward in one-off position to sit 1L behind leader. Eased 600m to get cover but raced fiercely, switched out again to get clear run but didn't finish off.
Began fairly, outpaced and soon at rear. Never likely thereafter.
Began well, vigorously ridden to lead 1050m before crossing to fence. Under pressure turning for home, overtaken 200m, battled on gamely.
Began well, raced with pace, bumped 900m but held one-off position 2L from leader. Got shuffled back around turn, took inside run in straight and kept on steadily.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear in one-off position. Made up some ground around turn, switched wide in straight, one-paced.
First out, stayed with pace to 1050m before easing to sit behind leader. Improved position turn, switched out in straight and ran on steadily.
Hard ridden from outside draw to go forward, racing wide, then left without cover from 600m. Losing position, dropping 3L from leader. Lay in top of straight but boxed on gamely.
Began fairy, then crowded, dropping back. Ridden aggressively but failed to pick up and soon became detached from field. Plodded home. Unacceptable performance. Lame right hind leg.
Jumped OK, not pushed, settling along rail 4L from leader. Stayed on rail around turn and ran on fairly in straight without looking dangerous.
Began OK but soon outpaced, dropping towards rear along fence. Switched out entering straight to make run but only one-paced.
Eased back from wide draw, settled near last 6-7Ls behind leader, stayed on moderately final 400M but not reach principal rivals.
Began well, contested the lead along the 3-path early stages, crossed to rail 750M, responded well and opened up 2L lead 300M, kept on well to line, caught last stride.
Positively ridden to find the rail, tracked leader from 800M, continued on same pace when driven out 400M, no extra 100M and weakened.
In touch behind leading trio, battled well between horses from 250M, brushed by rival late stages but managed to find the extra, got up last stride.
Reserved in midfield along the 2-path, into clear 250M and every chance, kept up the chase on leaders but was always held.
Placed ahead of midfield, caught 3-wide no cover until 600M, responded well when asked 350M, laid in under pressure and brushed with winner, narrowly beaten.
Slow to begin, ended up in rear pair 8Ls off the pace, kept on same pace only final 400M, never a threat to leaders.
Held up in midfield, proved difficult to settle passing 1100M, inclined to hang out making the home turn and came under pressure 550M, out of contention 300M.
From inside draw held up in midfield along the fence, lacked a finishing kick turning home, outpaced by rivals from 250M.
Towards the rear 6Ls off the steady pace, made stealthy headway from 400M, had to switch near 100M for clear running, continued on well to line. (Jockey questioned re his riding at 200M.)
Chased leader 2-wide, kept on same pace on straightening, weakened 200M.
Travelled 3-wide in midfield, pushed wider 900M and left without cover, picked up strongly 250M, nearest finish.
Taken back from wide barrier, not hurried 8Ls back in last, made some progress final 300M without threatening leaders.
Jumped OK, ridden along behind the pace, kept wide but with cover. Switched out in straight to make run, kept on fairly to 200m before tiring. Had substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Pressed forward from outside draw to get with a length of leader 1050m. Rolled forward when joined by another 900m to make it a 3-way lead. Tired quickly in straight.
Bumped start, outpaced, dropping back but kept away from fence. Switched wide entering straight, boxed on one-paced.
Began well, ridden along behind the pace but travelled keenly 1000m. Dropping 3L from leader. Kept on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.
Quickly into stride, press forward to lead 1050m, travelled well to 900m when joined up front by two others. Overtaken soon after straightening and faded quickly from 200m.
Away nicely, grabbing box seat 3L from leader. Took closer order around turn but blocked for run entering straight. Boxed on gamely though not ridden out final stages.
Away nicely, ridden along between horses, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Switched out entering straight to make run, hit front 200m, run down.
Began OK, no speed, dropping to rear in one-off position. Last into straight, taken to centre track and powered home, taking over lead 100m and pulling clear.
Began well from an outside draw, pressed forward to sit behind leading trio in one-off position. Urged forward top of straight, hit front 300m, boxed on when passed.
Jumped OK, ridden aggressively but didn't muster, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Switched out entering straight and ran on fairly.
Slow into stride, losing 2L, last into turn, stayed on rail entering straight but found little under hard riding.
Jumped with field, taken to fence, settling behind midfield 5L from leader. Closed in around turn but only-one paced final 200m.
Began well, pressed forward from outside draw but caught 3-wide 1400m. Allowed to roll forward to share lead with two others 900m, kept on to 200m before tiring.
Restrained, shifted across behind horses, settling at rear along fence. Switched out turning for home, made up some ground to 200m, one-paced.

Bumped on jumping and eased back early to sit towards the rear of the field, towards the rail. Ridden for luck in the straight, and shifted off heels for a run 250m. Good turn of foot from 150m, and in relatively easy.
Began awkwardly and eased back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Travelled wider in the straight and finished off well late, without threatening a place.
Pushed forward early from the wide draw, sitting 3 wide with no cover, before pushing forward to share the lead at 1000m. Used up early and dropped out from 200m.
Dropped straight to the rear on jumping, holding the rail. Last on the turn, and came wider, before coming widest at 200m for a run. Big run late, and made up ground.
Bumped on jumping and taken forward to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Unsettled up the back straight, and checked off heels at 1200m. Didn't have much left in the tank over last 200m.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit in the last pair, 1 off the fence. Came wider on the turn, and ran solidly until showing good turn of foot over last 100m to steal 2nd on the line.
Only eased forward early, eventually settling around midfield, on the fence. Had no kick in the straight, and was gone a long way from home.
Bumped on jumping, and didn't get moving early. Stuck mid field 4 wide early, before pushing up to sit behind the leaders, still 3 wide without cover. OK until 150m, before fading late.
Pushed forward early to set the tempo in front, with a tendency to race slightly keen. Still in front at 150m, before peaking soon after and dropping out.
Crowded on jumping, before settling midfield, 1 off the fence. Raced keenly onto heels 900m. Ran strongly from the 200m, despite hanging in and being difficult to ride out.
Cruised up early to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Under pressure from the turn. Hit interference at the 250m, but already a beaten horse and dropped out from that point.
Taken up to be handily placed 4th/5th, 1 off the fence. Only 1 paced to the line late.
Settled around midfield, 3 wide with cover. Plugged away OK in the straight, without threatening a place.
Taken up early to be handily placed 4th/5th on the fence. Dropped out quickly from the 200m, and played no further part.

Ridden early, settled in forward of midfield far side, hampered & lost position home bend, behind midfield in 9th and wide into straight, good effort after straightening but unable to sustain run closing stages.
Broke well from a wide draw, vied for lead rounding stables bend before taken one out one back onto back straight, folded up quickly from approaching home turn.
Moderate start, waited with, made significant progress in the straight, did best work late.
Jumped well from the middle draw, shared the pace on rails coming out of home straight, taken one back on rails onto back straight, came to challenge approaching final turn, weakened under pressure.
Jumped fairly, travelled keenly in last few, in similar position when came under pressure rounding home bend, switched wide into home straight but could make no impression.
Travelled in midfield and 3-wide down back straight, came to challenge under pressure from top of home bend, fought on under hard driving from 2L 4th to hit the front briefly over 100 metres out.
Raced wide behind midfield far side, dropped out under pressure from around home bend. (Questioned for disappointing performance.)
Ridden from the one draw before settling in midfield or just worse on rails, saved ground turning for home, angled out for a run 200 metres out, finished off well to fail narrowly.

Taken back from a wide gate to travel wide in midfield, moved closer up far side to be just over 2L off the pace in 4th, circled the field around home bend to reach 2nd into straight, had no more to give inside the final 100 metres.
Worked 3-wide rounding first bend to eventually take up running for rails run at the 1000m bend, made running to the 200 metres, weakened under pressure.
Settled in forward of midfield in 6th on rails, saved ground entering straight, sustained effort to claim victory close to home.

Broke well but soon settled in last few on or near the rails, was closer up before badly hampered by tiring runner rounding home bend, renewed effort over 200 metres out but could only keep on without quickening.
Hard ridden early but not muster, at rear, 2 wide, made good ground 150M.
Pushed to sit in front of midfield 2-3 wide, weakened 200M.
Slow away, pushed forward, raced ungenerously throughout, parked 3 wide pressuring the leaders, emptied 300M.
Midfield, along the fence, checked 600M, made steady ground 250M, checked again 150M, ran on ok.
Pushed forward, 2 wide in the lead under, bumped 700M, ran on until 200M flattened.
Hard ridden to take the rail in front of midfield, just held ground in straight.
Eased to rear, trapped 2-3 wide, dashed well 300M to score without being fully tested.
Settled nicely in midfield, took rail, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed to hold the rail, led at good pace, raced keenly as usual, under pressuring in the lead from 800M, out of fuel 200M.
At rear along the fence, no progress in straight.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 2 wide, made steady ground 300M for 2nd.
Prominent, despite the slow tempo, dropped off rounding the Home Turn.
Raced midfield, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, weakened badly soon after straightening, tailed out.
Sent forward to park outside the leader, despite the slow sectionals, weakened rounding the Home Turn.
Settled in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the slow sectionals, ran on gradually for a well beaten 3rd.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite harmed by the slow tempo, made some ground in straight.
Taken back from a wide gate, settled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, not suited by the slow pace, ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield, 4-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, showed little response and one paced home.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, enjoyed the slow pace, battled on gamely with the winner, missed by 1/2L.
Taken back, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the slow pace, ran on fairly.
Ridden forward to take the fence and share the lead at slow tempo, kept on strongly to hold off challenger by 1/2L.
Race midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, weakened badly soon after straightening.
Taken behind from widest, sat 1 off with cover near rear, advanced 3 wide from 550m, shifted wider & driven 380m, rattled centre to 2nd 100m, peaked 50m & no extra.
Taken back from wide to slot last pair 1 off, under pump for progress 550m, hard-ridden 400m, very wide into stretch, stayed on for sound late headway.
Tardy break, rolled on to midfield 3 wide no cover, minor advance on turn to challenge, one-paced & bumped 220m, weakened out.
Outpaced from gate & raced at tail, shifted out 400m, driven into stretch, switched centre 200m, staying on for minor inroads when slight check 60m.
Started well, snagged back wide to slot back of midfield 1 off with cover, fanned out home turn, kept on one pace.
Good break, settled midfield on rail, crowded on turn, driven into stretch & shifted out, quickened to lead 100m, drew clear.
Led at break & rousted 3 deep, settled 1 off & headed 870m, 0.5L 2nd & niggled 530m, under pump 450m, fought on one pace.
Fast start & pressed lead 1 off, snagged 1000m to park 1 back 1 off, shifted out & driven 300m, found nil & wilted.
Broke with others, lacked toe & taken back rail near rear, driven into stretch, stayed on for minor late gains.
Started ok, raced rail behind midfield, bustled under pressure 550m, shifted out final turn, plugged on moderately.
Sharp break & vied for lead on rail, led 870m, 1L ahead & driven into stretch, all out & headed 100m, tapered.
Broke with others, rousted initially to sit rail 1 back, niggled 450m, shifted 1 off & driven 320m, emptied 200m & faded.
Missed break & 2L adrift at tail, closed to tag on 450m, shifted 1 off 250m & boxed on for minor late inroads.
Taken back from wide & initially bustled, 2nd-last with cover & never travelled, driven 420m, very wide home turn, plodded tamely.
Started ok, raced rail midfield, steadied 400m, shifted out home turn, driven 250m & close to heels 200m, closing when struck in face by whip 80m, ran on.
Sharp break, raced 0.5L 2nd outside leader, driven home turn & straightened up centre track, emptied 200m & faded.
Speed to lead, to rail 780m, swung wide into stretch, shaken up 280m, all out & headed 60m, swamped.
Broke well, bustled along 3 wide no cover midfield, ridden for progress 450m, hard-ridden 200m, plugged on one pace.
Steadied & taken behind to 1 off back of midfield, 3rd last & driven into stretch, one-paced in run.
Lacked toe & bustled to race back of midfield 3 wide with cover, overraced 600m, driven very wide final turn, rattled centre, just failed.
Fast start wide, slotted 1 off 1 back, driven into final turn, boxed centre track to 2nd at 50m, edged back to 3rd close home.
Speedy start from inside draw, raced rail 1 back, niggled 400m, driven in pursuit 300m, battling run to lead 60m, just held on.
Front rank at break, unable to hold spot & bustled, receded to midfield 1 off with cover 500m, under pump 350m, struggled in run home.
Lacked toe & bustled initially to race back of midfield, driven 300m, kept on evenly.
Eased back, raced 4-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, closed off strongly after being reluctant to shift out upon straightening.
Broke down near the 200M, did not finish.
Taken back and remained at the rear, never a factor.
Slotted into midfield initially, then improved to race prominently along the Back Straight, however not competitive.
Sent forward and settled in one-off one-back position, closed off only one paced in the run home.
Ridden forward to race outside and 1L behind the leader, kept on going and closed off okay for 3rd.
Travelled at the rear, 4-3/4L behind along the rail, made little ground only in the Straight.
Rolled forward and took box-seat, crowded near 1500M, remained competitive until 100M when weakened.
Settled into midfield, 3-1/4L off along the rail, finished off well for 4th.
Ridden forward and led by 1L on the rail, kicked way at 250M challenged late but held on to score.
Raced in midfield, 3L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, hampered at 150M, made some ground thereafter.
Began well, unable match early pace, dropping 3L behind leader passing 800m. Switched out entering straight and ran on steadily.
Eased back after start, settling at rear in one-off position and switched off. Stayed at rear till straight, switched in 250m, rolled forward to hit front 50m, pulled clear.
Began well, found pace too hot, slipping 3L behind leader 800m. Boxed on early in straight until flattened passing 100m.
Outpaced, dropping to behind midfield when bumped and unbalanced 1000m. Lay in top of straight, awkwardly placed 250m, one-paced.
Began well, eased off hot pace and taken to rear along rail. Shifted out turning for home, got clear run 250m, finished off strongly.
Quickly into stride but unable handle early pace, dropping to behind midfield but kept 3-wide. Taken to centre track on straightening but only one-paced.
Ridden aggressively to hold position one-back, one-off. Under pressure turning for home, weakened badly in straight. Lame left front leg.
Restrained, shifted across behind horses, dropping to rear and became detached from field 800m. Improved turn, not much room early straight, switched in 150m and finished off nicely.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners, settling at rear. Not much room top of straight and not properly tested.
Crowded start, ridden forward, badly unbalanced when bumped 1000m. Kept on fairly to straight when one-paced.
Crowded out soon after start, hard ridden to hold position, settling close to rail 6L from leader. Switched out twice in straight to get clear running, boxed on gamely.
Aggressively ridden to lead, but tended to over-race from 900m. Pulled 5L clear turning for home, still well clear 200m, collared 50m, flattened.
Caught wide no cover early stages, strode forward to lead passing 1200M, led uncontested to straight but couldn't find extra when challenged by rivals inside 300M, faded towards the finish.
Sent forward, led to 1200M, tracked leader 2-wide from mid-race, lacked a finishing turning home and kept on same pace to the line.
Eased to a rearward spot as expected, 5Ls to make up 400M, inclined to lay in when placed under pressure, proved difficult to ride and not making any progress.
Bumped after start and unable to obtain a forward position as intended, shuffled further back to near the rear middle stages, made limited progress over final 300M, no impression on leaders.
Dropped back to last from wide barrier, 7Ls off leader in a slowly run race, waited with till 300M, hampered 150M when commencing to close off the race, would be closer with an uninterrupted run.
Caught 3-wide in midfield throughout and without cover at times, brought wide to challenge 350M but not quickened under pressure.
Quickly into stride, up with pace early but restrained to a position ahead of midfield passing 1200M, not pace to challenge first 2 entering straight, kept on moderately for non-threatening 3rd.
Steadied shortly after the start, travelled well along the fence in midfield, strongly challenged leader up the rail mid straight, got up near 50M.
Awkward away, held up in mid-division 4Ls off leader in a slowly run race, kept on fairly entering straight, no threat to leaders.
Taken back from wide draw, settled down 5Ls near the rear in a slowly run race, stayed on fairly final 300M for remote 4th.
Broke well, not far off the pace early stages, moved up to track leader 900M, led 250M, fought on when challenged by rival from 200M, beaten to 2nd near 50M but well clear of remainders.
Caught very wide without cover 1st turn, moved forward trying to find a position close to rails but unable to do so, run ended near 200M and eased.
Ridden along to hold place in midfield far side, in similar position on rails rounding home bend, did not find much room early in straight and one-paced closing stages.
Prominent, racing keenly far side, dropped away quickly after straightening.
Lost considerable ground at the start, recovered steadily on rails to reach rear of midfield in 10th over 1000 metres out, in similar position turning for home, found nil in straight.
Moderate start, settled in rear of midfield, did not find much room early in straight, produced modest late impression closing stages.
Moderate start, settled just better than midfield mainly in 6th, gained to 5th just over 2L back rounding home bend, briefly baulked after straightening, one-paced in remainder of straight.
Taken back from a wide gate, remained well behind throughout.

Ridden from a wide gate to vie for lead, gained narrow advantage after the first 400 metres before obtaining rails run over 800 metres while setting a steady pace, kicked over 3L clear under pressure 200 metres out, eased late.
Jumped well, soon dropped to 3-wide in midfield despite hard ridden, in similar position turning in, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Bumped shortly after start, settled 3-wide in 2L 5th in back straight, in joint 4th rounding home bend, came under pressure after straightening but failed to quicken.
Taken back from the widest gate, trailed the field most of way, only went past well-beaten horses inside final 100 metres.
Ridden along in last few, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards the rear 3-wide, in similar position turning in, finished off race well under pressure to claim 2nd final strides.
Prominent until unable to sustain effort inside final 200 metres.
Never far off, mainly in 2L 4th on rails far side, in similar spot on rails into straight, ran home one-paced.
Pushed to take rail and lead, clocked fast sectionals, hung on strongly to score.
Settled in midfield along the rails, benefited by the fast pace, made ground 300M.
Slow away, at rear, 2-3 wide, suited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400M, run ended 100M.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, not suited by the fast tempo, out of fuel 200M.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, dropped off quickly 400M.
Box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on strongly to the line, just beaten by narrow margin in 2nd.
At back, 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made steady ground 300M.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, ran on fairly in straight.
Eased to rear, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast sectionals, progressed steadily 300M for 3rd.
In front of midfield along the fence, emptied 300M.
Missed start, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, made some ground in Straight without threatening.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the fast tempo, never ran on.
Raced midfield, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, never looked competitive.
Settled worse than midfield about 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast sectionals, ran home strongly for 2nd.
Taken back to rear, travelled 10Ls behind the leader 2 with cover, benefited by the fast pace, sung widest turning in, dashed well for 3rd.
At rear throughout, never a factor.
Ridden forward to take the lead along the fence at fast sectionals, out of fuel 200M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3 wide with cover throughout, made no impression in Straight.
Prominent, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite harmed by the fast pace, kept on steadily for 4th.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, one paced home.
At rear throughout, 10Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, made minor ground in Straight.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, despite harmed by the fast sectionals, kept on steadily until weakened final 150M.
Rolled forward to cross and park outside the leader at fast sectionals, weakened badly rounding the Home Turn.
Raced midfield, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, accelerated nicely to score.
Even break, restrained to 2nd-last, bustled 630m, ran on strongly centre track to 3rd close home.
Broke with others, taken back to 3 wide no cover near rear, bustled 1030m to 3rd 1 off no cover, under pressure 600m, one-paced & tapered final 200m.
Missed break, recovered to sit 3rd-last on rail, niggled 650m, shifted 1 off 550m, hard-ridden into stretch, struggled.
Broke ok, settled 3 back on fence 3rd, driven 520m, switched out 400m but outpaced & tapered in run.
Even start, sat midfield on rail, niggled 800m, outpaced & under pump 600m, plugged on again late.
Broke with others & steadied to midfield, parked 1 off 4.5L back & gained cover 900m, shaken up 430m & shifted centre, quickened to 2nd 150m, no threat.
Sharp break but snagged to tail, niggled along, shifted out & ridden 500m, plugged on tepidly centre track.
Started ok, raced back of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted 3 deep 600m & bustled for progress, hard-driven 6th 350m, stayed on for minor headway.
Speed to lead, to rail 1300m & set tempo 1.5L clear, driven turning in, kicked on determinedly, always in command.
Fast start, snagged to sit 1 back 2nd, niggled 600m, hard-ridden into stretch, boxed on until emptied & lost 2nd 130m, faded to wire.
Sharp start, quickly out-sped, settled back of midfield 1 off but niggled to hold place, shifted 3 deep 620m, ridden along turning in, short spurt but found little thereafter.
Squeezed out at start, relegated to rear on rail, ridden along 660m, saved ground on turn, took time to wind up, minor inroads late.
Began on terms, unable to hold position despite vigorous riding, settled near rear on rail & continually ridden to stay in touch, outpaced, eased final 100m.
Strong start, straight across to lead on rail, crossed 1000m, box seat, briefly without cover 700m as leader drifted, 3 deep on turn to challenge, short-lived bid, weakened 100m.
Even break, eased to settle 1 off worse than midfield, hard to settle until 750m, travelled strongly into stretch, shifted back inside, finished willingly, just missed 2nd.
Snagged back from wide gate to settle among tail-enders 3 deep with some cover, tried to improve 500m, pulled to centre track, limited response.
Quick to muster, settled handy on rails, lost position 700m, ridden entering stretch, pulled 4 deep, stayed on evenly.
Driven through to take prominent spot, settled fore of midfield between runners with cover, forced to make early move 550m, pulled widest on turn, kept coming.
Quickly into stride, allowed to find his feet, settled slightly worse than midfield on rail, ridden to hold position 1000m, asked for effort 500m, little to offer.
Ridden along to take midfield position 1 off 1000m, overraced 800m, called upon 550m, no clear run 350m, switched to centre track, hung in 200m, kept on.
Began well, eased across, settled 3rd 1 off no cover, forced 3 deep when leader drifted, under pressure turning for home, weakened.
Awkward start, snagged behind runners, settled 1 off near rear, ridden to improve 700m, under the whip 530m, no response.
Broke evenly, ridden along out wide to join leaders 1000m, crossed to 2L lead 900m, drifted off rail 700m, joined again 600m, driven to regain outright lead 380m, found plenty.
Slow to muster, bustled to settle fore of midfield 3 deep no cover, allowed to stride around field 800m, joint lead 600m, ridden along 430m, boxed on but held.
Travelled in midfield, 5-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, not competitive in the Straight.
Sent forward and shared lead in one-off position, headed passing 250M, slight dash after then weakened gradually.
Settled in worse than midfield, 7-1/4L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, did not improve.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/2L behind along the rail, ran on well and just missed out on 2nd prior to going to the line.
In behind midfield, 7-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, crowded at 500M, then taken widest at 300M for clear running, ran on fairly.
Travelled in midfield, 5-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, closed off nicely to finish 2nd.
Detached throughout, never in contention.
Bumped start, then sat in just behind midfield, 6L behind the leader on the rail, not a factor in the Straight.
Awkward start, then ridden forward and shared lead on the rail, weakened badly approaching 300M.
Rolled forward and took up box-seat, 2-1/2L behind, pulled away at 250M and hit the line strongly to score.
Eased back and raced at the rear, 9L behind 3 wide with cover, covered ground steadily in the Straight.
Prominent but detached from leaders, 3-1/2L off the pace 2 wide with cover, one paced in the run home.
Initially in front of midfield and wide, then slotted in midfield 4L off 2 wide with cover, finished off only one paced.
Eased back and raced at the rear, 9-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, made some ground until 200M, one paced thereafter.
Steadied soon after start, shifted across behind runners, settling last. Trailed field to straight. Never competitive.
Quickly out, led on settling, joined up front passing 700m. Kept on strongly under pressure in straight until 50m when ran out of steam. Lame left front leg.
Jumped OK, not pushed, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Caught in traffic top of straight, got clear 250m, blocked again and not properly tested final stages.
Began well, pressed forward 3-wide without cover 2L from leader. Rolled forward to sit 3-wide outside leader passing 700m. Tired quickly in straight.
Began well, racing behind early pace till moving forward 700m to eyeball leader. Battled on strongly under pressure in straight until flattened final 50m.
Jumped well, ridden to hold midfield position close to rail. Took inside run in straight, made some ground initially before tiring final 200m.
Quickly away, raced with pace before settling between horses 2L behind leader 800m. Lost position turning for home, urged forward, battled strongly to line.
Began OK, ridden to stay close to pace, settling 3L from leader. Under pressure soon after straightening and gave ground gradually.
Began well, rolled forward, settling in box seat 2L from leader. Blocked for run 400m, switched in but blocked from 200m to 50m. Finished strongly when clear.
Began well, pressed forward three-wide 3L from leader. Got some cover around turn, switched out wider in straight, powered home down centre track for narrow win.
Steadied after start, shifted across behind horses, settling at rear. Left fence turning for home, not much space top of straight, got split 200m, finished off nicely.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear in one-off position. Taken 3-wide entering turn, swung widest into straight, ran on strongly.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping towards rear close to fence. Not much room top of straight, switched out 250m but only one-paced.
Jumped OK, not pressed, racing 3-wide behind midfield. Switched out further entering straight and boxed on fairly under hard riding.
Tracked pace, kept up the chase on leader under top weight, always held and lost 2nd near 100M.
Quickly moved to stand's side on jumping, severely checked 700M, moved out to challenge halfway but not pace to trouble leaders.
Settled down in 5th 3Ls off the steady pace, improved gradually from 350M, found extra late stages under strong riding, got up last stride.
4Ls off the pace in 2nd last, not responding to rider's urging near 400M, eased when no chance. (Lame RF.)
Soon led, set steady pace along the stands' rail, kept on soundly when driven out 300M, caught at the line.
Last of 7, hit the line well final 400M without threatening top 3.
4th on settling, responded fairly when asked passing halfway, out of contention 200M.
Eased back from wide draw and taken to fence, settling at rear. Shifted out 300m to get run but forced to switch in 250m. Unable to get clear run and not fully tested.

Quickly into stride, led field to 1100m before settling second in one-off position. Rolled forward to join leader 600m, battled on gamely to 200m before tiring and dropping back rapidly. Lame right front leg.
Pressed forward from widest draw, racing 4-wide until taking lead 1100m and crossing to fence. Joined up front passing 600m, battled on gamely to 100m before giving ground.
Got off OK, ridden along to hold midfield position one-away from fence. No run top of straight, shifted in but blocked again, then crowded out 150m. Held up to finishing line.
Began well, unable handle early pace, settling midfield but without cover. Rolled forward from turn to sit 3-wide outside leader 400m. Boxed on gamely till flattened final strides.

Began well, rolled forward inside leader before settling in box seat 1000m. Followed leaders to straight, looked chance 200m when got clear run, but only one-paced. Has substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Jumped OK, ridden by didn't muster, dropping to rear. Began forward move passing 800m, 4-wide around turn, even wider in straight, ground home for narrow win.
Began well, shared early pace before being eased back 3L from leader. Tended to over-race passing 900m, kept on fairly in straight under hard riding. Bled from both nostrils.
Began fairly, dropping to rear, then taken wide without cover from 900m to move forward. Circled field to be 4th into straight, hit front 100m, run down.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping to last passing 1000m. Began forward move 700m, taken to centre track on straightening, finished strongly.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping back. Picked up momentum passing 1100m but lost position around turn. Tired final 200m.
Began well but unable handle pace, dropping to midfield. Checked off heels 900m losing position, urged forward from 700m, battled on gamely in straight.
Jumped OK, no pace, dropping to rear but wide. Not much room top of straight, switched widest 300m, finished strongly only to lose narrowly.
Got off OK, pressed forward along rail, settling 3L from leader 1000m. Took inside run in straight and finished off strongly.
Taken forward early to settle 3rd. Over raced through the middle stages, and came 3 wide off heels at 700m. Ran solidly in the straight, just missing a place in a blanket finish.
Settled around midfield, 3-4 wide with limited cover. Looked gone at 150m, but showed good pace late to figure in a tight finish and just missed a place.

Not used early, settling worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Came wider at the top of the straight for a run. Progressed quickly from the 200m, despite shifting in, and went to the line under no urging and with plenty in hand.
Cruised forward early, settling around midfield, 1 off the fence. Raced keen midrace, and awkward on heels at 900m. Had nothing left in the straight, and eased out late.
Dropped back to sit last, 3-4 wide early, before moving to the fence at 900m. Not vigorously ridden in the straight, and finished off last 150m strongly despite only being pushed hands and heels.
Taken up early to sit forward of midfield, on the fence. Well positioned in the straight, but never ran on.
Pushed out early to share the lead into an early speed dual, before dropping back to sit 1 off, 1 back. Peaking late, and just held onto 3rd from a fast finishing field.
Dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 3 wide with cover. 1 paced to the line and never progressed.
Eased forward early, sitting just forward of the last pair. Plugged away fairly in the straight. Slightly off heels at 100, but never likely to make an impression.
Taken forward early to be handily placed in 4th, but 3 wide with no cover. Forced into a 4 wide position at the 700m. Ran well in the straight, and hampered at 200m. Peaked in the last 20m.
Challenged for the lead early, before claiming it outright at the 1000m. Used up all his bullets by the 400m, and gradually faded out of contention.
Began well before dropping back to sit in the last pair, 3 wide with limited cover. Plugged away and never a threat.
Crowded out on jumping, raced 9 lengths back at rear, still well back on turn, made good progress in straight without threatening.
Away with them, raced 5 to 6 lengths back at rear, similar position on turn, finished off strongly in straight to score.
Average to begin, positioned 5 lengths back on rail, severely checked on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Crowded out start, raced 2 wide 2 lengths back in 6th, similar position on turn, finished off one-paced.
Began well from gate 13, sent forward to take the lead, easy lead on turn, headed near 250M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 8 lengths back at rear, 3 wide on turn, widest in straight and finished off one-paced.
Crowded out start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, 3 lengths back on turn, made reasonable progress in straight to make frame. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderately away from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back in 9th, same position on turn, finished off well in straight to get 2nd without threatening the winner. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail for the majority of the race, never competitive.
Average to begin, positioned 2 lengths or so back on rail, steadied near 500M, no daylight early in straight, made some progress when clear near 250M to get 3rd.
Began well, raced prominently, a length behind the leader on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually after 300M.
Slowly away, recovered to race 4 lengths or so back in 8th, crowded near 650M, angled out in straight and finished off evenly.
Began well, raced prominently, 2nd on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked near 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Jumped with them, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide in 4th, no cover on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Jumped fairly, gradually shifted back towards the rear, waited with, finished off race strongly inside final 200 metres. (Jockey warned)
Began fairly, settled mainly 3-wide in midfield, gave ground from approaching home bend.
Jumped fairly, settled not far off in 4th on rails, became 3rd in similar position rounding home turn, hit the front under pressure over 200 metres out, soon drew clear.
Given reminders early, led the field to over 200 metres, dropped out under pressure.
Broke well, settled just off the pace to straight, unable to quicken to threaten and just held on for 2nd.
Soon taken back for rails run from the widest gate, remained well behind to the 400 metres, commenced move approaching home turn, failed to quicken under pressure in straight.

Settled 3-wide in midfield from a wide gate, got cover despite travelling wide far side, commenced move passing the 600 metres to come within 2L of lead turning for home, unable to sustain effort in the run home.
Travelled in forward of midfield, baulked for a run early in straight, kept on steadily without threatening closing stages.
Settled in last few, travelled wide without cover down back straight, circled the field on home bend, widest runner turning in, unable to sustain progress in the run home.
Jumped fairly from a middle draw, settled in rear of midfield, carried backward slightly coming out of back straight, renewed effort rounding home bend, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled in midfield on rails from a middle draw, remained similar on home turn, snuck up on inside to within 2L of lead turning in, soon found no extra.
Given reminders early, worked steadily from a wide gate to settle in prominent position 3-wide without cover, came under pressure to hold place passing the 600 metres, tired badly in home bend.
Midfield, 2-3 wide, pace good, made steady ground 300M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Eased to sit in midfield, raced 5 wide throughout, emptied 300M.
Eased at start, 2 wide at rear, pace good, no progress.
Took rail and lead easily, hung on well until 100M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Midfield, 3 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 250M for 3rd.
Eased at start, raced 3-4 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 200M.
At back, 2 wide, pace good, ran on ok in straight.
Trapped 4 wide throughout, dropped off quickly 400M.
Slow away, hard ridden to hold the rail at back, pace good, made steady ground in straight.
Pushed to occupy box seat, pace good, ran on until 200M flattened.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide just off the leader, pace good, out of fuel 250M.
Rolled forward to settle 1L behind the leader, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, weakened soon after straightening.
Pushed forward to park outside the leader, kept on steadily until weakened final 150M to hold 4th.
Taken back to settle worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, made no impression in Straight.
At rear throughout, never looked likely.
Settled in front of midfield about 2Ls behind the leader on the fence, kept on one pace to the line without threatening.
Eased to midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never looked likely.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on strongly to score by 1/2L.
Eased to settle midfield from a wide gate, 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, finished off well for 2nd.
Ridden forward to share the lead along the fence, kept on gamely until headed by the rivals final 50M.
Eased to settle worse than midfield 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
At rear throughout, never ran on.
Prominent, however, travelled 4 wide without cover throughout, flattened soon after straightening.
Began well, pushed on to lead 1000m 3 deep, continued to press on to 1 off 880m, joined again 600m, ridden to lead again 380m, beaten off 200m, eased.
Even break, ridden into forward position, settled fore of midfield 1 off, stoked up 460m, challenged 220m, boxed on.
Broke slightly slow, snagged behind runners, settled tail 1 off, ridden along 400m, slightly impeded 150m, stormed home.
Eased start, settled near tail 1 off, ridden along 350m, switched over heels 170m, stayed on well.
Slowly away, pushed along early, settled near tail on rail, ridden 530m, no response.
Fast break, ridden to hold spot, shuffled back to just beyond midfield on rail, under a drive 320m, tightened for room 150m, not fully tested.
Broke evenly, settled midfield 1 off, travelled strongly, pulled centre track and ridden 350m, sprinted quickly, comfortable win.
Began well, pushed on to take momentary lead, settled narrow second on rail, raced up to join lead 600m, in battle for lead 400m, stuck on evenly.
Away on terms, eased back, posted 4 deep no cover beyond midfield, restrained to 3 deep with cover near tail at 750m, under hard riding 380m, pulled widest, made up solid ground centre track.
Hopped slightly at start, stoked up, across to settle 2L 3rd 1 out, asked to improve 450m, under hard drive 300m, weakened.
Out sped at start, eased behind, settled beyond midfield 3 deep with occasional cover, ridden along 420m, pulled centre track, one-paced.
First to break, across to rail, settled ahead of midfield on rail, asked for effort 330m, crowded slightly for room, unable to pick up when passed.
Began well, ridden along to cross, moved up to lead before easing off to sit 2nd 1 off, chased leader from 570m, moved up to challenge but quickly passed, stayed on evenly.
Even break, eased behind runners, settled beyond midfield 3 deep cover, travelled strongly, under whip 400m, pulled centre track, one-paced, got home late.
Broke well, got head up when restrained 1500m, settled 3rd on rail and continued to overrace, settled better 900m, stoked 510m, railed into stretch, one-paced & weakened.
Away on terms, trapped wide first turn, settled beyond midfield 3 deep cover, progress to midfield 930m, lost place 600m, under pressure 470m but responded, pulled widest, unable to go on.
Broke evenly, settled just beyond midfield one out, overraced slightly, dropped head 1000m, no clear run until bumping duel 260m, sprinted strongly centre track, won comfortably.
Jumped alertly, settled just ahead of midfield 1 off, stoked up 390m, minor headway on turn, boxed on.

Slightly slow to jump, snagged behind, settled tail 1 out, down to rail 1200m, shifted 3 deep cover 800m, ridden to improve 500m, last into stretch, shifted in and out to find run, late headway, nearest finish.
Sharp start, stoked up to gain position, settled 4th 3 deep no cover, overraced, ridden up 550m, bumped 260m, dropped out.
