Very slow to break, straight to rail, improved to settle midfield, lost ground 500m, under drive 400m, little response.
Slight dip at start, roused to settle closer, near tail 1 off, improved 500m, blocked for run 260m, switched over heels, stayed on evenly.
Fast break, ridden along to clear lead 1200m, opened up 2L break 570m, asked for effort 400m, stuck on gamely.
Taken out at the start and then raced towards the rear, 7L behind 2-3 wide with cover, no charge in the Straight.
Initially in behind midfield, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, improved along the Back Straight, closed off well for 2nd.
Pushed forward, initially trapped wide but settled to sit outside the leader at 700M, weakened early in the Straight.
Raced prominently in the one-off one-back position, ran on fairly despite continued to hang in in the Straight.
Slotted in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, kept on only one paced in the run home.
Ridden forward to share the lead along the rail, kept on going until headed passing 150M, did not run on.
At the rear, 7L behind 2-3 wide with cover, gradually improved in the Back Straight, finished off strongly to score.
Rolled forward and took box-seat, weakened approaching 200M and gradually dropped off.
Always at the rear, never in contention.
Travelled in midfield, 3-1/4L behind along the rail, finished 3rd despite closing off only one paced.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, lost position before turn, not competitive.
Shifted out abruptly at the start, and then raced at the rear, 5-1/2L behind along the rail, found nothing in the Straight.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing three-wide still settling 3-back, one-off first turn. Under pressure from 400m, picked up momentum steadily between horses, finished nicely.
Steadied after start, shifted across behind runners, dropping to last. Trailed field to 400m when shaken up and taken to centre track, Powered home strongly to just miss.
Began well, sharing pace to first turn before easing into box seat. Kept tabs on leaders to 300m before giving ground rapidly.
Jumped in air at start and slow to move, Taken straight to fence, making up some ground to midfield. Found little in straight and faded.
Began well before easing off the speed, settling one-off in midfield 5L from leader. Switched out 500m, vigorously ridden down centre track to hit front 50m and pull clear.
Hard ridden to obtain forward position, settling one-back, one-off back straight. Put under pressure turning for home, kept on well to 200m before giving ground.
Steadied after jumped and taken to rail at the rear. Improved position slightly first turn, switched out 400m to make run, got split 100m, finished strongly.
Ridden but didn't must, dropping to rear in one-off position. Shaken up turning for home but only one-paced in straight.
Vigorously ridden ridden from an outside draw, racing 3– and 4-wide to circle the field to sit outside leader 900m. Took over lead passing 800m, collared 300m, faded.
Bumped start, ridden to make up ground but didn't respond 1300m and allowed to slip back. Started forward move passing 500m, very wide into straight, picked up momentum 200m and finished strongly.
Began well, unable match early rush, dropping to midfield along rail. Not asked for an effort till entering straight, made up ground initially, turning one-paced final 100m.
Began well, pressed forward to lead on settling and crossed to rail. Joined up front 900m, dropping to 2nd 800m, retook lead 200m and kicked ahead but ran on out steam 50m and swamped.
Restrained after jump, held up near the rear of main group 6Ls off the pace, brought wide top of straight, quickened up strongly and kept producing all the way to the line, led close home.
Slow to begin, sat at the rear of main group, hung out home turn and hampered 450M, stayed on moderately and passed a few on the way in before no clear run late stages.
Strode forward from wide draw, relinquished the lead 600M, battled up the rail on straightening, briefly regained the lead 150M but couldn't fend off first 3 late stages.
Chased leaders 2-wide, well placed to strike turning home, ran on soundly but no match for winner out wide, got up 3rd last stride.
Held up at the rear of main group, 5Ls to make up 400M, went for gap inside and made sound progress final 300M, went 2nd late stages.
Restrained in midfield about 4Ls back along the rail, badly held up for clear running in straight and was not able to be tested. (Jockey questioned.)
Jumped well before eased back to find cover, proved difficult to settle passing 1000M, didn't travel during the race and couldn't finish off on straightening.
Jumped on terms to be 3rd/4th along the rail on settling, into clear 300M, every chance, one paced final 150M.
Chased leader early, took over 600M, hung on to lead until 150M, faded final stages.
Held up in midfield, 6th and 3Ls off the pace 400M, kept on fairly behind main rivals, faded late. (Bled.)
Began awkwardly and lost ground, soon became detached from the field throughout the race. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Beaten for early speed, eased back passing 1000M, 3-wide without cover in midfield on settling, ran on fairly in straight, always held by leaders.

Sluggish at start, ridden to take up running coming out back straight, obtained rails run passing the 800 metres, joined entering straight, fought on steadily until overhauled inside final 100 metres.
Raced keenly in a prominent position of the small field, travelled one-out-one-back around home bend, ran home one-paced.
Ridden along handily 3-wide, lost position rounding home bend, one-paced in straight.
Began well from the widest gate of the small field but soon taken back, waited with, switched off rails for a run shortly after straightening, finished off race well to get up on line.
Jumped fairly, raced keenly in prominent position far side, lost touch shortly after straightening.
Midfield early stages, hampered and lost position coming out onto home bend, took time to find daylight after straightening, ran on under pressure but unable to peg back the winner throughout.
Failed to muster, in rear of midfield on rails when inconvenienced coming out of back straight, saved ground turning for home, ran on steadily between runners to be nearest at finish.

Broke well from a wide gate of the small field, settled wide without cover amongst the leaders, disputed lead from approaching home turn, held every chance early in straight, unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 100M.
Settled in last few, did not find much room after straightening, ran home one-paced. (Bled)
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, lack room 400M, dashed strongly when clear and scored.
Eased back, never a factor.
Pushed forward, one out one back, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to sit in midfield, 2 wide, checked badly 900M, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 250M.
Settled in midfield along the rails, blocked most straight, not properly tested.
Very slow away, at back, 2 wide, unleashed strong finishing efforts 200M.
Took rail and led easily at good pace, drifted away 300M, hung on well until last stride, just beaten by narrow margin.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, flattened 200M.
At rear, 2 wide, no progress.
Very slow away, never competitive.
Hard ridden to obtain box seat, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Very slow away, at rear along the fence, never improved.
At back, 2 wide, lack turn of foot in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made no impression in Straight.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never looked likely.
Always at rear, never ran on.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led by 1L, kept on strongly to score.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran home nicely for 4th.
Prominent, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced home.
Taken back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, switched wide turning in, dashed well to get 2nd.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, kept on steadily for 3rd.
Jumped slowly, settled midfield about 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, never a factor.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, kept on steadily until weakened final furlong.
Drifted sharply left at start, ridden along to go forward, trapped deep on track, finally to 2nd 900m, ridden along 500m, boxed on.
Strong start, ridden along for forward position, niggled to 900m, settled 3rd 1 off, ridden again 520m, switched over heels, weakened.
Sharp break, ridden early, settled handy on rail, under a drive 350m, closed along rail.
First to begin out wide, eased to look for cover, settled beyond midfield 2 & 3 deep with cover, improved 650m, pulled wide and driven 350m, peaked on run 100m.
Even start, eased to midfield position 3 deep no cover, under drive 450m, little response, found again late.

Awkward break, bumped badly at start, eased back, settled near tail 1 off, high head carriage, crowded 620m, searched for room 400m, checked 350m, darted left and right after a run, clear air 150m, stayed on evenly.
Began well, nudged along to get to lead, half-length lead settling, given more rein 600m, asked for an effort 360m, under heavy drive 250m, found plenty.
Away well, eased out of speed battle, settled fore of midfield 1 off, lost position 520m, crowded 350m, kept on moderately.

Away on terms, lacked early speed, improved 1250m, under heavy riding 1100m, settled just beyond midfield 1 off, again under hard riding 800m, dropped back to 3rd last, pulled centre track, limited response until 150m, stayed on.
Slowly away, hard ridden to stay in touch, settled tail on rail, pushed along 550m, bumping duel 500m, crowded 400m, pulled centre track, flew home.
Even break, pushed forward, in battle for position behind lead, settled 5th 1 off, asked to improve 580m, no impression, faded tamely.
Even break, settled beyond midfield on rail, ridden along 550m, crowded 500m, searching for runs 300m, split opened 250m, hit line well.
Slightly slow, restrained into midfield position on rail, nudged 600m, eased off rail 400m, under heavy drive 350m, crowded 280m, no answer.
Bumped at start, snagged to rear, settled tail 3 deep with cover, pushed widest into straight, ridden 400m, drifted beyond centre track, tailed off.

Rider slightly awkward in saddle out of gates, up near speed 1st turn, settled just ahead of midfield 1 off, ridden along 420m, burst between runners near inside 220m, sprinted strongly, died on run 50m.
Slow break, roused along, settled near tail on rail, crowded for room 500m, ridden along 430m, no response, tailed off.
Hopped in air at start, ridden along, settled fore of midfield 3 deep no cover, improved to challenge for lead 450m, momentary lead, stayed on but backwards 50m, weak late.
First out, hard ridden out wide to cross, finally got solo lead 1300m, overraced slightly, 4L lead 1000m, slowly reduced, joined 500m, ridden 400m, tapered out.
Slightly slow to begin, bustled, settled near tail 1 off, asked to improve 680m, ridden along 500m, loomed to win centre track 100m, outstayed.
Slightly slow break, nudged along, settled just beyond midfield 1 off, ridden along 470m, slow to pick up, rallied late, hit the line strongly.
Sharp start, early lead, passed 1300m, settled 3rd rail, overraced slightly, crowded 550m, ridden along 480m, on heels 200m, weakened.
Began well, pressed forward but eased, settled midfield 4 deep no cover, strode forward 600m, challenged lead 450m, under heavy drive, outright lead 200m, just found enough, game.
Jumped evenly, settled beyond midfield 3 deep with cover, niggled 880m, ridden along 680m, heavy drive 500m, no response.
Even break, settled midfield on rail, lost place 500m, ridden 440m, scrubbed along 270m, responded, made up handy late ground.

Away on terms, quickly outsped and snagged to rear, settled tail 1 off, lost touch with field momentarily, ridden to make ground 800m, driven 450m, pulled widest, made strong ground centre track, stayed on.
On back foot at start, rushed along, challenging for lead 1st turn, settled 2nd 1 off, moved up to equal lead 520m, ridden along 470m, quickly beaten.
Raced in midfield, 3L behind the leader 3 wide with cover, kept going and just missed out on 2nd.
Settled in worse than midfield, 4-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, ran on nicely to score by 1/2L.
Sent forward to take box-seat and sat 1-3/4L off, no daylight early in the Straight, made little impression thereafter.
In front of midfield, 1-1/2L off 3 wide without cover, assumed lead in the Straight until final 50M, couldn't match finish of the first 3.
Travelled in midfield, 4L behind 2 wide with cover, closed off strongly and finished 1/2L behind the winner.
Slow start and raced at the rear, 6-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, ran on well on the outer Straight.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 1L, headed and weakened upon straightening.
Eased back and travelled near the rear, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, no progress in the Straight.
Slow to jump and then settled in behind midfield, 5-1/4L behind on the rail, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind along the rail, switched wide and ran on only one paced.
Niggled forward and sat outside the leader, 1L off, crowded then steadied at 350M, did not run on.
At the rear throughout, never in contention.
Slotted into front of midfield, 2-1/4L off 2 wide with cover, slight dash early but ran on one paced from 200M.
Ridden forward initially but rider was dislodged at 1300M.
Fractious in gate, slow to move, taken to outside rail, dropping to near last. Allowed to coast under good tempo, switched in 200m to avoid heels, ran on fairly.
Jumped OK, restrained and taken closer to outside fence 3L from leader. Shaken up passing 350m, under whip 250m, surged forward late but unable catch winner.
Began only fairly, taken out for cover, dropping to rear, Switched in to centre track passing 500m and began long forward run to just miss out on the top four.
Began well, taken to outer fence and settled, dropping to midfield. Difficult ride from 600m when tended to lay out, then reluctant to shift in to get clear run, finished off nicely when clear.
Quickly in front, taken out but unable get closer then 3-away from outer rail. Set strong pace to 150m when collared before giving ground gradually.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward, holding outer rail 2L from leader. Travelled well to 300m when run ended and faded. Unacceptable performance.
Began well, not pushed, racing one-away from outer fence 3L from leader. Started forward move passing 400m, hit front 150m, pulled clear.
Bumped start, then checked, dropping to last on settling. Not asked for effort until 300m, hard ridden from 200m, ran on fairly.
Quickly away, shared early pace till settling a half length behind leader passing 700m. Kept on gamely to 250m when ran out of stamina and faded.
Began fairly, taken out but unable get closer than 3-wide from outer fence. Shaken up passing 400m and finished off nicely down centre track to be closest at finish.
Slow into stride, ridden but didn't muster, dropping towards the rear between horses. Put under pressure 400m but found nothing and faded.
Restrained after the jump, settled down 6Ls behind leader along the rail, lacked room 300-200M, kept on mildly towards the finish.
Held up 3-wide behind midfield, 5Ls to make up on leader 400M, kept on fairly to line only holding his position.
Jumped well to be 2nd in a strongly run race, had every chance turning in, continued to give chase but couldn't pull back the margin, lost 2nd 100M.
Close up in 3rd tracking the pace in strongly run race, hard driven chasing eventual winner passing 350M, went 2nd 100M, tried hard but couldn't reel in winner.
Up with early pace, taken keen hold, 4th home turn, kept up the chase on first 3 to 200, one paced final stages.
Began awkwardly, settled down in rear group 8Ls off the good pace, moved away from fence 450M, no clear run top of straight but only limited response after.
Held up in midfield along the rail, 4Ls off the strong pace on settling, no clear run to 300M, switched and ran on well making late gains on 3rd.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield in a strongly run race, 11th on settling, pulled wide 500M, gave brief response early straight, hit flat spot 250M, never reached contention.
Restrained on jumping, behind mid-division 6-7Ls back, held position to turn, ran on same pace under pressure, failed to get into contention.
From wide barrier couldn't get closer than 3-wide, no cover in midfield, ran on same pace final 400M, no threat to leaders.
Dropped back to rear from wide barrier, 8Ls off the good pace middle stages, brought widest 400M, closed off soundly for 5th, never nearer.
Travelled in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace at 400M, not quickened when placed under pressure, soon dropped away.
Sped to the lead, quickened tempo 1200M, kicked clear 250M, continued on strongly to line, never in danger and won with something in hand. (Class record time.)
Failed to muster speed, dropped back to last 9Ls off the pace, caught 3 deep home turn, plenty to do 400M, ran past a couple of beaten ones, never involved.
Jumped OK, no pace, dropping towards rear but wide. Kept wide around home turn, taken even wider in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Began well, rolled forward, settling 3L from leader in one-off position. Took inside run in straight, got clear run 350m, hard ridden for narrow win.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind horses, dropping to rear in one-off position. Switched out turning for home to make run but only one-paced under hard riding.
Crowded out start, shifted across behind horses, dropping to last. Trailed field to straight, took rails run and ran on steadily to be closest at the finish.
Pressed forward from widest draw, racing 4-wide before cutting in 900m to sit a half length outside leader. Under pressure from 300m and faded gradually.
Began fairly, outpaced before taken to fence 900m, 5L from leader. Took rails run in straight but held for clear running, switched out 200m to make run but held up again close to line.
Bumped start, pressed forward, steadied 800m but kept 3-wide mostly, about 2L from leader. Wide into straight, kept on fairly to 200m before giving ground.
Crowded out at start, restrained and shifted across to rail, settling behind midfield. Kept on fairly to straight when soon under pressure and faded gradually.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping towards rear. Shaken up 500m, no clear run top of straight, boxed on one-paced.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across to inner rail, settling towards rear. Improved position around turn, switched out in straight and ran on steadily between horses.
Hard ridden to lead on settling, then set good pace to straight. Overtaken passing 300m but kept battling to 100m when swamped.
Began well, pushed forward from wide draw, settling ahead of midfield in one-off position. Switched out entering straight and ran on strongly to just miss a placing.
Away nicely, led for a few strides before settling in box seat 1050m. Came off fence 500m, hit front 400m, kept drifting to centre track and run down close to line.
Began well, ridden along to hold midfield position one-away from fence. Switched out in straight to make run but only one-paced.
Pushed early to get to the front, and share early lead. Pulled away from challenger at 150m, and went strongly to the line without being challenged late.
Began awkwardly and dropped back early, before pushing along the rails to sit midfield. Gave nothing at the top of the straight and not persevered with over the last 200m.
Went forward early to be prominently placed, eventually settling 2nd, 3/4L off the leader. Shared the lead from the top of the straight, until peaking at the 150m, and dropping away.
Settled midfield, 1 off the fence early. Ran OK in the straight, making up some ground late.
Not pushed hard early, settling 5th, 1 off the fence. Ran solidly in the straight, before kicking at the 150m. Easily clear for 2nd, but only gradually catching winner.
Eased back from the wider draw to settle at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Came wider on the turn, and ran steadily to the line.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to sit towards the rear of the field. Keen on heels mid race. Raced steadily in the straight, but never threatened.
Handily positioned early in 4th, on the rail and within striking distance of the leaders. Gave nothing in the straight, and eased out over the last 100m.
Eased back early, settling towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Only ran on fairly in the straight.

Pushed forward early to have a share of the lead, and racing keenly. Bumped, unbalanced and came off heels 1000m, and raced wide until the turn. Solid to the line, but struggled to make inroads on 1 and 2.
Bumped and unbalanced on jumping. Sat forward of midfield, but stuck 3 wide with no cover. Well positioned at the top of the straight, but only ever 1 paced and dropped out over the last 150m.
Didn't stretch out early, setting at the tail of the field, on the rail. Never in it. Jockey questioned.
Eased out from barrier 4 to eventually settle midfield, 3 wide. OK in the straight, and picked up some momentum late, but no threat of a place.
Couldn't get in from the wide draw, and stuck 4-5 wide no cover throughout. Didn't have much in the tank by the straight, and dawdled to the line under minimal urging late.
Moderate start, settled in rear of midfield on rails, angled out for a run entering home straight, ran on well to claim narrow victory under pressure.
Niggled along early stages, settled 2L back in 5th after straightening onto far side, in similar position turning for home, hung in a difficult ride in the run home.

Jumped fairly, raced wide in prominent position before tightened and shifted backward to midfield coming onto stables bend, in similar position when carried wider entering home straight, found no extra.
Taken back from a wide gate, trailed the field to straight, finished off race well despite having had to switch off heels 200 metres out.
Settled in last few, came under pressure rounding home bend, found nothing.
Niggled along, travelled mainly one back on rails in 4th, dropped out tamely in straight.

Began well from a wide gate, worked forward 3-wide around stables bend to reach 1L back in 3rd far side, made short-lived effort to join the leader 300 metres out, faded out of contention inside final 200 metres.
Settled in last few, came to challenge under pressure turning in, switched in and ran on well down inside of straight to snatch 3rd late.
Began well, settled in 6th in forward of midfield on rails, quickened well under pressure to hold every chance inside final 200 metres but unable to peg back the winner throughout closing stages.
Taken back for cover, travelled just worse than midfield, came under strong pressure rounding home bend, very wide turning in, ran home one-paced. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Pressed forward from the widest gate to settle in 2nd outside the leader, came under pressure to hold place rounding home bend, folded up quickly after straightening.
Made running to straight, found no extra under pressure when headed 200 metres out.
Pushed early to hold the rail, shuffled back to midfield, pace good, flattened 200M.
Behind midfield, trapped 3 wide, pace good, checked 200M, ran on fairly.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, out of fuel 250M.
At back, along the fence, pace good, ran on ok in final stages.
Raced 4-5 wide throughout, emptied 250M.
Hard ridden forward, took rail and led at good pace, soon dropped off 300M.
Eased at start, 2 wide at back, pace good, raced flat until 200M to make steady ground.
Midfield with cover, 2 wide, made steady ground 300M to score.
Pushed forward early but failed to cross, soon eased back to midfield, sat 2 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 250M for 2nd.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3-4 wide, pace good, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, pace good, flattened 200M.
Eased to rear, took rail, pace good, no progress in straight.
At back always, never looked likely.
Settled worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never ran on.
Raced midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well to score by 1-1/4Ls when clear 250M.
At rear throughout, never a factor.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, finished off nicely.
Prominent, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide without cover, improved gradually when the pace slackened from 800M, kept on gamely to get 2nd.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader early stages, quickened the pace from 1200M to take the fence and lead, kept on nicely until weakened over the final stages.
Settled midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, improved gradually when the pace slackened from 800M, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Rolled forward to take the fence and lead early stages, steadied to take a seat from 900M, found nothing when place under pressure soon after straightening.
Prominent, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, closed to the line well.
Sharp start & bustled to edge lead 3 deep, strode on 900m, to rail & soon 1L clear, steadied on turn, neck up & driven 300m, no extra, headed 200m & swamped.
Vied for early lead wide, settled close 2nd 1off no cover, driven to clear lead 200m, emptied & headed 110m, swamped & faded.
Broke ok, settled rail near rear, niggled along, hard driven 250m, found little in tepid run home.
Taken back from widest to rail 2nd last, switched 1 off for progress 550m, shifted widest on turn & shaken up, rattled to lead 110m, in command.
Tardy break & bustled to midfield 3 wide with cover, 1 off 550m, under pump 400m, shifted out home turn & hard-ridden, quickened to 2nd 110m, held.
Moderate break, raced 1 off near rear, shifted 3 deep for progress 600m, driven in, bumped & unbalanced 160m, kept on, just missed frame.
Smart start, restrained to park midfield 1 off with cover, shuffled back 550m, driven into stretch, shifted out & bumped rival 160m, switched in & no extra.
Broke with others & speed to press lead 1 off, settled rail 1 back 850m, driven 300m, one paced in run.
Awkward start, lost ground & raced detached at tail, niggled along, plugged on evenly in stretch to pass beaten rivals.
Fast start but caught wide, snagged to midfield 4 wide no cover, rolled to vie for 4th 3 deep 450m, wider into stretch, weakened in run.
Smart start & vied for lead on rail, snagged 1000m to midfield, switched out & driven 300m, closed in tight quarters until checked last strides.
Fast start & bustled wide, slotted 1 back 1 off 900m, niggled 600m, driven wide final turn, stayed on soundly without threatening.
Slightly slow to begin, eased, settled beyond midfield 1 off, slightly keen, lost position 800m, ridden along near tail 600m, no room 450m, short of room in straight, finished evenly.

Head on side but first to break, eased but then edged forward in search of cover, stranded midfield 3 deep no cover, hanging throughout, improved 550m, under pressure 450m, pulled centre track, challenge short-lived.
Began well, ridden along but outpaced early, settled midfield on rail, under pressure 680m, crowded 450m, took inside run, ridden 330m, short spurt, outpaced, eased.
Very awkward at start, restrained to rear, ridden along, overraced, settled near tail 1 off, shifted 3 deep cover 800m, pushed 350m, pulled centre track, limited response.
Away on terms, hard ridden early, settled fore of midfield 1 off, niggled 1300m, asked for an effort 550m, under hard drive 400m, responded 200m, gritty.
Sharp break, jumped inwards, natural pace to challenge for lead, settled 2nd 1 off, nudged 500m, driven 370m, ranged up 250m, kept on one-paced.
Strong start, bustled along, eased out of speed battles, settled 3rd on rail in box seat, niggled 500m, under heavy drive 420m, stuck near inside, stayed on.
Even break, crossed to rail, booted up to lead 1st turn, 1.5L lead 1100m, comfortable tempo, bustled entering stretch, joined 300m, fought on gamely, faded 50m.
Slow break, restrained to rear, settled tail on rail, pulled 3 deep at 800m, pushed 4 deep soon after, improved around field 600m, under a drive 400m, widest straight, eased.

Awkward out of the gates, squeezed out, snagged, settled beyond midfield on rail, relegated to tail 700m, travelling strongly with limited space, clear last 400m, asked for effort between runners 300m,sprinted powerfully,comfortable.
Pushed forward and sat outside the leader, ran on but couldn't match the winner's effort and missed out by a nose.
Travelled in behind midfield, 4-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, made good ground in the Straight.
Ridden up to take spot in front of midfield, 2L off 3 wide with cover, kept on one paced in the run home.
Sent forward and obtained box-seat, sat 2-1/4L off, unbalanced along the Back Straight, did not run on.
Eased to race at the rear, 4-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, made some ground from 200M onwards.
Raced at the rear, 5-3/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, gained ground nicely on the outer Straight.
Slotted into midfield, 3-3/4L behind along the rail, slight dash at 150M after initially being one paced.
Ridden forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, headed when emptied passing 200M.
Missed start and remained at the rear, never a factor.
Settled in midfield, 2-1/2L behind the leader 2 with cover, switched wide and ran on one paced for 4th.
Pushed forward and settled in one-off one-back position, 1-3/4L behind, remained in touch until 200M weakened.
Eased and slotted into midfield, 3-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, closed off nicely to score by a nose.
Began fairly, quickly taken in to find cover, settling towards rear in one-off position. Put under pressure passing 500m, taken to centre track on straightening and finished off strongly.
Allowed to roll forward on jumping, sitting one-away from the fence but 2L from leader. Shuffled back to 3rd passing 550m, but kept battling to 200m before giving ground gradually.
Hard ridden early to get forward position before settling on rail 3L from leader. Raced in restricted space turning form home, got rails run in straight but spent force passing 200m.
Began fairly, quickly taken in from outside draw to settle 3-back, one-off first turn. Shaken-up 550m, taken to centre track on straightening, finished strongly while laying in to win close home.
Jumped OK but right stirrup buckle broke near 1700m placing jockey at severe disadvantage. Kept wide behind midfield to straight before eased out final 200m.
Pressed forward from outside draw and left wide from 1400m, 3L from leader. Rolled forward from 700m to take lead 550m, then kept finding when challenged until run down final strides.
Began well but not pushed, settling between horses 3L from leader. Started forward move passing 500m, turned wide, ran on strongly to just miss.
Lifted front legs as gates opened and slow into stride. Shown persuader but didn't muster, dropping to last. Trailed field to straight where made little impression.
Quickly into stride, leading field to 1450m before slipping into box seat 2L from leader. Came under pressure from 700m and gave ground quickly.
Jumped with field, taken to rail, then eased 3-back from leader. Came off fence 500m, got run between horses in straight, ran on steadily.
Began well, rolled forward taking lead 1450m before crossing to fence 1200m. Overtaken 550m but kept battling until swamped last couple of strides.
Crowded out start, taken to rail but outpaced, dropping to rail at rear. Made no effort until entering straight then only one-paced.
Prominent behind leader, had every chance final 300M, kept on moderately holding his position, couldn't accelerate enough.
Caught 3 deep behind mid-division, 4Ls back at 400M, worked home fairly without threatening.
Drove forward to be just off leader, came under pressure 450M, soon couldn't keep up and weakened away.
Taken back from wide barrier, in last over 6Ls off leader, never near to challenge.
Slightly slow out, reserved in midfield 4Ls off the pace, responded moderately top of straight, no clear run near 200M and checked late stages.
Niggled along early stages and improved to 4th at 600M, couldn't finish off entering straight, no threat inside 200M.
Taken back from wide barrier, settled down 2nd last 5-6Ls off the pace, brought out-wide 350M, hit line strongly getting up last few strides.
Sent forward, had uncontested lead to straight, kept on gamely in straight, just couldn't hold off winner last few strides.
Began awkwardly, settled down 4-5Ls back along the rail, kept on same pace only when driven out 300M, no threat to leaders.
Not far off but was wide without cover throughout, fought on same pace and no extra 200M.
Jumped well from draw 1, reserved in midfield 3Ls back, made steady gains on leader over final 300M. (Lame LF)
Not hurried early stages, held up 10th 5Ls off the pace, worked home well passing 300M, hampered late and not ridden out near finish.
Ridden to share early pace on stands rails, unable to sustain effort inside the final 250 metres. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Settled towards the rear, commenced move inside final 400 metres, kept on steadily under pressure.
Jumped awkwardly, settled in midfield, came to challenge inside final 400 metres, fought on steadily without threatening the first two.
Began awkwardly losing ground, travelled just worse than midfield on stands rails about 3L off the pace, inconvenienced 200 metres out, kept on at the one pace.
Never better than midfield.
Slow out, travelled well behind, finished off race strongly despite wayward behaviour closing stages. (Jockey questioned)
Never far off, commenced move coming onto course proper, hit the front under pressure passing the 50 metres.
Prominent racing well off the stands rails without cover, folded up quickly half-way out.
Jumped well, settled one off the pace, gave ground steadily inside the final 250 metres.
Held narrow lead most of way only to be collared close to home.
Soon dropped to tail-end, ran past two well-beaten horses closing stages.
Jumped well, settled within 2L of pace on stands rails, ran home one paced.
Slow away, pushed to sit in midfield, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400M whilst hanging in badly, just beaten by narrow margin in 2nd.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, no progress.
Eased back, took rail, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M.
Hard ridden to keep up with the field at rear, 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, ran on fairly.
Raced 3-4 wide, never a factor at rear.
Pressed forward, sat 2 wide just off the leader, not suited by the fast pace, took lead from 350M, hung on well until 50M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, suited by the fast pace, made steady ground 400M, run ended 100M.
At back along the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Eased back, raced 3-4 wide, suited by the fast tempo, lack turn of foot.
Pushed to obtain box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, held ground in straight, lack room close to the line.
At back, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, ran on ok in straight.
Pressed forward, 2 wide, not suited by the fast sectionals, ran on well until 200M flattened.
Hard ridden forward, harmed by the fast pace, faded rapidly 500M.
Eased to sit in midfield early, however trapped very wide, improved steady from 1200M to get closer to the fence, not suited by the fast tempo, emptied 350M.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on one pace to the line.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide without cover, weakened badly over the last furlong.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and share the lead, kept on strongly until final 50M headed by the winner.
At rear, travelled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, made some ground along the inside.
Taken back to the rail from a wide gate, travelled 6Ls behind the leader, made some ground along the inside without threatening.
At rear throughout, never looked competitive.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, kept on gamely until final 50M headed by the winner to hold 3rd.
Crowded start, raced worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader, swung wide turning in, flattened 200M.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on gradually until weakened final 100M.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never looked likely.
Settled in front of midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily without extra acceleration for 4th.
Always at back, never ran on.
Rolled forward to obtain the box seat, dashed well to score by 3/4L.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, one paced until weakened final 100M.
Broke with others, rousted initially to advance on fence, soon settled & eased to lead 800m, 1L up & kicked on 400m, drew away, comfortable.
Awkward start & lost 2L, recovered to race 2nd last on inner, driven 400m, tame effort.
Smart start, taken back to 3 deep back of midfield, advanced 570m, 5th & driven 400m, kept on one pace.
Front rank at break, soon taken back, trapped 4 wide no cover back of midfield, hard-ridden final turn, boxed on dourly centre track.
Broke ok & handy, soon snagged to midfield 1 off with cover, driven turning in, boxed on evenly.
Broke with others, settled 1 off behind midfield, snatched off heels 700m & lost 1L, driven 380m & switched out home turn, kept on tepidly.
Broke ok but soon outpaced & bustled at tail, wide into stretch & driven, responded & stayed on to grab 3rd late.
Started well& closed 3 deep no cover, slotted 1 off 1 back 700m, 4th & driven 500m, shifted centre track, quickened to go 2nd 150m, well held.
Front rank initially, soon settled 1 back on rail, niggled 660m receded to midfield, hard driven turning in, found nil & eased 230m.
Broke with others widest & advanced 5 deep to press lead 3 deep at 700m, soon 2nd 1 off, driven into stretch but out-kicked & tapered out.
Speed & punched to slight lead 1080m, raced 1 off & headed 700m, soon under pump & outpaced in 3rd, plugged on tepidly & faded out final 200m.
Broke with others, lacked toe & bustled rail back of midfield, shifted out & driven home turn, plugged on one pace.
Slowly away, hard ridden to improve, settled just beyond midfield 3 wide cover, hard ridden until 900m, improved quickly 700m, ridden 520m, pulled centre track, raced up 250m, couldn't go on.
Away well, allowed to drift back, settled beyond midfield 4 deep no cover, got cover 3 wide at 750m, improved 650m, ridden 500m, pulled widest, hanging right, made ground out wide, determined.
Slightly slow to begin, hard ridden, settled just beyond midfield on rail, bustled along, ridden for luck 450m, tight 400m, again 280m and 220m, on heels 100m, no luck.
Awkward beginning, hard ridden, settled midfield 3 deep no cover, improved 700m, ridden along 500m, challenge short-lived, quickly beaten.
Fastest to begin, hard ridden to cross, down to rail 1200m, 0.5L lead 1000m, clicked up 450m, joined 150m, weakened late.
Even break, natural speed to settle 4th rail, ridden 520m, under hard riding 350m, short of room 200m, boxed on.
Began evenly, snagged to last from outside gate, badly outpaced and distant last ridden along, under hard riding 600m, small inroads late but well beaten.
Even start, natural speed to settle ahead of midfield 1 off, travelled strongly, pulled 4 deep 450m to make run, took time to wind up, outsprinted.
Lacked early speed, niggled, settled beyond midfield 1 off, never travelled, niggled again 500m, asked for full effort 400m, short of room 350m, weakened.
Broke evenly, snagged to rear from wide gate, settled near tail 1 off, niggled 1000m, losing ground 750m, back to last 650m, eased right down, tailed off.
Ridden early to push forward, eased out of speed battle, settled 3rd 1 off, overracing slightly, shifted three wide and ridden 550m, first to challenge for lead 350m, limited response.
Quick to begin, initially ridden along, unable to match speed, settled midfield 1 off, under riding 900m, lost place 650m, ridden 480m, sprinted up 120m, peaked on run 50m.
Away on terms, ridden to go forward, joined lead at 1150m, eased to settle 2nd 1 off, asked to improve 500m, quickly headed off, eased down.
Began well, eased for cover, settled midfield on rail, improved 1000m, searching for a run 350m, short of room 200m, emerged between gap 150m, took lead 100m, raced away.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 1L, headed and emptied near 250M.
Raced at the rear end, 8L behind 2 wide with cover, made minor ground and passed tiring runners only.
Travelled at the rear, 8-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, switched widest, made good ground and closed off nicely.
Slotted into midfield, 5L behind 3 wide without cover, not competitive.
Took position in midfield, 5L behind along the rail, showed nothing in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, kept going and finished off nicely for 2nd.
Settled in front of midfield, 3-1/2L off along the rail, held up early, showed good dash in final 200M to finish 4th.
Always at the back, never a factor.
Raced towards the rear, 6-3/4L behind along the rail, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Travelled in behind midfield, 6L behind 2 wide with cover, one paced in the run home.
Slotted into midfield, 4-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, closed off well but couldn't match first two inside final 150M.
Pushed forward and took box-seat, sat 2L off the leader, hit the line strongly to score by 1/2L.
Sent forward and raced 1L behind and outside the leader, kept on until weakened at 300M.
Began fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear but away from fence. Raced right early in straight, switched out and finished off strongly.
Vigorously ridden to get forward position before being eased passing 1200m when 3L from leader. Not much room top of straight but battled on one-paced when clear.
Pressed forward from widest draw, racing very wide till settling three-parts of a length outside leader 1400m. Made brief challenge on straightening before running out of stamina and fading.
Hard ridden from wide draw to stay with early pace but kept wide mostly. Lost position 900m dropping behind midfield, taken wide in straight, boxed on under hard riding before steadied 100m.
Outpaced, then shifted across behind runners to rail, trailing field to 800m. Stayed on rail around turn, given reminders passing 300m, ran on fairly.
Hard ridden from outside draw, taking lead passing 1500m and crossing to fence. Kicked ahead in straight but collared 150m. Held on for third.
Began well, pushed forward to take box seat 3L from leader. Raced tight passing 1300m, held for run early straight. Powered through split 250m to lead and then held off strong challenge.
Jumped well but unable handle early pace, dropping towards rear and kept 3-wide mostly. Taken to centre track on straightening and ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Ridden early to stay with pace before easing one-back, one-off passing 1400m. Kept on steadily till 200m before coming under pressure and fading.
Began fairly, ridden forward to hold rail, settling behind midfield. Travelled smoothly to 300m when held for run, steadied 200m, boxed on one-paced.
Lifted front legs as gates opened and slow into side. Taken to fence and made up ground to 1400m when settled. No run early in straight, but ran on fairly when clear.
Pushed forward from wide draw, settling 3L from leader but mostly 3-deep without cover. Battled on gamely early in straight before turning one-paced final stages.
Allowed to settle, dropping behind midfield in one-off position. Blocked for run early in straight, angled out 300m for clear passage, powered home to just fail.
Crowded out start, outpaced, dropping to rear but wide. Taken wide entering straight, but only one-paced under hard riding.
Taken back from wide barrier, 2nd last 7Ls behind leader making the turn, made steady gains final 300M and fared best among those coming from off the pace.
Settled towards the rear 6-7Ls back, ran on only one pace, not reach contention.
Began only fairly, urged along and improved to 3rd 700M, inclined to hang in when placed under pressure and proved difficult to ride, made late gains on 3rd when straightened up.
Not hurried early stages, towards the rear 6Ls off the pace, brought wide 500M but stayed on only fairly, never dangerous.
Not far off the pace but had to be niggled along to keep up with leaders, unable to make gains when driven out 300M, faded towards the finish.
Jumped well to be 2nd tracking leader, continued the chase entering straight, kept battling to the line but was always held.
Caught wide no cover chasing leaders, eased down 400M. Jockey said his mount felt sore but no vet findings. Unacceptable Performance.
Settled down midfield, 6Ls to make up 400M, stayed on without threatening.
In mid-division 3-4Ls off the pace, saved ground on the rail, remained inside on straightening but well held by leaders in the run home.
Outpaced in detached last, 9Ls off leader 400M, eased early straight when no chance, never in it.
Took keen hold early stages, no closer than 3-wide in running, responded well to pressure with a sustained run from 400M, led 100M and drew clear for successive win.
Quickly into stride, led at good pace to straight, continued on well when challenged by a rival but couldn't fend off fast finishing winner final 100M.
Vigorously ridden to go forward before settling midfield along rail, lost position passing 700m, got inside run in straight, made ground to 200m before turning one-paced.
Vigorously ridden, racing with pace before losing position 1000m. Rolled forward 3-wide from 800m, battled strongly to 200m when tightened and lost momentum.
Jumped well, ridden forward but trapped wide. Rolled forward from 1000m circling field to lead 750m. Kept on well till overtaken 300m, faded.
Steadied soon after start and shifted across behind horses, settling at rear in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished strongly to grab minor placing.
Began awkwardly, crowded, then shifted across behind horses dropping to last. Trailed field to straight, took inside run and ran on fairly.
Hard ridden on jumping, racing with pace till taking lead 1150m. Set steady pace to 750m when overtaken. Involved in bumping match 400m but kept on one-paced.
Hard ridden to lead on jumping before easing into box seat passing 1000m. Came off fence 600m, 4-wide into straight, picked up momentum from 200m, hit the front close home and pulled clear.
Began well but unable to maintain early pace, dropping to midfield. Began forward move from 700m, very wide into straight, one-paced.
Jumped OK, ridden but didn't muster, dropping towards rear and moving to rail. Come off fence 700m, but switched in again 350m, gaining ground to 200m before turning one-paced.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide 3L from leader. Lost position passing 700m but boxed on gamely to 200m before giving ground.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward along rail to behind midfield. Angled out 800m to move forward but blocked for run early straight, then checked 250m, faded.
Outpaced early, dropping to rear, racing between horses. Took turn 4-wide, boxed on early in straight till tightened 250m, then one-paced.
Taken back soon after jump and shifted across behind runners, settling at rear but wide, Took off 4-wide from 600m, very wide into straight, ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Pressed forward 3-wide till settling a half-length outside leader 1000m. Involved in bumping match entering straight but quickly picked up speed to lead 300m before being run down close to line.
Cruised forward early, and settled around midfield. Not worked hard in the straight, and made no impression.
Taken forward early, with a clear run near the centre of the track. Had no kick, and eased out last 150m.
Settled at the back of the field early. Showed nothing during the race, and never pushed out.
Drifted across to sit around midfield. Tried to come out away from heels at 350m, before coming back in again. Raced tight when attempting a run between horses at 200m and only fair to the line late.
Pushed up early to share the lead. Faded from the 200m, and only hands and heels late.
Cruised forward early, eventually settling last. Battled to keep up, and only went past some slower ones late.

Broke well, and taken across early to sit 3 off the outside rail, with a clear run in front. Ran strongly in the straight, but couldn't match it with the winner and not pushed last 50m when assured 2nd.
Eased across early to have a clear run down the straight. One paced, and no kick.
Had to come across from the inside draw to sit midfield, up the centre of the track. Stayed on well late, under minimal urging.

Badly crowded on jumping, & forced to the back of the field early. Lost a run at the 400m, and came out off heels to keep pressing forward. Got into a narrow gap at 100m, and finished well, despite not being able to use the persuader.
Allowed to be crossed early, settling on the rail, 1 behind the leaders. Battled on fairly late, without threatening a place.
Fractious in the barrier and slow to begin, but still managed to cross to the outside rail. Boxed in over the final 300m, and was never tested in the run to the line.
Came across early to sit behind the leaders, 1 off the outside rail. Looking for a run from the 250m, moving closer to the centre of the track. OK to the line late, just missing a place.
Showed good early speed to go straight to the front. Got moving at the 250m, and away clear. Hands and heels late when well ahead.
Slightly slow out, raced 8 lengths back on rail at rear, saved ground on turn, angled out in straight and made reasonable progress to make frame.
Average to begin, raced 8 lengths or so back at rear, 3 wide on turn, emptied early in straight, never competitive.
Bumped and unbalanced start, raced 9 lengths back at rear, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, finished off evenly thereafter.
Bumped, unbalanced start, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover in 5th, similar position on turn, emptied early in straight.
Slightly slowly away, recovered to race 3 lengths back on rail in 4th, similar position on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, there to turn, bumped early in straight, failed to close off.
Jumped well from gate 1, positioned well in 2nd, 2 lengths back on turn, took the lead near 200M, kept on well to score easily.
Jumped well from a wide draw, sent forward to take the lead, easy lead on turn, headed near 200M, but still stayed on to get 3rd.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths back in 3rd, there to turn, finished off evenly.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, difficult to settle near 900M, angled out near 500M, made some headway in straight without threatening.
Jumped with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position turning, bumped near 350M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Slightly slow out, positioned 5 lengths or so back in midfield, same margin back turning, finished off evenly in straight.
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 8 to 9 lengths back at rear, kept to inside after turning in, finished off one-paced.
Bumped start, raced at tail, still 10 lengths back on turn, came wide but set too much to do, still finished off very strongly to grab 2nd.
Failed to muster and soon dropped to tail-end, given reminders at the back of the field rounding home bend, ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Jumped fairly from a wide gate, travelled in forward of midfield without cover far side and similarly wide rounding home bend, made modest impression late.
Began well but soon taken back to settle in midfield, faded out of contention from home bend.
Jumped slowly, soon recovered to just worse than midfield on rails, saved ground turning in, some 3L back in 4th into straight, fought on steadily.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, gained slightly closer rounding home bend, inconvenienced briefly after straightening, fought on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly, settled in midfield on rails, commenced move rounding home bend gaining to 3L 3rd into straight, fought on dourly to just get up on line.
Broke well to lead from the widest gate, obtained rails run in the front at the Rock, kicked nearly 2L clear around home bend, unable to sustain effort and worn down close to home.
Moderate start, soon picked up to prominent position 3-wide without cover, slightly worse rounding home bend, one-paced under pressure in the run to the line.
Slightly slow out, settled in last few, made good progress past beaten runners inside final 200 metres, did best work late.
Jumped fairly, ridden early in prominent position within 2L of pace, faded out of contention from approaching home turn.
Settled in midfield, 3-wide rounding home bend, made no impression in straight.
Ridden for speed early, taken back to just over 1L behind the leader on rails, failed to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Hard ridden forward to lead, dropped off quickly 300M.
Pushed to obtain a midfield spot along the fence, little dash 200M.
Very slow away, never competitive at rear.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, emptied 250M.
Hard ridden to sit in front of midfield, 2 wide, ran on until 150M flattened.
Very slow away, took rail at back, little dash 200M.
Eased back, 2 wide, ran on ok in straight.
Eased to occupy box seat, ran on well for 2nd.
Settled 3 back along the fence, closed off strongly 250M and scored.
Eased at start, took rail, made ground 200M.
Eased at start, 2 wide at rear, never improved.
Midfield, 2-3 wide, just held ground in final stages.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, kept on steadily for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, ran on gradually for 4th.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, made no impression in straight.
Pushed forward to take the lead along the fence, kept on until weakened over the last furlong.
Jumped slowly, slotted in and settled 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well to get 2nd when clear 150M.
Settled in front of midfield about 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on one pace to the line without threatening.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, kicked nicely to score by 1.5Ls.
Always at back, never looked likely.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, one paced home.
Prominent, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, soon weakened after straightening.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Started ok widest, bustled forward to lead 1030m, soon to rail & set tempo, 2L clear & shaken up 400m, hard-driven in run, all out & just held on.
Raced at tail on rail initially, advanced a place 600m, ridden 300m, limited response in tepid stretch run.
Speed to lead, soon eased &settled 1 back on fence, under pump 400m, shifted out turning in & vied for 2nd, boxed on one-pace & swamped late.
Moderate break, raced back of midfield 1 off with cover, hard-ridden 400m, wide & bumped final turn, stayed on moderately.
Taken back to race near rear 1 off with cover, switched wide & driven 400m, widest into stretch, rattled home, just missed frame.
Broke well, steadied to settle rail midfield, driven turning in, kept on evenly.
Fast start, bustled to settle 4th 1 off 1 back, niggled 500m, hard-driven 250m & closed without threatening.
Broke ok, handy 3 wide no cover until rolled to 2nd 1 off at 600m, niggled 430m & soon ridden along, under pressure turning in, found nil & wilted.
Taken behind to rail & rolled to midfield, driven & shifted out home turn, rattled centre track to 2nd 50m, kept closing, just failed.
Broke ok, overraced midfield 1 off with cover, wide into stretch & driven, unbalanced 200m, one-paced to line.
Broke with others, soon outpaced, niggled but drifted back, rousted at tail 500m, 2L adrift turning in, never a factor & eased closing stages.
Broke with others, raced midfield 3 wide, without cover from 600m, forced wide final turn, hard-ridden closing stages, plugged on evenly.
Slightly slow, bustled to head forward, speed battle to first turn, eased to settle 2nd 1 off, asked to improve 430m, under a heavy drive 320m, no response, dropped out sharply.
Edged along out of gates, niggled to hold spot, kept off rail, settled beyond midfield 1 off, clicked up 600m, heavy drive 500m, slow to pick up, not much room 200m, stayed on.

Began well, natural speed to be on heels of leaders at first turn, eased to midfield 1 off, niggled 1200m, never travelled well, lost spot 500m, hard ridden 400m, drifted towards rail drastically 150m, stayed on.
Eased at start, down to rail, ridden to hold spot, settled just beyond midfield on rail, ridden entering straight 320m, short of room 200m, off balance 120m, sprinted well.
Away strongly, ridden to hold spot on inside, settled 3rd on rail, under pressure 500m, switched over heels 300m, challenged strongly, hit lead 150m, sprinted clear.
Away fairly, no natural speed, ridden to keep up, settled tail 1 off, clicked up 500m, driven along widest 300m, never in contention.
Awkwardly away, snagged behind, ridden along to stay in touch, settled near tail on rail, relegated to clear last 700m, bustled 500m, short of room 380m, hanging right 250m, plugged away.

Sharp beginning, natural speed to vie for lead, restrained into midfield on rail, pulling slightly, improved 500m, short of room 400m, switched inside 270m, outside 240m, sprinted, squeezed badly 150m, almost fell, eased to line.
Ridden from start, unable to match speed inside him, eased back, settled near rear 3 deep no cover, improved 850m, midfield 600m, ridden along 500m, one-paced.
Began on terms, edged forward, 3 deep first turn, clear lead 1280m, took control of rider, 4L lead 1200m, extended 1000m, finally under control 700m, under pressure 300m, found little.
Prominent initially but wide, settled outside the lead after 800M, pressed winner from 200M, missed by a short head.
Sent forward to take the lead along the rail, held off challenge from 200M to score in a tight battle to the wire.
Eased to race towards the rear, 5-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, slight dash passing the 200M only.
Raced just in front of midfield, 2-3/4L off and 3 wide without cover after 800M, showed nothing in the Straight.
Rolled forward and took box-seat, became detached gradually in the Back Straight, not competitive.
Taken back and raced at the rear, 6-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Crowded start then raced in midfield, 3-3/4L behind along the rail, ran on well inside 100M to be closest at finish.
Always at the back, never a factor.
Initially outside the leader, settled one-off one-back after 800M, kept on one paced and no extra inside 100M.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, never in contention in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide with cover, kept on only one paced in the run home.
Slotted in just behind midfield, 4-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, made minor ground until 150M.
Jumped well, stayed with pace until crossed 900m and started to over-race. Left without cover from 700m, swung wide entering straight, finished off strongly to fail narrowly.

Began well, shared pace to 1100m before easing into box seat, 2L behind leader. Allowed to coast along to 250m when got run inside leader, then involved in neck-a-neck duel before scraping ahead to narrow win.
Steadied on jumping to find cover but crowded out and lost ground, dropping to rear. Made forward move 700m but lay out 500m. Taken to centre track on straightening and ran on fairly.
Away nicely, ridden forward, settling in one-off position 3L from leader, Made short-lived effort on straightening turning one-paced final 200m.
Began fairly, taken to fence, settling behind midfield. Started to over-race passing 600m, kept on fairly to 200m before tiring.
Jumped with field but no early speed, dropping towards rear but away from fence. Stayed at rear throughout and found nothing when asked in straight. Rider dropped whip 200m.
No early pace and last on settling. Trailed field to straight, made short-lived effort 300m but tired quickly and faded.
Began fairly, tightened, dropping toward rear along rail. Took inside run on straightening but only one-paced under hard riding.
Jumped OK but not pressed, dropping to midfield along rail 4L from leader. Shaken up passing 400m, took rail run in straight and ran on steadily for distant fourth.
Good start, pressed forward in one-off position 3L from leader. Lost position turning for home and gave ground gradually in straight.
Quickly into stride, sharing pace until settling three-quarters of a length behind leader passing 900m. Shaken up passing 300m but soon under pressure and faded.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to lead on settling, then set good pace to straight. Joined up front 250m and battled on strongly to line to just fail.
Settled 2-wide behind mid-division, 5Ls to make up 400M, pulled to the center worked home well for 4th.
Went forward from wide barrier, gradually made his way to the front without making too much use, kept going entering straight but passed by looming runners close home.
Dropped back after the start, shifted to a rail position near the rail 7Ls behind leader, made some progress over 300M but never seriously threatened.
Settled down midfield 5Ls off the slow pace, ran on same pace entering straight holding his position only.
Drove forward and crossed to the rail 1000M, switched to 2-wide 600M and vying for lead from 350M, no match with winner final stages but kept to task until the finish.
Quickly away, close up behind leaders but travelled keenly middle stages when pace slackened, stayed in touch with the front runners till 150M, outsprinted late.
Taken across behind horses, raced as the back marker 9Ls behind leader in a slowly run race, made limited progress only.
Eased back to the rear after the jump, settled down 7-8Ls off the pace in a slowly run race, 2nd last turning for home, never near to challenge.
In 5th 3Ls behind leader, weakened passing 300M, eased. (Bled 2nd time.)
Jumped well, restrained behind leaders in a slowly run race, raced tight early straight before quickened up smartly when driven out 200M, led 100M and going clear.
Began only fairly, held a midfield position along the rail, stayed on moderately towards the finish.
Taken across behind runners after the start, settled down 6Ls off the pace in 9th, made limited headway never a serious threat.
Began fairly, badly checked and dropped to last shortly after start, made no impression thereafter.
Broke well, settled mainly in midfield, similar entering home straight, made some late impression.
Broke well from the middle draw, soon taken back to last few, made no progress on the bend and in straight, never a factor.

Moderate start, soon recovered to within 3L of speed on rails, made steady headway round home bend to reach 2nd about 2L off the lead, unable to sustain effort in straight and swamped inside final 100 metres.
Began from a wide gate, gradually settled in last few, saved ground turning for home, fought on steadily without threatening.

Sluggish at start, ridden before settling about 2L off the lead in 6th when 3-wide onto first turn, became 8th on the bend and switched wider entering home straight, fought on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, vied for lead early stages and 4-wide amongst the leaders coming onto first turn, yielded ground on home bend. (Bled)
Jumped well, amongst leaders early, dropped to one-out-one-back position around home bend, soon weakened in straight. (Questioned for disappointing performance)
Slowly away, ridden to soon join the leaders, took up running on rails coming onto home bend, kicked 2L clear on straightening, unable to sustain effort and headed close to home.

Niggled along 3-wide just worse than midfield after beginning from a wide gate, obtained rails run on home bend and snuck up to 3L 5th into straight, sustained effort in the run home to just get up on line.
Worked his way up and across from the widest gate to join the leaders 5-wide onto first turn, remained very wide rounding home bend, dropped out of contention from about 450 metres out.
Broke well to hold slender lead, 3 wide onto first turn, drifted slightly backward to be 1L 3rd on home bend, lost further ground under pressure after straightening.
Hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, harmed by the slow tempo, lack room 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Eased to sit just off midfield, 2 wide, dashed well 400M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at slow sectionals, hung on until 250M flattened.
Hard ridden early, at back along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, held up 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, out of fuel 350M.
Eased to rear, never improved.
Midfield, 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow pace, no dash, flattened 200M.
Never competitive, tailed out.
Eased back, took rail, not suited by the slow tempo, no progress.
Hard ridden early, settled in front of midfield, 2 wide, just held ground in straight for 3rd.
Box seat, emptied 350M.
Midfield early but trapped very wide, moved forward from 1000M steadily to take advantages of the slow pace, sat 3 wide just off the leaders, drifted away 250M to score.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, checked 800M, harmed by the slow pace, unleashed strong finishing efforts 250M.
Eased back, 3 wide, dashed well 250M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, one paced until weakened final furlong.
At rear, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never ran on.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on steadily to the line.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed well for 2nd, missed by a neck.
Prominent, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, weakened badly 300M.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Taken back, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on steadily after having difficulty to find a clear run in the early straight.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, found nothing when asked.
At rear throughout, never a factor, tailed out.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led by 3/4L, weakened badly soon after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 4th.
Jumped fairly, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on fairly when clear 200M.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, accelerated strongly to score by a neck.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on only fairly.
Started well, taken back to race back of midfield 3 wide with cover, shifted wider home turn & driven, closed off solidly to just miss frame.
Crowded start, raced midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 850m, under pump 500m & tight for room, driven 400m, plugged on one pace.
Broke ok, dropped in to race behind midfield 1 off with cover, driven wide turning in, stayed on well for minor late inroads.
Slow start, soon rolled from tail to sit back of midfield on rail, driven into stretch, boxed on evenly.
Fast start & shared early lead but soon settled 3rd 1 back on rail, 4th turning in & shaken up 400m, found little in one-paced run home.
Broke well, rousted wide to lead 1200m, clear & to rail 1050m, 1.5L ahead & driven 420m, headed 320m, fought on but tapered.
Broke ok, sat fore of midfield on rail, overraced 650m & shifted out, crowded for room turning in until driven 350m, kept on evenly.
Started well, restrained to race behind midfield 3 deep with cover, overraced, under pump 500m & wide on turn, tepid run home.
Taken behind at break to race at tail, ridden 400m & kept on past beaten rivals.
Fast start wide, restrained to park midfield 3 wide no cover, niggled 630m, driven 500m, determined run to 2nd 100m, always held.

Sharp break, shared early lead, restrained & headed 1200m, parked 2nd 1 off no cover, eased upside leader & shaken up 350m, quickened clear, in command.
Bumped at start & lost ground, raced rail near tail, driven into stretch, found nil & struggled in fading run home.
Broke ok, trapped wide & restrained to race near tail 1 off, ridden wide into stretch, hard-driven 250m, plugged on tamely.
Strong start, roused to press for lead but outpaced and stuck deep, unable to match leaders, settled beyond midfield 4 deep no cover, ridden along throughout, hard drive 380m, dropped out late.

Slightly slow to begin, then hampered, driven along to push closer, niggled throughout, settled near tail on rail, brushed rail and lost ground 680m, saved ground into straight, limited response, eased.
Began on terms but quickly outsped, niggled, settled beyond midfield 1 off, searching for inside run 400m, sprinted very strongly but too much to do.

Good start, eased behind speed, settled just fore of midfield on rail, easy run behind leaders, off leader's back 400m, under a hard drive, boxed on.
Bumped at start, outpaced and ridden along, dropped back, settled near tail 3 & 4 deep with cover, ridden along 500m, widest into straight, solid late ground but no threat.

Settled in behind midfield, 8-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, made ground steadily in the Straight.

Settled at the rear, 11L behind along the rail, shifted out on its own accord at 900M, ran home only one paced.
In front of midfield 4L off initially 3 wide, fought on with the eventual winner until 150M when couldn't find extra.
Always towards the rear, never in contention in the Straight.
Pushed forward and shared the lead 2 wide, weakened 300M out and faded away.
Raced at the rear, 11-1/4L behind initially 3 wide before hampered and taken wider at 900M, made minimal ground.
At the rear, 10L behind 2 wide with cover, improved and moved closer to rail rounding turn, ran home one paced.

Hard ridden to lead on settling but overtaken passing 750m. Retook lead 400m, joined up front 200m, battled on to 100m when swamped.

Pressed forwards from widest draw, racing without cover 2L from leader entering turn. Rolled forward top of straight to look a chance then battled on gamely to the line.
Ridden along early to share pace before slipping into slipstream of leaders around turn. Rolled forward to hit front 200m but hung in badly and difficult to ride out.
Jumped with field but allowed to find feet, settling towards rear in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening and powered home, holding off late challenge.
Shifted across behind horses from wide draw, settling at rear. Trailed field to straight before running on strongly between horses to just miss.
Began well, hard ridden to hold rail before slipping into box seat. Took rails run in straight, kept on well to 200m before turning one-paced.

Began well, pressed forward but wide, taking lead passing 750m but kept away from fence, Overtaken soon after straigtening and dropped out. Lame right front leg.
Shifted across behind horses from wide draw, settling at rear in one-off position. Taken on centre track on straightening and finished strongly.
Slow, taken to fence and made up ground, settling 2-back from leader. Came off fence 500m to challenge but failed to respond. Substantial amount of blood in trachea. Lame left front leg.
Restrained to a rearward position, 7Ls off the pace at 800M, stoked up 600M and moved a bit closer to leaders, run ended soon after straightening however.
Not hurried after the start, held up near the rear 6-7Ls behind leaders, ran on only fairly over final 300M, not reach leaders.

Never far off from leaders in a strongly run race, came under pressure 550M to keep up with rivals, checked 350M, made no impression after.
Raced along the 2-path near the tail of the field, 7Ls off the pace at 800M, ran on steadily over final 400M, got up for 4th late.
Last of 14 on the inside, 8Ls off the pace middle stages, still last at 400M and failed to make any impression on straightening.
Restrained early to get cover before picking up speed, settling 3-wide behind midfield. Got shuffled back 700m when tempo increased, widest into straight, finished off strongly.
Jumped well, pressed forward, settling 2-back along rail. Switched out 300m to get clear running and finished off strongly despite racing in restricted space final 150m.
Crowded out start, dropping back to last before moving up on settling. Began forward move from 800m, racing 4-wide around turn, but run ended 300m and faded.
Began well, pushed forward, settling one-out, one-back. Swung wide entering straight but battled on strongly despite being awkwardly placed outside drifting winner.
Away nicely, sharing early pace till settling in box seat 2L from leader. Became unbalanced rounding turn, had inside run in straight but found little under pressure and faded.
Began fairly, not pushed, dropping to last 1250m. Began forward move 800m, circled field to lead 600m, dawdled 300m before picking up speed again, holding off late challenges.
Jumped OK, not pushed, taken to rail, settling behind midfield. Got shuffled back to last passing 700m, took rails run in straight, kept on fairly to 150m, turning one-paced.
Began well, pushed forward to lead, then steadied pace. Shaken up when joined up front 600m, fought on gamely to 100m before running out of steam and fading.
Jumped OK, not pushed, dropped towards rear in one-off position. Got shuffled back to last around turn, blocked for run early in straight, finished off nicely when clear final 300m.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground, settling one-off 4L from leader. Under pressure when field speeded up 700m, swung wide, one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to sit three-parts of a length outside leader on settling. Shaken up from 600m, battled on strongly till flattened final 100m.

Pushed forward early from the wide draw to ensure a position up the front, on the rail. Drifted back to 2nd at the 800m, 2L off the leader. Had nothing left in the straight, and went to the line 1 paced late.
Eased forward early to sit worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran strongly down the outside in the straight and making up ground. Just missed a place in a tight finish.

Began awkwardly and didn't kick. Struggled to find early position, before dropping back towards rear of the field. Unsettled and stuck wide no cover 1200m. Last on the turn. Plugged on fairly to get a couple of slow ones late.
Taken forward early looking to challenge, before easing off slightly to sit 3rd. Found nothing in the straight, and gave ground rapidly from the 300m.
Crowded and lost ground on jumping, and forced back to the rear of the field, on the fence. Progressed well in the straight, and threatened a place, before peaking just before the line.
Eased forward early, settling midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran solidly in the early part on the straight. Picked up over the last 200m, and finished strongly.
Eased forward early to sit around midfield, on the fence. 1 paced in the straight, struggled to make an impression and eased last 75m.
Dropped back to sit last, 2L off the next horse by the 1000m. Made no inroads in the straight, gave ground from the 250m and eased out from the 150m. Jockey questioned.
Didn't kick early, eventually settling just behind midfield, 3 wide with cover. Only fairly to the line late.
Pushed forward early for the wide draw to lead by 2L at the 1000m. Led early in the straight, but was used up early and faded out from the 250m.
Came across from the wide draw to sit midfield, 3 wide with limited cover. Ran well in the straight to figure in a tight finish for the placing's.
Eased forward early to be handily placed 4th/5th, 1 off the fence with cover. Ran on from the turn, and showed good turn off foot from the 200m. Easy to the line late, and in under hands and heels.
Dropped back early to sit at the rear of the field, 3 wide with cover. Only went to the line fairly under hands and heels in the straight.

Eased forward from the inside draw to sit 4th/5th, on the rail. Stayed closer to the rail rounding the turn, and nosed in front at the 200m. Couldn't match it with the winner, and eased late when guaranteed 2nd.
Began from a wide gate, ridden forward to be 1L 2nd 2-wide, held every chance under pressure after straightening, unable to sustain effort inside the final 100 metres.
Ridden to 3L 5th on rails, fought on steadily early in straight but did not find much room inside the final 200 metres. (Not properly tested)
Settled towards the rear from a wide gate, kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight.
Moderate start, gradually recovered to midfield about 4L from the front, similar position into home straight, ran on steadily despite hanging in over 200 metres out.
Ridden early, settled 2-wide in 4th just over 2L off the lead, came under pressure to challenge over 200 metres out, asserted authority inside the 100 metres.
Slow to muster, soon dropped well behind, took closer order leaving the Rock, made no impression in straight.
Began well from the one draw, settled one back in 3rd on rails, fought on under pressure to hold every chance in straight only to be headed close to home.
Crowded early dropping well behind, made no show.
Settled in midfield on rails, fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Jumped best, led briefly before dropping out abruptly when bucking, never recovered.
Jumped fairly, took up running on rails from the 1000 metre bend maintaining 1L advantage to home straight, unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside final 150 metres.
Pushed forward, 2-3 wide, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on well until 150M flattened.
Slow away, hard ridden to hold the rail in midfield, not suited by the slow pace, held up 4-2, dashed strongly when clear, just missed by narrow margin.
Raced ungenerously shortly after the start, detached until 800M, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200M.
At back, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 250M whilst hanging in.

Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, severely checked 400M, never ran on thereafter.

At rear throughout, never a factor, tailed off.
At back always, never looked likely.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader, dropped off from 600M, tailed out.
Rolled forward to obtain the box seat, kept on one pace until weakened final 150M.
Settled in front of midfield about 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Taken back, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made no impression in Straight.
Rolled forward, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, dropped off rounding the Home Turn when the pace quickened.
Pushed forward to take the fence and led, quickened 600M, kept on strongly until headed by the winner over the last couple of strides.

Began on terms, bustled along to challenge for lead, wide first turn, worked to lead by 1750m, 1L lead at 1500m, leading at steady fractions, challenged and passed 800m, under drive 450m, stayed on.
