Very slow to begin, 3L behind field, ridden 1900m, checked slightly 1720m, settled near tail on rail, overracing, relegated to last 1000m, 3L behind second last runner 700m, widest into straight, flew late.
Smart to begin, vying for lead early, eased behind, settled just worse than midfield on rail, improved 800m, under pressure 500m, sprinted, effort short-lived.
Broke well, eased behind speed runners, settled midfield on rail, short of room 750m, ridden along 500m, slight check 250m, even finish.
Away evenly, ridden along to position handy, settled 4th on rail, shuffled back severely 800m, no room until 500m, checked badly at 350m, pulled to centre track, charged home to grab 3rd, luckless.

Slightly slow, nudged to edge forward, trapped wide, eased behind, overracing, settled midfield 1 off, pulled 3 deep to improve 900m, hit lead 800m, vigorous drive 500m, fought off challengers, strong staying effort.
Bumped at start, just behind speed early, settled ahead of midfield 1 off, ridden along 750m, short of room 600m, shuffled back, ridden 300m, stayed on evenly.
Awkward start, niggled to improve, settled worse than midfield 1 off, outpaced slightly 900m, improved around field 750m, heady drive 500m, one-paced.

First away, eased, checked 1700m, pulled off rail 1500m, settled worse than midfield 1 off, refused to settle, improved 900m with eventual winner, up into 2nd 750m but under a ride, quickly beaten off.
Broke evenly, among leaders at first turn, eased to settled 3rd 1 off, up to 2nd 1200m, unable to match sprint at 800m, lost place 500m, limited response.
Settled in box-seat, sat 2L off the leader, hard ridden in the Straight but couldn't find extra to pass the first three.

Pressed forwards from an outside draw, racing without cover 2L behind leader. Swung wide entering straight, boxed on to 100m before fading.
Bumped shortly after start, pressed forward, settling along rail 3-back from leader. Three-wide into straight, ran on steadily between horses to grab minor placing.
Jumped best and led to 800m when joined by another up front. Edged ahead passing 600, kicked clear 250m, kept on strongly to line.
Began well, pressed forward, grabbing box seat. Became unbalanced around turn, took inside run in straight but found nothing under hard riding final 200m.
Jumped OK but eased, dropping to rear between horses. Shaken up turning for home, got close to heels passing 200m, switched out and finished off strongly.
Jumped with field, ridden along three-wide behind midfield before losing position entering turn, Taken to centre track on straightening and ran on steadily doing best work final 100m.
Hard ridden to hold forward position, racing between horses 3L from leader. Took turn 3-wide but only one-paced in straight under hard riding.
Sent forward, emerged as leader 1100M and took them along steadily, lost lead 300M, kept on effort to 150M, swamped late.
Caught very wide first turn before getting to a one out one back position, quickly raced to the lead 300M, joined by winner 200M and went head to head to the line, just missed.
Handily placed behind leaders in a slowly run race, well placed to strike 350M, moved up to the fore 200M, went head to head with rival, kept coming under pressure for narrow win.
Crossed to the lead 1300M, chased pace in 3rd from 1100M, under pressure 500M, ran on one paced to the finish.
Held up in 8th behind midfield in a slowly run race, saved ground along the rails, driven out 300M and made some ground along the inside but never really threatening.
Began fairly, pushed wide 1300M when pace slackened, remained in 2nd last to straight, did best work final 200M and rapidly closing on leaders, just came up short.
Jumped well from draw 1 to be 3-4Ls back in midfield, fought on same pace turning in, faded 50M to last but not beaten far.
Caught wide first turn before settling down in midfield along the 2 path, 3Ls to make up 400M, closed off steadily to get within 0.5L of winner in a blanket finish.
Began awkwardly, not hurried and settled down near the rear 6Ls off the slow pace, brought wide and closed off well over final 300M, nearest finish.
Raced tight entering 1st turn, severely checked 1300M and pushed wide, ended up in last 8Ls off leader, peeled widest 400M, raced up strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Pushed along after the jump, severely checked 1300M proved difficult to settle from that point, 5Ls to make up 400M, not pace to seriously challenge. (Unacceptable Racing Manner.)
Prominent early before taken back to settle in 5th and within 3L of pace, yielded ground from 400 metres out.
Jumped fairly, settled in midfield on rails, took closer order rounding home bend for 2.5L 3rd into straight when not able to quicken further, kept on at the same pace to finish.

Began fairly, amongst leaders early stages travelling 4-wide before shifting backward to 4th, renewed effort to reach 2nd briefly passing the 600 metres, folded up quickly from approaching home straight. (Mucus in trachea)
Settled behind midfield on rails, commenced move rounding home bend, reached 5th some 4L back on final turn, sustained effort in straight to just get up on line.
Awkward beginning, given gentle reminders to get in focus before settling in 1L 2nd, lost position under pressure from the Rock and made no impression in home straight.
Caught very wide from a tricky gate, taken back to midfield far side but remained 3-wide without cover, dropped away quickly from home bend.
Settled in rear from the widest gate, travelled keenly improving to 8th and just worse than midfield coming onto back straight, run ended on top of home bend.
Held up behind the leader on rails, angled out to challenge entering straight, soon hit the front narrowly, collared close to home.
Very slowly away, settled well back on rails, saved ground turning for home, made modest progress under pressure without threatening.

Jumped awkwardly from a wide gate, raced wide in midfield early stages before taken back closer to the rails in rear, renewed effort from the 400 metres, finished off race well near the centre of the track.
Broke well from the two draw, assumed lead on rails setting a reasonable pace, found no extra under strong pressure in straight and swamped close to home.
At rear, 2-3 wide, suited by the fast pace, made early move from 700M, ran on fairly in final stages.
At back, 2 wide, benefited by the fast sectionals, no progress.
Eased back, took rail, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Behind midfield along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, no turn of foot in straight.
Hard ridden forward, 2-3 wide, harmed by the fast tempo, out of fuel 200M.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at fast sectionals, hung on very well until 150M flattened.
Eased to occupy box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, emptied 400M.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2-3 wide, benefited by the fast pace, never improved.
At back, 2-3 wide, suited by the fast tempo, never a factor.
Trapped 3-4 wide throughout in midfield, tailed out.
Slow away, took rail at back, favoured by the fast tempo, made steady ground 300M to score again.
At back, travelled 6.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, made some ground in Straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 3.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, however, unable to find a day light over the last furlong.
Pushed forward to settle in midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, under pressure rounding the Home Turn, made minor ground in Straight.
Sent forward, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, kept on fairly and weakened final 100M.
Detached throughout despite hard ridden along, never a factor.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, harmed by the fast sectionals, kept on until weakened final 100M. (Bled & Lame right front)
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, harmed by the fast pace, weakened over the last furlong.
Pushed forward to take the fence and led at fast tempo, kept on until weakened final 150M.
Camped handy, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast sectionals, ran on strongly to score by 1-1/4Ls.
Settled in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on steadily to the line.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast tempo, dashed well to get 2nd.
Prominent early, however, was checked rounding the first turn, suited by the fast pace, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Tardy start, bustled initially to race 1 off behind midfield, niggled 500m, driven wide into stretch, kept on for moderate gains.
Sluggish start. Raced near rear 1 off with cover, overraced 1100m into backstretch, bustled 500m, driven wide home turn, stayed on centre for minor headway.
Broke well & bustled up to park rail 1 back, bustled 550m, driven final turn, weakened tamely.
Speed to lead on rail, under pressure & joined for lead 450m, headed 400m & driven, faded in run home.
Steadied start to back of midfield 1 off with cover, ridden 400m, swung wide into stretch, closed off centre to edge 2nd close home.
Steadied start, to rail mid rank, checked off heels 1370m & raced back of midfield, shifted out & driven into stretch, found nil in tame run to wire.
Attempted to lug in at break, to rail 1450m & snatched off heels 1400m, niggled 500m, hard at it turning in, struggled in weakening run.
Smart start widest, rolled to sit outside lead, stalked 0.5L back, eased upside 450m & led 400m, shaken up 300m & kicked 3L clear, in command.
Sharp start & bustled to slot 1 back 1 off, niggled 600m, hard-ridden turning in & to 2nd 250m, tapered final 100m.
Broke ok, crossed to midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 500m & under pump 450m, wide final turn, maintained momentum & closed to 3rd last strides.
Awkward start & crowded, raced rail near rear & snatched off heels 1370m, niggled 620m & under pressure on turn, driven into straight, found nil.
Taken behind from wide gate to park at tail on rail, niggled 500m, driven into stretch & shifted out, hard-ridden final 250m, kept on for moderate headway.
Taken back from widest to last pair 3 wide with cover, niggled 600m, soon bustled in last, driven into stretch, stayed on one pace.
Started well, taken back to behind midfield 3 wide with cover, bustled to advance 700m, 4 wide into stretch, hung in & bumped rival 250m, stayed on for 3rd.
Smart start, taken back to near rear 1 off with cover, overraced 850m, 3 wide & niggled 550m, widest home turn, soon emptied & faded.
Fast break, snagged to handy 3 wide with cover, overraced 950m, bustled wide 600m to press lead 450m, emptying when drifted into rival 250m, faded.
Tardy break, settled midfield on rail, driven turning in & shifted out, stayed on for minor late headway.
Broke with others, worked forward 4 wide no cover to edge lead 700m, clear & to rail 550m, swung out home turn & driven 1.5L clear, all out & headed 80m, faded.
Dropped in at tail, forward move 500m, not clear passage in stretch, shifted centre track & driven 150m, quickened to 2nd late.
Broke sharply, rolled forward 3 deep no cover to lead 850m, headed 700m & raced 1 off no cover 3rd, driven 300m, found nil & weakened.
Moderate start, parked rail near rear, overraced 900m, shuffled to 2nd last turning in, crowded in run, shaken up 150m, stayed on for minor late gains.
Fast break & soon led on rail, not extended & headed 850m, shuffled to 4th 1 back 550m, under pump final turn, plugged one pace.
Sharp start, taken back to midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 450m & shifted out, driven very wide home turn, quickened centre track to lead 80m, in control.
Sharp start & shared lead, soon snagged & raced handily 1 off with cover, shifted out & ridden 300m, impeded 250m & clipped heels, not fully tested thereafter.
Slotted in behind midfield, 7-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, ran on well when found extra near 200M.
Rolled forward to take box-seat, sat 3L off the lead, not competitive in the Straight.
Taken back and sat at the rear, 8L behind along the rail, made slight ground along the rail in the Straight.
Travelled slightly behind midfield, 6-3/4L behind along the rail, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 4L off the lead 2 wide with cover, closed off fairly to finish 3rd.
Slow start and remained at the rear, never a factor.
Pushed forward and raced prominently, 2-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, weakened badly approaching 400M.
Missed start then raced at the tail, 9-3/4L behind the lead, closed off strongly to make good ground.
Took place in midfield, 4-3/4L off along the rail, assumed lead near 200M, ran on nicely and held on to score.
Eased back and raced towards the back, 8-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, swung widest and made minor ground only.
Sent forward and led by 2-1/4L, stayed 2 wide, headed and dropped off approaching 200M.
Settled in midfield, 5-3/4L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on well to get 2nd.
Bounced well, racing inside leader till easing into box seat 1400m. Began run passing 400m, battled strongly but unable mow down leader.
Shifted across behind horses from widest draw, dropping to rear. In last pair throughout and never in the hunt.
Shifted across behind runners from an outside draw, dropping to last. Trailed field thereafter without making any progress.
Crowded out soon after start, then taken to fence 4-back from leader. Switched out turning for home and kept on fairly in straight.
Jumped with field, ridden along in midfield one-off the fence. Under pressure turning for home and one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward to lead on settling, cutting to fence 1400m and slowing pace. Picked up speed 500m, kept finding final 100m when strongly challenged.
Got off nicely, ridden to hold forward position, settling in one-off position 3L from leader. Swung wide into straight and ran on steadily.
First out but not rushed, easing 4L from leader on settling. Urged forward on straightening, making up good ground until flattened final 50m.
Began fairly, steadied, ridden to make up ground but held 4-wide before rolling forward 1450 to sit 1L behind leader. Under pressure final 300m but kept on gamely.
Jumped OK but eased to find cover, cutting to rail towards rear 1500m. Shaken up passing 400m, finished strongly along rails but run ended just before the post.
Shifted across behind horses soon after start, landing towards rear but kept away from fence. Given early reminders but found nothing in straight.
Jumped OK, ridden along ahead of midfield, then taken 3-wide turning for home. Kept on fairly in straight. Rider rapped by stewards on riding early in straight.
Chased leaders along the fence, ran on well down the inside but couldn't accelerate enough to challenge winner.
Towards the rear hugging the rail on settling, 5Ls to make up 400M, shifted out to center of track, closed off moderately over final 250M and no threat to clear cut winner.
Jumped on terms and drove forward to share lead along the rail on settling, no extra when ridden out top of straight, faded 200M.
Settled down 2-wide in the group chasing the pace, remained in touch 400M, kept battling to line but couldn't get closer to leaders.
Restrained after the jump, travelled in midfield along the 2-path, not quickened when driven out 300M, never dangerous.
Sent forward from wide barrier, contested the lead and was wide without cover until 500M, headed 150M, outpaced by rivals close home.
Taken back from wide barrier early, ridden forward passing 1000M and improved to a midfield position 3-wide, gave chase on leaders final 300M but always held.
Shared lead early stages, eased off to sit behind leaders near 500M, raced up to the lead 150M, kept on strongly to win a shade cosily.
Guided to the fence on settling, 3.5L off the pace in midfield, closed off well to go 2nd inside 100M, not reach winner.
Steadied in the early stages and shifted across behind runners, settled down near the rear 5Ls off the pace, brought wide for his run 350M, kept on mildly without threatening.
No closer than 3-wide from outside barrier, 2nd last making home turn, never near to challenge.
Dropped to last 850M, became detached from field halfway, weakened and eased top of straight, tailed off. (Unacceptable Performance.)
Jumped well, shared early pace before settling one-back, one-off back stretch. Made forward move passing 450m, kept on fairly to 200m, then one-paced.
Jumped well, ridden to find cover, crossing to fence in midfield passing 1200m. Switched out 350m but unable to get clear run until passing 200m. Finished off well.

Jumped OK, pressed forward but held 4-wide into first turn and back stretch 4L from leader. Started to give ground 600m and finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance. Had substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Restrained and taken in, settling towards rear in one-off position. Began forward move passing 500m, swung wide into straight, finished strongly to just fail.
Began fairly, taken to rail, settling towards rear. Got shuffled back when field speeded up 500m, took inside run in straight but found little room and shifted out 200m but only one-paced.
Inconvenienced shortly after start, taken to rail but outpaced, dropping to rear. Left flat-footed 500m when field speeded up, swung wide into straight but found nothing under hard riding.
Restrained on jumping, shifted across behind runners and last on settling. Started forward move 600m, racing around field, widest into straight, kept on fairly without looking dangerous.
Pressed forward from widest draw to lead passing 1500m before crossing to fence 1250m and slowing pace. Joined up front 1200m-800m, kicked clear 500m, kept finding when challenged final stages.
First out, racing with pace till switched out 1300m, racing between horses 4L from leader. Began forward move 400m, kept on well until flattened final stages. Had cut inside left hind cannon.
Began well, leading field to 1450m, but started to over-race when crossed 1300m. Held box seat to straight when gave ground gradually despite hard riding.
Began well, ridden to hold one-off position in midfield until steadied and dropping back 1100m. Shaken up from 400m, shifted out 250m to get run, finished off nicely.
Jumped OK, ridden to hold forward position but held 3-wide into first turn. Rolled forward from 1200m to sit outside leader to 500m when ran out of steam and faded.
Dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Plugged away in the straight without threatening.
Settled just forward of midfield early, on the fence. Came in off heels at 250m. Ran strongly in the straight, and was slowly wearing down winner, but just missed late.
Slow away and settled at the back of the field, 1 off the fence. Never went past a horse. Quietly ridden in the straight and eased out very early.
Went to press forward early, but was stuck 3 wide with no cover just behind the pace. Fading before the turn, and was eased out late.
Cruised forward early to sit midfield, 3 wide with cover. Ran on well in the straight and was briefly hampered on the line.
Pushed forward early from the wide draw to lead, sitting 3 wide up the back straight. Starting to fade late, and being chased down, but just managed to hold onto the win late.
Pushed forward early to be handily placed in 2nd, 1L behind the leader. Dropped out very quickly in the straight and was eased out late.
Slow into stride, settling at the back of the field on the rail. Switched in off heels after missing a run at 350m. Ran solidly in the straight, without threatening a place.
Settled midfield early, 1 off the fence. Pressed forward from the 400m. Stayed on well. Raced tight 100m, shifted out late and not fully pushed to the line.
Pushed out early, before electing to ease back slightly and sit 3rd/4th, 1 off the fence. Loomed up in the straight, and was gradually getting over the top of first two, but ran out of time.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit towards the rear of the field, 3 wide with cover. Came wider in the straight and rattled home OK late.
Fairly away, then crowded and settled towards the back of the field, on the fence. Lost a run 300m, and came out off heels to keep progressing. Battled on to the line.
Jumped awkwardly losing ground, gradually recovered on rails to reach midfield home bend, switched out for a clear after straightening and ran on under pressure.
Ridden positively from the middle draw, settled 2L off the pace before shifting out for a run entering straight, sustained effort to take charge inside final 100 metres.
Jumped well but soon dropped to last few, no further impression.
Soon dropped well behind from the widest gate, trailed the field to the 400 metres until passing a few backmarkers briefly after straightening.
Moderate start, settled within 2L of pace, kept on before fading inside final 200 metres.
Given reminders early, prominent to straight, dropped out tamely inside final 300 metres.
Raced wide behind midfield gradually dropping to last into straight, renewed effort after straightening, did best work late.
Settled wide in midfield, ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all, found no extra when swamped inside final 100 metres.
Chased leader most of way, found no extra inside final 200 metres.
Raced wide behind midfield, became last shortly after straightening, went past well-beaten horses inside final 200 metres.
Raced wide throughout far side after beginning from a tricky gate, improved to join the leaders coming onto home bend, unable to sustain effort and gave ground under pressure in straight.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2-3 wide, pace good, ran on well to the line for 2nd.
Settled in box seat, pace good, lack room 400M, ran on fairly when clear.
Slow away, hard ridden along the rails at rear, pace good, no progress.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up with the field, trapped 3 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 200M for 3rd.
Pushed to take rail and led at good pace, soon emptied 300M.
Hard ridden forward, sat 2 wide, pace good, ran on well until 200M dropped off rapidly.
Pushed to take a midfield spot on the fence, pace good, checked 400M, hung in early straight, made steady ground 200M.
At back, along the fence, pace good, never improved.
Bumped start, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, trapped 3 wide, pace good, flattened 200M.
Slow away, pushed early, trapped 3 wide at rear, pace good, made steady ground 200M.
Hard ridden early, took midfield spot in 2 wide, pace good, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Hard ridden early but not muster, at back, 2 wide, pace good, no dash.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, made no impression in Straight.
At back always, despite the fast sectionals, never ran on.
At rear throughout, despite the fast tempo, never looked likely.
Ridden forward to take the fence and led at fast tempo, kept on until weakened final furlong.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, harmed by the fast sectionals, out of fuel final 200M.
Settled worse than midfield, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, ran on fairly.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast tempo, dashed well to score by 1-1/4Ls.
Rolled forward to obtain the box seat, despite harmed by the fast sectionals, ran on strongly for 2nd when clear 200M.
Pushed forward to settle in a prominent spot, however, harmed by the fast tempo, weakened final 150M.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the fast pace, one paced home.
Taken back from the wide gate, 8Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite the fast pace, never ran on.
Good break, nudged to edge lead 1 off 1020m, headed 800m & raced close 2nd, shaken up 400m, plugged on until emptied 150m & swamped.
Tardy start & bustled forward to rail midfield, niggled 500m & ridden into stretch, found nil.
Taken back at start, nudged along last pair on inner, shifted out on turn & under pump into stretch, found nil.
Lacked early toe & bustled along, receded to back of midfield 1 off with cover, hard driven 550m, struggled & eased in stretch when beaten.
Front rank from break, caught 3 wide no cover & snagged 950m to 1 back 1 off, trapped in pocket 360m & bumped, driven 300m, stayed on to 2nd 120m, always held.
Smart start & prominent on rail, nosed ahead 800m & maintained narrow advantage, shaken up 350m, extended 2L clear, driven out to win.
Sluggish start, taken back from widest to race last pair on outer, driven 500m & awkward on bend, swung very wide into stretch, never a factor in weakening run home.
Smart start wide, soon snagged to midfield 1 off with cover, 3 wide on bend, driven into stretch, stayed on centre track without threatening.
Broke front rank & 3 wide no cover, eased to race 1.5L 3rd, niggled along, hard driven into stretch, boxed on centre track, lost 3rd last stride.
Broke well front rank wide on track, taken back to slot fore of midfield 1 off with cover & niggled along, driven 400m, & closed centre to nick 3rd late.
Started well, taken back & raced near rear on outer with cover, shifted out & driven 500m, one-paced in tame run home.
Lacked toe & bustled initially to rail near rear, driven 400m & shifted out, stayed on for moderate inroads.
Fast break, bustled initially to race close 2nd & pressed lead, slight advantage 450m, shaken up 350m, headed 250m & faded.
Tardy start, bustled forward & found rail 1 back 750m, niggled 650m & shifted 1 off on turn, not clear run into stretch, driven 300m, one-paced.
Broke well, soon taken back & outpaced at tail, very wide home turn & driven into stretch, plugged on for minor headway.
Sharp start & pressed lead on rail, raced close 3rd no cover on fence, ridden into stretch, grinding pressure to challenge, edged 2nd at wire.
Broke with others, bustled wide initially & raced handily 3 deep with cover, niggled 500m, shifted out home turn, 2L back & shaken up 350m, quickened to lead 50m, drew away.
Taken behind from widest gate, niggled along 2nd last, ridden turning in, found nil & eased when beaten.
Lacked toe, niggled to race midfield 1 off with cover, hard at work on turn, very wide into stretch, soon emptied & eased.
Speed to lead 3 wide, eased & headed 800m, slotted 1 off 1 back 600m, 3 deep on turn & driven 350m, one-paced in tepid run home.
Steadied start, raced rail midfield, awkward on turn, driven 400m, found nil in tepid run home.
Moderate break, soon bustled 3rd last, 5.5L back turning in, driven 300m & shifted out, rattled home centre track for smart gains.
Broke well & on-pace, advanced 4 wide to narrow lead 800m, 3 deep 650m, headed 450m, pressed again 400m & led 250m, labored & headed close home, lost 2nd at wire.
Broke well & close up, restrained to track pace 1 off with cover, ridden under pressure 600m, kept on one pace.
Travelled just in front of midfield, 4-1/4L behind 2 wide with cover, found nothing and dropped off passing 300M.
Settled towards the rear, 8-3/4L behind along the rail, steadied when crowded at 300M, did not run on.
Taken back and raced at the rear, 9-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, made ground steadily in the Straight.
Slow start and raced at the rear, 10-3/4L behind along the rail, made no progress in the Straight.
Eased back then broke down after passing the winning post on the first occasion.
Sent forward and took box-seat, sat 1-1/2L off the lead, assumed lead at 300M, ran on until 200M when couldn't find extra.
Pushed forward and sat outside the leader, found nothing and weakened badly after straightening.
Ridden forward to take the rail and led by 3/4L, headed passing 300M, remained one paced in the run home.
Pushed forward and raced in front of midfield, 2-3/4L off 2 wide with cover, ran on until bumped at 200M.
Rolled forward and raced in front of midfield, 4L behind along the rail, ran on nicely to finish 2nd.
Eased back before dislodging rider after passing the winning post on the first occasion when struck heels.
Raced in behind midfield, 7-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, widest in the Straight, ran on strongly to score.
Raced just behind midfield, 6-3/4L behind along the rail, no clear run approaching 200M, but overall only one paced.
Travelled in midfield, 5-3/4L behind 2 wide with cover, ran on well to finish 3rd.
Bumped and unbalanced start, dropping to clear last on settling. Got close to heels 700m, took inside run in straight but only one-paced.
Crowded out start, ridden but didn't muster, settling at rear in one-off position. Took closer order around turn, got clear run 400m but only one-paced.
Jumped well, racing inside early leader before easing 2L back passing 200m. Took closer order around turn, battling on strongly in straight until tiring final 100m.
Hard ridden from jump to hold midfield between horses 4L from leader. Under pressure turning for home, kept on gamely in straight without making ground.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide without cover 4L from leader. Kept on fairly in straight until tiring final 200m.
Blundered and checked start, hard ridden but didn't muster, dropping back but away from fence. Dropped to last turning for home, ran on late past beaten horses.
Vigorously ridden from an outside draw to lead, pulling 2L clear 900m before crossing to fence. Still well clear passing 200m but run down final strides.
Jumped well but unable match early pace and drifted back to behind midfield in one-off position. Took turn 5-wide, one-paced in straight.
Vigorously ridden from jump to hold forward position before settling in box seat 2L from leader. Kept on fairly to 200m before giving ground quickly.
Hampered start, then taken to fence, settling behind midfield. Shifted out turning for home, wide in straight, gave ground quickly and eased down final 100m.
Hard ridden early to hold position, settling two back from leader along rail. Angled out 500m to get run, making up ground under hard riding to just get there.
Slow into stride, taken to rail and made up ground to sit in midfield passing 800m. Switched out 350m to get run, finished strongly final 100m to just miss.
Settled down in mid-division 3-4Ls off the good pace, no clear run early straight then stayed on well over final 250M, got up 2nd near line.
Always within 3Ls of leader, kept on mildly over final 350M, never a serious threat to leaders.
Settled down 4-5Ls behind midfield, kept on one pace when placed under pressure top of straight, no impression on leaders. (Lame next day with tendon injury.)

Slow to muster speed despite ridden along, not far off the pace first half of the race but got shuffled back to near the rear before home turn, closed off moderately making up some lost ground over final 300M.
Held up behind midfield, shuffled back to near the rear middle stages, brought wide home turn, closed off final 400M fastest, nearest finish.
Blundered badly at the start, recovered to be close up tracking the pace, raced up to the lead 400M, kept going well to hold rivals at bay.
Prominent early stages, tracked leaders but came under pressure 800M and fell back to midfield, had nothing to offer in straight, eased 150M when no chance.
Held up 4Ls back in midfield, 3-wide throughout, couldn't accelerate enough to challenge leaders inside 300M.
Sent forward, 3-wide early stages, crossed to the rail 1100M, sat behind leaders making the turn for home, fought on well holding his position, lost 2nd near line.
Eased back on jumping from gate 1, 2nd last well off the pace, 3-wide bid from 600M, never going the pace to challenge.
Restrained near the rear, no cover from 1200M, strode forward to join leaders 650M, run ended soon after straightening, weakened 300M.
Held up behind midfield, proved very difficult to settle 1100M, remained in similar position to home turn, eased passing 500M. (No Vet findings / Unacceptable Performance.)
Caught wide first turn from 14, strolled forward and crossed to the lead near 800M, headed top of straight, one paced final 200M.
Taken across behind runners from wide draw, in last over 10Ls off the pace early stages, fanned widest home turn but couldn't pick up to challenge.
Began well from gate 10, sent forward to race in 2nd, same position on turn, peaked early in straight, weakened gradually thereafter, eased final 150M.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 4 to 5 lengths back at rear, last turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start, raced 4 lengths or so back at rear, similar position on turn, no daylight early in straight, made some progress when clear thereafter.
Raced a length behind the leader on rail, easy run on turn, lacked an extra gear in straight, stayed on at same pace
Bumped start, raced 2 wide in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off well to score.
Moderately away from gate 13, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide with no cover in midfield, emptied early in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 5 to 6 lengths back at rear, taken very wide turning in, finished off evenly without posing any threat.
Began only fairly, positioned 3 lengths or so back on rail, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, finished off very strongly when clear final 200M.
Jumped with them, unable to slot in, travelled 3 wide with no cover throughout, emptied after turning in, eased final 150M. (blood in the horse's trachea.)
Taken back from the widest draw, raced 6 lengths back at tail, improved along the rail on turn, kept to inside after straightening, made good progress to make frame.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide in 4th, angled out near 500M, finished off evenly.
Began fairly from a wide draw, raced wide with cover, 4 to 5 lengths back at rear, failed to close off in straight.
Slightly slow out, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, emptied after turning in, never competitive.
Jumped well from gate 1, showed early speed to take the lead, enjoyed the easy lead on turn, kicked clear early in straight, headed near 150M, stayed on for 3rd.
Slow away, pushed to obtain box seat, lack room 400M, just held ground when clear.
Eased back, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, unleashed strong finishing efforts 250M and scored.
Behind midfield, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
At rear, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Took rail easily and led at slow sectionals, hung on well until 150M overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Pushed forward, 2 wide, benefited by the slow tempo, closed off strongly 400M for 2nd.
Midfield along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Bumped start, at rear, dashed strongly 200M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, raced greenly, faded 400M.
Hard ridden forward, sat just off the leader 2 wide, benefited by the slow tempo, however soon dropped off 300M.
Eased back, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, lack turn of foot.
Checked early, at rear, harmed by the slow pace, never nearer.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, kept on steadily until weakened final 150M. (Questioned for riding in the early stages)
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, checked 350M, never ran on thereafter.
At back throughout, never a factor.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran home strongly for 3rd.
At rear throughout, never looked likely.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, made some ground in Straight despite unable to fully test concluding stages.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on one pace until weakened final stages.
Settled in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced home.
Eased back from a wide gate, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, kept on until weakened final 300M.
Pressed forward to take the fence and led, kept on nicely until weakened final 100M, hung on for 4th.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader one the fence, dashed well to get 2nd, missed by a head.
Settled in front of midfield, 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on steadily until weakened final 100M.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, accelerated strongly to score by a head.
Settled back at break to 1 off near rear, ridden into stretch & shifted out, tepid run home.
Slow start & rousted at tail, 7L last & driven into stretch, stayed on for minor inroads until peaked & no extra 100m.
Broke well but lacked early toe & niggled midfield, found rhythm 850m, switched out & ridden 420m, shifted centre 300m & quickened to lead close home.
Broke with others, bustled to lead & soon to rail, narrow advantage, pressed on turn & shaken up 430m, fought to 1L lead 200m, all out & headed close home.
Broke well, sat narrow 2nd outside leader, pressed lead on turn to vie for advantage, lugged in under pressure 400m, emptied 250m & tapered.
Broke with others & rousted wide to race close 3rd 3 deep no cover, snagged 800m & slotted 1 off 1 back 730m, driven turning in, bumped 350m & squeezed out, faded.
Broke with others, unable to slot back & bustled forward to park handily 1 off with cover, niggled 550m, shifted out final turn, swept to 2nd 150m but peaked & tapered.
Smart start, bustled along & settled midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out & driven home turn, one-paced in run home.
Taken behind from wide to 2nd last 1 off, edged 3 deep with cover on turn, wide into stretch, checked off heels 350m, driven & surged centre.
Moderate start, rolled forward to 1 back on rail, in pocket 400m & forced way out, driven 300m, kept on dourly.
Broke front rank, taken back & trapped 3 wide behind midfield without cover, ridden for progress on turn, plugged on tamely.
Tardy start & bustled, settled rail near rear, driven turning in, stayed on for solid inroads.
Broke well, outpaced, settled midfield 4 off outside rail, under pressure 540m, lost spot, dropped to near rear, found again late, strong to line.
Swift break, challenged for early lead, settled 2nd on outside rail, pushed along 400m, unable to match leader, battled on, weakened late.
Strong start, urged along to try and cross, settled ahead of midfield centre track, ridden along widest out 550m, nothing to give.
First to begin, early lead, surrendered, settled just off speed 1 off, under heavy riding 500m, switched over heels 350m, boxed on.
Even break, ridden along to obtain handy position, settled 4th 3 off, under a drive 540m, limited response, quickly beaten off.

Jumped towards outside rail and hanging at start, roused along but could not improve, settled near rear in centre track, relegated to last 520m and ridden, pulled beyond centre track but no impression at all.
Good start, sped across face of field to lead 750m 3 off outside rail, under pressure 350m, responded, clear lead 200m, stopped final 50m, weakened.
Slightly awkward start, checked, dropped back to last on outside rail, short of room 550m, checked 200m, short of room again 100m, sprinted well when clear.
Away well, edged towards outside rail, settled just beyond midfield 1 off outside rail, improved to be just behind speed 650m, under pressure 450m, one-paced.

Away on terms, quickly lost spot and under pressure, settled beyond midfield on outside rail, niggled throughout, improved 400m, short of room 250m, nowhere to go and badly checked 100m, not ridden out.
Began evenly, settled fore of midfield near centre track, lost position 500m, awkwardly placed 300m and ridden along, battled away.
Slightly slow to begin, settled beyond midfield 3 off outside rail, travelled strongly, improved through field 450m, made run centre track, accelerated rapidly, easy win.
Very awkward beginning, ridden along but unable to make ground, settled near rear 1 off outside rail, overraced badly, pulled centre track, ridden along 250m, checked 200m, flew late.
Smart beginning, allowed to find a comfortable spot behind the pace, settled midfield 2 off outside rail, short of room 600m, ridden 500m, steady ground without threatening.
Travelled in midfield, 4L behind the leader and 3 wide without cover after 800M, showed nothing in the run to the line.
Ridden forward and settled one-off one-back position at 700M, weakened early and continued to drop off.
Raced slightly in front of midfield, 3-1/2L off the lead along the rail, kept on one paced in the run home.
Rolled forward and took the box-seat, sat 1-1/4L off the lead, ran on fairly and just missed out on 3rd.
Raced at the rear, 8-1/2L behind 3 wide with cover, swung widest and finished off strongly to score.
No early speed and raced in behind midfield, 5-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, ran on nicely inside 100M, closest at finish.
Prominent initially but 3 wide, improved to sit outside the lead at 700M, ran on but couldn't match the finish of the first two.
Awkward start, at back initially but improved to midfield along the rail, 5-1/4L behind, held up early then made minor inroad.
Always at the rear, never a factor.
Settled in behind midfield, 6L behind 2 wide with cover, awkward on heels passing 300M, one paced thereon.
Slotted in front of midfield, 3L off 2 wide with cover, hung in under pressure, couldn't hold on and missed by a short head.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, weakened passing 300M, not competitive.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/2L behind 2 wide with cover, crowded near 200M then checked at 150M, not fully tested.
Eased back and raced at the rear, 7-1/4L off along the rail, ran on only one paced.
Jumped with field but soon outpaced, dropping to rear along fence. Took inside run entering straight and ran on steadily between horses to grab minor placing.
Jumped best, led to 1250m, then took box seat when crossed, settling 2L from leader. Hard ridden early in straight to hold position but gave ground quickly from 250m.
Began well but not pushed, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Put under pressure turning for home, got clear run passing 350m, made no headway until final 100m when ran on fairly.
Vigorously ridden early to stay with pacemakers before settling one-back, one-off passing 1000m. Boxed on gamely to 150m before flattened.
Jumped well, pushed forward, settling two back along the fence. Blocked for run top of straight, switched out 400m to challenge but unable to close gap to winner.
Jumped well but unable handle pace, dropping back through field until clear last passing 900m.Turned very wide but found nothing under hard riding.
Bumped start, steadied, shifted across behind horses, settling in last pair passing 1000m. Shifted out turning for home, hard ridden entering straight, one-paced. Lame right front leg.
Hard ridden from outside draw to go forward, racing 3-wide before settling outside hind-quarters of leader. Rolled forward to momentarily lead 400m but only one-paced final 250m.
Vigorously ridden from widest draw to lead on settling, crossing to fence 1000m and slowing tempo. Momentarily headed 400m but kicked ahead 300m and pulled clear under hands and heels riding.
Vigorously ridden but didn't muster, settling between horses in midfield 4L from leader. Turned 4-wide, ran on steadily while shifting in under pressure final 150m.
Began OK, ridden along, settling along rail behind midfield. Left fence 600m, blocked for run top of straight, got clear 300m but blocked again 100m, ran on fairly.
Lifted feet at start and began awkwardly dropping back. Shifted across behind horses to 900m when moved forward 3-wide. Widest into straight, kept on fairly under hard riding.

Lifted legs at start and slow, then ridden to make up ground but held wide until 1200m when shifted in. Taken out 1000m to 3-wide position, losing ground steadily in straight. Had substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Ridden along to go forward but held 3-wide in midfield. Began forward move passing 900m, circling field to get within 2L of leader 300m when run ended and faded.

Dropped back from 14, in the rear 9Ls off and proved difficult to settle in a slowly run race, moved a bit closer 600M, held up near 300M, closed off steadily under top weight just couldn't reel in the winner.
Tracked pace, left flat footed when leaders quickened up 500M, no impression mid-straight.
Crossed to the lead 1200M and slowed things down, joined by rivals 600M, lost lead early straight, fought on to 150M, no extra towards finish.
In rear group early, left with no cover 1100M when pace slackened, strolled forward to reach leaders 600M, continued with the chase final 400M but was always held.
Behind mid-division in a slowly run race, saved ground on the inside, gave limited response to urging passing 400M, never threatened.
Settled down in mid-division 3-4Ls off the slow pace, bustled along 450M, chased steadily in the straight under light weight but couldn't reel in the winner.
In mid-division, 7th at 800M 4Ls off the slow pace, brought wide 550M, ran on mildly couldn't get to leaders.
Close enough throughout the race, kept on one pace only entering straight, weakened 200M.
Towards the rear 7Ls behind leader in a slowly run race, inclined to lay in early straight, had no clear run until 150M then finished well to go 4th near line. Would be closer.
Tracked leader 2-wide, under heavy restraint when pace slackened mid-stages, took over 350M, kept on soundly to the finish and holding pursuers at bay.
Eased back to the rear, last at 800 8Ls off the slow pace, ran on only fairly never reach contention.
Held up behind midfield, 5Ls off the slow pace making home turn, stayed on moderately over final 300M.
Never far off from leaders in a slowly run race, 7th at 400M, had his chance but couldn't accelerate enough to challenge leaders, steadied near 100M, eased off.
From draw 12 slotted into a 2-wide spot towards the rear, 5Ls off the pace 800M, brought widest in straight, stayed on moderately.
Lost right front plate on jumping and then lost left front plate soon after, dropping to rear between horses. Taken out on straightening but only one-paced.
Jumped OK, steadied and shifted in, dropping to rear. Steadied again 950m dropping to clear last. Taken to centre field on straightening and finished off strongly.
First out from widest draw, leading to 1150m before settling outside hind-quarters of leader. Kept tabs until 350m when under pressure and faded.
Slow into stride, dropping to last. Improved position along rail between 1000m and turn. Took inside run in straight, making up some ground when baulked 250m. Boxed on.
Began fairly, pressed forward, setting two-back along fence. Not much room top of straight, got clear 300m, boxed on one-paced.
Pressed forward on jumping but held 3-wide without cover 4L from leader. Took turn 3-wide, taken even wider in straight, one-paced.
Began well, unable handle pace dropping to last 1050m. Shifted out 850m to improve, 3-wide turn, taken to centre track, steadied 350m, squeezed out 250m, boxed on.
Struck heels and blundered shortly after start, dropping back, then ridden to make up ground settling between horses at midfield. No room top of straight, got clear 350m, ran on steadily.
Outpaced, dropping back, taken to fence 1250m and made up ground to settle midfield 950m. Not much room top of straight, got inside run 300m, rolled forward to hit front 50m, slowly edging clear.
Jumped OK, then hard ridden to hold position but kept 3-wide behind midfield. Turned very wide, kept on steadily under hard riding.
Hard ridden early to stay with pace, settling between horses 3L from leader 800m. Swung wide into straight, made up some ground initially, turning one-paced from 200m.
Vigorously ridden to go forward, racing with pace till taking clear lead 1150m. Kicked ahead on straightening, still well clear 100, run down final strides.
Began well, racing with pace until sliding into box seat 1150m. Followed leader to straight when soon under pressure, giving ground rapidly after passing 200m.
Began well, raced with pacemakers before settling one-back, one-off 1150m. Turned wide, picked up momentum and kept on well but unable run down first two.
Taken up early to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Wider in the straight and progressed well, slowly catching 3rd.
Reared on jumping and got near fore leg over the barrier, and played no part in the race.
Slow into stride and eased back to sit at the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Plugged away in the straight, picking up a couple of slower ones late.
Dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Came in off heels in the straight, and progressed steadily without threatening.
Cruised forward early to sit midfield, on the fence. Ran steadily at the top of the straight, before progressing from the 250m. Peaked close to the line, but held 3rd.
Crowded on jumping before dropping back to sit towards the rear of the field, on the rail. Held up and steadied from the 200m before being eased out late.
Stuck 4-5 wide with no cover in midfield early, before pressing forward to sit 3rd/4th, but never closer than 3 wide no cover. Gave ground quickly in the straight.
Looked for a sit early, before pushing to lead by the 1000m. In front at the 300m, before dropping out from that point and easing in the last 100m.
Worked up in the barrier before jumping, before pushing up early to be forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Under pressure before the turn, showed nothing in the straight and eased out early.
Bumped and unbalanced on jumping, before dropping back to sit worse than midfield, 3 wide with limited cover. Widest in the straight and finished off OK, despite laying in late.
Pushed forward to be the earlier leader, before allowing horses to cross at 1000m and settling 3rd/4th on the rail. 1 paced in the straight, and dropped out late.
Pushed up early, eventually settling 1 L behind the leader and 1 off the fence. Tackled leader at the 300m, and ran strongly to the line without bring threatened.
Cruised forward early to sit forward of midfield, on the rail. Came wider on the turn and pushed solidly in the straight. Only gradually getting to winner and accepted 2nd late.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit at the rear of the field. Stayed closer to the rails in the straight and ran on solidly, without threatening a place.
Slowly away, recovered to race 2 lengths or so back, difficult to settle near 1100M, 2 wide on turn, peaked early in straight, finished off evenly thereafter.
Crowded out start, raced 2 lengths back in 6th, difficult to settle near 1100M, 3 wide and without cover on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 200M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Taken back to race at rear from gate 12, 8 lengths back, still well back on turn, finished off one paced. (Lost right front plate near 1100M.)
Away with them, raced prominently, no cover throughout, finished off evenly in straight, never a threat to the first few.
Began well, raced 4 lengths back in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide, 5 lengths back, same margin back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from gate 13, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, improved on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Began fairly, crowded near 1200M, raced 8 lengths back, still at rear on turn, kept to inside after straightening and finished off evenly. (See racing incidents.)
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 6 lengths back on rail at rear, slightly improved along the rail on turn, no daylight early in straight, finished off very strongly when clear final 200M to score.
Began well, took the lead early, headed near 950M, sat a length behind the leader on turn, closed off well to get 3rd.
Average to begin, raced at rear throughout, never competitive.
Crowded out start, raced 2 lengths or so back on rail, saved ground on turn, made no progress in straight.

Jumped well from a tricky gate, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover early, took the lead near 950M, enjoyed the easy lead on turn, kept on very well in straight but couldn't hold off the winner late.
Jumped well from the widest gate, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Slightly slow out, no early speed, raced 5 lengths back at tail, still well back on turn, finished off very strongly to be nearest on line.
Jumped well, raced 2 wide in 6th, checked near 600M, angled out turning in, failed to close off in straight.
Began well from a tricky gate, showed no early speed, raced 3 wide behind midfield, similar position on turn, failed to close off.
Jumped well from a wide draw, raced prominently, 3 wide on turn, peaked near 200M, one-paced thereafter. (Lost left front plate near 850M.)
Average to begin, positioned on rail in midfield, ideal run on turn, finished off strongly to score.
Bumped start, sent forward to race 2 wide in 3rd, same position on turn, peaked near 200M, stayed on fairly.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward from the widest gate, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide without cover throughout, emptied early in straight when hard run took effect.
Bumped start, raced 4 lengths or so back at rear, same position on turn, finished off well to get 3rd.
Began well, raced prominently on rail, shared lead on turn, unbalanced near 450M, showed no response in straight and eased. (Blood in trachea.)
Began fairly, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths or so back in midfield, there to turn, angled out in straight and made good progress to make frame.
Eased back, 2 wide, pace good, improved around the field from 800M, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, pace good, ran on ok.
Eased to rear, 2 wide, pace good, dashed well in straight whilst hanging in.
Hard ridden forward, took rail and led at good pace, hung on until 150M flattened.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide just off the leader, pace good, out of fuel 150M.
Hard ridden early, at back, 2 wide, pace good, blocked 4-2, dashed well when clear.
Eased to sit 3 back along the fence, pace good, emptied 300M.
Eased to rear, took rail, pace good, lack room 300M, progressed steadily when clear for 3rd.
At back, 2 wide, pace good, never improved.
Settled in box seat, pace good, very one paced in straight.
Pushed to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, pace good, lack room 4-2, no dash when clear.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, 2 wide, pace good, ran on until 100M flattened.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 2nd.
Eased back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed well for 4th.
Always at rear, never ran on.
Raced midfield 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, however, raced ungenerously throughout the race, never looked likely.
Prominent, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, lost ground rounding the Home Turn, one paced thereafter.
Prominent, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide without cover, kept on steadily until weakened final 100M.
Settled worse than midfield about 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, made no impression in Straight.
Jumped slowly, settled midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced home without any threats.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled 9Ls behind the leader on the fence, made plenty of ground in Straight.
Sent forward to park outside the leader, however, dropped couple of lengths rounding the Home Turn when the pace quickened, ran on strongly to score thereafter.
Pushed forward to take the fence and led from a wide gate, dropped off rounding the Home Turn.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, stride forward to take the lead 800M, kept on strongly until headed final 50M, hung on for 3rd.
Slow start, punched to rail behind midfield, driven 310m & shifted out, struggled in tepid run home.
Moderate start & raced midfield 1 off with cover, overraced 900m, driven out 400m, wide into stretch, one-paced & tapered closing stages.
Broke well, taken back to behind midfield 1 off with cover, checked off heels 830m, niggled 600m, fanned out into stretch & driven, kept on evenly.
Fast start to lead, 3 wide & headed 1100m, parked close 2nd 1 off from 1000m, niggled 450m, outkicked turning in & soon 1.5L down, kept on to edge 2nd.
Taken to tail from widest, niggled initially, nudged along 500m, driven into stretch & shifted out, kept on solidly past beaten rivals.
Taken behind from wide gate to race rail midfield, overraced 800m, niggled for progress 500m, 4th & driven into stretch, grinding advance between runners to lead last strides.
Moderate break, bustled forward to 1 back on rail, shifted out & driven 400m, driven wide into stretch, kept on dourly centre track.
Smart start & eased to lead on rail 1100m, overraced a touch in back straight, shaken up turning in & kicked 1.5L clear, emptied 100m & headed close home.
Sharp break to press initial lead, soon settled 1 back 1 off, 4th & niggled 550m, 5th & driven turning in, stayed on evenly.
Smart start, taken back & settled near rear 3 wide with cover, shifted very wide & driven out, struggled in run home.
Sharp break, taken back to 1 off with cover near rear, overraced 830m & shuffled to 2nd last, rank last turning in, driven & switched centre 250m, plugged on one pace.
Broke ok, trapped 3 wide no cover midfield, under pump 420m, wide into stretch, found nil & faded.
First to begin, unable to match early speed, stuck wide in opening stages, driven hard into first turn to get across, settled 2nd 1 off, asked for an effort 380m, hanging in, boxed on.
Steady break, taken back, settled near rear 1 off, asked to improve 400m, pulled to outside, little impression.
Began OK, ridden to try and get in, settled midfield 3 deep with cover early, without cover from 800m, improved 550m, under heavy drive 350m, weakened.
Step slow at start, ridden to obtain midfield position, short of room 950m, settled beyond midfield 1 off, eased 4 deep on turn, ridden 400m, widest into straight, grinding effort.
Away well, urged to front, 1L lead 1000m, travelled strongly, ridden along 300m, joined 150m, game, just outsprinted late.
Even break, snagged from outside, settled last 1 off, railed through on turn, searching for space, short of room 150m, went to line under hold.
Strong start, ridden to take forward position, settled 4th 1 off, taken 3 deep and nudged 450m, effort short-lived, outsprinted.
Away on terms, slightly outpaced early, settled midfield on rail, short of room 420m, blocked again 320m, switched inside 300m, made steady ground.
Smart break, eased out of speed battle, settled 3rd on rail, pushed off leader's back 350m, joined leader 150m, just too strong late.
Eased at start, settled near rear on rail, niggled 750m, eased off fence and ridden 500m, checked 150m, no dash.
Slightly awkward start, eased to fence, improved, settled beyond midfield on rail, limited room 450m, ridden for rails run 350m, sprinted between runners powerfully, short of room near finish.
Even break, settled fore of midfield 1 off, overraced throughout, lost position and shuffled beyond midfield 600m, ridden 500m, short of room soon after, ridden entering straight, stuck on evenly.
Rolled forward and sat outside the leader, 1L off, slight dash at 200M, overhauled for 2nd inside final 50M.
Raced in front of midfield, 3-1/4L off along the rail, improved slightly around turn, but one paced home.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 4-3/4L off along the rail, kept on one paced in the run home.
Sent forward and took box-seat, sat 1-1/2L off, found nothing in the Straight. (Blood in trachea, roarer and lame right front)
Rolled forward and took the rail and led by 1L, kept on all the way to score by 1-3/4L.
Settled towards the rear, 6-1/4L behind along the rail, checked at 400M, did not run on.
Ridden forward and assumed one-off one back position, 2-1/2L off 2 wide, fell and dislodged rider passing 400M.
Settled in midfield, raced 4L behind the lead 2 wide, ran on well to the line to get 2nd.
Taken back and raced towards the rear, 7L behind 2 wide, eased down after suffering interference at 400M.
Slow start and settled at the rear, sat 8-1/4L behind on the rail, checked and dislodged rider passing 400M.
Eased back and raced at the rear, 8-3/4L behind 2 wide, eased down after suffering interference at 400M.
Awkward start, slotted in behind midfield, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide, hampered at 400M then showed nothing in the Straight.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to lead on settling, crossing to fence and setting steady pace. Swung wide, kept battling until final 50m when steadied and swamped.
Began awkwardly, no pace, dropping to rear in one-off position. Took run between horses entering straight but only one-paced.
Began well, racing with pace until settling along fence 3L from leader passing 800m. Took inside run in straight but no clear run from 100m. Raced tightly final stages and not fully tested.
Jumped with field, urged forward but over-raced from 900m to 700m before settling in one-off position, 5L from leader. Turned very wide but only limited response under hard riding.
Began OK, ridden along to hold rail, settling in midfield 5L from leader. Switched out 450m to make turn, 5-wide into straight, ran on strongly doing best work final 100m.
Go off fairly, not pushed, settling one-off behind midfield. Held for running when turning into straight, switched in but only one-paced.
Jumped well, mixing it with early leaders till eased to one-off position 3L from leader 700m. Switched out in straight, ran on steadily though tightened final stages and not fully tested.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide until settling outside hind quarters of leader passing 700m. Shaken up 350m, hit front 150m, kept finding when strongly challenged for narrow win.
Steadied on jumping, shifted across behind horses to rail, then travelled keenly, settling in last pair. Got rails run in straight, ran on fairly to 100m when flattened.
Began awkwardly, dropping back, then taken to rail behind midfield. Switched out in straight to make run, ran on well between horses but tightened final stages and not fully tested.

Jumped well, led early before taking box seat 700m. Got inside run when leader swung wide entering straight, threw out strong challenge final 150m, rider stopped riding momentarily when tightened near finish.
Began fairly, unable to maintain pace, dropping to clear last passing 850s. Taken to centre track on straitening but found nothing under vigorous riding.
Began well to be 4th on settling, ran on well leaving home turn, loomed a strong threat but lost every chance when checked 50M.
Crowded for room at the start, settled behind midfield 5-6Ls off the pace, 9th at 400M, made no progress on leaders on straightening.
Towards the rear 7Ls behind leaders, 10th at 600M, brought widest to challenge, ran past beaten horses only.
Restrained in midfield, 4Ls off the pace 400M, came with a well-timed challenge, kept going well and claimed leader just in time.
Reserved behind mid-division 6Ls behind leaders, gave limited response passing 300M, never reach contention.
Not hurried, dropped back to last 8Ls from leader, couldn't pick up passing 400M, never in the hunt.
Shifted back from wide barrier, 2nd last over 7Ls off the pace, found disappointingly little in the finish, eased off late stages.
Broke sharply, sat just off leaders, worked home solidly passing 300M, led 150M, shifted out under pressure late stages and caught last few strides.
Began well, held up in midfield 3Ls off the pace, chased leaders steadily passing 300M, peaked on this run late.
Crossed the lead 1000M, led steadily to straight, headed 150M, faded towards the finish.
Went forward from draw 12, prompted the pace to 400M, weakened rapidly entering straight.
Caught 3-wide no cover in midfield from draw 11, remained wide home turn and struggled to the finish.
Settled one from last after beginning from the widest gate, saved ground on rails turning in, angled out for a run upon straightening, failed to quicken under pressure.
Settled in midfield, soon came to challenge in straight and hit the front passing the 300 metres, just prevailed.
Well behind, wide entering home straight, kept on.
Began well from a wide gate, ridden forward to dispute the lead from far side, came under pressure upon straightening, soon weakened. (Tactic questioned) (Blood in trachea)

Worked steadily forward to obtain rails run in the front on top of stables bend, ceded lead briefly far side, re-gained narrow advantage rounding home bend but not for long, swamped inside the final 250 metres. (Blood in trachea)
Taken back to 5th over 3L off the pace, came to challenge from a similar position entering home straight, fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled just worse than midfield on rails, switched out for a run entering straight, ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Broke well from a low draw, settled just off the pace on rails mainly in 4th, did not have much room after straightening, kept on same pace without quickening despite a clear passage inside the final 250 metres.
Settled towards the rear, finished off race well near the centre of the track, just failed to get up on line.
Settled in midfield some 3L back in 6th on rails, in similar position turning in, baulked for a run 250 metres out, produced good late impression closing stages.
Moderate start, moving forward when hampered near trainers stand on stables bend, reached one-out-one-back position straightening onto far side, with leaders early in home straight, soon weakened.
Hard ridden forward, sat outside the leader, ran on well to the line and scored.
At rear, 2 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, no dash.
Midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, never improved.
Box seat, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on until 150M flattened.
Pushed early, trapped 3 wide in front of midfield, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well in final stages.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, lack room 4-2, little dash when clear.
Eased back, 3 wide, raced keenly, harmed by the slow pace, lack room 4-2, unleashed strong finishing efforts when clear.
At back, on the fence, not suited by the slow pace, no dash.
Eased to sit in midfield along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 250M, lack room 100M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, overhauled 300M, ran on for 3rd.
Eased back, 2 wide, dashed strongly 300M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Very slow away, at rear, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Pushed forward, sat 2 wide, benefited by the slow sectionals, flattened 200M.
Very slow away, trapped 3 wide behind midfield, harmed by the slow pace, held ground in straight.
Sent forward to park outside the leader, kept on nicely until headed final 50M.
At rear, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, passed some tired runners in Straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, kept on fairly and weakened over the last furlong.
Failed to muster early, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, never looked likely.
Settled midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, made ground nicely rounding the Home Bend, however, weakened 200M.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Rolled forward to obtain the box seat, ran on well to get 2nd, missed by a head.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, checked 700M, dropped off thereafter.
Prominent, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, weakened 150M, hung on for 4th.
Missed start, switched to the fence and settled 5Ls behind the leader, never ran on.
Settled worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, made no impression in Straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, dashed well to score by a head.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on one pace to the line without threatening.
Sent forward to take the lead along the fence, weakened badly soon after straightening, tailed out.
Sluggish break, to rail & rolled to camp midfield, advanced to 4th on turn, shaken up 350m & shifted out, quickened to press lead 150m & lugged in, corrected & drew clear.
Sharp start, rolled wide to lead 1210m, to rail 1000m & raced 2.5L clear, 1L up & ridden 400m, all out & headed 300m, tapered.
Tardy start, bustled forward, raced back of midfield 1 off with cover, to rail on turn & overraced a touch, ridden 350m, kept on for minor inroads.
Fast start widest, taken back & slotted behind midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 700m, driven home turn, tame run home.
Broke front rank, settled 2nd 1 off no cover, narrow 3rd & niggled 650m, under pressure turning in & soon weakened out.
Lacked toe at break, near rear & overraced 1200m, settled rail behind midfield & overraced 850m, shifted out & driven 400m, kept on for minor late headway.
Led at break & steadied, headed 1210m & 3 wide no cover until parked handy 1 off with cover 800m, 5th & 3 deep turning in, driven 400m, closed centre to nick 2nd late, no threat to winner.
Moderate start, rousted initially & soon settled 3 wide with cover midfield, off heels 930m, lost cover 800m, hard ridden turning in, found nil& weakened.
Taken back to rail at tail, shifted 3 wide for progress 700m, driven home turn, wandered around under pressure, one-paced.
Sharp start, restrained to 1 back on rail, 1L 2nd when switched to challenge & shaken up 400m, quickened to lead 300m, all out & headed 100m, tapered.
Started ok, raced midfield 1 off with cover, ridden 400m, boxed on one pace.
Taken back to 1 off with cover near tail, driven into stretch, plodded weakly, never a factor.
Slow start & bustled on rail near tail, last trio turning in, driven & plodded on one pace.
Taken back at start & bustled a touch to race near rear 3 wide with cover, widest into stretch, ridden 300m, struggled.
Away on terms, taken back, settled beyond midfield 1 off, awkwardly placed 1250m, niggled 1000m, short of room 800m, ridden 400m, switched over heels 280m, sprinted strongly, just got the bob.

Began OK, eased at start to go back, niggled to get to midfield spot, settled midfield on rail, saved ground throughout, looking for room 400m, checked badly 250m, sprinted very strongly but all too late.
Strong start, eased from widest gate, back to last, improved quickly around field, settled just beyond midfield 4 deep no cover, continued to improve 5 wide, under pressure 500m, quickly beaten.
Hard-ridden at start, overraced badly, settled just fore of midfield 1 off, lost position 700m, ridden 450m, one-paced.

Strong start, slow to muster, heavy drive along rail to push up, lead 1450m, hard to settle, joined and headed 1100m, kicked up again 900m, under pressure 500m, quickly beaten, impeded 300m when weakening, tailed off.
Slightly awkward out of gates, restrained, raced ungenerously, back to last 1 off, improved between runners 850m, ridden 400m, little to offer.
Began evenly, pushed but couldn't muster enough speed to cross, stuck widest 1st turn, settled midfield 4 deep, improved to fore of midfield 3 deep with cover 1000m, under riding 500m, no response.

Away well, ridden into first turn but stuck 3 wide with cover, settled just beyond midfield 3 deep, overraced slightly, shuffled back 900m, pulled widest 550m and asked to improve, response short-lived, battled on.
Well away, natural pace to lead early, allowed others to set pace, settled 3rd and 4th 1 off, shuffled back 600m, pushed into clear 4 deep at 380m, sprinted powerfully, led 150m, just out bobbed.
Began well, ridden along to go forward, stuck wide early, posted 4 deep, eased to settle 3rd 3 deep, under ride 550m, moved up to lead 300m, weakened 150m.
First to begin, ridden to obtain handy position, slightly outsped, kept pushing to take lead 1100m, joined and headed again 900m, driven 600m, swept to lead 350m, claimed 150m, boxed on.
Slight step slow, niggled, settled near rear 3 deep with cover, overracing, asked to improve 800m, quickened 550m, ridden 350m, sprinted well, stayed on.
Away smartly, eased to rail, settled fore of midfield on inside, given more rein 850m, short of room 430m, unable to pick up.
Awkward start, taken back, settled near rear on rail, relegated to last 850m, under pressure 600m, no impression at all.
Niggled forward and settled into box-seat, 2L off the leader, kept on one paced to finish 4th.
Travelled in midfield 3-3/4L behind along the rail, held up early in the Straight, then ran on only one paced.
Raced at the rear, 8-1/2L behind 2 wide, ridden to keep up rounding turn, ran on and nearest at the finish.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/4L behind 3 wide with cover, showed nothing in the Straight.
Travelled towards the rear, 6-1/4L behind along the rail, not competitive.
Eased back and raced towards the rear, 6-3/4L behind 2 wide, finished off strongly along the outer Straight for 2nd.
Travelled in behind midfield, 5L behind the lead 2 wide, found extra near 200M and ran on well to score.
Ridden forward and led 2 wide when kept away from the rail by inside runner, headed inside 100M, ran on for 3rd.
Taken back and always at the rear, never in contention.
Ridden forward and settled one-off one-back, 1-3/4L behind the lead, hampered at 900M, weakened at 250M.
Rolled forward, prominent and sat 2L off but 3 wide without cover, checked at 900M, slight dash near 200M to run on.
Pushed forward and sat inside the lead along the rail, remained in touch until 150M when couldn't find extra.
Settled in front of midfield, 3-1/4L behind 2 wide, raced greenly throughout and interrupted run in the Straight.
Raced in midfield, 4L off the pace and trapped 4 wide, bumped at 200M, one paced throughout.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground between horses getting to midfield at halfway mark. Ran out of steam passing 300m and faded.
Jumped with field, not pushed, settling midfield but 4-away from outer fence. Hard ridden from 400m to hold position before tiring final 100m.
Bumped start, hard ridden but didn't muster, dropping behind midfield one-away from outer fence. Given reminders 400m, boxed on fairly under hard riding.
Quickly away, roaring down centre track to draw almost level with leader 700m. Ran out of steam passing 350m and faded.
Began well, pressed forward along rail, settling 3L from leader 700m. Under pressure from 350m to hold position and faded gradually final stages.
Jumped best, quickly in front while shifting across to outer rail. Joined up front passing 200m but kept battling only to lose in a finish of bobbing-heads.
Began fairly, ridden but didn't muster, dropping to rear along outer rail. Clear last passing 400m, shifted in several times to get opening 200m before running past beaten horses.
Slow to move and last on settling. Trailed field to 400m when taken to centre track, closing in steadily while hanging out final 300m.
Off nicely, racing with pace till setting between horses 3L from leader passing 700m. Under pressure from 350m, hampered 150m, giving ground quickly.
Began well but not rushed, settling one-away from outer rail 2L from leader. Closed in passing 200m, hit front 100m but strongly challenged to the line, winning by the smallest of margins.
Began fairly, no speed, dropping to last pair 3-away from outer fence. Picked up the bit passing 400m and made steady progress between horses though never close enough to challenge.
Jumped fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear but away from outer fence. Crowded for room 300m, switched to centre track 200m but only one-paced.

Off fairly, no speed, settling behind midfield 3-away from outer fence. Under pressure from 400m but only got going final 100m when closed off strongly. Rider reprimanded for not riding out final stride.
Broke well, not rushed, allowed to settle 3L from leader 700m. Took closer order passing 400m, closed in 200m before turning one-pace, just hanging on to minor placing.
Restrained behind midfield, 3-wide much of the way and proved difficult to settle at times, finished well final 300M under top weight, held by first two late stages.
From wide draw caught 3-wide no cover in midfield, kept on same pace passing 400M,
Slow to begin, taken across behind runners from wide barrier, 9th at 400M and 4Ls back, stayed on moderately without threatening.
Chased the pace along fence, held up early straight, shifted out 200M and closed off reasonably well to go 4th before line.
Chased leaders early, checked near 1100M and drifted back to a midfield position, fought on same pace in straight, offered little final 150M, failed to finish off.
Quickly into stride, soon led and set good pace upfront, headed 200M, couldn't sustain run late and lost several placing towards the finish.
Fractious in stalls, reared as the start was affected and lost many lengths, never got back to contention.
Never far off from leader, travelled strongly into contention, quickened to lead 200M, kept on strongly to the line only caught by impressive winner near 50M.
Failed to muster speed, settled down in a 2-wide position behind midfield, lacked further response entering straight, soon beaten.
Given a waiting ride in the rear 7-8Ls back, responded only fairly passing 400M, no threat to leaders.
Dropped back to rear, couldn't quicken up passing 400M, never involved
Pressed forward, in 2nd place chasing leader from 1100M, raced up to challenge early straight, tried hard but not finishing pace of first three, lost 4th before line.
Failed to muster speed, shuffled back to near the rear before home turn, worked home well final 300M but too much ground to make up.
Guided to the rail position, settled in midfield 4Ls off the pace, shifted into clear 300M then powered home for an emphatic win.
Hard ridden early to hold forward position, settling one-off in midfield 3L from leader. Ran on fairly early straight before turning one-paced.
Hampered start, shifted across into one-off position at the rear and switched off. Widest on straightening finished strongly, chasing winner all the way to the line without closing gap.
A little slow to move then hard ridden to hold rail position towards the rear. Took inside run in straight and was finishing strongly when checked 200m. No clear run after that and not tested.
Jumped with field before settling along rail in midfield. Put under pressure from turn but found little and plodded home.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 4-wide until seeking cover 900m, dropping 3L from leader. Ran on fairly in straight until steadied passing 200m.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground, settling one-off in midfield 4L from leader. Held up in traffic top of straight, switched out 300m, finished off strongly.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide without cover 2L from leading pair. Looked a possibility when rolled forward top of straight but only one-paced final 200m.
Jumped fairly, outpaced, dropping to rear along fence. Last turning for home and never competitive.
Jumped OK, eased, sliding into one-off position behind midfield. Switched out turning for home, taken to centre track on straightened, closed strongly, hitting the front 100m and pulling clear.
Began awkwardly then crowded, dropping to last soon after start. Tailed field to turn, switched wide entering straight before switching in for clear run. Ran on steadily without looking dangerous,
Quickly into stride, pressed forward between horses, settling 3L from leading pair. Steadied 500m when crowded, baulked 200m, no clear run until final 150m. Not properly tested.
Began well, pressed forward, settling in box seat 2L from leader. Blocked for run early in straight, angled out 400m to get clear run, finished off steadily.
