Hard ridden to lead narrowly while pressed by rival on inside. Headed 650m but retook lead 400m. Battled strongly until 100m when tired but held on for minor placing.
Vigorously ridden to hold rail inside leader before edging ahead passing 650m. Caught on straightening but battled on gamely until running out of steam final 100m.
Eased forward early to sit midfield, on the rail. Came wider on the turn, and found a run at 350m. Ran strongly late, and just managed to hold onto 3rd late.
Taken forward early, before allowing leader to cross to sit just behind. Over raced onto heels 1100m. 1 paced in the straight, and not pushed out late.
Crowded on jumping, before dropping back to sit at the rear of the field, on the fence. Ran steadily in the straight, without threatening a place.
Dropped back early to sit in the last pair. Came out off heels at 1300m. Plugged away in the straight, without making an impression.
Eased forward early, settling around midfield, on the fence. Made no impact in the straight, and not pushed out late.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to sit last, 3-4 wide with limited cover. Struggled to improve from that position, and eased late.
Eased forward early to sit worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Never made an impact in the straight.
Eased back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Only fair in the straight.
Settled midfield, 1 off the fence. Came widest on the turn, ran strongly from the 250m and just missed claiming 3rd late.
Eased across early to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran solidly early in the straight, before running well from the 200m. Just missed in a 3 way go for 3rd.
Taken up early to be handily place in 4th, 3.5L off the leader. Closer on the turn, and ran strongly in the straight. Chasing down the winner late, but just missed.
Taken forward early to eventually sit 3/4L behind the leader, 1 off the fence. Up on the pace until dropping out quickly from the 150m.
Eased into stride, and eventually taken back to sit towards the rear of the field, 3 wide with limited cover. Ran disappointingly in the straight, before easing late.
Put his head down and began awkwardly, before recovering to cross to the lead. Starting to feel the pressure over the last 100m, but just managed to hold on late.
Led or disputed lead far side, 1L back in 2nd coming onto home bend, weakened steadily in home straight.
Jumped fairly, settled in midfield, switched wide for a run entering straight, ran on well down the centre of the track but without threatening the winner.
With leaders early before shifting back to 2L 4th 3-wide, renewed effort approaching the Rock to close on leaders briefly, folded up quickly from a prominent position inside the final 150 metres.
Soon taken back from a wide gate, saved a lot of ground turning in, but no clear passage most of way in straight.
Moderate start, travelled just worse than midfield 3-wide down back straight and around home bend, not much room early in home straight and could only keep on the same pace in the run home.
Jumped fairly, settled just better than midfield on rails about 2L off the pace, commenced move rounding home bend, hit the front upon straightening, readily.
Ridden to 3rd 1L back early, shifted back to 4th and then 5th coming out of back straight, shifted wide for a run turning for home, failed to quicken under pressure.
Restrained to share the pace on rails, kicked 1L clear leaving the Rock, maintained similar advantage turning in, but headed under pressure over 100 metres out.

Taken back from the widest gate briefly before going forth and then back again to settle for last position 900M out, given reminders and switched widest entering home straight, made good impression closing stages to grab 3rd late.
Niggled at wide in midfield after beginning from a wide gate, commenced move rounding home bend, but failed to respond to hard driving throughout the straight.

Moderate start, soon dropped to last few, not settled when steadied behind runners on rails approaching the Rock, saved ground on midfield turning in, switched in for a clear run 200 metres but only finished one-paced.
Sluggish at start, settled in last few, did not find much room after straightening until late.
Pushed to take rail and led at good pace, hung on well until 150M flattened.
Eased back, trapped 4-5 wide, pace good, no dash.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, pace good, out of fuel 150M.
Eased back, raced keenly, 2-3 wide, pace good, made some ground 100M.
Pushed to obtain box seat, pace good, closed off strongly for 2nd.
Settled in front, 2 wide, pace good, soon emptied 250M.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, raced keenly, pace good, progressed steadily 300M and scored without being fully tested.
At back along the fence, pace good, made ground 300M, lack room 100M.
Slow away, midfield, 2 wide, pace good, never improved.
At rear along the fence, pace good, no progress.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, pace good, held ground in straight.
Eased at start, took rail behind midfield, pace good, lack room 4-2, progressed steadily when clear.
Raced midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, peeled wide turning in, dashed strongly to score by a neck.
Taken back, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, made ground steadily for 4th.
Rolled forward to take the fence and led by 2Ls 600M, kept on until headed final 100M.
Prominent, travelled 2.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide without cover, ran on gradually, however, clipped heels and rider dislodged over the final couple of strides. ( See incident report)
Settled midfield, despite trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, battled on gamely for 2nd, beaten by a neck.
Eased back from a wide gate, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in Straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on nicely for 3rd.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, kept on one pace until weakened final 100M.
Sent forward to take the fence, eased 600M to obtain a cover, kept on one pace until weakened final 100M.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Taken back to rear from a wide gate, never ran on.
Raced midfield, failed to respond despite ridden along throughout, never looked likely.
Began fairly, taken to rail and eased, dropping towards rear. Lost position turning for home, took rails run in straight and finished off nicely to be closest at finish.
Slow into stride, ridden but didn't muster and distant last on settling. Trailed field thereafter, passing one runner 50m out.
Hard ridden but wide to go forward before getting cover in one-off position 3L from leader back stretch. Put under pressure from 500m and ran on steadily between horses.
Pressed forward from inside draw, racing keenly in the lead to back stretch when settled and slowed pace. Under pressure from 400m, held on to 300m before giving ground rapidly.
Jumped well, raced with pace until eased into box seat 1250m, 2L from leader. Got clear rails run entering straight, kept on well to 50m when flattened.
Began well but eased, settling along rail 5L from leader back stretch. Lost position around final turn, tightened 300m, got split between horses 250m and finished off nicely.
Jumped well, gradually taken in for cover, settling in one-off position behind midfield. Vigorously ridden from 500m but did not respond until passing 150m, finishing off final 100m nicely.

Quickly into stride, had natural speed to stay with leading pack until settling outside hind-quarters of leader back stretch. Put under pressure 500m, looked chance 200m before getting the staggers and fading.
Began awkwardly, losing ground, dropping to rear in one-off position, Began forward move passing 700m, very wide into straight, ran on steadily under hard riding.
Hard ridden from outside draw, racing 3-wide around first turn and then held without cover back stretch 2L from leader. Rolled forward from 400m, hit front 200m, battled gamely when passed.

Jumped w/ field, took first turn 3-wide, gradually dropping to rear in one-off position. Started forward move 750m, 5-wide into straight, finished strongly down centre track to win in driving finish while laying in closing stages.
Pressed forward from outside draw, settling in one-off position 2L from leader at turn. Chased leader to 200m when ran out of stamina and gave ground quickly.
Began well, rolled forward, settling one-back, one-off. Niggled at from 700m to hold position, under pressure from 400m, boxed on fairly in straight.

Bumped shortly after started, ridden but held wide, gradually drifting towards rear. Take to centre track on straightening, ran on fairly though rider momentarily stopped riding 150m to prevent tightening.
Began well, took clear lead on settling, then slowed pace. Kicked ahead entering straight, joined up front closing stages, kept battling to line.
Bumped start, pressed forward, racing in one-off position in midfield. Put under pressure turning for home but limited response, dropping out quickly final 200m
Got off well but not pushed, sliding into box seat 3L from leader. Shaken up passing 500m, got inside run in straight, made ground to 100m when flattened.
Restrained after start and shifted in, settling along rail towards the rear. Not asked for effort until approaching 400m, taken wide in straight, finished strongly, cutting down leader final stages.

Had feet in air when gates opened and slow to move. Trailed field to straight when switched wide. Tightened 150m when improving, boxed on fairly, through rider stopped riding near line to relieve tightening.
Jumped with field, not pushed, settling along rail, 4L from leader. Angled out 400m to go forward, got clear run entering straight, ran on steadily to grab minor placing.
Slotted into midfield, 4-3/4L behind the lead 2 wide, one paced early then made slight progress after 150M.
Eased back and raced toward the rear, 6L behind the lead 2 wide, swung widest after turn, ran on fairly for 4th.
In box-seat initially, dropped to behind midfield when making the home turn, found extra at 150M and ran on.
Initially in front of midfield but trapped 3 wide, improved and crossed to lead at 800M, dropped off after 250M.
Taken back initially, then followed the winner to improve along the back straight and around turn, ran on nicely for 2nd.
Eased back then improved in the back straight and crept to within 1L of the leader at turn, kept on nicely to score.
Pushed forward and raced outside the leader, 1-1/4L behind, ran on until 200M when weakened.
Sent forward and led initially along the rail, crossed near 800M, slight dash only before 200M, not competitive.
Raced towards the rear, dropped off rounding turn, never a factor.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/4L behind the lead along the rail, kept on one paced in the run home.
Raced in front of midfield, sat 2-3/4L off 2 wide, kept on in the Straight and just held on to 3rd.
Quickly into stride, ridden to hold forward position, settling one-out, one-back until shuffled back to 5th when others moved forward. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Jumped best, led initially until settling in box seat, 3L from leader at first turn. Put under pressure turning for home, boxed on fairly to 100m when flattened.

Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide until settling 2nd, 2L from leader approaching 1200m. Shuffled back to 3rd when another moved up 1050m, kept on till bumped and unbalanced 200m, one-paced.
Began fairly, pressed forward, then hampered, settling 3-back along rail at midfield. Took inside run in straight, steadied 250m, one-paced. Found to suffer post-race distress.
Began well but eased out of pace battle, dropping to rear on settling. Dropped to last passing 800m, switched out turn to improve, boxed on one-paced in straight.

Hard ridden from widest draw, racing wide until taking lead 1500m and crossing to fence. Slowed pace but kicked half-length clear when joined 900m. Over taken passing 400m and gave ground quickly in straight.
Began fairly, tightened 1700m, taken to rail, settling behind midfield. Took inside run in straight but severely hampered 200m when improving. Finished off nicely when clear.
Began OK, shared early peace before settling between horses 3L from leader passing 1200m. Given reminders passing 400m, forced to shift out 250m to get run, boxed on gamely.
Steadied after start and shifted in for cover, settling in one-off position at the rear. Switch out final turn, taken to centre track on straightening, finished off strongly.

Began fairly, pressed forward but caught wide without cover 1250m and allowed to roll forward to sit outside leader 900m. Took over running passing 400m, caught 150m when shorting stride but held for third.
Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind horses, settling last. Improved along rail from 850m, very wide in straight, powered home to win easily, easing down.
Jumped well but allowed to settle, dropping to behind midfield in one-off position. Taken wider when trying to improve around turn, very wide in straight, found nothing when asked for effort.
Caught wide early stages from widest draw, shifted to a 3-wide spot behind leaders, ran on fairly over final 300M for non-threatening 5th.
In touch with leaders, lacked a strong kick when driven out 300M, kept on fairly to the finish.
Settled down behind midfield, 3-wide with cover, 4Ls off the pace 400M, brought widest entering straight but not picking up pace.
Jumped well from draw 1, vied for early pace before emerging as the clear leader 600M, kicked clear from pursuers 250M, kept on well for a dominant victory under hands and heels riding.
Pressed forward, vied for the lead 2-wide, kept on same pace early straight, weakened 200M.
Up with pace, caught 3-wide no cover throughout, gave ground 200M. (Lame LF leg)
Eased back to the rear pair, 4-5Ls off the pace midway, didn't have the clearest run mid-straight but couldn't accelerate enough when clear.
Restless in the barriers, began fairly and ended up in last 5Ls behind leaders, saved ground inside but lacked a strong kick in the finish, no threat to leaders.
Along the 2-path 3-4Ls off the pace on settling, 8th at 800M and 400M, kept on same pace in straight, never threatened.
Sat behind leaders, no match with winner's acceleration passing 300M, fought on to hold his position.
In mid-division 3-4Ls behind leaders, stayed on to go 2nd 150M, couldn't get near to runaway winner.
Jumped well from a poor draw, settled in midfield, became worse when pace quickened home bend, came under pressure entering straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Taken back from a poor gate for rails run in last few, remained towards the rear to straight, made no impression.
Settled in 5th on rails within 3L of speed, soon came to challenge after straightening, quickened well to take charge passing the 200 metres.
Ridden early before settling wide in forward of midfield, gained slightly closer entering home straight, faded inside the final 200 metres.
Settled well behind from the widest gate, made late impression running past well-beaten horses inside the final 200 metres.
Jumped fairly from the one draw, soon took up running with a smart pace, no answer to winner's turn of foot and headed 200 metres out.
Settled in midfield, angled out for a run turning for home, fought on steadily without quickening.
Settled just worse than midfield, made no impression in straight.
Prominent but wide early stages, 2L back in 4th entering home straight, hung out a difficult ride and faded gradually.
Well there to the 200 metres, found no extra.
Jumped okay but raced awkwardly dropping to the rear of field, remained well back before making good late ground down the centre of the track inside the final 200 metres.
Taken back to midfield on rails, awkwardly placed and lost position rounding home bend, just kept on at the same pace in the run home.
Began well, disputed lead early stages before taken back to 3rd coming out of back straight, remained similar to the turn, dropped out tamely inside the final 400 metres.
Always well back, making short-lived effort when very wide entering home straight. (Blood in trachea)
Pushed to occupy box seat, benefited by the slow sectionals, just held ground in final stages.
At rear, 3-4 wide, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Eased to rear, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 200M.
At back along the fence, harmed by the slow tempo, ran on ok in straight.
Eased to rear, took rail, harmed by the slow pace, ran on fairly.
Midfield along the rails, harmed by the slow pace, lack room 4-2, unleashed strong finishing efforts when clear.
Eased to sit in midfield, raced 3-4 wide, little dash in straight despite not suited by the slow tempo.
Very slow away, trapped 3-4 wide at back, little dash 200M despite all negative racing situations.
At back, 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no turn of foot.
Very slow away, raced keenly at rear, 2-3 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash.
Eased to sit just off the speed 2 wide, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide just off the leaders, ran on well for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, benefited by the slow tempo, led 300M, ran on well until 100M overhauled.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, soon emptied 300M.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast sectionals, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Settled in front of midfield, however, trapped wide and without cover throughout, weakened soon after straightening.
Always at rear, despite the fast pace, never ran on.
Hard ridden forward to park outside the leader at fast pace, weakened 300M.
Rolled forward to settle midfield, trapped 4 wide without cover throughout, dropped off rounding the Home Turn.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, harmed by the fast pace, kept on until weakened final 200M.
Eased back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast tempo, dashed well to score by a head.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite the fast pace, never ran on.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast pace, ran on well until headed by the winner final 25M.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the fast pace, never ran on and weakened final 150M.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, benefited by the fast sectionals, ran on steadily for 4th.
At rear, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, made no impression in straight.
Pressed forward to take the fence and share the lead at fast sectionals, weakened soon after straightening.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, not suited by the fast pace, kept on until weakened final 200M.
Bumped start, no early speed, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Shaken up turning into straight but little response.
Began well, allowed to settle, drifting back to behind midfield along rail. Entered straight behind a wall of horses, did not get clear run until 200m when finished strongly to win close home.
Ridden early to hold forward position, settling one-out 4L from leader. Niggled at turning for home, got clear run 400m, hit front 100m, run down final strides.
Quickly into stride to lead, crossing to fence first turn and setting steady pace. Headed passing 1250m, dropped to 3rd passing 800m. Spent force soon after straightening and faded.
Pressed forward from wide draw to sit outside leader. Shuffled back to 3rd passing 1250m but moved up again to sit outside new leader 800m. Came under pressure passing 200m and faded.
Jumped well, shared early pace till taking box seat 1750m. Saved ground turn, steadied 300m when unable to get clear run, picked up pace but steadied again 80m, plugged on.
Began OK, but tended to over-race early when attempting to settle one-off behind midfield. Swung wide into straight, given reminders, didn't pick up bit till final 100m when finished strongly.
Broke fairly, ridden along but left wide 1700m and allowed to roll forward around field to take over running 1250m. Kicked ahead 400m, battled to 150m when flattened.
Jumped OK but no speed, dropping 3-wide towards rear. Left without cover passing 1200m and made short forward move, but spent force soon after straightening.
Bumped start, no early toe, dropping to rear along fence. Took rails run entering straight, given several reminders 350m before running past tiring rivals.
Began awkwardly, ridden to make up ground, settling one-out in midfield. Checked and unbalanced 750m when close to heels, rolled forward top of straight but badly crowded out 100m, boxed on.
Steadied soon after start and shifted across behind horses, settling in last pair away from fence. Began forward move passing 800m, taken to centre track in straight and finished off steadily.
Away well, pressed forward, settling one-out 3L from leader. Given more rein passing 700m, got clear run top of straight, hit front 150m, battled but unable hold off first two final strides.
Lifted feet at start and slow into stride. Taken to fence, tagging on to main field passing 1600m. Held for run top of straight, shifted in 350m, finished off steadily between horses.
Began well but held back, dropping to midfield but 3-wide. Still wide turning for home and only one-paced in straight.
Began well, pressed forward to lead clearly before being joined up front passing 800m. Retook lead around turn, caught 250m, but battled on gamely until swamped final strides.
Bumped start, ridden to hold forward position, settling in one-out position 3L from leader. Bumped and taken wider entering straight, kept on fairly till 200m when ran out of steam.
Began well, ridden along but 4-wide behind midfield to 1000m when started to lose ground steadily. Clear last entering straight and finished tailed out.
Jumped OK, no speed, dropping towards rear. Taken 3-wide approaching home turn, switched out even wider entering straight but no response despite hard riding.
Away quickly, shared early pace then eased into box seat 1200m. Tailed leader to straight, rolled forward from 400m to hit front 250m, won readily.
Off nicely, racing behind early pace until settling 2-back along fence 1000m. Shifted out 400m to obtain clear run but lay out under pressure. One-paced.
Began awkwardly, made up ground along fence to sit in midfield, then switched off. Came off fence on straightening and chased winner to the post without closing the gap.

Jumped with field but no early toe, dropping towards rear and taken to fence. Got held up in traffic around turn, switched in and then switched out in straight to get run, finished strongly when clear.
Began well but restrained, taken back and shifted across behind horses, settling in last pair. Taken very wide in straight but failed to respond despite several reminders.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide till settling one-back, one-off 1000m. Swung wide entering straight, kept on fairly until 200m when one-paced.
Jumped fairly, no speed, dropping back to last pair, then racing fiercely and refusing to settle. Under pressure from turn before losing contact with main field from 300m. Not ridden out.
Slow into stride, pushed forward, settling between horses at midfield. Got clear run on straightening and finished off steadily, doing best work final 100m.

Began OK, pressed forward to join leader 800m. Lay out turn, kept shifting ground in straight forcing jockey to stop riding several times and not properly tested. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Taken back, improved slightly around the field from 800M, showed nothing in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 3-1/2L off 2 wide, prominent upon straightening, ran on one paced.
Settled just in front of midfield, 4L behind along the rail, ran on well but had to settle for 3rd.
Pushed forward and led by 1-3/4L, stayed one horse off the rail until turn, headed approaching 150M, ran on for 4th.
Travelled in behind midfield, 5-3/4L behind along the rail, finished off strongly from 200M to score.
Eased and raced towards the rear, 6-1/2L behind 2 wide, taken wider at 650M, closed off nicely for 2nd.
Sent forward to race prominently, 1-3/4L behind the lead 2 wide, in touch until 200M when couldn't find extra.
Rolled forward and raced 2-1/4L off the lead along the rail, kept on until 150M flattened.
Travelled slightly in behind midfield, 5L behind the leader 2 wide, shifted 3 wide at turn, one paced home.
Broke well, steadied 1400m, settling in one-off position 1.5L behind leader. Hard ridden from 400m making ground steadily before being straightened 250m. Boxed on. Had small cut on left hind cannon.
Began fairly, driven forward to sit one-back, one-off on settling. Switched out top of straight to go forward, hit front passing 100m, run down close to line.
Began only fairly, ridden to make up ground along rail, taking box seat on settling. Tracked leader to straight but unable to accelerate, finishing one-paced.
Began well but eased back through field, settling one-off at rear. Peeled five wide turning for home to begin long run, winning narrowly in driving finish.
Got off OK but no early toe, dropping to last and taken to fence. Improved position passing 1100m, held up for run top of straight, got clear but ran into dead-end 250m and badly checked. Boxed on.
Came out running, taking lead and crossing to fence. Set good pace to straight, kicked 2L clear 400m. lepton strongly to 100m when swamped.
Jumped with field but no speed, dropping behind midfield but without cover. Continued to race wide, and only one-paced in straight.
No early pace, dropping back and taken to fence, then ridden forward settling 3-back from leader. Not much room top of straight, hampered 250m, kept on nicely to line.
Began well but not pushed, settling in one-off position behind midfield. Took closer order around turn. Four-wide into straight, ran on strongly to lose narrowly in close finish.
Jumped OK but no early speed, gradually dropping back to clear last at 1200m. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished off nicely.
Soon led, pressed by rival middle stages, headed near 200M, not found much under 5lb penalty, faded towards the finish.
Sent forward and prompted the pace 2-wide, held its position to 250M, soon no extra and weakened to last.
Held up behind midfield, 3Ls off leader 400M, worked home steadily for 4th in what was an encouraging return to racing.
In 8th place 5Ls off the pace, brought wide on straightening, quickened up well to go 2nd 100M, tried to close the gap on winner but ran out of ground.
2Ls off the pace in 4th, got its head on the side and shifted out 350M, fought hard but couldn't get to the winner, went 3rd 50M.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, 3Ls off at 400M, loomed a threat mid-straight but couldn't go on from 150M, one paced towards the line.
Chased leaders in a strongly run race, responded well when driven out 350M, led 200M, did enough to hold off late challenge from LUCKY BUBBLES.
Not hurried, settled down in rear pair 7Ls behind leader, couldn't go on passing 300M, never a threat.
Held up in rear pair 7Ls off the pace, stayed on moderately down outside, not reach contention.
In 5th, 3Ls off the pace along the 2-path, battled on passing 400M but couldn't accelerate enough to challenge leaders.
Jumped with field but held wide without cover and dropped back to behind midfield. Allowed to improve position but wide 1000m, wide into straight, boxed on one-paced.

Crowded out on jumping, allowed to settle towards rear in one-off position. Shuffled back to last 600m when shaken up. Switched out 300m to make run, surged forward while shifting under pressure, just failed.
Began fairly, steadied and taken back, shifting across to rail, dropping to last 1200m. Got inside run in straight, made up some ground initially before turning one-paced final 150m.
Broke with field, ridden to hold forward position, settling one-off in midfield. Raced keenly around turn, under pressure on straightening but only limited response.
Quickly away, leading initially before settling in box seat and tracking leader. Rolled forward on straightening to look a chance but only one-paced final 150m.
Broke fairly then hard ridden to make up ground settling along fence ahead of midfield. Took inside run in straight and battled on fairly without looking dangerous.
Began well, pressed forward, settling one-back, one-off 1200m. Allowed to roll forward to sit outside leader around turn, kept on fairly to 200m before turning one-paced.
Began fairly, badly crowded 1350m and dropped back towards rear between horses. Held up for run top of straight, improved position 350m but no clear run final stages and not fully tested.
Pressed forward from a wide draw to lead, crossing to the fence 1200m and setting steady pace. Caught passing 300m but battled on gamely to hold down 4th position.
Began well, pushed forward, settling along rail 3L from leader. Turned 3-wide, hustled along picking up speed gradually and doing best work final 100m.
Began well but restrained and taken back, shifting across behind runners, dropping to clear last. Made short forward move passing 800m, taken wide in straight, ran on fairly.

Began fairly, bumped, ridden forward to midfield but badly crowded 1350m and dropped back. Took inside run in straight but soon under pressure and eased out passing 200m, finishing tailed out. Had irregular heart rhythm.
Jumped well but trapped wide and allowed to drift back to find cover. After racing 3-wide at rear, allowed to roll forward, turned very wide, but only one-paced in straight under hard riding.
Began well but eased out of pace battle, settling one-off 5L from leader. Took closer order around turn, hit front 300m and pulled clear, then put under pressure but kept finding when challenged.
Moderately away from the widest draw, sent forward to race prominently, shared lead on turn, peaked early in straight, one-paced thereafter.
Bumped start, unable to slot in, raced wide and without cover throughout, finished off evenly in straight.
Moderately away from gate 10, raced wide at rear, carried wider and severely hampered on turn, bumped near 250M, emptied thereafter.
Began awkwardly, raced 4 lengths back at rear, angled out on turn, no clear running early in straight, finished off very strongly when clear to make frame, nearest on line.
Jumped with them, positioned 1-out 1-back, there to turn, emptied early in straight. (Lost right front plate on jumping.)
Hampered start, raced 3 lengths or so back on rail, checked near 550M, failed to close off in straight and eased.

Moderately away from gate 11, unable to slot in, raced 4 wide in midfield for the majority of the race, made good progress after turning in, took the lead final 150M but couldn't hold off the winner late.
Jumped well, positioned a length or so back on rail, there to turn, no daylight early in straight, finished off well when clear final 300M to get 3rd.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 5 lengths back at rear, improved on turn, finished off very well to score narrowly.
Average to begin, raced at rear, hung out badly on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Taken back from gate 12, raced 5 lengths or so back at rear, last turning in, one-paced in straight.
Began well, raced prominently, difficult to settle near 1000M, shared lead on turn, kicked clear early in straight but couldn't hold off the challengers late.
Bumped start, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield, similar position on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Hampered start, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, failed to close off in straight.
Not far off on rails, briefly baulked passing the 100 metres, fought on steadily to the line.
Sluggish at start, given reminders and picked up to midfield after the first 200 metres, fought on steadily in straight, nearest at finish.
Soon dropped to the rear, trailed the field into straight, produced good late impression inside final 200 metres.
Settled in rear of midfield, hampered approaching home bend, kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Ridden along from the widest gate, prominent and wide without cover to straight, kept on steadily without quickening.
Jumped awkwardly and crowded losing ground, saved ground turning in, made modest progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Always well there and ridden early, fought on steadily without threatening.
Soon took up running, obtained rails run after the first 300 metres, just held off late challenges.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, remained wide throughout and shifted wider turning in, made up good ground down the centre of the track.
Settled 2-wide in midfield from a poor gate, not much room behind runners in straight and failed to quicken under pressure.
Settled in midfield, kept on same pace without quickening.
Prominent and without cover from a wide gate, folded up quickly after straightening.
Pushed to obtain a midfield sport, trapped 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, emptied 400M.
Pushed early but not muster, at back along the fence, not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot.
Took rail easily and led at advantageous slow sectionals, overhauled 300M, ran on well for 3rd.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, dashed well 200M.
Pushed to hold the rail in midfield, shuffled back from 1200M, held up until 300M, dashed well when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to rear for cover, 2 wide, made early move 900M to take advantages of the slow pace, led 300M, ran on well until 150M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Settled in box seat, benefited by the slow sectionals, closed off strongly 300M to score.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, dropped off quickly 500M.
At back, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress.
Slow away, eased back, trapped 3 wide throughout, harmed by the slow pace, no dash.
Took rail in front of midfield, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash in straight.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and share the lead at fast sectionals, kept on steadily until weakened final 150M.
Always at back, despite held up rounding the Home Turn, made plenty of ground in straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, dashed strongly to score by a nose.
Sent forward, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, soon weakened after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast tempo, ran on only fairly.
Settled midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, ran on steadily for 4th.
Pressed forward to park outside the leader at fast pace, kept on nicely until final 20M headed, hung on for 3rd.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast tempo, ran on strongly to get 2nd, missed by a nose.
At rear throughout, despite the fast tempo, never ran on.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Pressed forward to park outside the leader at fast tempo, dropped off rounding the Home Turn.
Settled worse than midfield about 8Ls behind the leader on the fence, benefited by the fast sectionals, made some ground in straight.
Jumped with field, eased back, settling one-out behind midfield 800m. Dropped back and caught three-wide pace quickened 600m. Switched out wider in straight and ran on steadily.
Began well but over-raced around first turn and bumped 1050m, before settling one-out 3L from leader back stretch. Shaken up top of straight but found little and faded quickly final 150m.
Jumped well, taken to the front, then set steady pace to straight. Kept finding when put under pressure from 300m, only to be swamped just before the line.
Began well, ridden to hold forward position but trapped 3-wide without cover. Wide around final turn, taken wider entering straight, spent force passing 200m.
Began well, eased out of pace battle 1000m and taken to rail 4L from leader. Got clear rails run on straightening and finished strongly to miss out narrowly.
Checked on jumping, dropping back, then taken to rail, settling in last pair. Shaken up turning for home but no response and not ridden out final 150m.
Restrained shortly after start and shifted across behind runners, settling last but away from fence. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished off nicely.
Began fairly, then pressed forward, racing 3-wide around first turn before restrained to get cover 850m. Hard ridden in straight but only one-paced.
Began awkwardly, ridden forward along rail to hold box seat. Proved difficult to settle 1100m, layout 1000m and lost ground. Remained in contention till 150m when flattened and faded.
Quickly away, shared early pace before easing 1L behind leader 900m. Niggled at from 400m, given several reminders in straight before edging ahead to win in driving finish.
Checked on jumping, ridden to make up ground settling one-out behind midfield back stretch. Urged forward around turn, wide into straight, finished strongly to grab minor placing.
Began fairly, shifted across behind runners, settling towards rear along fence. Niggled at passing 700m, got inside run in straight to look a chance 100m, then one-paced.
Bumped start, shifted in for cover between horses but checked 1300m, dropping to rear. Taken to centre track on straightening and ran on steadily, doing best work final 100m.
Jumped well but restrained, dropped back further when hampered 1300m. Remained well back to straight, taken to centre track, finished strongly to hit front 50m but unable hold off winner.
Hard ridden from outside draw, racing very wide into first turn before settling in one-off position 2L from leader back stretch. Under pressure from 400m and dropped back quickly final 200m.
Quickly into stride, pressed forward along rail to lead into first turn. Passed by another 700m, dropping into box seat 600m. Kept on fairly until 200m when gave ground abruptly.
Began well, shared early pace before racing ungenerously first turn, settling 3L from leader back stretch. Looked chance entering straight but only one-paced final 200m.
Checked on jumping, ridden to hold ground, settling one-out behind midfield back stretch. Put under pressure turning for home, surged forward between horses only to fail narrowly.
Broke well, not pushed, taken to fence and settled towards rear. Took inside run on straightening, was making ground when severely checked 100m and not properly tested.
Began well, not pushed, settling along fence, 3L from leader. Lost position final turn but not bustled. Got split between horses 290m, finished strongly to win close home.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners to rail, settling last. Trailed field to straight and ran past beaten horses.
Jumped OK, pressed forward, taking first turn 4-wide. Still very wide 800m when allowed to stride forward to join leader 700m. Under pressure early in straight and gave ground from 150m.
Began well, ridden to hold forward position, taking first turn 4-wide, settling 4L from leader. Made forward move turning for home, fourth into straight before running out of steam.
Began well, shared early pace but kept 3-wide, before taking over passing 1050m. Joined up front 700m but kept finding when put under pressure before flattened 100m.
Rolled forward and settled in box-seat, 2-3/4L off the lead, kept on only one paced in the run home.
Ridden forward and sat outside the leader 3/4L off, gradually faded after straightening.
Eased and raced at the rear, 9L behind the leader 2 wide, made good ground and hit the line strongly.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 3/4L, continued to lead until weakened soon after straightening.
Eased back after the jump then sat in midfield, 4-1/2L off along the rail, led early straight, headed by winner at 50M.
Prominent throughout, 2-1/4L off 2 wide, ran on until weakened passing 100M.
Settled towards the rear, 7-3/4L behind along the rail, made ground steadily on the inner track to score.
Trapped wide in midfield initially, then settled in front of midfield 3-3/4L off, improved slightly in the straight only.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 7L off 2 wide with cover, shifted wide and ran on well for 4th.
Always at the rear, never in contention.
Travelled in midfield 5-1/2L behind 2 wide, crowded and clipped heels at 950M, steadied 350M, did not run on.
Raced in just behind midfield, 6L behind along the rail, kept on until crowded at 50M, then hung on for 3rd.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling towards rear in one-off position. Shaken up turning for home but little response.
Broke well but eased out of pace battle, settling 2L from leader entering back stretch. Got shuffled back 900m but picked up momentum passing 600m and finished well, doing best work final 100m.

Vigorously ridden from outside draw, taking first turn 4-wide, dropping to midfield. Trapped 3-wide 1000m and allowed to roll forward to race outside leader 600m. Kept grinding away in straight to win in final stride.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling in last pair along rail. Put under pressure turning for home and ran past beaten rivals.

Pressed forward, took first turn 3-wide, settling 2L from leader back stretch. Allowed to roll forward to race outside leader but pushed back to 3rd passing 700m before gradually losing position and dropping back.
Quickly away, taking the lead on settling and setting good pace. Joined up front 600m, kicked ahead 500m, then hard ridden to hold off challenge before losing in final stride.
Began fairly, allowed to travel at own pace, settling along fence behind midfield. Stayed on rails entering straight and boxed on fairly.
Jumped OK, not pressed, settling in one-off position behind midfield. Swung wide into straight but only one-paced under hard riding.
Began OK, no early pace, settling along fence towards rear. Got an inside run in straight and ran on steadily under whip without looking dangerous.
Ridden to hold forward position but over-raced entering back stretch before settling 3L from leader in one-off position. Taken very wide in straight and ran out stamina final 100m.

Steadied shortly after start, then pressed forward first turn to settle in one-off position 1L from leader. Got shuffled back to 4th passing 800m but rolled forward again to look chance 100m before run ended 50m.
Fractious in gate and began only fairly, then crowded for room, dropping to last. Stayed on rail around turn but found little in straight when asked.
Up with early pace, severely checked 1050M and fell back to a midfield spot, 3Ls off 400M, kept on mildly to line, no threat to first 2.
Vied for the lead, crossed to the rail 700M, travelled strongly into straight, kicked 2Ls clear from pursuers 200M, stuck on task well only caught by fast finishing winner last stride.
Went for the lead after the start but saddle shifted after 1000M resulting in jockey having little control, eased out of the race after 600M.
Sat 4Ls back in midfield, 8th at 800M and 400M, made steady progress on straightening for modest 3rd.
Restless in stalls and slowly away, taken back, checked 600 when hanging out, 6Ls to make up passing 400M, made limited progress and ran past a few beaten runners only.

Pressed forward but was checked 1050M, moved a bit closer to leaders home turn, not quickened leaving the bend, ran below market expectation. (Jockey : his mount would not stretch out fully after incident at 1050M.)
Never far off, 5th at 400M and 3Ls off the pace, battled on but failed to make up ground on leaders.
Taken across behind runners after the jump, 7Ls off the pace in last as they settled, didn't respond to urging 400M, eased when no chance.
Taken back from draw 11, near the rear early stages but improved its position from 700M, brought wide into straight, ran on strongly to nail the leader final stride.
Not hurried on jumping from widest barrier, behind midfield going into the turn, brought widest 500M but soon out of contention early straight, eased. (Unacceptable Performance / Lame right hind)
Driven forward from wide barrier, pressed the pace 2-wide, couldn't go on inside 200M, faded away
Held its rail position from draw 1, had cover behind leaders from 800M, found little when driven out passing 300M, weakened towards the finish.
Jumped well, settled just better than midfield 2-wide, baulked for a run in straight and checked 250 metres out, no further impression.
Ridden early to join the leaders, ceded joint position to settle one off the pace, one-paced when hampered over 200 metres out, no further impression.

Travelled wide without cover in forward of midfield, circled the field to join the leader rounding home bend, weakened passing the 300 metres before checked and dropped quicker backward 200 metres out. (Blood in trachea)

Broke well from a middle draw, gained narrow advantage 2-wide before obtaining rails run coming out of back straight, led the field until headed under pressure inside the final 300 metres, shifted out under pressure 200M out.
Taken well back from a wide gate, waited with at the tail-end of the field, switched widest to challenge turning in, ran on well but unable to match pace of winner inside the final 200 metres.
Began fairly from a low draw, travelled keenly when mainly two back on rails, quickened upon straightening to hit the front briefly 200 metres out, unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Began from a wide gate, settled 3-wide just better than midfield, soon came to challenge upon straightening, quickened up well to take charge over 200 metres out, won readily.
Began moderately, travelled towards the rear on rails despite ridden early, fought on steadily between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide towards the rear after beginning from a wide gate, went wider entering straight, clipped heels and dropped to last 300 metres out, finished off race well down the centre of the track.
Slow start, soon recovered to midfield on rails, snuck up home turn and just over 2L off the pace on straightening, one-paced under pressure.
Settled just worse than midfield, tight between runners early in straight, produced good late impression inside the final 200 metres.
Broke well from the widest gate, settled wide in prominent position, one out one back rounding home bend, ran home one-paced.
Settled 3-wide in midfield, in similar position rounding home bend, no clear run after straightening and hampered by winner over 300 metres out, recovered well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few and made no show.
Midfield along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, lack room 4-2, ran on fairly when clear.
Hard ridden forward, 2-3 wide, just held ground in final furlong.
Eased at start, took rail at rear, lack room 4-2, dashed strongly when clear despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M and scored.
Eased at start, 2-3 wide at rear, harmed by the slow pace, little dash 150M.
Settled in front of midfield on the rails, lack room 400M, never improved.
Hard ridden forward, benefited by the slow tempo, emptied 250M.
Midfield, 2 wide, just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, demonstrated strong finishing efforts after being held up from 4-2.
Eased to rear, 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, no progress.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at slow sectionals, hung on well until 100M flattened.
Eased to sit in midfield, trapped 3 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, no dash.
Very slow away, hard ridden along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked 400M, dashed well when clear but only for 3rd.
Eased to sit in midfield, 2-3 wide, dashed well 400M, but run ended 150M.
At rear, 5Ls the leader in the middle of the track, ran on steadily for 4th without serious threats.
Prominent, 2Ls behind the leader stand side, emptied 250M.
Sent forward to take the lead along the stand rail, finished off impressively to score by 3-3/4Ls.
Crowded start, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader stand side, ran on fairly.
Settled about 2Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, found nothing when placed under pressure.
Settled about 2Ls behind the leader along the stand rail, stayed on fairly.
Pressed forward to share the lead stand side, stayed on until final 300M weakened.
Rolled forward to share the lead stand side, kept on nicely to get 2nd, and beaten by an impressive winner.
At back throughout, never looked likely.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader stand side, finished off one pace.
Settled about 1L behind the leader along the stand rail, kept on one pace to the line.
Settled about 2Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, dropped off 300M.
At back early, travelled 4Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Prominent, 2Ls behind the leader in the middle of the track, weakened over the last furlong.
Began well, no early speed drifting back to one-off position in midfield. Peeled out turning for home, taken very wide in straight, finished strongly.
Began well, hard ridden to hold position inside leader before moving up to share lead 600m. Kicked ahead on straightening but spent force passing 200m and faded.
Jumped OK, ridden but didn't muster, dropping to rear in one-off position. Travelled keenly approaching turn, taken very wide in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Hard ridden to lead soon after start but kept 3-wide until joined at turn by inside runner. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Hard ridden to share early pace, settling 1L behind leader passing 750m. Swung wide on entering straight, under pressure from 350m but only one-paced. Rider dropped whip 300m.
Broke well, shared early pace before being eased back, settling 3L from leader but 3-wide 800m. Took closer order turn, switched out straight and ran on steadily.
Began fairly, took a few strides to find feet, made up ground along rail to sit behind midfield 900m. Caught in traffic early straight, burst through split 200m, hit front 50m and pulled clear.
Jumped well but restrained and taken back through field to one-off position at the rear. Took inside run in straight, shifted in 350m to improve position but steadied off heels 100m, boxed on.
Jumped with field, ridden to hold forward position, settling along rail 4L from leader. Switched out 400m to get clear run, looked chance 100m, kept on well.
Began fairly, shifted out and bumped, steadied, dropping to last. Raced greenly, trailed field to straight. Never competitive.
Bumped and unbalanced start, dropping to rear but kept wide. Took home turn 3-wide, widest in straight, found nothing under pressure.
Hard ridden to hold forward position while shifting in, settling along rail 2L from leader passing 800m. Switched out top of straight, rolled forward to hit front 200m, one-paced final 100m.
Broke well, ridden along while looking for cover but stuck 3-wide passing 800m. Four-wide into straight, boxed on one-paced.
Hard ridden early to hold midfield position but lost ground passing 800m when bumped and unbalanced. Weakened gradually in straight.
Began only fairly, ridden to make up ground but steadied from heels 900m, dropping to last pair. Stayed on rails around turn, switched out 250m for clear running, finished strongly.
Quickly into stride, hard ridden to hold lead before slowing pace approaching turn. Caught passing 250m, kept on gamely to 100m when flattened.
Began well, hard ridden to hold position but tightened 900m and dropped back to rear. Clear last passing 500m, took rails run in straight but found nothing.
Jumped well, given early reminders, settling one-back, one-off. Kept tabs on leading pair to straight, given another reminder 300m, kept on gamely to line to just miss quinella spot.
Slow into stride, settling at rear in one-off position. Put under pressure turning for home but found nothing and plodded in straight.
Broke well, pressed forward from wide draw to race outside leader. Urged forward top of straight, took over running passing 250m and kept on strongly to the line.
Began only fairly, hard ridden to make up ground, settling in box seat 2L from leader 950m. Raced tight passing 400m, got clear run 250m, kept on gamely under whip.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling in midfield 4L from leader. Stayed on rail around turn, boxed on fairly in straight without looking dangerous.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling between horses behind midfield. Commenced to layout early in straight, failed to respond to reminders and not ridden out final 100m.
Sat outside the leader, 1/2L behind, in touch until 150M when out gunned by the first three but kept on.
Bumped start, travelled at the rear, 10-1/4L behind 2 wide, made minor ground only.
Check start, sat at the rear, 8-1/2L behind along the rail, did not improve.
Raced in midfield, 3L off along the rail, hung in in the Straight and ran on one paced.
Raced in behind midfield, 6-1/2L off 3 wide without cover, not competitive.
Travelled just in front of midfield, 3-3/4L off 2 wide, kept on one paced in the run home.
Settled in midfield, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide, made slight ground only but kept on going to the line.
Slotted into midfield, 4-1/2L behind along the rail, awkward on heels near 250M, ran on well to the line.
Rolled forward into box-seat, sat 1-1/2L off, unleashed strong finishing effort after 200M to score.
Travelled in behind midfield, 6-3/4L behind along the rail, made ground nicely along the inner Straight for 3rd.
Settled in behind midfield, 7L off the lead 2 wide, ran on nicely for 2nd when under whip from 250M.
Rolled forward and took one-off one-back position, 2L off the lead, dropped off gradually in the Straight.
Sent forward to take the rail and led by 1/2L, weakened and headed passing 250M.
Eased and raced at the rear end, never in contention.
Broke well but eased out of pace battle and allowed to drift back towards rear. Taken to centre track on straightening and unleashed powerful run which ended in shadows of the post.
Began well, pressed forward, holding one-out position in midfield, 4L from leader. Took turn 4-wide, rolled forward to hit front 300m, kept finding when challenged but run down on line.
Began well, pressed forward, crossing to rail 3L from leader. Switched out turning for home, held up in traffic early straight, got clear 300m but only one-paced under hard riding.

Began OK, not pushed, striding forward at own pace along rail, settling behind midfield. Took closer order around turn, held in traffic 300m, got clear run 250m and burst through between horses to win on the line.
Steadied on jumping and taken back through field before shifting in at the rear. Travelled keenly approaching 1100m, shaken up on straightening but only one-paced.
Hard ridden to go forward but didn't muster. Steadied 1400m to find cover but trapped wide, drifting back towards rear. Found nothing in straight.
Began OK, vigorously ridden but didn't muster, dropping towards rear along rail. Left fence 600m, got clear run 300m, boxed on fairly.
Rolled forward from inside draw to grab box seat on settling, tracking leader to straight. Got clear rails run on straightening but failed to respond to reminders and faded.
Steadied soon after jumping and taken back through field before crossing to fence. Held for clear running early straight, shifted out 300m, but only one-paced when clear.
Jumped OK but no early toe, dropping to rear. Got close to heels passing 900m, switched in early straight to get clear running but little response to hard riding.
Hard ridden early but didn't muster before settling one-off in midfield. Took final turn 4-wide and boxed on fairly in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced start, hard ridden to make up ground, settling outside hind-quarters of leader. Took over lead on straightening, joined up front 300m, kept battling till flattened 50m.

Pressed forward from an outside draw to lead, crossing to fence and setting steady pace. Collared near 400m and faded gradually. Jockey severely reprimanded for overuse of whip. Bled from both nostrils.
Pressed forward to share early pace, racing inside leading pair before settling one-back, one-off 1000m. Made forward move around turn but soon under pressure and faded gradually.
Sent forward vying for lead on the inside, set good pace, kept on well early straight and kicked 2L clear 200M, caught by first 2 inside 100M, weakened but held on for 3rd.
Caught wide no cover in midfield, 5Ls off the pace 400M, kept on only fairly in straight, not reach contention.
Sat 2-wide ahead of midfield, 5th at 400M 4Ls off the pace, tried hard but couldn't wear down leaders.
Chased leading pair, ran on steadily entering straight, outpaced by first two 150M, closing on 3rd late, just ran out of ground.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, swung wide from 550M, couldn't go on inside 350M, faded away.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, in 11th place over 8Ls behind leaders, made limited progress passing 400M, running past beaten horses only.
Pressed forward from draw 12, vied for lead on outside, set good pace to straight, run ended 300M, weakened rapidly towards the finish.
Towards the rear, 7Ls off the pace in 10th at 400M, closed off well but left with too much to do.
Settled down midfield 4-5Ls off the pace, found clear running 300M and ran on strongly to the line, just missed.
Jumped well, sat ahead of midfield 3-4Ls off the good pace, couldn't quicken in the run home, no threat from 250M.
Outpaced early stages, in last almost 10Ls off the good pace, made no ground in the run home.
Slowly away, recovered to race behind midfield 5Ls back, quickened up strongly 350M but hung in final 200M and difficult to ride, led inside 100M and just managed to hold off 2nd.
Began well but retrained to look for cover, dropping to rear but still three-deep. Taken very wide in straight and finished off nicely after a few reminders.
Quickly into stride to lead initially before settling 2L behind leaders in one-off position passing 1000m. Given reminders early in straight but only one-paced final 300m.
Began awkwardly, pressed forward along rail to sit inside leader approaching the turn. Took over running on straightening, looked winner 100m, run down final stages.
Pressed forward from widest draw, racing three-deep before taking lead approaching 800m. Joined up front around turn, kept on fairly to 200m when tired and dropped out.

Broke well but eased back to find cover, settling in midfield along fence. Held up for run in straight and unable to get clear until 150m, then placed closed to heels and not properly tested final stages.
No early pace, dropping to rear and taken to fence. Improved position around turn, took rails run in straight and ran on nicely to be closest at finish.
Began well, pressed forward and then taken to fence 2L from leader 1200m. Dropped back slightly when tempo increased around turn, switched out 200m to make run and finished well under the whip.
Got off OK but checked 1450m dropping back between horses behind midfield. Held up in traffic in straight, steadied off heels 250m, finished off well when got clear run from 150m.

Broke well but restrained and taken back through field to be last passing 1200m. Taken to rail 700m but not asked for effort till 400m when ran on strongly along rail to hit the front 50m before pulling clear.
Checked start, no pace, dropping to rear and taken to fence. Made up some ground passing 750m, taken to centre track on straightening, ran on fairly under whip.
No early pace and shuffled back to midfield but 3-wide on settling. Urged forward turning for home, loomed as a chance approaching 250m before flattened 100m.
Ridden early to hold forward position, racing three-deep 4L from leader at halfway mark. Boxed on early in straight before tiring quickly passing 200m.
Jumped OK, raced keenly early stages, settling one-off in midfield. Under pressure turning for home and faded gradually. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.

Hampered start, losing ground, taken to fence and ridden to make up ground, settling behind midfield passing 1200m. Got inside run in straight ad finished strongly between horses to just miss a placing.

Began well and taken up to be handily placed 4th/5th 1 off the fence. No clear run at the top of the straight, before coming out off heels at the 350m. Nothing came of it and went to the line only fairly.
Dropped back early to sit 2nd last, on the fence. Left with too much to do, but ran gamely and picked up a couple of slower ones late.
Pressed forward early to sit 2nd, 1 off the fence. Went to the line 1 paced in the straight.
Taken forward early to be handily placed 4th/5th, wide with no cover. Ran strongly in the straight, but couldn't match fast finishing winner late.
Dropped back early from the wide draw to sit towards the rear of the field. Ridden for luck from the top of the straight, and progressed strongly late.
Taken up early to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Showed nothing in the straight, and eased out last 100m.
Blundered badly on jumping, losing ground, before dropping back to sit last. Battled on OK late down the outside, given the circumstances, but had too much to do.

Eased forward early, sitting forward of midfield, on the rail. Ridden for luck early in the straight, before coming off heels at 250m. Showed great turn of speed from the 100m to win convincingly late.
Cruised forward early settling midfield, 1 off the fence. Wider on the turn, and loomed up at the 300m. Only 1 paced from there, and swamped late.
Eased back early to sit just behind midfield on the fence. Moved forward at the 600m, and ran solidly in the straight, without threatening a place.
Eased back early to sit worse than midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran home strongly down the outside, and just missed a place late.
Pushed forward early to sit 2nd/3rd on the rail. Nosed in front at 200m, but was starting to fade late, and just held 3rd.
Taken up early, before eventually settling around midfield, on the rail. Not going well enough to take a run in the straight, and was eased from the 100m.
Pushed hard early to ensure he led. Nothing left late, and dropped out rapidly from the 200m.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, 7 lengths back on turn, angled out in straight and made some progress.
Raced at tail throughout, finished tailed out. (Irregular heart rhythm; blood in trachea.)
Bumped start, positioned on rail in midfield, there to turn, closed off well to get 2nd.
Jumped with them, positioned 2 wide in 5th, 2 lengths or so back on turn, no daylight in straight, finished off one-paced. (Lost left front plate near 700M.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, angled out after turning in, made good progress to take 3rd.
Began fairly from gate 1, positioned behind the leader, easy run on turn, steadied early in straight, no response thereafter.
Bumped start, raced in midfield, checked near 1100M, angled out turning in, emptied early in straight.
Jumped well from the widest draw, raced in 2nd, same position on turn, kept on very well in straight to score.
Away with them, sent forward to take the lead, travelled well on turn, headed near 300M, weakened gradually thereafter. (Lost right hind plate near 300M.)
Taken back to race 7 lengths back at rear, checked heels near 800M, still 6 lengths or so back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well from gate 8, raced in midfield, no cover on turn, finished off evenly in straight.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, raced prominently, 1-out 1-back on turn, kept on well until peaked final 100M, stayed on for 4th.
Jumped well from a wide draw, unable to slot in early, raced 3 wide with cover at rear, still 5 lengths back on turn, made some progress in straight without threatening.
Began awkwardly, recovered to race 5 lengths back on rail behind midfield, saved ground on turn, kept to inside after straightening, finished off evenly.
Settled in last few, saved ground on inside turning for home, produced good late impression in the run to the line.
Began well, settled just off the pace in 3rd or 4th, kept on before fading inside the final 200 metres.
Soon dropped to last few, made no impression under pressure in straight.
Soon dropped to midfield despite ridden early, failed to quicken under pressure.

Slow out, soon recovered to just over 2L back in 4th on rails, became 3rd midway down back straight gaining to 2nd turning for home, unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside the final 100 metres.
Broke well from the one draw attempting to make all, unable to sustain effort and caught in the shadows of the post.
Jumped fairly from a wide draw, gradually dropped towards the rear while wide on far side, made no impression in the run home.
Taken back from the widest gate and waited with, finished off race well between runners down the inside of the straight.
Missed the break, quickly taken across from a wide gate to settle in rear of midfield in 4L 7th, in similar position turning for home, fought on well under pressure to get up final strides.
Soon dropped to midfield, raced awkwardly past the 1000 metres mark losing some ground, came under pressure from approaching home turn, made modest progress under pressure.
Ridden along from a poor gate, settled 2-wide in midfield over 800 metres out, shifted out for a run entering straight, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Ridden positively early, settled just outside the leader, folded up quickly after straightening. (Lame)
Pushed early, took midfield spot, 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 300M, run ended 100M.
Box seat, harmed by the fast pace, out of fuel 250M.
Very slow away, 2-3 wide at rear, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M.
Very slow away, took rail at back, checked early, suited by the fast pace, checked badly 400M, blocked most straight, ran on strongly.
Eased back, 2-3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, held up 500M, made good ground 250M.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide throughout, emptied 200M.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, on heels 250M, held ground in straight.
Hard ridden early but not muster, took rail behind midfield, benefited by the fast tempo, lack room 300M, progressed steadily when clear for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, 3 back along the fence, not suited by the fast pace, lack room 300M, held ground when clear.
Hard ridden forward, 2-3 wide, harmed by the fast tempo, weakened 250M.
Eased to sit in midfield, settled nicely in 2 wide, had a trouble-free trip, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Took rail and lead, clocked fast sectionals under pressure, reduced 250M.
Pushed forward to park outside the leader, kept on steadily until weakened final 50M, just held on for 4th.
Hard ridden forward to take the fence and led by 1L, kept on strongly to the line and scored by 1-1/4Ls.
Prominent, however, trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, dropped off soon after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung wide turning in, ran on well for 2nd.
Eased to settle worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, switched widest turning in, finished off strongly for 3rd.
Eased to settle worse than midfield about 7ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made no impression in Straight.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, switched wide turning in, finished off one pace.
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, made minor ground in Straight.
Never looked competitive, tailed out.
Always at back, never looked likely.
At rear, detached throughout despite hard ridden along, tailed out,
Raced midfield, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, hampered rounding the Home Turn, one paced home.
No early toe, dropping to last along fence. Trailed field to straight and never competitive.
Broke well, pressed forward three-wide to settle 3L from leader. Under pressure from turn and gave ground quickly in straight, finishing tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Began well and quickly in box seat, 2L from leader. Stayed on fence around turn and chased leader in straight without being able to close the gap.
Broke well, ridden to hold forward position, settling one-back, one-off. Shaken up top of straight but only one-paced.
Jumped straight to the front and led to 800m when momentarily headed. Retook lead a few strides later, kicked ahead passing 300m, extending lead with every stride for effortless win.
Bumped and hampered start, dropping back, then crowded for room 1000m, dropping to rear. Switched out on straightening and finished off nicely for minor placing.
Jumped OK, ridden along, settling one-off in midfield, 4L from leader. Three wide into straight but only one-paced under hard riding.
Bounded into the air on jumping and slow into stride, dropping to rear. Over-raced passing 1000m before taking closer order around turn. Spent force passing 200m and faded.
Steadied soon after start and shifted across being runners, settling in last pair but away from fence. Put under pressure around turn but only one-paced.
Began fairly, no pace, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening but failed to make ground.
Jumped with field, pressed forward, settling in midfield along rail. Took closer order around turn but only one-paced in straight.
Began awkwardly then bumped and unbalanced losing ground. Pushed forward 3-wide to sit outside leader, then led for a few strides passing 800m. One-paced final 300m and checked off heels 50m.
Jumped with field, taken to fence in midfield and settled. Got caught in traffic in straight before finishing off nicely when clear 150m.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw soon after start, settling in last pair. Tried to improve position around turn but only one-paced in straight.
Broke well, rolled forward to sit 2L behind leader at first turn in one-off position. Shaken up passing 500m, hit the front 150m, hard ridden under whip to hold off late challenge.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling at rear along fence. Stayed on rail turning for home and ran on steadily in straight to be closest at finish.
Slow into stride, dropping to rear but away from fence. Swung wide into straight but found little under hard riding.
Restrained shortly after start and shifted across behind runners, settling between horses towards the rear. Urged to go forward passing 500m and ran on steadily in straight to grab minor placing.
Quickly in front, setting steady pace to back straight when slowed field. Tried to kick clear turning for home, caught 150m, kept battling till swamped final stages.
Steadied soon after start and shifted in to find cover but trapped three-wide at midfield. Made forward move 700m but spent force soon after straightening and faded.
Began well, rolled forward, settling one-out, one-back at first turn. Urged forward from 500m to look a chance entering straight but only one-paced final 200m.
Broke well, allowed to side forward, grabbing box seat at first turn, 3L from leader. Put under pressure 400m, got clear run 250m, but only one-paced.
Began fairly, then got close to heels, settling midfield in one-off position. Allowed to stride forward 600m, took home turn 4-wide, ran on strongly in straight to just miss.
Jumped well, ridden to hold forward position, settling along rail 5L from leader. Closed in around turn, got inside run in straight and ran on well to be closest at finish.
Travelled in midfield, 4-1/4L off along the rail, ran on well for 3rd.
Sat just behind midfield, 5-1/4L behind 2 wide, covered good ground and finished strongly.
Settled in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide, closed off only one paced.
Taken back and raced at the rear, 9L behind 2 wide, made up ground steadily in the Straight.
Sent forward to lead by 1/2L, initially 2 wide before taking the rail at 600M, weakened passing 100M.
Prominent, sat 1L behind the leader 2 wide, finished off solidly once kicked on at 200M.
Pushed forward and sat outside the leader 1/2L off, found no extra passing 150M.
Eased back after the jump, raced 7-3/4L off along the rail, kept on fairly to the line.
Raced in midfield, 3-3/4L behind 2 wide, made slight ground in the Straight.
Sent forward and settled into box-seat, sat 2L behind the lead, held on to score once cleared passing 150M.
Travelled towards the rear, 7L behind 2 wide, closed off well in the Straight.
Raced in behind midfield, 5-3/4L off along the rail, kept on going to the line.
No early pace and soon at rear between horses. Shaken up home turn but limited response. Never competitive.
Broke well, not pushed, settling in one-off position behind midfield. Shaken up passing 400m, swung widest into straight, finished strongly to just fail.
Pressed forward from outside draw, taking first turn 3-wide before settling in one-off position 1L from leader back stretch. Under pressure from 500m, kept on gamely under hard riding in straight.

Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling in last pair. Taken to rail back stretch, improved position final turn, switched to centre field on straightening, finished off strongly.
Jumped well, allowed to stride forward in the lead before being shuffled back first turn, settling in one-off position 3L from leader. Shaken up 400m, switched out 250m to make run, kept on fairly.

Began well, vigorously ridden to hold forward position but held 4-wide. Gradually lost position around first turn, dropping toward rear but still wide without cover. Found nothing when asked in straight.

Allowed to stride forward at own pace, settling in one-off position 4L from leader heading into back stretch. Given more rein passing 400m, 3-wide into straight, hit front 200m, gamely held off strong challenge.
Began awkwardly, ridden to hold forward position, settling along rail 3L from leader entering back stretch. Raced tightly home turn, switched out 300m to make run, boxed on one-paced.
Jumped with field, ridden but no pace, dropping to rear along fence. Improved position around first turn to midfield, got close to heels 400m, finished strongly to grab minor placing.
Steadied soon after start and shifted across behind runners, settling towards rear close to rail. Left rail final turn to make run but limited response to hard riding.

Allowed to stride forward but 4-wide to share early pace, then bumped and unbalanced 1300m before surging ahead to lead entering back stretch. Kicked clear 400m but collared 200m and gave ground gradually.
Ridden early to hold rail, sharing early pace before settling in box seat entering back stretch. Under pressure from 500m, spent force soon after straightening, faded.
Began awkwardly, settled down behind midfield, didn't respond to riding passing 400M and quickly dropped out of contention.
Taken back from wide barrier, 7-8Ls off the pace in 2nd last, couldn't not quicken passing 300M, no impression.
Taken back from wide barrier, 8Ls back in last on settling, made limited progress only entering straight.
From wide draw crossed to track leader and eventual winner along the 2-path, couldn't match the finishing speed of winner passing 300M, was challenged for 2nd late but held on just.
Close up in 4th, stayed on steadily for 3rd but never a threat to runaway winner.
Dropped back to race behind midfield, caught 3-wide no cover, 7Ls behind at 400M, couldn't pick up from off the pace. (Jockey questioned re riding tactics.)
Began only fairly, held up behind midfield 5Ls behind leader, couldn't make up ground on straightening, never involved.
Tracked leaders, bustled along home turn, kept battling in straight but peaked on this run 100M and couldn't go on.
Towards the rear, recorded fastest final 400M of the race but had too much to make up, not reach leaders.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield, 4Ls behind leader and eventual winner 400M, tried hard on straightening, narrowly missed out on a minor placing but no threat to winner.
Soon bagged the rail and led them along steadily, quickened up strongly inside 300M, kicked well clear for a dominant win.
Held up in mid-division 4Ls off the pace, 6th at 400M, kept on same pace final 300M, never a threat.
Began fairly from the widest gate, pressed forward in prominent position while remaining wide, taken back for cover in 2L 4th rounding home bend, kept on one pace under pressure.
Moderate start, settled behind midfield on rails, kept on in straight.
Niggled at after a moderate start, remained in last few to the 400 metres, produced good late impression inside the final 200 metres.
Never seen with a chance.

Jumped fairly, soon took up running on rails, led before joined by eventual runner-up around the bend, re-gained slender lead over 200 metres out, but unable to sustain effort and overhauled close to home.
Slightly slow out, soon recovered on rails to forward of midfield gaining to 5th some 3L back on home bend, kept on same pace in straight.

Raced wide in better than midfield early, taken back behind midfield to be closer to rails coming onto home bend, switched out for a run entering straight, ran on well to assert authority close to home.
Broke well, disputed lead rounding home bend, fought on under pressure but overshadowed by eventual winner close to home.
Niggled along in midfield to straight, made no impression in the run home.
Moderate beginning, niggled along in forward of midfield, came under pressure approaching home turn, found nothing.
Lacked pace despite ridden along, produced good late impression in closing stages.
Ridden early, settled in 2L 4th on rails, became 3rd in the same box-seat rounding home bend, faded under pressure upon straightening.
Hard ridden to take rail and lead, never being challenged, drifted away 400M to score.
Hard ridden to keep up behind midfield, 2-3 wide, dashed strongly 300M.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 4-5 wide throughout in midfield, faded rapidly 600M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, midfield along the fence, just held ground in final stages.
Pushed early but not muster, took rail at back, lack turn of foot in straight.
Hard ridden forward, trapped 3 wide, emptied 500M.
Pushed early, 2-3 wide at back, no turn of foot.
At rear, trapped 3-4 wide early, took rail prior to 800M, no dash.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, trapped 3-4 wide, no progress.
Eased back along the fence, dashed well 200M.
Pushed to occupy box seat, just held ground in straight for 3rd.
Hard ridden forward, 1 out 1 back, just held ground for 2nd.
At rear, raced 4-5 wide throughout, never improved.
Never competitive, tailed out.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, finished off steadily without serious threats.
Prominent, settled 1L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, kept on one pace to the line.
Pushed forward to hold the fence and share the lead, kept on strongly to score by a head.
At back, trapped wide without cover throughout, never looked likely. (Questioned for riding)
At back throughout, never ran on.
Pressed forward to park outside the leader, fought on gamely until weakened over the concluding stages, missed by a head.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader on the fence, kept on steadily for 4th.
Always at back, never a factor.
At rear throughout, never looked competitive.
Settled midfield about 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, made some ground in Straight.
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced home.
