Eased to midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 3rd.
Broke well, rolled forward along rail to sit 4L behind leader at turn. Inched closer around turn, got split 250m, hit front 100m, pulled clear.
Bumped start, pressed forward, settling one-off in midfield. Put under pressure from turn, given reminders 300m but only one-paced.
Began well but beaten for speed and dropped back towards rear. One-paced early in straight before picking up the bit 200m and finishing well.
Away well, pressed forward, sitting in box seat. Tailed leader to straight, switched out to make run, boxed on one-paced without closing gap.
Aggressively ridden and given reminders but didn't muster and eased back passing 1000m. Well back thereafter and never competitive.
Hard ridden to go forward, racing 3-wide without cover 2L from leader. Turned 4-wide before running out of stamina and fading final 200m.
Hard ridden but failed to respond and soon clear last. Continued to give ground first turn and eased down. Unacceptable performance.
Vigorously ridden early to hold forward position before settling in midfield 5L from leader. Took closer order around turn, switched out straight and ran on well doing best work final 50m.
Hard ridden to hold forward position before settling one-off 3L from leader. Rolled forward from 400m to look a chance but only one-paced final 200m.
Pressed forward from outside draw to lead on settling, crossing to fence before turn. Collared passing 100m but held on to second placing.
Began awkwardly, no pace, dropping to last and crossing to fence. Made ground from 800m to get within 4L of leader entering straight before turning one-paced.
Crowded out at start then bumped and unbalanced. Pressed forward but wide to settle behind midfield. Taken wide in straight but only one-paced under hard riding.
Steadied soon after start and shifted across behind runners, settling at rear. Made forward move turning for home, wide in straight, ran on steadily to be closest at finish.
Jumped OK but beaten for speed, slipping to behind midfield in one-off position. Lost position around turn, taken wide in straight, boxed on fairly.
Hard ridden to hold forward position before settling between horses 4L from leader back stretch. Put under pressure from 500m, got clear run 350m, picked up momentum from 200m and finished strongly.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to race outside leader on settling. Moved forward 600m to put pressure on leader, kept battling in straight until flattened final strides.
Bounced well, allowed to stride forward, settling one-off 2L from leader. Made forward move on straightening but run ended 200m out. One-paced.
No early pace dropping to rear along fence. Shuffled back to last around turn, boxed on one-paced in straight.

Pressed forward from outside draw, taking first turn 4-wide before settling 3-wide 2L from leader back stretch. Rolled forward final turn, gradually forged forward under vigorous riding to score narrowly.
Began fairly, ridden to make up ground but held wide 3L from leader. Took closer order around turn to look a chance entering straight. Flattened final stages.
No early pace, dropping to rear but away from fence. Switched out turning for home to go forward and ran on fairly in straight.
Began well but tended to race ungenerously and slipped back to behind midfield. Took inside run around turn, got clear run top of straight, finished off strongly final 200m.
Ridden along early then steadied and shifted in to find cover, settling close to fence in midfield. Stayed on fence around turn and kept on fairly in straight.
Slow into stride, then crowded for space 1400m before being pushed forward along rail to sit 2L behind leader back stretch. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Quickly into stride, took lead on settling and slowed pace. Put under pressure turning for home but kept battling before being swamped final strides.
Outpaced early, dropping back but kept wide towards the rear. Wide around turn, one-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield, 1-1/2L off the lead stand side, ran on well from 200M to take 3rd.
Sat towards the rear, 3L behind on centre track until 300M when shifted to inner track, kept on one paced home.
Raced towards the rear, 2-1/4L behind along the outside rail, hampered at 200M, not competitive anyway.
Travelled in worse than midfield, 2-1/2L off stand side, showed slight dash after 200M.
Sent forward and raced as part of the lead, run interrupted at 200M, not a threat anyway.
Prominent on stand side and assumed lead near 400M, kept on to score without being pushed in final strides.
Slow start, then eased back and sat 3L off stand side, shifted to inner track at 300M, made no progress.
Niggled forward and raced prominently on centre track, dropped off gradually at 200M.
Ridden forward to lead on inner track, out of steam passing 350M.
Settled in midfield, 1-1/2L behind on centre track, run ended when clipped heels and blundered at 200M.
Raced prominently, 3/4L off the lead along the outside rail, kept on until couldn't match the pace passing 300M.
Awkward start, raced at the rear 3-3/4L behind along the outside rail, inconvenienced at 200M, not competitive.
Pushed forward and sat 3/4L behind the lead on inner track, finished off nicely but no match to winner.
Raced in about midfield, 2L behind on inner track, kept on one paced in the run home.
Began well, pressed forward to lead until 1100m when settled in box seat 3L from leader. Came off fence 500m, got clear run in straight but unable to run down winner.
Got off well, ridden along to hold rail, settling 3L from leader passing 1000m. Lost position around turn, took rails run in straight, kept on fairly to 100m when flattened.
Hard ridden early to share early pace, settling one-off 3L from leader passing 1000m. Started to feel the pinch on straightening and gave ground steadily.
Slow into stride, restrained and taken to fence 1300m. Switched out 650m but not much room top of straight. Got clear 300m and ran on fairly.
Steadied and shifted across behind runners soon after the start, dropping to rear but away from fence. Switched out around turn but found nothing in straight when asked for an effort.
Away nicely, pressed forward, taking over lead passing 1100m and crossing to fence. Collared passing 250m but kept battling to line.
Ridden to hold forward position but held wide. Allowed to stride forward from 600m, turned wide, kept on steadily in straight without looking dangerous.

Jumped with field, not pushed, settling one-off behind midfield. Disappointed for run around turn then held in traffic early straight. Steadied 250m, shifted in for clear run 200m and finished off nicely.
Began fairly, taken to rail and allowed to improve position to midfield. Badly crowded passing 900m, dropping to near last around the turn. Took rails run in straight and boxed on one-paced.
Broke well but no early toe, dropping behind midfield but wide. Began long forward move 1200m to race outside hindquarters of leader 600m. Shaken up 400m, hit front 250m, pulled clear.
Jumped OK but held wide and tended to over-race when restrained behind midfield. Improved position around turn to get within range of leaders passing 200m when ran out of steam.
Outpaced and soon clear last. Tagged on to field passing 600m, taken to centre track on straightening, boxed on fairly under the whip.
Vigorously ridden to hold forward position, settling between horses 4L from leader 1000m. Blocked for run early in straight, raced tightly to 300m, steadied 250m, ran on fairly when clear final 200m.
Near the rear early stages, settled behind midfield down the back-straight, checked 800M, brought wide 450M, stayed on without threatening.
Caught wide no cover from first turn, chased leaders along the 3-path, well held in the run home, no extra 150M.
Taken back on jumping, raced in the rear and keenly passing 900M, 8Ls off the pace 400M, didn't respond to riding and never a factor.
Never far off, 5th at 800M, under pressure to keep up nearing 400M, weakened from 300M.
Behind mid-division early stages, shuffled further back midway, 3-wide home turn, couldn't quicken enough to challenge.
Pressed forward from draw 13, crossed to 2-wide prompting the pace, tried hard but always held by leader in the run home, lost 2nd 150M.
Settled down 2-wide in midfield 3-4Ls behind leader, outpaced home turn, soon out of contention and eased. (Blood in trachea.)
From widest draw caught no closer than 3-wide throughout, 3Ls back in midfield on settling, kept on moderately final 300M without threatening leaders.
Held up midfield, 3Ls off the pace halfway, made good progress up the fence passing 400M, shifted out 200M to continue his chase, led 100M and won going away in very fast time.
Jumped awkwardly, settled towards the rear, 6Ls to make up 400M but didn't make much progress on leaders.
Dropped back after first 100M and shifted to 2-wide spot at the rear, remained there to home turn, gave limited response when asked, never involved.
Restrained to near the rear, caught 3-wide during race, improved to midfield home turn, kept on fairly under pressure final 300M.
Chased leaders along the inside, advanced to 3rd 400M, kept battling on but couldn't reel in the leaders over final 300M.
Soon led from draw 1, set steady pace first half, quickened up tempo home turn, kept on well in straight just couldn't hold off winner at 100M.
Crowded start, recovered and pushed forward, settling one-off 3L from leader 900m. Had clear run on straightening and kept on well.
Checked start, ridden to make up ground but trapped 3-wide. Improved position around turn, swung very wide in straight, finished strongly down centre track to win drawing away.
Began OK, ridden along early but hard to settle, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Switched wide around turn, made ground steadily to 200m then one-paced.
Broke well, pressed forward to settle along rail 3L from leader passing 1000m. Stayed on rail in straight and kept on gamely till flattened final stages.
Vigorously ridden from outside draw to race outside early leader before taking over passing 1000m and crossing to fence. Kicked 2L clear entering straight, caught 150m, kept on to hold minor placing.
Quickly into stride, leading field before slipping into box seat when passed 1000m. Came off fence to challenge 400m but soon out of steam and dropped back quickly.
No early pace, dropping to rear along rail. Taken out turning for home but only one-paced in straight under hard during.
Jumped OK, ridden but didn't muster and held wide at rear, shifting ground several times. Boxed on fairly in straight under hard riding.
Outpaced and soon clear last. Caught up to main field passing 800m and ran past beaten horses in straight.
Began fairly, badly unbalanced but pressed forward from wide draw to take forward position 3L from leader 900m. Lay out turn, under pressure on entering straight and gave ground quickly final 200m.
Jumped well but unable handle early pace, settling ahead of midfield in one-off position. Made ground early in straight to look a chance before turning one-paced final 200m.
Began OK, ridden to hold rail, settling midfield. Under pressure turning for home and gave ground steadily in straight.
Ridden early but found pace too hot, dropping behind midfield. Came off fence turning for home, battled on gamely in straight, doing best work final 100m.
Outpaced, dropping to rear and clear last from 800m, finishing tailed out. Rider reported abnormal breathing noises. Unacceptable performance.
Taken up to be well placed early in 2nd, but stuck 3 wide with no cover. Slightly 1 paced in the straight, and faded late.
Taken up early, eventually settling 4th/5th, 5 wide with limited cover. Gave ground quickly from the 200m.
Pushed hard early to set a quick early tempo up front, before easing off the gas at the 800m. Ran solidly in the straight, but couldn't hold off the fast finishing winner in the shadows of the post.
Not hard ridden early and settled forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Never fully pushed, and plugged on solidly under hands and heels in the straight.
Cruised up early, eventually settling forward of midfield, on the fence. Plugged on OK in the straight, just losing a placing late.
Slow into stride and settled towards the rear of the field, on the fence. Held up until forcing a run at the 200m, but only plugged away fairly to the line.
Stuck wide early, before easing back to sit behind midfield, 3-4 wide with cover. Widest on the turn, but showed nothing in the straight and was eased out late.
Went to press forward early and settled 4th/5th, but trapped 4-5 wide with no cover. Battled on solidly in the straight, just nabbing 3rd late.
Pushed forward early, before easing back 900m to sit midfield, 3-4 wide. Ran solidly in the straight, making up some ground late.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit last, 2L off the 2nd last horse. Still 2nd last on the turn, before coming wider. Rumbled home strongly in the straight, grabbing the win late.
Pushed up early to be handily placed in 3rd, 1 off the fence. Used up early, and had little left in the tank late and faded out in the straight. Jockey questioned.
Couldn't match quick early tempo before dropping back to sit towards the rear of the field. Dropping out before the turn, and not pushed out in the straight.
Well back, raced wide down far side and around home bend, made modest progress under pressure down the centre of the straight.
Broke well from the one draw, settled 2 back in 4th on rails, drifted further back to midfield far side, came under pressure on home bend, one-paced.
Wide in midfield early, circled the field to obtain rails run in front 1100 metres out, led until finding no extra passing the 200 metres.
In rear of midfield before crowded on rails losing ground, towards the rear when hampered and lost further ground approaching the Rock, no further impression.
Midfield early, carried backward passing the 1000 metres, saved ground turning for home, soon faded.
Settled in midfield 3-wide without cover, kept on steadily in straight, nearest at finish.
Settled in last few from a wide gate, raced keenly early far side, ran on past beaten horses closing stages. (Lame)
Never better than midfield, found nothing.
Settled in midfield, gained closer to 4th coming out of back straight, quickened well to take charge passing the 200 metres, won cosily.
Never far off, ducked in away from whip upon straightening losing momentum, renewing effort when hampered passing the 200 metres, no further impression.
Pressed forward from the widest gate, led briefly before taken back to 3rd behind leader coming onto 1000 metre bend, fought on steadily under pressure without threating the winner.
Towards rear when hampered and veered wide losing a few lengths 1200 metres out, soon recovered to just worse than midfield but wide without cover down far side, made no impression in home straight.
Very slow away, struggled to keep up at rear, suited by the fast tempo, closed off strongly 250M to score.
At back, 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, lack room 4-2, made steady ground when clear.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide in the lead, harmed by the fast sectionals, out of fuel 300M.
Trapped 4 wide throughout in front of midfield, race on well until 100M flattened.
Hard ridden early but not muster, trapped 3 wide, suited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 200M.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up at back, 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, no dash.
Very slow away, at back along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, never improved.
Pushed to hold the rail in the lead, harmed by the fast pace, flattened 150M.
Eased to rear, took rail, benefited by the fast sectionals, progressed steadily 300M for 2nd.
Pushed early, stayed 3 wide throughout in the lead, harmed by the fast sectionals, ran on well until 100M flattened.
Pushed early, midfield, 3 wide, suited by the fast pace, made steady ground 300M.
Pushed forward, trapped 3 wide, harmed by the fast pace, emptied 300M.
At rear, travelled 7.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, made minor ground in straight.
At back, checked and lost couple of lengths rounding the Home Turn, never looked likely.
Pressed forward to park outside the leader, kept on until weakened final 150M.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, soon weakened after straightening.
Eased to settle midfield from a wide gate, travelled 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, switched wide turning in, ran on nicely for 3rd.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, sung wide turning in, stormed home to score by 1L.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide without cover, made some ground in straight.
Prominent, travelled 1L behind the leader 2 wide with cover, emptied soon after straightening. (Questioned trainer for tactics)
Raced midfield, travelled 3Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on steadily for 4th.
Crowded start, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, ran on well to get 2nd.
Rolled forward to take the lead along the fence, soon weakened after straightening.
Raced midfield, travelled 2.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, one paced home.
Pressed forward 3-wide from an outside draw before cutting in to one-off position 3L from leader around turn. Switched out in straight and ran on solidly.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3 and 4 wide behind midfield. Took home turn wide, kept wide in straight, one-paced.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners from wide barrier, settling at rear. Tagged on to main field around turn, taken to centre track on straightening and ran on steadily.
Ridden to obtain forward position but trapped 3-wide without cover 2.5L from leader. Shaken up around turn, looked chance 200m, then one-paced.
Hard ridden to lead on settling, then set good pace to straight. Collared 100m out and faded gradually.
Pushed forward from inside draw to grab box seat on settling, 2L from leader. Tracked leader to straight but only one-paced when asked for an effort.
Began well but not pushed, settling one-off 3L from leader. Got clear run in straight when front-runners fanned out, rolled forward to hit the front 100m, pulled clear.
Crowded out start, dropping back, then crowded again passing 600m, dropping to rear between horses. Found nothing in straight when asked.
Pressed forward to race three-quarter length outside leader. Kept on well around turn and early straight but ran out of steam 200m and gave ground quickly.

Began awkwardly, then raced in restricted room before settling along rail in midfield. Stayed on rail in straight and ran on well to be closest at the finish. Had small wound inside right hind fetlock.
No early pace, dropping to rear along rail. Improved position around turn, switched out in straight to make run but found little.
Crowded for room shortly after start, then checked 600m, dropping to rear. Taken to rail around turn but only one-paced in straight.
No early toe, dropping towards rear along rail. Improved position around turn, switched out straight and ran on solidly.
Pressed forward to lead on settling, then set steady sections to straight. Collared passing 200m and swamped final stages.
Jumped well, steadied and shifted across behind runners from outside draw, settling at rear. Took inside run in straight and ran on steadily.
Bumped start, pushed forward but raced keenly, settling one-off 3L from leader. Left wide without cover from 700m but kept on gamely without looking dangerous.
Hampered start, pressed forward taking first turn wide and losing position, dropping to rear. Took home turn 3-wide and one-paced in straight.
Hampered start, pressed forward but wide, settling in midfield in one-off position. Started to give ground around home turn and plodded home in straight.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, taking first turn very wide before settling outside hindquarters of leader back stretch. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Got off OK, no early speed, settling at rear in one-off position. Shifted in early straight to get run and ran on fairly.
Began well, rolled forward, grabbing box seat and tracking leader. Got clear run on straightening, hit front 200m, finished strongly.
Outpaced, dropping to rear along rail. Hard ridden around home turn but spent force passing 200m and faded, finishing tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Ridden along to obtain forward position, taking first turn very wide before settling one-off, 4L from leader. Under pressure top of straight and only one-paced.
Broke well but eased out of pace battle, settling along rail 4L from leader. Came off fence 400m to make run but force to switch in 250m, then crowded 200m. Finished off well.
Ridden forward and raced prominently, 1/2L off 2 wide, kept going to the line and scored by 1-3/4L.
Travelled in behind midfield, 3-1/2L behind along the rail, made little progress only.
Travelled in midfield, 2L behind 2 wide, ran on well from 150M and hit the line strongly for 3rd.
Settled in worse than midfield, 4L behind 3 wide with cover, improved rounding turn, one paced in the Straight.
Pushed forward and sat outside the lead, kept on early in the Straight but no extra inside 100M.
Eased back and raced 5-1/4L behind the lead along the rail, made good ground and finished off nicely.
Taken back and raced towards the rear, 4-3/4L behind 2 wide, made minor ground in the Straight.
Raced in front of midfield, 2L off and left 3 wide without cover after 700M, kept on one paced to the line.
Rolled forward and led by a nose along the rail, headed passing 200M, just held onto 2nd.
Raced in worse than midfield, 3-1/2L behind 2 wide, not competitive.
Took box-seat, sat 1-3/4L off the lead, crowded and checked at 600M, dropped off gradually in the Straight.
Got off well, allowed to roll forward at own speed, settling in box seat 3L from leader 1300m. Came off fence turning for home, got clear run, hit front 200m, run down on line.

Pressed forward from wide draw, taking lead passing 1450m and crossing to fence 1380m. Harassed up front by other runner from 1200m to 400m when had enough and finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Hard ridden from outside draw to go forward, taking first turn 3-wide before settling 3L from leader back stretch. Dropped further back when pace hotted up 600m. Found little in straight.
Broke well but eased back, dropping to last passing 1200m. Shaken up 450m, given reminder 400m circled friend turning for home, taken to centre track and finished powerfully to win on the line.
Began OK but didn't muster despite vigorous riding, dropping 3-deep towards rear. Put under pressrun turning for home, very wide in straight, finished strongly.
Bumped start, no pace, dropping to rear in one-off position. Stayed on rail around turn but founding nothing in straight despite hard riding.
Broke well, rolled forward, settling one-off 3L from leader back stretch. Put under pressure turning foursome, 4-wide into straight, finished well under vigorous riding to hold on to minor placing.
Jumped OK, unable to match early paced dropped behind midfield first turn. Improved position back straight to get within range 200m before flattened 100m.
Snagged back soon after start and taken to rail in last place 1500m. Uncreased tempo back straight, took inside run on straightening but only one-paced final 200m.
Began well, pushed forward but 3-wde, settling ahead of midfield. Started run midway through back stretch but faded in straight.
Jumped well, ridden to obtain forward position but crowded out 1450m and dropped to behind midfield. Shaken up turning for home, made some gain early straight turning one-paced 200m.
Began best, led initially before headed 1450m. Urged forward again to eye-ball leader back stretch as pace increased, took over lead passing 400m but spent force soon after and faded.
Dropped back from wide barrier, in last 10Ls off runaway leader, worked home mildly over final 300M, never got involved.
In 4th position, 4Ls to make up on runaway leader at 400M, tried hard but effort leveled off passing 150M.
Caught wide no cover from draw 11, couldn't keep up 550M, soon detached from the field.
Sat behind midfield 6-7Ls behind runaway leader, ran on under pressure passing 300M but couldn't accelerate enough, no clear run final 100M.
Sent forward from wide barrier, in 3rd place along the 2-path, failed to make impression in the straight, just holding ground.
Dropped back to near the rear, 6-7Ls off the pace at 400M, ran on well down the rail, just missed 3rd.
Crossed to the lead 1400M, raced keenly and opened up 3-4Ls lead middle stages, caught by winner near 200M, faded and lost 2nd late.
Held up 2-wide behind midfield, 6Ls to make up 400M, chased steadily without threatening.
Sat in 2nd about 3Ls away from runaway leader, quickened to lead inside 200M, kept on well to score.
Reserved near last, 8Ls off the pace making home turn, closed off fastest down outside, nearest finish.
Settled down 2-wide in mid-division, driven out 500M, loomed a chance mid-straight but couldn't reel in the leaders.

Surged forward from inside draw to settle one-back, one-off at first turn but shuffled 5L back 1000m when rivals moved forward. Closed in steadily around turn, swung wide, kept on fairly till flattened 100m.
Pressed forward 3-wide to race outside leader first turn. Steadied 1200m but unable get cover and surged forward to lead 480m. Kicked 3L clear 300m but faltered final stages and run down.

Began awkwardly, taken to rail but outpaced, dropping to rear. Not asked to move until 400m when shaken up, swung wide into straight, run into traffic jam, shifted out 150m to improve, finished strongly.
Jumped well but restrained, dropping to rear in one-off position. Not asked for an effort until niggled at passing 500m, taken to centre track 180m and powered home to win on the line.
Began OK, taken to rail and settled, dropping to behind midfield. Switched off along back stretch, left fence 450m to make run, ran on steadily in straight. Lame right front leg.
Tightened shortly after start, settling midfield in one-off position. Niggled at passing 500m, swung wide into straight finished off strongly under vigorous riding.

Vigorously ridden from start to lead to 1480m before dropping into box seat first turn. Kept tabs on leader to straight, kept on fairly until running on empty final 200m. Substantial amount of mucus in trachea.
Steadied on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling last in a well strung-out field. Hard ridden from 400m, taken on centre field on straightening, ran on steadily.

Hard ridden from inside draw to get forward position 2-back from leader but left 7L behind when pace hotted up back stretch. Took closer order turn, got inside run in straight and finished off fairly.

Broke fairly, ridden along to 1600m before restrained and taken in, settling one-off behind midfield. Made forward move passing 450m, taken to centre track and finished strongly under hard riding to just miss.

Jumped with field, allowed to stride forward, taking first turn 3-wide. Settled one-off 3L from leader back stretch. Put under pressure 450m, speared forward under whip to look winner 100m but run down on line.
Hard ridden but wide to take lead 1480m before crossing to fence. Refused to settle and set hot pace to straight when headed and faded.
Moderate start, midfield on rails before hampered and lost position coming out of back straight, towards the rear rounding home bend and into straight, produced good late impression closing stages.
Towards the rear despite ridden along early, made up late ground in straight, never nearer.
Close up before hampered and lost position approaching home bend, some 3L back in 6th turning in, kept on steadily without quickening.
Never far off, switched out to challenge upon straightening, hit the front inside the 300 metres but died on its run close to home.
Prominent early, hampered and lost position coming out of back straight, midfield turning for home, kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled in just better than midfield on rails in 6th and then 5th on home bend, switched out to challenge after straightening, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Taken back from the widest gate to race in rear, ran on well to assert authority close to home.
Failed to muster and dropped to last few, raced 3-wide around home bend, ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well, in front briefly before ceded advantage to settle just off the pace coming out of back straight, briefly baulked early in home straight, failed to peg back the winner.
Soon took up running, led to the 300 metres, dropped out under pressure.
Moderate start from a wide gate, travelled wide behind midfield, commenced run from approaching home turn, ran on to reach 4th just over 2L back 200 metres out when run ended.
Jumped well, settled in midfield, made steady headway down the inside of straight but without threatening.
Made steady headway from a wide gate to join the leader coming out of back straight, unable to sustain effort and overhauled over 350 metres out.
Moderate start, trailed the field most of the way, finished off race well inside the final 150 metres.
Pushed early but not muster, 2-3 wide in midfield, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 350M for 2nd.
Pushed to take rail and led at advantageous slow sectionals, hung on until 200M weakened.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on well until 150M flattened.
At back along the fence, harmed by the slow tempo, dashed well 300M.
Pushed early but not muster, sat 2 wide behind midfield, not suited by the slow pace, blocked 400M, dashed strongly when clear.
Hard ridden forward, benefited by the slow sectionals, out of fuel 250M.
Eased back as usual , 3-4 wide, harmed by the slow pace, ran on only fairly in straight.
Never a factor.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, dashed strongly 300M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, flattened 200M.
Eased to rear, 3-4 wide, dashed well 200M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, lack room 300M, dashed well when clear.
Eased back, 2 wide, harmed by the slow tempo, unleashed strong finishing efforts 300M.
Box seat, suited by the slow tempo, soon emptied 400M.
Taken back from a wide gate, travelled 8Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on fairly.
Pushed forward to take the fence and share the lead, kept on until weakened 250M.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed well for 2nd, just missed by a nose.
Eased to rear from a wide gate, travelled 9Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, swung widest turning in, ran on fairly.
Prominent, however, trapped wide without cover throughout, one paced home and weakened 100M.
Settled in front of midfield about 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily.
Always at rear, made no impression in straight.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, finished off strongly to score by a nose.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, kept on only fairly to the line.
Missed start, travelled 6Ls behind the leader on the fence, made ground nicely for 3rd.
Raced midfield, travelled 4.5Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on and dropped off 250M.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, never looked likely.
Midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 4th.
Raced midfield, travelled 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, never looked likely.

Jumped well, allowed to stride forward at own pace before taking clear lead 1850m. Put under pressure 1450m but edged ahead again. Kicked 3L clear 300m to look winner but run down in the shadows of the post.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw, settling at rear. Asked to take closer order passing 1200m, got inside run in straight but only one-paced.
Began well sharing early pace before settling in box seat 2L from leader. Left flat-footed top of straight when leader kick and faded.

Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start but pressed forward between horses to sit 2L from leader at first turn. Started to give ground around home turn and finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Ridden early but unable handle pace and eased back, racing 3-deep at the rear. Shuffled back to last passing 1150m, picked up speed entering straight and ran on nicely between horses.
Pressed forward from an outside draw to race in midfield but without cover. Put under pressure turning for home but only one-paced.
Began well, pushed forward along rail, settling 3L from leader 1600m. Kept on steadily to 300m when ran out of stamina and faded.
Began well, pushed forward but wide 3L from leader. Allowed to roll forward from 1600m to race outside leader 1450m. Kept on steadily to 800m when came under pressure and gave ground gradually.
Broke well, allowed to find feet and gradually taken to fence towards the rear and shut off. Shaken up passing 900m, steadied 700m, got clear run 300m, ran on strongly to win close home.
Pressed forward but wide to sit 2L behind leader at first turn and then kept tabs until 400m when gave ground quickly finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Hampered shortly after start but ridden to make up ground, settling behind midfield. Lost position turning for home but boxed on one-paced in straight. Lame right front leg.
Began only fairly, then checked, dropping to rear but kept away from fence. Shaken up passing 1150m, got inside run in straight, ran on steadily for distant third.
Jumped fairly, restrained and shifted across behind runners settling at rear. Got shuffled back turning for home and one-paced in straight.
Began OK, not pushed, settling behind midfield but away from fence. Under pressure turning for home and found little in straight under hard riding.
Broke well but eased off pace, settling between horses 2L from leader. Switch out top of straight to make run, gradually increased speed to hit the front 100m, then held off determined challenge.
Began awkwardly but pushed up quickly to grab box seat, 3L from leader. Chased leader to straight, kept on fairly to 200m then one-paced.
Jumped well, pressed forward but wide, gradually dropping back towards rear. Shuffled back to last entering straight and plodded home.
Crowded and unbalanced shortly after start, settling between horses ahead of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight under hard riding without looking dangerous.
Quickly away, pressed forward to race outside leader. Stayed in contention to 200m when ran out of steam and faded.
Jumped well but hampered shortly after, dropping to behind midfield. Got close to heels around turn, switched out 380m for clear run, finished strongly to just miss.
Quickly into stride to lead on settling. Set strong pace to straight, kicked ahead 350m but caught passing 100m. Battled on gamely to hold minor placing.
Began well, pressed forward behind the pace but severely hampered 850m, dropping back to midfield 4L from leader. Shaken up top of straight and kept on fairly.
Began well but outpaced, dropping to rear along rail. Improved position around turn, got dream rails run in straight and ran on strongly.

Pressed forward from an outside draw, racing wide without cover in midfield. Covered extra ground turn, wide into straight, found little under pressure final 200m. Had small cut inside right front fetlock.
Hard ridden to obtain forward position, racing 3-wide 2L from leader into turn. Still in contention to 200m when condition gave out and faded.
Shifted across behind runners from wide draw and last on settling. Trailed field to straight, taken to centre track and finished off nicely.
Ridden along from an outside draw but didn't muster and kept wide at the rear. Kept wide in straight but limited response when asked.
Prominent, raced 1L outside and behind the lead, ran on well couldn't match the finish inside final 100M only.
Travelled in front of midfield, 2L off but 3 wide without cover, in touch until 150M when couldn't find extra.
Settled just slightly in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide, held up until 200M, hit the line strongly thereafter.
Slow to begin. Remained at the rear and difficult to settle throughout. Not competitive.
Eased and settled in behind midfield from a wide draw, 3-1/2L off 3 wide with cover, closed off only one paced.
Raced towards the rear, 4L behind 2 wide, made no real progress in the Straight.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led by 1L, kept on gamely to the finish.
Eased from a wide draw and raced at the tail, 5L behind the lead, made good ground to score.
Rolled forward and took up box-seat, sat 1-1/2L behind the lead, battled on nicely to the line.
Raced in midfield, 3L behind along the rail, one paced only in the Straight without ever threatening.
Jumped with field but restrained looking for cover at settling at the rear in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening and ran on steadily.
Broke well, allowed to stride at own pace while edging towards rail behind midfield. Took inside run in straight but only one-paced.
Began well, ridden to get forward position but caught wide without cover in midfield, Continued to race wide around turn and boxed on gamely in straight.
Slow into stride and last on settling. Tailed field to 200m before switching out and finishing off nicely.
Ridden along early to hold forward position, settling one-off 3L from leader. Made forward move on straightening but run petered out 200m and faded.
Jumped well but not pushed, looking for cover before settling 3-wide behind midfield. Improved position around turn, got clear run in straight and finished off strongly.
Pushed forward on jumping, settling one-out, one-back 1000m. Took closer order around turn to look a chance 200m before swamped final stages.
Slow into stride then vigorously ridden to make up ground, grabbing box seat 2L from leader at turn. Held for run top of straight, got clear 200m, finished off nicely.
Slow into stride, dropping to last, then shifted across behind running to fence. Made up some ground around turn but found little in straight under hard riding.
Broke well but held and taken back through field to settle 3-wide at rear. Switched out turning for home, taken wide in straight and finished powerfully to win pulling ahead.
Jumped awkwardly, losing ground and dropping towards rear but away from fence. Blocked for run top of straight but before finishing strongly when clear to miss narrowly.
Broke well, pressed forward 3-wide to race outside hindquarters of leader on turning. Rolled forward to hit front 200m but then ran out of stamina and faded.
Began OK, pressed forward to hold rail, settling 4L from leader. Under pressure soon after straightening and gave ground steadily from 200m.
Pressed forward from outside draw to lead on settling, setting a slow first quarter before speeding up. Tried to kick clear top of straight but collared 200m and faded.
Soon led from drawn 1, led slowly first 400M but quickened up from 2nd quarter, opened up 5Ls lead home turn, couldn't sustain run inside 200M, weakened rapidly.
Tracked leader early stages, drifted back to midfield down the back-straight, 7Ls off runaway leader at 400M, kept grinding to the line, creditable performance against much higher rated rivals.
Gradually moved forward from wide barrier, sat 2nd 4-5Ls behind runway leader middle stages, under pressure to hold his position 450M, soon weakened.
Not hurried after the start, held up behind mid-division, ran on only fairly inside 400M, no threat to leaders.
Reserved towards the rear, over 10Ls behind runaway leader in middle stages, picked up strongly passing 350M, sprinted to the lead 150M and kicked clear from rivals for a truly remarkable victory.
Slow to begin, dropped back to last over 10Ls behind runaway leader, bustled along 650M and brought wide into straight, couldn't accelerate enough to challenge main rivals.
Settled in midfield, in 6th and 8Ls off the leader making the home turn, tried hard and kept giving to the line, finished not far behind minor place getters.

Caught 3-wide first turn, advanced to 3rd middle stages, sat 5Ls behind runaway leader, no match with winner's acceleration 250M, fought on well for minor placing final stages, got up for 3rd just in time.
Close up early stages, about 6Ls behind runaway leader mid-race, ran on well in straight without matching winner's finishing pace, held 2nd from 100M until closing stages.
Behind midfield in 8th or 9th place, much to do turning in but not able to quicken under pressure, never a threat.

Behind midfield in 7th place, 8Ls off runaway leader turning for home, held up to 250M, ran on well without threatening MAURICE but got past a couple of classy overseas raiders to claim 2nd near line. Career best effort.
Towards the rear, over 10Ls off the strong pace in middle stages, last turning home, ran on moderately without threatening.
Checked shortly after start, dropping to rear along rail. Improved position around turn, stayed on rail in straight and finished off solidly.
Began well, shared early pace before settling along rail 3L from leader. Under pressure soon after turning for home and gave ground gradually.
Quickly unto stride, chased leader into first turn but hampered 600m and lost position. Spent force on straightening and faded.
Hard ridden from widest draw to go forward, racing wide until settling outside leader passing 700m. Remained in contention till 200m when tired.
Began awkwardly then hampered but pressed forward racing wide without cover to get within 2L of leader at turn. Under pressure on straightening and faded.
Broke well, then ridden to hold rail in midfield. Got shuffled back around turn, found little in straight though was inconvenienced 350m.
Ridden to obtain forward position 3L from leader but without cover. Looked chance top of straight, kept on gamely to 200m when flattened.
Got off OK, ridden along 3-wide, settling midfield. Taken wider around home turn when lost position, wide into straight, finished off strongly.
Broke well but stumbled shortly after start, dropping back between horses 4L from leader. Got clear run on straightening but didn't pick up momentum until 280m when finished strongly.
Outpaced early, dropping to rear. Improved position around home turn but badly hampered 350m when attempting to improve into tight running. One-paced.
Jumped with field but no early speed, dropping to rear in one-off position. Shuffled to last turning for home, taken to centre track and unleashed strong finishing burst, doing best work final 100m.
Shifted across behind runners from an outside draw and distant last on settling. Tagged on to main field entering straight, took inside run and finished off nicely.
Began OK but no early speed, dropping towards rear between horses. Blocked for run early straight when improving, then one-paced.
Allowed to stride forward to lead on settling and taken to fence. Joined for a few strides passing 700m but edged ahead again. Kicked 2L clear passing 250m and held off well for comfortable win.

Dawdled out of the gate and dropped back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Held up early in the straight and slightly 1 paced when initially clear, before picking up the tempo late.
Eased forward early to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Ran solidly in the straight, without pressuring for a place.
Taken up early to be handily placed, 4th/5th and 1 off the fence. Plugged away steadily late, without ever threatening.
Very slow to begin, and pushed up to sit forward of midfield, on the fence. Only 1 paced in the straight, and awkward on heels near the finish.
Eased back early from the wide draw to sit behind midfield, 3-4 wide with limited cover. Didn't show a great turn of foot in the straight, and went to the line only fairly.
Keen when pushing forward early to sit 3rd, on the fence. Struggled to run on in the straight, and dropped back from the 250m.

Bumped on jumping, before being eased forward early to sit just forward of midfield, on the rail. Smoked the pipe until coming around heels for a run 200m. Pulled away and just held off a fast finishing 2nd late.

Dropped back to unfamiliar position in midfield and fought the jockey consistently up the back straight, being awkwardly placed on heels multiple times. Had nothing left in the tank in the straight. Trainer and jockey questioned.
Cruised forward early, settling midfield, on the rail. Came wider in the straight, and ran very strongly over the last 150m, and just missed on the line.
Dropped back to sit at the tail of the field early. Came widest on the turn and ran home strongly, but was left with too much to do in the straight.
Taken up early to lead. Started to fade from the 300m, and dropped out from there.
Taken forward from the wide draw to be handily placed in 4th, 3 wide with no cover. Loomed into 2nd at the 200m, and held until 50m before peaking late.
Began well and elected to move forward early to race in 2nd. Grabbed the lead at 250 and ran well, before peaking at the 50m, and just holding a place.
Dropped back from the wide draw to sit 2nd last early. Pushed out in the straight, but couldn't improve.
Bumped start, positioned a length or so back in 2nd, easy run throughout, kept on well in straight to score.
Jumped well, took the lead easily, enjoyed the easy lead for the majority of the race, headed final 200M and weakened thereafter.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at tail, bumped near 900M and eased shortly thereafter. (Lame left front.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Average to begin, raced on rail in midfield, same position throughout, finished off evenly in straight.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced 2 wide, 6 to 7 lengths back, improved after 400M, finished off strongly in straight to get 2nd.
Began awkwardly and bumped, positioned on rail in 3rd, saved ground throughout, failed to close off in straight.
Bumped start, raced 5 lengths back in 6th, 2 wide throughout, peaked after turning in, finished off one-paced.
Bumped start, raced 7 lengths back on rail in 8th, same position to turn, angled out early in straight and made reasonable headway to make frame.
Moderately away, raced 2 wide, 3 lengths back in 4th, same position to turn, showed good response early in straight, peaked near 150M, finished 3rd.
Taken back from gate 9, raced at tail, bumped near 900M, still well back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Hard ridden forward, not suited by the fast tempo, ran on well until 100M flattened.
Eased to rear, took rail, favoured by the fast tempo, made steady ground 200M.
Pressed forward, took rail and led at fast sectionals, out of fuel 200M, bumped 100M.
Pushed early, behind midfield 2 wide, benefited by the fast pace, lack room 300M, made minor ground, hampered 100M.
Hard ridden forward, 2 wide, not suited by the fast sectionals, weakened 250M.
Settled in midfield, benefited by the fast tempo, closed off strongly and drifted away 200M to score.
Pressed forward, settled in 2 wide, emptied 250M.
Eased back, 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, made steady ground 250M for 3rd.
At back, along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 250M.
Trapped 3 wide in midfield throughout, ran on well to the line for 2nd.
At back, trapped 3 wide, suited by the fast pace, made some ground 300M.
Raced midfield, 3.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, made no impression in straight.
At back, travelled 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast pace, swung widest, made some ground in straight.
Taken back from a wide gate, 7Ls behind the leader on the fence, suited by the fast pace, dashed well for 2nd.
Raced midfield, 3Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite the fast sectionals, never ran on.
Prominent, travelled 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite harmed by the fast tempo, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Rolled forward to take the fence and share the lead at fast tempo, kept on nicely until weakened over the final furlong, hung on for 4th.
Sent forward from a wide gate to park outside the leader, not suited by the fast sectionals, weakened over the last furlong.
Settled worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, despite the fast pace, ran on fairly.
Jumped slowly, then rolled forward to park outside the leader, however trapped 3 wide without cover throughout, dropped off final 150M.
Settled worse than midfield about 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, ran on well to score by 1-1/4Ls.
Raced midfield, 4Ls behind the leader on the fence, despite the fast pace, never ran on.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, weakened badly over the last furlong, tailed out.
Missed break & initially at tail 1 off with cover, advanced a spot 880m, driven & shifted out final turn, stayed on solidly without threatening.
Lacked toe & bustled initially to sit rail behind midfield, overraced 950m, hard-ridden into home run, kept on evenly.
Smart start, raced handy 3 wide with cover until slotted 1 off 1 back 750m, shifted out to challenge turning in, narrow lead 250m, headed 180m & tapered.
Smart start & rousted initially, settled midfield 1 off with cover, shifted out 450m & driven, wide into stretch, plugged on one pace.
Taken back from widest gate, raced 1 off near rear, shifted out 400m, driven wide into stretch, ran on centre track for solid 3rd.
Broke well, snagged to race midfield on rail, edged 1 off 400m, shifted wide & driven 300m, quickened to a pressing 2nd 180m but outkicked, shifted in & always held.
Early speed to lead 1100m, restrained & headed 950m, settled 1 back on rail, driven 300m, quickened to lead 180m, kept on nicely.
Steady start, raced last pair on rail, to last 880m & niggled, driven into stretch, found nil.
Decent break but lack of pace exposed, checked off heels 1050m, settled midfield 3 wide with cover, driven very wide home turn, found little in weak run home.
Smart start, bustled to lead 950m, worked under pressure to maintain narrow advantage, challenged turning in & headed, faded weakly.
Started ok but soon pumped along to hold midfield berth, trapped 4 wide no cover & niggled 700m, retreated under pressure, very wide into stretch, plodded on tepidly.
Led at break, trapped wide & restrained, headed 1100m, settled close 1 off, pressed leader on turn & edged lead into stretch, headed 250m & weakened tamely.

Very awkward beginning, back to last, overraced and hung off track, settled last 1 off, unable to settle, back to rail 650m, under heavy pressure 350m, all over the place in the straight, never in it.
Away well, ridden along early, outpaced, settled ahead of midfield 1 off, back to midfield 1100m, short of room 550m, angled out 400m, hanging in 350m, widest 200m, limited response.
Knuckled slightly at start, hard ridden but could not match speed, stuck slightly worse than midfield 3 deep no cover, strode forward 850m, up to third 600m, under pressure 450m, unable to go on.
Jumped evenly, behind runners, outpaced slightly, settled beyond midfield on rail, shuffled back 600m, back to rail 300m, one-paced.
Good start, eased to sit midfield, settled just ahead of midfield on rail, shuffled back 460m, off rail soon after, ridden along, barged clear 270m, in traffic again 210m, hit line steadily.

Best to jump, allowed to settle just behind speed, sat 3rd on inside, nowhere to go 550m, pushed back to 9th into straight, off rail 250m, checked 200m, switched back to inside, luckless, finished strongly.
Slightly slow to jump, shifted behind runners, settled beyond midfield 1 off, shifted 3 deep 500m, 4 deep soon after and pushed along, strong bid, died on run 150m.
Began on terms, urged to go forward, stuck deep at first turn, kept pushing on to sit 1L second 1 off, sole lead 600m, ridden along, joined 280m, quickly passed, faded.
Jumped well, ridden to cross, stuck 3 deep out of straight, settled 4th 1 off, under a hard drive 500m, switched over heels 210m, stayed on.

Crowded at start, ridden to go forward, taken to lead at post first time, settled down 1L leader, joined 650m, under pressure soon after, fought on momentarily, dropped off sharply in straight, eased down.
Snagged, back to last out of straight, settled near last on rail, pushed 1 off 650m, asked to improve 450m, short of room 300m, short of room again 120m, found line strongly.

Began evenly, shifted across to find position, settled beyond midfield 1 off, switched 3 deep with cover 800m, improved to midfield spot 600m, ridden along 530m, challenging for lead 370m, stuck on strongly, comfortable.
Rolled into box-seat, sat 2-1/4L behind the lead, weakened passing 150M.
Couldn't muster after the jump, raced at the rear 6L behind 2 wide, never a factor.
Slow start and raced towards the rear, 4-3/4L behind on the rail, never in contention.
Prominent but wide until shifted in to race outside the leader before turn, weakened badly at 250M.
Travelled in midfield, 3-3/4L behind along the rail, not competitive.
Settled in midfield, 3-1/4L behind the lead 2 wide, ran on nicely but was no match to the winner.
Niggled forward, and took up one-off one-back position, finished off only one paced in the Straight.
Showed no speed from break, then raced in worse than midfield 4L behind 2 wide, made slight ground.
Eased and raced at the rear, 6-1/4L behind along the rail, closed off well in the Straight.
Sent forward to lead on the rail by 1L, kept on going to the line and was never challenged.
Sat in front of midfield, 2L off but 3 wide, weakened rounding turn, finished tailed out.
Raced in midfield initially but trapped very wide, dropped out rounding turn.
Broke well but eased out of pace battle, settling one-off 4L from leader around first turn. Made forward move passing 500m, took inside run in straight, but only one-paced final 200m.

Began OK, restrained, taken in, but then steered away from fence. Allowed to stride forward first turn to midfield but left without cover from 800m. Wide in straight, picked up momentum late and finished strongly.
Ridden early to stay with pace but held 3-wide first turn at midfield and allowed to roll forward to sit outside leader passing 800m. Looked a chance 300m, kept on well until flattened 100m.
Shot to the front on jumping, crossing to fence 1400m and setting good pace. Put under pressure 800m but kicked ahead. Collared passing 150m and swamped final stages.
Hard ridden early but didn't muster, dropping to behind midfield in one-off position. Put under pressure from 500m, steadied 350m when blocked for run, kept on fairly.
Ridden early to hold forward position, grabbing box seat first turn, 4L from leader. Took inside run in straight, but only one-paced under hard riding.
Began well but unable handle early pace and slipped back through field towards rear. Dropped to last passing 750m, found little in straight under hard riding.

Jumped well but not pushed, settling along fence in midfield. Not asked for effort till 400m when switched out to make run. Taken to centre track in straight and finished strongly to win drawing away.
Began fairly then squeezed out, dropping back and taken to fence towards rear. Got inside run in straight and ran on steadily.
Pressed forward to obtain forward position, racing 3-wide first turn before settling outside leader 1200m. Shuffled back to 3rd passing 800m, under pressed from 400m, stopped quickly final 200m.
Steadied shortly after start and shifted across behind runners, settling last at first turn. Made short forward move 800m, under pressure from 500m, but only one-paced.
Ridden early to hold forward position, settling one-back, one-off 1300m. Allowed to stride forward passing 500m, 3-wide into straight, kept on solidly to line.
Guided to the fence after the start, settled down 5-6Ls in a position behind midfield, inconvenienced by beaten rival 400M, never near to challenge.
Tracked leaders in a strongly run race, couldn't go on passing 200M, faded towards finish.
Caught wide early stages, raced up to leader 1200M and vied for lead setting fast pace, proved difficult to settle, gave ground rapidly home turn, eased. (Irregular heart rhythm.)
Taken across behind runners after the jump, settled down 2nd last in a strongly run race, 5Ls to make up 400M, closed off fastest and got up for 2nd near line without reaching easy winner.
Sent forward from draw 11, pressed by rival 1200M and proved difficult to settle in the lead, set fast pace to home turn but had little left passing 200M.
Jumped well and restrained in midfield along the 2-path, made his move 500M, responded well to lead 250M out, kicked clear for commanding win.
Held up behind midfield but caught 3-wide for much of the way, moved closer 600M, tried hard and loomed a place chance mid-straight, flattened late stages.
Fractious in stalls and slowly away, reserved near the rear 7Ls off the strong pace, made sound progress final 300M without troubling winner, just missed 3rd.
Never far off, chased leaders in 4th, couldn't match winner's acceleration in straight, moved to 2nd 100M briefly, beaten to 3rd near line.
Held up midfield on inside, eased down passing 300M. (Jockey : horse's action didn't feel comfortable / Lame right front.)
Settled in 9th behind a strong early pace, ran on moderately from a midfield position inside 300M, never seriously threatened.
Dropped back to last, over 8Ls off the strong pace, made no real progress passing 300M.
Began well from a wide draw, took up running from the 1300 metres, led the field until headed inside the 300 metres, lost 2nd late.
Driven forward, then settled one back on rails, quickened well to lead 300 metres out, soon drew clear.
Taken back from a wide draw, travelled towards the rear on rails, switched out for a run on straightening, kept on well closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and given reminders, picked up to forward of midfield turning into back straight, came under pressure in midfield rounding home bend, weakened in home straight. (Bled)
Waited with in rear, finished off race well.
Began well from a wide gate, raced wide in forward of midfield to home bend, folded up quickly.
Soon taken across to rails in rear, settled in rear of midfield far side, ran on near the centre of the straight to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly from a wide gate, worked his way across to settle 3-wide in forward than midfield, renewed effort entering straight, found nothing under pressure.
Ridden early, crowded on rails stables bend, dropped to rear of midfield far side, saved ground turning in, kept on before fading 200 metres out, checked 100 metres out.
Towards the rear, wide into straight, ran home one-paced. (Blood in trachea)
Taken back from the widest gate, detached most of way, never seen with a chance.
Jumped well, crowded on stables bend before improving to 2nd 2-wide just off the pace, weakened under pressure in straight.
Began well, settled 3L off in 5th far side, saved ground turning for home, kept on one pace.
Settled in 4th about 2L off the pace, gradually faded under pressure after straightening.
Very slow away, at back, harmed by the slow pace, improved well from 500M, however run ended 200M.
Hard ridden to keep up at back, not suited by the slow tempo, never improved.
Pushed forward to lead, clocked advantageous slow sectionals, ran on well until 50M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Pressed forward, sat in front of midfield, soon under pressure 300M.
Checked early, never competitive.
Eased to sit in midfield, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 250M.
Midfield, harmed by the slow tempo, just held ground in final stages.
Eased to sit just off the leaders, lack turn of foot, flattened 200M.
Pushed forward, soon out of fuel 300M.
Hard ridden forward, ran on until 250M emptied.
Never a factor, tailed out.
Easily obtained prominent spot, benefited by the slow sectionals, closed off strongly 200M to score.
Very slow away, at rear, dashed strongly 250M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Settled worse than midfield about 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, harmed by the very slow pace, made some ground in straight without threatening.
Prominent, travelled 3Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the very slow tempo, ran on gradually for 2nd.
At back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader along the fence, not suited by the very slow sectionals, made some ground in straight without threatening.
Rolled forward to park outside the leader, enjoyed the very slow sectionals, ran on well to score by 1.5Ls.
Raced midfield, 4.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the very slow tempo, ran on steadily for 4th.
Eased to rear, not suited by the slow tempo, never improved.
Pushed forward to lead along the fence at very slow sectionals, kept on one pace to the line for 3rd.
Rolled forward to occupy the box seat, despite suited by the very slow pace, weakened soon after straightening.
Taken back to rear from a wide gate, not suited by the very slow sectionals, never ran on. (Questioned for tactics)
Smart start from a wide draw, taken back to race behind midfield 3 wide with cover, driven into stretch, ran on centre track, bottomed close home & just missed frame.
Outpaced initially, raced rail behind midfield, shifted out turning in but crowded, angled inside 330m, driven & kept on late for 3rd.
Missed break & bustled along, advanced on fence to chase leader in 4th, shifted out to challenge & driven 400m, outpaced & back to rail 350m, tapered to wire.
Fast start, raced handy 2nd 1 off without cover, shaken up 400m, emptied 250m & faded.
Missed break & bustled at tail, hard driven 520m & shifted out, staying on dourly when forced to check inside 200m, driven for minor late headway.
Broke well, bustled wide to park 3rd 3 deep without cover, niggled 500m & driven into stretch, emptied 270m, weakened tamely.
Fast start widest, taken back to 2nd last wide with cover, niggled final turn & driven 400m, closed centre track for late headway, nicked 2nd.
Speed to lead on rail, set tempo without pressure, nudged along 400m, soon shaken up & driven out 300m, all out & headed 200m, swamped late.
Tardy start & bustled forward to midfield 1 off with cover, niggled 650m, soon under pump, shifted out on turn & hard-ridden 400m, plugged on one pace.
Started well & handy initrially, soon snagged to midfield 3 wide with cover, driven into stretch, quickened to lead 200m & drew clear.
Tardy start, taken behind to rail near tail, shaken up 450m, progress checked & steadied 320m, switched out & ridden 200m, kept on evenly.
Broke ok & bustled to midfield 1 off with cover, checked off heels 870m & shuffled back, checked & shifted wide 500m, driven turning in, kept on dourly.
Away well, under riding early, settled midfield 1 off, awkwardly placed 1100m, lost ground slightly, 3 deep 800m, short of room 700m, ridden along 420m, took time to wind up, found line steadily.
Slightly awkward break, eased to settle at rear 1 off, shifted 3 deep 1050m, 4 deep 600m, checked as pulled wide 420m, one-paced.
Best away, pushed on to go forward, stuck deep, settled 3rd and 4th 3 deep, asked to improve 530m, challenge short-lived in straight, faded.
Jumped strong, scrubbed along to lead, momentary lead 1300m, joined and headed 920m, 2nd on outside, under a ride 530m, weakened tamely.
Even break, ridden to go forward, settled fore of midfield on rail, off leader's back 600m, up to challenge 400m, switched inside 350m, stayed on.
Jumped well, ridden early to push on, pushed up at 1050m, took lead on rail 930m, overraced slightly 800m, under heavy pressure 400m, drifted to centre track, stole a break to score.
Good jump, early pace to take forward position, settled 4th 1 off, shuffled back slightly 750m, under pressure 600m, short of room 400m, switched back to inside, stuck on.

Slightly slow, drifted back despite riding, settled beyond midfield on outside, checked slightly and shuffled back 1050m, blocked for run 700m, ridden 500m, under heavy drive soon after, green but steamed home.
Very slow to begin, mustered along rail to settle midfield on inside, saved ground throughout, ridden along 580m, outpaced.
Away well, under riding early, settled ahead of midfield 1 off, lost ground steadily throughout, awkwardly placed 700m, very weak in straight.

Away on terms, slow to muster, overraced slightly and checked off heels 1200m, lost ground soon after, shifted to 3 deep cover beyond midfield, wider on turn, swept around field 4 deep 700m, emptied in straight.

Away on terms, eased to find spot, taken back beyond midfield, ridden out wide to settle midfield 3 deep, improved 820m, pushed deeper 500m, challenged 400m, drifted out under pressure, made steady ground.
Jumped evenly, shuffled back, settled beyond midfield on rail, off inside 800m, short of room 350m, stayed on.
OK break but outsped early, settled near rear on rail, short of room 550m, under heavy drive soon after, wound up eventually but much too late.
Settled in worse than midfield, 5-3/4L behind 3 wide with cover, awkward to heels passing 400M, ran on strongly.
Slow break, travelled in behind midfield, 5-1/4L behind along the rail, continued to make ground steadily for 4th.
Sent forward to lead along the rail, remained neck to neck with the winner until final strides, missed by a head.
Slow start, raced towards the rear, 6-1/2L behind along the fence, hit the line strongly when cleared after 100M.
Raced in just behind midfield, 4-1/2L off 2 wide, kept on one paced in the run home.
Initially towards the rear and wide, improved around field rounding turn, never looked likely.
Punched forward and settled in one-off one-back position 2L off, kept on well going to the line.
Slotted in front of midfield, 3-1/4L off 2 wide, ran on okay until flattened passing 250M.
Awkward start and then sat outside the lead, kept on to score in a tight battle that went down to the final strides.
Eased and raced at the tail, 7L behind 3 wide with cover, shifted widest and finished only one paced.
Travelled in behind midfield, 6-1/4L off 2 wide, interrupted run in the Straight, not fully tested.
Raced at the tail throughout, found nothing in the straight.
Rolled forward and settled into box-seat, sat 1-3/4L off, no clear run near 200M but still ran on well to the line.
Raced just front of midfield, 3-3/4L behind along the fence, ran on nicely for 3rd.
Bounced well, taken to fence, settling 3L from leader. Got clear run 400m, burst through to lead 220m, shortened strides closes stages but held off late challenge.
Broke well, pressed forward sharing early pace until settling in box seat 2L from leader at turn. Came off fence 500m, looked chance 300m, then one-paced.
Surged forward to lead clearly on settling, setting good pace to straight. Collared passing 300m and weakened quickly final 200m.
Began fairly, no early pace, dropping towards rear along rail. Swung wide into straight, got clear run 350m, finished off strongly final 200m to just fail.
Jumped fairly, ridden to hold fence, settling behind midfield in one-off position. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished off nicely.
Jumped fairly, ridden along early but beaten for pace, dropping towards rear but 3-wide. Shaken up top of straight but limited response.
Bumped and unbalanced start, pressed forward, settling one-off 3L from leader. Swung wide into straight and ran on steadily under hard riding.
Began well but eased back and shifted in, dropping to rear in one-off position. Taken wide in straight and picked up momentum steadily to be closest at finish.
Hard ridden from an outside draw to go forward, racing one-off 2L behind leader to turn. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded.
Began fairly, outpaced, clear last until straight when took rails run and ran past beaten horses.
Broke well, hard ridden to go forward but limited response, settling behind midfield. Got close to heels 900m, took turn 3-wide, widest into straight, ran on steadily doing best work final stages.
Hard ridden early but unable to lead and eased back, settling 3L from leader in one-off position. Under pressure from 600m and finished off only fairly.
Jumped well from gate 12, showed good speed to take the lead on the stands rail, travelled really well throughout, scored easily.
Moderately away, raced prominently near to the stands side, peaked near 400M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Raced behind midfield throughout, closer to the middle of the track, finished off one-paced.
Crowded out start, recovered to race 2 lengths behind the leader on the stands' rail, finished off evenly to get 3rd, never a threat to the first two.
Moderately away, 2 away from the stands rail in midfield, closed off well to get 2nd without threatening the winner.
Jumped well, raced prominently, peaked near 350M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Hampered start, raced behind midfield closer to the middle of the track with no cover, finished off evenly.
Began awkwardly from gate 10, raced 3 lengths or so back on the stands rail, made no impression final 400M.
Inconvenienced start, raced at rear throughout, never competitive. (See Racing Incidents.)
Hampered start, raced at rear throughout, never competitive.
Jumped well, raced in midfield, taken to the middle of the track final 400M, weakened gradually thereafter.
Began well from gate 11, raced in 4th, 2 away from the stands rail, finished off evenly, just missed 3rd.
Quickly away, shared pace before forging to a clear lead 1050m. Set steady pace to straight, kicked clear 300m and kept on strongly to the line.
Outpaced early, dropping towards rear in one-off position. Dropped further back around turn and found nothing in straight under hard riding.
Began well but unable match early pace and dropped to behind midfield but wide. Taken to centre track on straightening and finished off strongly under hard riding.
Began OK but travelled keenly, dropping towards rear but wide. Even wider around turn, hung out straight, faded.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners to fence, dropping towards rear. Stayed on fence around turn, ran on steadily in straight, doing best work final stages.
Began OK, ridden to obtain forward position settling between horses 4L from leader at turn. Held up in traffic early in straight before finishing fairly when clear.
First into stride, sharing early pace before settling 3L behind leader at turn. Under pressure soon after straightening and faded quickly final 200m.
Pressed reward from an outside draw, racing wide until settling outside hind-quarters of leader at turn. Kept on gamely in straight until flattened 150m.
Bumped start, pressed forward inside pacemakers before settling in box seat 2L from leader 1000m. Came off fence 350m to make challenge but unable close gap to leader.
Jumped with field, ridden along in midfield but held 3-wide mostly. Wide around turn, wider in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Broke well, pressed forward along rail before settling 4L from leader at turn. Stayed on rail entering straight and boxed on gamely.
Began awkwardly, ridden to obtain forward position but held 3-wide without cover. Battled on gamely in straight without closing gap to winner.
Shifted across behind horses from an outside draw and last on settling. Trailed field to straight and ran past beaten horses.

A little tardy at start before making ground along rail to settle behind midfield. Took inside run in straight, weaving between horses until strong finishing spurt final 200m. Horse hit on nose by rival's whip 300m.
Eased back early to sit towards the rear of the field, 3 wide with cover. Widest in the straight. Off heels at the 400m, but only battled on fairly to the line.
Crowded on jumping, and settled just behind midfield, on the fence. Ran solidly in the straight, and was chasing down 3rd late, before just running out of ground.
Pushed forward early, and stuck wide until eventually grabbing the lead at 1100m. Dropped out from the 300m.
Cruised forward to sit midfield, 1 off the fence. Held up early in the straight, but clear from 350m and ran on solidly without threatening a place.
Taken up early, eventually settling 4th, 1 off the fence. Started to fade early in the straight, and not pushed out.
Taken up from the inside draw to eventually sit 3rd, on the rail. Came around early leaders heels, and nosed in front at 300m. Slightly 1 paced, losing the lead at 100m, and just holding 3rd late.

Dropped back from the wide draw to be a clear last, 10L off the leaders. Progressed at 1100m to sit at the back of the main group. Held rail, and ridden for luck in the straight. Weaved through and won well late.
Taken forward early, before dropping back to sit midfield, 3 wide with no cover. Came off heels at 300m, and played no part after that. Unacceptable performance.
Eased forward early, settling just behind midfield, 1 off the fence. Finished off strongly when asked from the 250m.

Pushed forward early before dropping back to sit forward of midfield, 1 off the fence. Fighting with his jockey throughout and wanted to lay out in the straight, and not pushed out late. Jockey questioned.
Taken up early, before dropping back at 1200m to sit midfield, 3 wide with cover. Only ran on fairly in the straight, and eased late.

Came around the back of the field early, settling around midfield, on the rail. Came wider on the turn, and had an unimpeded run to the line. Strong in the straight, but just lost it in the last 100m.
Fairly away, then pushed forward to sit 2nd/3rd, 2-3 wide. Faded from the 300m, and eased out late.
Dropped back early to sit a clear 2nd last, 3L off the main group. Plugged on OK in the straight and picked up a few slower ones, running on OK in the last 50m.
Settled just behind midfield on rails, kept on at the one pace when tight on rails passing the 200 metre mark, no further impression.
Broke well from the one draw, settled in forward of midfield in 5th over 3L back, in similar position when 7th around the bend, kept on at the same pace. (Blood in trachea)
Taken well back and waited with, commenced move entering home straight, finished off race well to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well, drifted back wide in midfield, remained wide throughout far side, dropped out from home bend. (Tactic questioned)
Settled one back in 3rd on rails, became second though not any closer on straightening, kept on at the one pace.
Pressed forward from the widest gate, obtained rails run in front over 1200 metres out, came under pressure to hold position 200 metres out only to be caught in the final strides.

Broke well, taken back to race with cover towards the rear, commenced move from the Rock improving 3-wide to reach midfield home bend, widest entering straight, sustained effort to prevail by a narrow margin.
Settled in midfield, commenced move passing the Rock gaining to 2L 5th rounding home bend, sustained good progress under pressure in straight, just failed to get up on line.
Settled in last few, made good headway rounding home bend, fought on steadily from over 2L off the lead into the straight.
Began well, settled just off the pace outside the leader, soon faded after straightening.
Raced 3 wide at rear, similar position throughout, failed to close off in straight. (See racing incidents.)
Caught wide in forward of midfield after beginning from a poor draw, settled in 2L 4th from over 1000 metres out, faded under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield along the fence, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M, drifted away 200M to score.
Pushed early but not muster, sat behind midfield, favoured by the fast tempo, on heels 300M, made steady ground 200M.
Eased to rear, favoured by the fast pace, made early move 700M around the field, however raced flat in straight.
Hard ridden forward, pressured the leader, harmed by the fast pace, weakened 250M.
Hard ridden early but not muster, trapped wide in midfield throughout, held ground in straight for 3rd.
Eased back, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M.
Hard ridden forward, not suited by the fast pace, flattened in straight.
Took lead easily, under pressure throughout, clocked fast sectionals, ran on until 200M emptied.
Behind midfield, trapped wide, suited by the fast tempo, no progress.
Hard ridden forward, not suited by the fast tempo, soon out of fuel 300M.
Eased to rear, benefited by the fast pace, never improved.
Hard ridden forward to occupy box seat, ran on well to the line for 2nd.
Raced midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the fence, never ran on.
Raced midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, ran on steadily for 3rd.
Ridden forward to park outside the leader, kept on steadily until weakened final 100M.
Jumped slowly, then rolled to take the fence and led making the Home Turn, kept on until weakened final 150M. (Questioned for riding)
Pushed forward to obtain the box seat, kept on one pace to the line without any serious threat.
Always at rear, never a factor.
Eased to midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, dashed well for 2nd, missed by a neck.
Pressed forward to settle in a prominent spot with cover from a wide draw, ran on nicely to score by a neck.
At back, travelled 7Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, made some ground in straight.
Raced midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 3 wide with cover, ran on gradually for 4th.
At back always, never looked likely.
Pushed forward to share the lead on the fence, dropped off rounding the Home Turn, tailed out. (Bled)
Taken back at break to park midfield 1 off with cover, checked off heels 850m, shifted out home turn & driven centre track, rattled home to just miss 2nd.
Steady start, edged out & hampered rival 1100m, settled last trio 1 off, forced out in close quarters turning in, driven 300m, stayed on for minor headway.
Broke left from widest gate & restrained, sat 3 wide near rear, bustled on outside 450m, driven widest into stretch, kept on for even progress.
Moderate start, impeded early, sat last trio on rail, advanced a spot 600m, ridden when checked outward off heels final turn, no extra.
Speedy break, taken back to midfield 3 wide with cover, checked off heels briefly to 4 wide no cover 850m, driven wide home turn, closed centre track to nick 2nd at line.
Tardy start, bustled a touch to sit midfield on rail, niggled a few strides 880m, ridden on turn when impeded & unbalanced, plugging on again when steadied off heels close home.
Sharp Start, raced 1.5L 2nd 1 off no cover, niggled 400m, driven into stretch, kept on in pursuit, always held, edged out of frame last strides.
Slow start, settled last trio 3 wide, last & driven wide into stretch, one paced in run home.
Moderate start, bustled forward but trapped handy 3 wide without cover, advanced a spot 550m, under pump in 3rd 450m, soon hard driven, plugged on one pace.
Broke ok to fore of midfield 1 off with cover, under pump 500m, one paced in tepid run home.
Speed to lead, soon to rail & dictated, 1.5L up & kicked on turning in, driven out to maintain advantage.
Smart break, parked 1 back on fence, niggled 600m, driven into stretch, outpaced & faded.
Head up slightly at start, eased behind leaders, settled midfield 1 off, short of room 620m, pushed along 500m, made ground steadily, hit lead 50m, drew clear.

Best away, eased to get across from outside gate, 1 off at 1st turn, settled beyond midfield 1 off, overracing slightly, began run 400m, sprinted strongly, laying in onto heels 150m, stuck on solidly.
Fair to begin, throwing head around soon after jump, eased behind, ridden along out of straight, settled beyond midfield on rail, ridden along 600m, steadied 380m, one-paced.
