Began fairly but head up shortly after start, continued to race ungenerously throughout, settled midfield on rail, under pressure 700m, dropped back through field steadily, under vigorous ride 400m, no response.

Slightly slow to begin, ridden to go forward, 5 deep first turn, eased but never closer than 3 deep with cover just ahead of midfield, pulled 4 deep 600m and ridden, short-lived burst, heavy bump 240m, weakened.
Away on terms, early lead, eased to take a trail, sat 2nd 1 off, joined lead 820m, slender lead soon after, keen, joined again 340m, under a ride 300m, boxed on.
Smart getaway, early lead, ridden to press on, stuck 4 deep at first turn, settled 3rd and 4th 3 deep no cover, ridden 380m, offered nothing.
Jumped strongly, lacked early speed, finally mustered at turn, settled 3rd on rail, overracing, short of room 550m, squeezed out 100m, luckless.
Very awkward beginning, 2L slow, settled near rear 1 off, awkwardly placed 980m, back to rear momentarily 850m, asked to improve 550m, under vigorous drive 400m, heavy bump 240m, stayed on fairly.
Missed start by 6L, knuckled and lost further ground, ridden to tack on, up to 2nd last 1 off 850m, relegated to rear again 650m, dropped off thereafter, eased.

Steady break, ridden to press forward, lead at post 1st time 3 deep, pushed on to take sole lead on rail, joined 820m and headed soon after, sat 2nd on inside, recaptured lead 340m and ridden along, headed 200m, battled away.

Good beginning, ridden but unable to muster enough to match early speed from out wide, settled just behind the leaders 1 off, niggled momentarily 800m and again 620m, improved quickly 450m, took lead 200m, claimed 50m, strong effort.
In midfield initially then made early move at 700M, kept on strongly and finished 3/4L behind the winner.
Box-seat early before shuffling back to better than midfield, closed off nicely but was no challenge to first two.
No speed and at the rear, improved to sit outside the lead from 1200M until 600M, found no extra passing 200M.
Eased and travelled in behind midfield, 6-1/2L behind along the rail, one paced only in the run home.
Led until 1300M, then settled in box-seat before dropping back to midfield at 600M, closed off one paced.
Always prominent and assumed lead from 1200M until 600M, however found nothing in the Straight.
Prominent initially, then settled in just behind midfield, 5-1/2L behind 2 wide, ran on well to finish 4th.
Raced in front of midfield, 2-1/2L off 2 wide, out of steam passing 200M.
In midfield before dropping back when others improved in the Back Straight, one paced in the Straight.
At the rear until improved to lead in the Back Straight, pulled away from 500M, ran on to score nicely by 3/4L.
In behind midfield but dropped to the rear when others improved at 800M, made some ground and ran on okay.
Eased and raced at the rear initially, improved to front of midfield from 800M, found nothing in the Straight.
Beaten for early speed and soon clear last. Trailed field thereafter and never competitive.
Broke well, ridden to hold midfield position, one away from rail. Niggled at passed 500m, swung wide entering straight, finished strongly to just miss a placing.
Quickly into stride, shared early pace before taking clear lead passing 800m. Joined up front passing 200m, kept battling until hampered final stages.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing wide without cover until 700m when eased 2L back in 3rd place. Chased leaders in straight until final stages when inconvenienced.
Began OK, ridden to hold rail, settling midfield. Checked passing 600m, left fence 400m to make run, kept on fairly in straight.
Began well, pushed forward sharing early pace before easing 3L back when racing in retracted room 700m. Kept on one-paced under pressure in straight.
Jumped well, shared early pace until 1000m when eased, settling 2L from leader along rail. Got inside run in straight, looked chance 100m, swamped near line.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 3-wide in battle for the lead before settling outside hindquarters of leader passing 700m. Edged ahead under whip 200m and held off late challenge.
Got off OK, ridden to hold forward position, settling one-off 3L from leader. Taken wide in straight but hung in badly under pressure and proved difficult to ride out final 200m.
Jumped with field, steadied and shifted across behind horses, settling one-off towards rear. Began forward movement passing 400m, taken wide in straight, finished strongly to just miss.
Began fairly, no early pace, dropping to behind midfield along fence. Stayed on fence around turn and into straight, but only one-paced.
Outpaced, dropping to rear. Put under pressure from 400m, taken to centre track on straightening, finished strongly to miss narrowly.
Moderately away from the widest draw, unable to slot in, raced wide behind midfield, finished off evenly in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped with them, raced 3 wide in midfield, 4 lengths or so back on turn, carried very wide in straight and finished off one-paced.
Began awkwardly, recovered to race prominently, took the lead near 750M, headed after turning in, emptied and eased thereafter, finished tailed off.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at rear, slightly improved along the rail on turn, no clear running early in straight, taken out after 200M, finished off very strongly to be nearest on line.
Moderately away from gate 1, positioned 2 lengths or so back on rail, kept to inside after straightening, closed off well to score by a neck.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail, still last turning in, made reasonable in straight without threatening the first few.
Began well, raced prominently, 2nd on turn, kept on well early in straight, peaked 150M, weakened thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 7, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide without cover early, got cover on turn, emptied early in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide in 5th, similar position on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, unable to slot in, raced very wide early, still 3 wide without cover turning, failed to close off in straight when hard run took toll. (See Racing Incidents.)
Away with them, raced 2 wide in midfield, there to turn, improved after 400M, made good progress in straight despite being difficult to ride.
Taken back from gate 8, raced at rear, slightly improved on turn, angled out in straight and finished off well to make frame.
Just better than midfield far side, improved to 3 wide 1L back in 4th onto home bend, hit the front 200 metres out only to be overhauled close to home.
Settled in last few, commenced move wide around home bend, sustained progress after straightening, reached 3rd late.
Ridden early but remained well back, effort very wide on the bend, steady progress down the centre of the straight, no extra close to home.
Waited with, finished off race well between runners inside final 250 metres.
Began well, settled in midfield, baulked and switched over 300 metres out, ran on steadily without threatening.
Close up early, gradually dropped to 2L back in 6th on rails, hampered approaching home turn, found nothing from a similar position into straight.
Settled wide in midfield from the widest gate, similar turning in, fought on steadily until hampered about 100 metres out.
Pressed forward early, obtained rails run in front coming out of back straight, steadied pace on the bend, folded up quickly inside final 200 metres.
Jumped well from a middle gate, settled just off the pace outside the leader, shared the pace entering straight, unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 150 metres.
Settled 3 wide in midfield from a wide gate, made short-lived effort rounding home bend, weakened under pressure shortly after straightening.
Settled one back on rails in 3rd, steadied off heels rounding home bend, still not much room after straightening, kept on same pace to the line.
Ridden to 2L 5th early, gave ground steadily after straightening, beaten when checked passing the 200 metres.
Ridden to midfield on rails, hampered and lost position rounding home bend, found nothing in straight.
Settled in last few, quickened well to take charge about 100 metres out.
Pressed forward, harmed by the fast pace, led 300M, ran on strongly until 50M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Hard ridden to maintain a position in front of midfield on the rails, ran on until 200M flattened.
Hard ridden early, raced 3 wide behind midfield, benefited by the fast tempo, no progress.
Eased to rear, raced 3-4 wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 250M.
Pushed early but never muster, 2 wide at back, suited by the fast pace, ran on fairly.
Lack early speed, 2-3 wide at rear, favoured by the fast tempo, lack room 350M, made ground 200M.
Very slow away, hard ridden forward along the fence, harmed by the fast pace, out of fuel 250M.
At back, 3-4 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, ran on fairly in straight.
Eased to rear and took rail, benefited by the fast tempo, made steady ground 300M.
Pushed to obtain a midfield spot, 2 wide, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300M to score.
Occupied a prominent spot in 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, held ground in straight.
Pushed to hold the rail in midfield, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300M for 3rd.
Hard ridden to take rail and led at fast sectionals, ran on until 300M emptied.
Very slow away, suited by the fast pace, but never competitive.
Settled midfield with cover, moved around the field gradually rounding the Home Turn and won comfortably, too classy.
Rolled forward to take the fence and led by 2Ls at fast sections, kept on well until headed by the winner final 250M.
Eased to rear, 6Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, suited by the fast tempo, ran on steadily for a distance 3rd without any serious threat.
Always at back, never a factor.
Raced midfield, 3.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide with cover, despite the fast tempo, never ran on.
Pushed forward to park outside the leader at fast sectionals, dropped off soon after straightening.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, harmed by the fast sectionals, kept on only fairly and weakened final 100M.
Quick to stride , soon rousted & outsped, receded to back of midfield 1 off, advanced on turn & driven to 3rd at 350m, peaked 250m & tapered.
Fast start, parked 1 back on rail, driven & shifted out 400m, outpaced in tepid run home.
Decent start, but shuffled back to midfield 3 wide with cover, niggled wide into stretch, stayed on evenly.
Sharp start & bustled to 2nd but trapped 3 wide no cover, driven to press lead turning in, inched ahead 200m, all out & headed 70m, tapered.
Fast away & eased back to midfield, wide no cover & soon niggled along, widest into stretch & driven, struggled in run home & eased 200m.
Broke with others, raced back of midfield 3 & 4 wide with cover, driven 500m, gradually wound up & stayed on for dashing late inroads.

1L slow at start, difficult to muster early, settled near rear on rail, asked to improve 600m, made ground between runners, short of room 400m, green, accelerated strongly, found line willingly on inside.
Speed wide to lead, soon to rail, shaken up 350m, emptied 200m & headed, tapered to wire.
Slow to begin, back to last, made ground quickly 1050m, checked 850m, settled near rear 1 off, ridden 650m, hard to handle, pulled centre track, held ground.
Broke with others, raced rail midfield, shifted out & driven 400m, angled back inside 350m, plugged on one pace.
Even break, ridden early, eventually eased, posted 5 deep no cover near rear into first turn, eased to 3 deep cover last, hard ridden 600m, dropped out.
Slightly awkward break, roused to pick up, outsped, settled near rear 1 off, green, eased to rail, ridden 650m, dropped off, eased.
Fast start, taken back & soon niggled fore of midfield 1 off with cover, shifted 3 deep turning in & driven, kept on dourly to edge 2nd at line.
Awkward break but bustled forward to 3rd, overraced 880m, sat 1 off no cover, driven turning in, outpaced when crowded out 250m & eased.
Squeezed out at start, slow to muster, eased to rail, settled near rear on inside, roused along 400m, relegated to rear, under hard riding, made ground very late, outpaced.
Fair break, bumped shortly after start, edged forward to settle midfield 1 off, checked slightly 800m, overraced, pulled wide and ridden 400m, outsprinted.
Awkward at start, restrained, ridden along, settled last 1 off, asked to improve 400m, made ground between runners, accelerated strongly last 100m to snatch 5th late.
Eased at start, settled near rear 1 off, under heavy drive 500m, pulled to centre track, wound up very late, made ground when race all over.
Away on terms, squeezed shortly after start, ridden to recover, settled beyond midfield on rail, short of room 480m, stuck to inside, stuck on evenly.
Strong start, crossed fairly easily to lead 1050m 1 off, 1L lead 800m, joined on inside 450m, quickly beaten off, dropped right out.
Away well, ridden along to cross, settled fore of midfield 1 off, ridden along throughout, under heavy drive 500m, green, stayed on.

Even break, roused along but slow to pick up, settled beyond midfield 3 deep, shifted to 1 off 700m, niggled throughout, under heavy ride 500m, shifted widest straight, made solid headway, simply no match, beat rest comfortably.
Good start, eased out of speed battle, sat 4th on rail, under a ride 520m, shifted 4 deep in straight, hung in, boxed on.
Began evenly, settled just beyond midfield 1 off, ridden 900m, lost position, under heavy ride 550m, couldn't go on.
Step slow at start, hard ridden to push forward, settled just ahead of midfield on rail, ridden along 700m, short burst 250m, struggled.
Outpaced at start, ridden along to hold position, settled beyond midfield on rail, ridden 450m, green, weakened.
Easily best to begin, ridden to ensure lead, joined 1080m, rustled to sit 2nd on rail, regained lead 450m, asked for an effort soon after, claimed 320m, fought on but meek last 150m, eased near line.

Began strongly, ridden to cross, joined lead momentarily but soon crossed, sat 3rd 1 off, travelled strongly throughout, pulled 3 deep in straight, joined leaders 320m, raced away for effortless victory.
Settled in front of midfield, 3-1/4L off 2 wide, kept on one paced in the run home for 3rd.
Raced towards the rear, 6-1/2L behind 2 wide, swung widest and closed off strongly from 250M to score.
Travelled at the rear, 8L behind the lead along the rail, made good ground and finished off nicely.
Raced in midfield, 4-1/4L off but trapped 3 wide without cover, improved slightly around turn, dropped off at 250M.
Travelled in slightly behind midfield, 4-3/4L behind 2 wide, not competitive in the Straight.
Raced inside the leader along the rail, kept on until 250M and then eased down.
In front of midfield but wide initially, improved to lead one-off the rail at 1000M, found no extra and headed at 150M.
Slotted into midfield, 3-3/4L behind along the fence, awkward to heels at 350M, kept on thereafter to finish 4th.
Sat outside the lead until 900M when shuffled back to one-off one-back position, weakened near 150M.
Took up box-seat, sat 2L off the lead, gradually faded upon straightening.
Settled in worse than midfield, 5-1/4L behind along the rail, only once paced in the run home.
Eased back and raced at the rear, 6-3/4L behind along the rail, ran on nicely but was no match to the winner.
Broke well, shared pace to first turn before settling along rail 3L from leader. Caught in traffic jam top of straight and didn't get clear run until final 100m. Not properly tested.
Crowded out start, recovered and pressed forward, settling between horses 4L from leader. Under pressure from 700m when 3-wide, losing ground steadily.

Got off well but eased back and taken to rail towards the rear. Left fence passing 600m, bumped and unbalanced 500m, hard ridden from 400m but didn't pick up till 150m when switched out and finished strongly.
Steadied shortly after start and shifted across behind runners, dropping towards rear in one-off position, lay in and bumped around turn, boxed on one-paced in straight.
Pressed forward from outside draw, racing 4-wide at first turn. Still without cover turning into back stretch and allowed to roll forward to sit 2L behind leader 1000m. Plugged on gamely in straight.
Bumped and unbalanced shortly after start, dropping to last pair away from fence. Trailed field thereafter without looking competitive.
Ridden to hold forward position, settling one-off in midfield about 4L from leader. Rolled forward turning for home, kept on steadily to 100m when flattened and faded.
Steadied and shifted across behind runners soon after start and last on settling. Trailed field to straight, switched out to centre track and ran on fairly.

Began well, ridden to hold forward position, settling outside hindquarters of leader back stretch. Hard ridden on straightening and under whip 250m, making up ground gradually to snatch second close home.
Hard ridden from outside draw to lead on settling. Set steady pace to straight, kicked 2L clear 350m but ran out of puff 50m and swamped. Had substantial amount of blood in trachea.
Began well, not pushed, settling behind midfield along fence. Lost position around turn, taken wide in straight, boxed on one-paced.
Hard ridden to hold forward position, settling in box seat 2L from leader. Under pressure soon after straightening, losing ground steadily.
Broke with field but beaten for early pace, dropping to behind midfield but away from fence. Began forward move 700m, turned wide, swooped around field to lead 100m, edging ahead at line.
Pressed forward from an outside draw, taking first turn three-wide before setting one-off, 3L from leader. Shaken up top of straight and boxed on gamely without threatening leaders.
Began fairly, raced 2 away from the stand rail in 5th, no response to riding final 300M and weakened thereafter.
Slowly away, positioned 3 lengths or so back on the stands rail, taken to the middle of the track after 400M for clear running, finished off evenly.
Bumped start, raced 2 lengths or so back on the stands rail, finished off well, just missed 2nd.
Jumped well from gate 10, positioned 1 away from the stands rail in 3rd, peaked 400M and weakened thereafter, checked near final 100M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Taken back from gate 2, raced 6 lengths back at tail, failed to close off, never competitive.
Moderately away from gate 1, raced at rear nearer to the middle of the track, made good progress final 300M to make frame.
Away with them, raced behind midfield, closer to the middle of the track, finished off evenly.
Taken back to race at at rear, 1 away from the stands rail, gradually carried to the middle of the track after 400M, finished off evenly without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began awkwardly and bumped, raced 5 lengths or so back at rear, taken to the middle of the track after 350M and finished off evenly.
Jumped well from gate 4, showed early speed to race prominently, peaked 400M and dropped away tamely thereafter.
Jumped well from gate 5, raced closer to the middle of the track, a length or so back with no cover, travelled well throughout, hit the front near 250M and scored easily.
Jumped well from gate 14, showed early speed to race prominently on the stands rail, kept on well until final 250M, emptied thereafter. (Roarer)
Jumped with them, raced in midfield nearer to the middle of the track, 2 lengths or so back, improved from 300M, finished off well to take 2nd, never a threat to the winner.
Bumped start, raced in midfield nearer to the stands rail, no clear running near 350M, emptied thereafter.
Restrained soon after start and shifted across, settling at rear in one-off position. Switched out entering final turn to make run but only one-paced in straight.
Quickly into stride, racing inside leader to 1300m before taking box seat. Dropped back to 5th passing 850m, gave ground quickly around turn, finished tailed out. Unacceptable performance.
Restrained on jumping and shifted across behind runners, settling last. Became detached from field 1100m when tempo increased, tagged on to tai lenders 350m and ran past beaten horses.
Slow from the gate, recovered and pressed forward, settling midfield 4L from leader. Allowed to roll forward from 600m, 4-wide into straight, boxed on steadily without looking dangerous.

Began well, racing with pace before sliding into box seat first turn. Lost position back stretch when others moved forward, dropping to behind midfield. Left fence 600m, then chased winner final 400m without closing gap.
Away quickly, sharing early pace before settling one-off, 2L from leader. Got shuffled back approaching 1000m, straightened behind horses, switched out 350m and ran on steadily to grab minor placing.

Broke well, restrained to find cover but trapped 3-wide at rear. Allowed to roll forward from 1200m, circled field to race outside leader 1000m. Boxed on gamely to 200m when ran out of stamina and faded.

Steadied soon after start and shifted across behind runners, dropping to rear but away from fence. Trapped 3-wide 1000m when rivals moved forward. Taken to centre track on straightening and ran on steadily.
Slow into stride, recovered, pressed forward, settling along rail in midfield. Dropped to rear back stretch as rivals moved forward, one-paced in straight.

Jumped with field, pressed forward but held wide in midfield. Caught without cover passing 1000m and allowed to roll forward. Hit the front 400m out and kept finding when challenged for comfortable win.

Broke well, pressed forward to lead 1800m but kept away from fence by inside runner. Got clear 1300m and crossed to fence, but pushed back to 3rd 880m when two others moved forward. Spent force 300m and faded.
Hard ridden to hold forward position, settling one-back, one-out back stretch. Held position when back-markers moved forward 1200m, looked chance entering straight, one-paced final 200m.

Hard ridden to go forward, taking first turn 4-wide before settling 3-wide 2L from leader 1200m. Urged forward passing 1100m to lead 1000m, crossing to fence 850m. Collared early in straight but kept on to 200m before tiring.
Eased out early, settling around midfield, on the fence. Stayed on solidly in the straight, kicking late and almost stole 3rd despite losing his whip at the 200m.
Stumbled early and travelled 5 wide into the first turn, before settling at the rear of the field, 4-5 wide with limited cover. Race was over by the home turn, and eased to the line late.
Fairly away and settled towards the rear of the field, 1 off the fence. Only fair in the straight, and plodded to the line late.
Taken up from the wide draw to set the tempo in front. Tried to make all, but taken by winner at the 100m and couldn't respond.

Crowded and checked on jumping and dropped back to sit at the rear of the field. Off heels at 1300m, and became unsettled. Ridden for luck in the straight, but struggled for a run and only got clear last 150m. Jockey questioned.
Taken up early to be handily paced 4th, 1 off the fence. Pushed up to challenge leaders on the turn, but faded out in the last 150m.
Taken up from the inside draw to be handily placed 3rd, closest to the fence. Stayed on OK and just held 3rd late.
Settled worse than midfield, 3-4 wide. Squeezed out of a run at 250m, and didn't get clear until 200m. Ran strongly over last 100m, but had too much to make up. Came off heels on the line.
Cruised forward early, settling just behind midfield, 1 off the fence. Pushed forward from the 500m, and came wider in the straight. Solid in the straight without threatening, and eased late.
Got back early, before pushing forward to sit midfield, 5 wide with no cover. Came wider on the turn, but gave nothing in the straight and was eased late.
Crowded on jumping and got back to eventually find a position worse than midfield, on the fence. 1 paced in the straight and dropped out last 100m.
Taken forward from the wide draw to gab the box seat behind the leader, 1 off and 1 back. Ran solidly in the straight, before picking up the bit in the last 150m and winning strongly.
Eased back early, settling towards the rear of the field, 3-4 wide. Lay in at the top of the straight. Never responded to pressure and only went to the line fairly. Vet- Blood in trachea.
Pushed forward early to settle midfield, 1 off the fence. Keen on heels, and came off to be placed 3-4 wide no cover from 1000m. Race was run by the turn, and not pushed out in the straight.
Away with them, raced 2 wide behind midfield, 6 lengths back on turn, angled out early in straight and finished off well, pleasing debut.
Very slow start, raced 8 lengths back at rear, slightly improved from 600M, showed no progress in straight.
Average to begin, raced 2 wide, 2 lengths back in 5th, there to turn, no clear running early in straight, not able to be fully tested in the concluding stages.
Moderately away from a tricky gate, taken back to race at rear, difficult to settle near 1000M, still 2 wide, 5 lengths or so back on turn, finished off evenly.
Jumped well from the widest draw, unable to slot in, raced 3 wide with no cover in 3rd, there to turn, kept on very well in straight, just missed 2nd.
Slowly away, raced 7 lengths back at rear, still very back on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Jumped well, raced outside the leader in 2nd, similar position on turn, kept on evenly in straight.
Taken back from gate 12, raced 6 lengths back at rear, slightly improved from 900M, 5 lengths back turning in, in traffic near 300M, closed off evenly thereafter.
Began awkwardly, recovered to take the lead, travelled well on turn, headed near 250M, weakened thereafter.
Taken back from a wide draw, raced at tail throughout, found nothing in straight, tailed off.
Away with them, raced 4 lengths back on rail in midfield, similar position on turn, showed no progress in straight and checked near 200M.
Jumped with them, raced 1 to 2 lengths back on rail, saved ground on turn, failed to close off in straight.
Moderately away, raced 2 to 3 lengths back in 6th, 3 wide with cover on turn, finished off well to score with some in tank.
Moderately away from a wide draw, unable to slot in early, taken back to race 2 wide in midfield, angled out in straight and made good progress to make frame.
